🎯 Nu JavaScript Client Library Maken
Dit is wat frontend developers gaan gebruiken!

bash
cat > docs/websocket-client.js << 'EOF'
/**
 * MCC WebSocket Client
 * Simple client for connecting to MCC real-time streams
 */

class MCCWebSocketClient {
  constructor(baseUrl = 'ws://localhost:8000') {
    this.baseUrl = baseUrl
    this.ws = null
    this.listeners = new Map()
    this.connected = false
    this.reconnectInterval = 3000
    this.maxReconnectAttempts = 5
    this.reconnectAttempts = 0
  }

  async connect(endpoint) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      try {
        const url = `${this.baseUrl}${endpoint}`
        console.log(`[MCC] Connecting to ${url}`)
        
        this.ws = new WebSocket(url)
        
        this.ws.onopen = () => {
          console.log(`[MCC] Connected to ${endpoint}`)
          this.connected = true
          this.reconnectAttempts = 0
          resolve()
        }
        
        this.ws.onmessage = (event) => {
          this._handleMessage(event.data)
        }
        
        this.ws.onerror = (error) => {
          console.error('[MCC] WebSocket error:', error)
          reject(error)
        }
        
        this.ws.onclose = () => {
          console.warn('[MCC] Connection closed')
          this.connected = false
          this._attemptReconnect(endpoint)
        }
      } catch (error) {
        reject(error)
      }
    })
  }

  _handleMessage(data) {
    try {
      const message = JSON.parse(data)
      const { type, timestamp, data: messageData } = message
      
      console.log(`[MCC] Received ${type} at ${timestamp}`)
      
      const callbacks = this.listeners.get(type) || []
      callbacks.forEach(callback => {
        try {
          callback(messageData, timestamp)
        } catch (error) {
          console.error(`[MCC] Error in ${type} listener:`, error)
        }
      })
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('[MCC] Failed to parse message:', error)
    }
  }

  on(type, callback) {
    if (!this.listeners.has(type)) {
      this.listeners.set(type, [])
    }
    this.listeners.get(type).push(callback)
    console.log(`[MCC] Registered listener for ${type}`)
  }

  off(type, callback) {
    const callbacks = this.listeners.get(type) || []
    const index = callbacks.indexOf(callback)
    if (index > -1) {
      callbacks.splice(index, 1)
    }
  }

  disconnect() {
    if (this.ws) {
      this.ws.close()
      this.ws = null
      this.connected = false
      console.log('[MCC] Disconnected')
    }
  }

  _attemptReconnect(endpoint) {
    if (this.reconnectAttempts >= this.maxReconnectAttempts) {
      console.error('[MCC] Max reconnection attempts reached')
      return
    }
    
    this.reconnectAttempts++
    const delay = this.reconnectInterval * Math.pow(2, this.reconnectAttempts - 1)
    
    console.log(`[MCC] Reconnecting in ${delay}ms`)
    
    setTimeout(() => {
      this.connect(endpoint)
        .catch(error => console.error('[MCC] Reconnection failed:', error))
    }, delay)
  }

  isConnected() {
    return this.connected && this.ws && this.ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN
  }
}

// React Hook Example
function useMCCWebSocket(endpoint = '/ws/all', baseUrl = 'ws://localhost:8000') {
  const [events, setEvents] = React.useState([])
  const [alerts, setAlerts] = React.useState([])
  const [health, setHealth] = React.useState(null)
  const [stats, setStats] = React.useState(null)
  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = React.useState(false)
  const clientRef = React.useRef(null)

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const client = new MCCWebSocketClient(baseUrl)
    clientRef.current = client

    client.on('task_event', (data) => {
      setEvents(prev => [data, ...prev].slice(0, 100))
    })

    client.on('alert', (data) => {
      setAlerts(prev => [data, ...prev].slice(0, 50))
    })

    client.on('health', (data) => {
      setHealth(data)
    })

    client.on('stats', (data) => {
      setStats(data)
    })

    client.connect(endpoint)
      .then(() => setIsConnected(true))
      .catch(error => console.error('Failed to connect:', error))

    return () => {
      client.disconnect()
    }
  }, [endpoint, baseUrl])

  return { events, alerts, health, stats, isConnected }
}

// Export for use in other modules
if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
  module.exports = { MCCWebSocketClient, useMCCWebSocket }
}
EOF
ENTER.

bash
cat > app/db/models.py << 'EOF'
from sqlalchemy import Column, String, DateTime, Integer, Boolean, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
from datetime import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    hashed_password = Column(String)
    is_active = Column(Boolean, default=True)
    is_admin = Column(Boolean, default=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

class Task(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tasks"
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    task_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    project_id = Column(String, index=True)
    status = Column(String)
    owner_agent = Column(String)
    owner_layer = Column(String)
    assigned_to = Column(String, nullable=True)
    domain = Column(String, nullable=True)
    trace_link = Column(String, nullable=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)
    is_overdue = Column(Boolean, default=False)
    error_message = Column(String, nullable=True)

class Agent(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agents"
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    layer = Column(String)
    status = Column(String)
    current_task = Column(String, nullable=True)
    task_count_active = Column(Integer, default=0)
    task_count_completed = Column(Integer, default=0)
    last_activity = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

class Project(Base):
    __tablename__ = "projects"
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    project_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=True)
    task_count_total = Column(Integer, default=0)
    task_count_completed = Column(Integer, default=0)
    progress_percent = Column(Integer, default=0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)
    status = Column(String, default="IN_PROGRESS")

class Alert(Base):
    __tablename__ = "alerts"
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    alert_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    alert_type = Column(String)
    severity = Column(String)
    title = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    is_active = Column(Boolean, default=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    resolved_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)
EOF
ENTER.

    alert_type = Column(String)

Nu gaan we snel FASE 2 files maken. Dit gaat HEEL snel want we doen het in bulk.

Ik ga je één mega-script geven dat alles in één keer maakt:

bash
python3 << 'ENDPHASE2'
import os

# 1. Database init
db_init = '''from sqlalchemy import create_engine
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker
from app.db.models import Base
import os

DATABASE_URL = os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", "postgresql://mcc_user:mcc_secure_password_2026@localhost/mcc_db")

engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL, echo=False)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

def init_db():
    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()
'''

with open('app/db/database.py', 'w') as f:
    f.write(db_init)

# 2. Security module
security = '''from passlib.context import CryptContext
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Optional
import os
from jose import JWTError, jwt

pwd_context = CryptContext(schemes=["bcrypt"], deprecated="auto")

SECRET_KEY = os.getenv("SECRET_KEY", "your-secret-key-change-in-production")
ALGORITHM = "HS256"
ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES = 30

def verify_password(plain_password: str, hashed_password: str) -> bool:
    return pwd_context.verify(plain_password, hashed_password)

def get_password_hash(password: str) -> str:
    return pwd_context.hash(password)

def create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: Optional[timedelta] = None):
    to_encode = data.copy()
    if expires_delta:
        expire = datetime.utcnow() + expires_delta
    else:
        expire = datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(minutes=15)
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    encoded_jwt = jwt.encode(to_encode, SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)
    return encoded_jwt

def decode_access_token(token: str):
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM])
        return payload
    except JWTError:
        return None
'''

with open('app/security.py', 'w') as f:
    f.write(security)

# 3. Update requirements.txt

uvicorn[standard]==0.24.0
pydantic==2.5.0

db_init = '''from sqlalchemy import create_engine
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker
from app.db.models import Base
import os

DATABASE_URL = os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", "postgresql://mcc_user:mcc_secure_password_2026@localhost/mcc_db")

def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()

security = '''from passlib.context import CryptContext
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Optional
import os
from jose import JWTError, jwt

pwd_context = CryptContext(schemes=["bcrypt"], deprecated="auto")

SECRET_KEY = os.getenv("SECRET_KEY", "your-secret-key-change-in-production")
ALGORITHM = "HS256"
ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES = 30

def verify_password(plain_password: str, hashed_password: str) -> bool:
    return pwd_context.verify(plain_password, hashed_password)

def get_password_hash(password: str) -> str:
    return pwd_context.hash(password)

def create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: Optional[timedelta] = None):
    to_encode = data.copy()
    if expires_delta:
        expire = datetime.utcnow() + expires_delta
    else:
        expire = datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(minutes=15)
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    encoded_jwt = jwt.encode(to_encode, SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)
    return encoded_jwt

def decode_access_token(token: str):
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM])
        return payload
    except JWTError:
        return None
'''

📊 STAP 1: Analytics Engine

bash

# Analytics module for FASE 3

ENTER.

bash
cat > app/analytics/engine.py << 'EOF'
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Dict, List
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from app.db.models import Task, Agent, Project, Alert
from app.data_engine.models import TaskStatus, AgentStatus

class AnalyticsEngine:
    def __init__(self, db: Session):
        self.db = db
    
    def get_task_metrics(self) -> Dict:
        """Get comprehensive task metrics"""
        tasks = self.db.query(Task).all()
        
        return {
            "total_tasks": len(tasks),
            "completed": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "COMPLETED"]),
            "in_progress": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "IN_PROGRESS"]),
            "blocked": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "BLOCKED"]),
            "failed": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "FAILED"]),
            "completion_rate": self._calculate_completion_rate(tasks),
            "average_duration": self._calculate_avg_duration(tasks),
            "overdue_count": len([t for t in tasks if t.is_overdue]),
        }
    
    def get_agent_metrics(self) -> Dict:
        """Get comprehensive agent metrics"""
        agents = self.db.query(Agent).all()
        
        return {
            "total_agents": len(agents),
            "active_agents": len([a for a in agents if a.status == "ACTIVE"]),
            "idle_agents": len([a for a in agents if a.status == "IDLE"]),
            "stale_agents": len([a for a in agents if a.status == "STALE"]),
            "total_tasks_processed": sum([a.task_count_completed for a in agents]),
            "avg_tasks_per_agent": sum([a.task_count_completed for a in agents]) / max(len(agents), 1),
        }
    
    def get_project_metrics(self) -> Dict:
        """Get comprehensive project metrics"""
        projects = self.db.query(Project).all()
        
        return {
            "total_projects": len(projects),
            "in_progress": len([p for p in projects if p.status == "IN_PROGRESS"]),
            "completed": len([p for p in projects if p.status == "COMPLETED"]),
            "avg_completion_percent": sum([p.progress_percent for p in projects]) / max(len(projects), 1),
        }
    
    def get_system_health(self) -> Dict:
        """Get overall system health score"""
        task_metrics = self.get_task_metrics()
        agent_metrics = self.get_agent_metrics()
        alerts = self.db.query(Alert).filter(Alert.is_active == True).all()
        
        health_score = 100
        
        # Deduct for blocked tasks
        if task_metrics["blocked"] > 0:
            health_score -= task_metrics["blocked"] * 5
        
        # Deduct for failed tasks
        if task_metrics["failed"] > 0:
            health_score -= task_metrics["failed"] * 3
        
        # Deduct for stale agents
        if agent_metrics["stale_agents"] > 0:
            health_score -= agent_metrics["stale_agents"] * 2
        
        # Deduct for critical alerts
        critical_alerts = len([a for a in alerts if a.severity == "CRITICAL"])
        health_score -= critical_alerts * 10
        
        health_score = max(0, min(100, health_score))
        
        return {
            "health_score": health_score,
            "status": "healthy" if health_score >= 80 else "degraded" if health_score >= 50 else "critical",
            "task_metrics": task_metrics,
            "agent_metrics": agent_metrics,
            "active_alerts": len(alerts),
        }
    
    def get_timeline_events(self, hours: int = 24) -> List[Dict]:
        """Get events from past N hours"""
        cutoff = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(hours=hours)
        tasks = self.db.query(Task).filter(Task.updated_at >= cutoff).all()
        
        return [
            {
                "task_id": t.task_id,
                "status": t.status,
                "timestamp": t.updated_at.isoformat(),
                "duration": (t.updated_at - t.created_at).total_seconds(),
            }
            for t in sorted(tasks, key=lambda x: x.updated_at, reverse=True)
        ]
    
    def _calculate_completion_rate(self, tasks: List) -> float:
        if not tasks:
            return 0.0
        completed = len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "COMPLETED"])
        return (completed / len(tasks)) * 100
    
    def _calculate_avg_duration(self, tasks: List) -> float:
        completed_tasks = [t for t in tasks if t.status == "COMPLETED" and t.created_at]
        if not completed_tasks:
            return 0.0
        durations = [(t.updated_at - t.created_at).total_seconds() for t in completed_tasks]
        return sum(durations) / len(durations)
EOF
ENTER.

bash
cat > app/api/analytics_routes.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from app.db.database import get_db
from app.analytics.engine import AnalyticsEngine

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/analytics", tags=["analytics"])

@router.get("/metrics/tasks")
async def get_task_metrics(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get task metrics"""
    engine = AnalyticsEngine(db)
    return engine.get_task_metrics()

@router.get("/metrics/agents")
async def get_agent_metrics(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get agent metrics"""
    engine = AnalyticsEngine(db)
    return engine.get_agent_metrics()

@router.get("/metrics/projects")
async def get_project_metrics(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get project metrics"""
    engine = AnalyticsEngine(db)
    return engine.get_project_metrics()

@router.get("/health")
async def get_system_health(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get system health score"""
    engine = AnalyticsEngine(db)
    return engine.get_system_health()

@router.get("/timeline")
async def get_timeline(hours: int = 24, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get event timeline"""
    engine = AnalyticsEngine(db)
    return {"events": engine.get_timeline_events(hours)}

@router.get("/dashboard")
async def get_dashboard_data(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get all dashboard data in one call"""
    engine = AnalyticsEngine(db)
    health = engine.get_system_health()
    timeline = engine.get_timeline_events()
    
    return {
        "health": health,
        "timeline": timeline,
        "timestamp": "2026-04-22T15:45:00Z",
    }
EOF

bash
cat > app/main.py << 'EOF'
import os
import logging
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from app.config import settings
from app.data_engine import DataEngine
from app.api import routes
from app.api import analytics_routes
from app.core.websocket import init_connection_manager
from app.core.websocket_routes import ws_router
from app.db.database import init_db

logging.basicConfig(
    level=getattr(logging, settings.LOG_LEVEL),
    format='%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'
)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

_engine: DataEngine = None

@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    global _engine
    logger.info("Starting MCC Backend - FASE 3 ULTIMATE")
    
    # Init Database Tables
    try:
        init_db()
        logger.info("Database tables initialized")
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"Database init: {e}")
    
    # Init WebSocket
    init_connection_manager()
    logger.info("WebSocket manager initialized")
    
    # Init Data Engine
    events_file = os.getenv("EVENTS_FILE", "data/sample_events.jsonl")
    _engine = DataEngine(events_file=events_file)
    init_stats = _engine.initialize()
    
    logger.info(f"Engine initialized: {init_stats}")
    routes.init_engine(_engine)
    
    yield
    logger.info("Shutting down MCC Backend")

app = FastAPI(
    title="MCC Backend - FASE 3 Ultimate",
    description="Mission Control Center for ARC AI ANGELS - Complete System",
    version="3.0.0",
    lifespan=lifespan,
)

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

app.include_router(routes.router)
app.include_router(analytics_routes.router)
app.include_router(ws_router)

@app.get("/")
async def root():
    return {
        "message": "MCC Backend — Mission Control Center FASE 3",
        "version": "3.0.0",
        "phase": "Ultimate",
        "status": "operational",
        "features": [
            "REST API with 14+ endpoints",
            "WebSocket Real-time Streaming",
            "PostgreSQL Database",
            "Advanced Analytics",
            "Digital Twin Ready",
            "Voice Integration Ready",
        ],
        "docs": "/docs",
        "api": "/api",
        "analytics": "/api/analytics",
        "websocket": "/ws/status",
    }

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    port = int(os.getenv("PORT", "8000"))
    uvicorn.run("app.main:app", host="0.0.0.0", port=port, reload=True)
EOF

Nu gaan we Digital Twin Visualizer bouwen (visueel system)!

bash
cat > app/analytics/digital_twin.py << 'EOF'
from typing import Dict, List
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from app.db.models import Task, Agent, Project, Alert
from datetime import datetime

class DigitalTwin:
    """Visual representation of the MCC system"""
    
    def __init__(self, db: Session):
        self.db = db
    
    def get_system_graph(self) -> Dict:
        """Get system as graph (nodes and edges)"""
        agents = self.db.query(Agent).all()
        tasks = self.db.query(Task).all()
        
        nodes = []
        edges = []
        
        # Agent nodes
        for agent in agents:
            nodes.append({
                "id": agent.agent_id,
                "type": "agent",
                "label": agent.agent_id,
                "layer": agent.layer,
                "status": agent.status,
                "current_task": agent.current_task,
                "x": hash(agent.agent_id) % 100,
                "y": hash(agent.layer) % 100,
            })
        
        # Task nodes
        for task in tasks:
            nodes.append({
                "id": task.task_id,
                "type": "task",
                "label": task.task_id,
                "status": task.status,
                "project": task.project_id,
                "x": hash(task.task_id) % 100,
                "y": hash(task.project_id) % 100,
            })
        
        # Edges (task assignments)
        for task in tasks:
            if task.assigned_to:
                edges.append({
                    "from": task.task_id,
                    "to": task.assigned_to,
                    "label": "assigned_to",
                    "color": "green" if task.status == "COMPLETED" else "orange" if task.status == "IN_PROGRESS" else "red",
                })
        
        return {
            "nodes": nodes,
            "edges": edges,
            "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
        }
    
    def get_hierarchy_view(self) -> Dict:
        """Get ARC hierarchy visualization"""
        agents = self.db.query(Agent).all()
        
        layers = {}
        for agent in agents:
            layer = agent.layer
            if layer not in layers:
                layers[layer] = []
            layers[layer].append({
                "agent_id": agent.agent_id,
                "status": agent.status,
                "tasks_active": agent.task_count_active,
                "tasks_completed": agent.task_count_completed,
            })
        
        hierarchy = [
            "supreme_fea",
            "nova",
            "flux",
            "omni",
            "sentinel",
            "worker"
        ]
        
        return {
            "hierarchy": [{"layer": layer, "agents": layers.get(layer, [])} for layer in hierarchy],
            "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
        }
    
    def get_flow_visualization(self) -> Dict:
        """Get task flow through system"""
        tasks = self.db.query(Task).all()
        
        flow = {
            "CREATED": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "CREATED"]),
            "ROUTED": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "ROUTED"]),
            "IN_PROGRESS": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "IN_PROGRESS"]),
            "BLOCKED": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "BLOCKED"]),
            "FAILED": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "FAILED"]),
            "COMPLETED": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "COMPLETED"]),
            "ARCHIVED": len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "ARCHIVED"]),
        }
        
        return {
            "flow": flow,
            "total": len(tasks),
            "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
        }
    
    def get_heatmap(self) -> Dict:
        """Get agent workload heatmap"""
        agents = self.db.query(Agent).all()
        
        heatmap = []
        for agent in agents:
            workload_percent = min(100, (agent.task_count_active * 20))
            
            heatmap.append({
                "agent_id": agent.agent_id,
                "layer": agent.layer,
                "workload_percent": workload_percent,
                "status": agent.status,
                "active_tasks": agent.task_count_active,
            })
        
        return {
            "heatmap": heatmap,
            "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
        }
EOF
ENTER.

from app.analytics.digital_twin import DigitalTwin

@router.get("/digital-twin/graph")
async def get_system_graph(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get system as graph visualization"""
    twin = DigitalTwin(db)
    return twin.get_system_graph()

@router.get("/digital-twin/hierarchy")

    """Get ARC hierarchy visualization"""
    twin = DigitalTwin(db)
    return twin.get_hierarchy_view()

@router.get("/digital-twin/flow")
async def get_flow(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get task flow visualization"""
    twin = DigitalTwin(db)
    return twin.get_flow_visualization()

@router.get("/digital-twin/heatmap")
async def get_heatmap(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get agent workload heatmap"""
    twin = DigitalTwin(db)
    return twin.get_heatmap()

@router.get("/digital-twin/full")
async def get_full_twin(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get complete digital twin visualization"""
    twin = DigitalTwin(db)
    return {
        "graph": twin.get_system_graph(),
        "hierarchy": twin.get_hierarchy_view(),
        "flow": twin.get_flow_visualization(),
        "heatmap": twin.get_heatmap(),
    }

bash
cat > app/analytics/voice.py << 'EOF'
from typing import Dict, Optional
from datetime import datetime
import json

class VoiceEngine:
    """Text-to-Speech and Voice Alert System"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.alerts_queue = []
    
    def generate_alert_voice(self, alert_type: str, title: str, description: str) -> Dict:
        """Generate voice alert message"""
        
        # Map alert types to voice urgency
        urgency_map = {
            "CRITICAL": "URGENT",
            "WARNING": "ATTENTION",
            "INFO": "NOTICE",
        }
        
        urgency = urgency_map.get(alert_type, "NOTICE")
        
        # Generate natural speech text
        speech_text = f"{urgency}. {title}. {description}"
        
        voice_alert = {
            "id": f"voice_{datetime.utcnow().timestamp()}",
            "text": speech_text,
            "urgency": urgency,
            "alert_type": alert_type,
            "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
            "ssml": self._generate_ssml(speech_text, urgency),
        }
        
        self.alerts_queue.append(voice_alert)
        return voice_alert
    
    def _generate_ssml(self, text: str, urgency: str) -> str:
        """Generate SSML (Speech Synthesis Markup Language)"""
        
        rate_map = {
            "URGENT": "1.5",
            "ATTENTION": "1.2",
            "NOTICE": "1.0",
        }
        
        rate = rate_map.get(urgency, "1.0")
        pitch = "high" if urgency == "URGENT" else "medium"
        
        return f'''<speak>
            <prosody rate="{rate}" pitch="{pitch}">
                {text}
            </prosody>
        </speak>'''
    
    def get_pending_alerts(self) -> list:
        """Get pending voice alerts"""
        return self.alerts_queue
    
    def clear_alerts(self) -> int:
        """Clear processed alerts"""
        count = len(self.alerts_queue)
        self.alerts_queue = []
        return count
    
    def system_status_voice(self, health_score: int, active_alerts: int) -> Dict:
        """Generate system status voice report"""
        
        if health_score >= 80:
            status_text = "System is healthy and operating normally"
        elif health_score >= 50:
            status_text = "System is degraded. Some issues detected"
        else:
            status_text = "System is critical. Immediate attention required"
        
        alert_text = f"You have {active_alerts} active alert" + ("s" if active_alerts != 1 else "")
        
        speech_text = f"{status_text}. {alert_text}. Health score is {health_score} percent."
        
        return {
            "id": f"voice_status_{datetime.utcnow().timestamp()}",
            "text": speech_text,
            "health_score": health_score,
            "active_alerts": active_alerts,
            "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
            "ssml": self._generate_ssml(speech_text, "ATTENTION"),
        }

# Global voice engine instance
_voice_engine: Optional[VoiceEngine] = None

def init_voice_engine():
    global _voice_engine
    _voice_engine = VoiceEngine()

def get_voice_engine() -> VoiceEngine:
    if _voice_engine is None:
        init_voice_engine()
    return _voice_engine
EOF

from app.analytics.voice import get_voice_engine

@router.post("/voice/alert")
async def generate_voice_alert(alert_type: str, title: str, description: str):
    """Generate voice alert"""
    engine = get_voice_engine()
    return engine.generate_alert_voice(alert_type, title, description)

@router.get("/voice/pending")
async def get_pending_voice_alerts():
    """Get pending voice alerts"""
    engine = get_voice_engine()
    return {"alerts": engine.get_pending_alerts()}

@router.post("/voice/status")
async def get_system_status_voice(health_score: int, active_alerts: int):
    """Get system status as voice"""
    engine = get_voice_engine()
    return engine.system_status_voice(health_score, active_alerts)

@router.post("/voice/clear")
async def clear_voice_alerts():
    """Clear processed alerts"""
    engine = get_voice_engine()
    cleared = engine.clear_alerts()
    return {"cleared": cleared}
EOF

bash
cat > ../frontend/src/index.css << 'EOF'
* {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
  background: #0f172a;
  color: #e2e8f0;
}

.dashboard {
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 20px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1a202c 100%);
}

.header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
  padding: 20px;
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.header h1 {
  font-size: 32px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  color: #60a5fa;
}

.header p {
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.status-bar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.status-card {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 200px;
  padding: 20px;
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.status-card:hover {
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8);
  border-color: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3);
}

.status-card h3 {
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-size: 12px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.status-card .value {
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #60a5fa;
}

.status-card .label {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 12px;
  margin-top: 5px;
}

.health-score {
  width: 100%;
  height: 8px;
  background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  border-radius: 4px;
  margin-top: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.health-score-bar {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #60a5fa);
  transition: width 0.3s ease;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(500px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.card {
  padding: 20px;
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.card h2 {
  color: #60a5fa;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  font-size: 18px;
}

.metrics-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 15px;
}

.metric {
  padding: 15px;
  background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.05);
}

.metric-label {
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-size: 12px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.metric-value {
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #60a5fa;
}

.hierarchy {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
}

.layer {
  padding: 10px;
  background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
  border-left: 3px solid #60a5fa;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.layer-name {
  color: #60a5fa;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.layer-agents {
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.flow-container {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.flow-item {
  padding: 10px 15px;
  background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
  border: 1px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3);
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #60a5fa;
}

.flow-item .count {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: bold;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.arrow {
  color: #60a5fa;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.loading {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 40px;
  color: #94a3b8;
}

.spinner {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  border: 3px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3);
  border-top-color: #60a5fa;
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes spin {
  to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

.alert {
  padding: 15px;
  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1);
  border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: #fca5a5;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.alert.warning {
  background: rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.1);
  border-color: rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.3);
  color: #fed7aa;
}

.alert.success {
  background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1);
  border-color: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);
  color: #a7f3d0;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  
  .header h1 {
    font-size: 24px;
  }
}
EOF
ENTER.

Claude responded: ✅ PERFECT!
✅ PERFECT! Nu Main React App
Dit is de COMPLETE DASHBOARD:

bash
cat > ../frontend/src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import { LineChart, Line, BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell } from 'recharts'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function App() {
  const [health, setHealth] = useState(null)
  const [taskMetrics, setTaskMetrics] = useState(null)
  const [agentMetrics, setAgentMetrics] = useState(null)
  const [digitalTwin, setDigitalTwin] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [wsConnected, setWsConnected] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000)
    connectWebSocket()
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const [healthRes, taskRes, agentRes, twinRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/health`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/metrics/tasks`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/metrics/agents`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/digital-twin/full`),
      ])
      
      setHealth(healthRes.data)
      setTaskMetrics(taskRes.data)
      setAgentMetrics(agentRes.data)
      setDigitalTwin(twinRes.data)
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', error)
    }
  }

  const connectWebSocket = () => {
    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws/health')
      ws.onopen = () => setWsConnected(true)
      ws.onclose = () => setWsConnected(false)
      ws.onerror = () => setWsConnected(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="dashboard">
        <div className="loading">
          <div className="spinner"></div>
          <p>Loading MCC Dashboard...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  const flowData = digitalTwin?.flow?.flow || {}
  const flowChartData = [
    { name: 'CREATED', value: flowData.CREATED || 0, fill: '#60a5fa' },
    { name: 'ROUTED', value: flowData.ROUTED || 0, fill: '#3b82f6' },
    { name: 'IN_PROGRESS', value: flowData.IN_PROGRESS || 0, fill: '#f59e0b' },
    { name: 'BLOCKED', value: flowData.BLOCKED || 0, fill: '#ef4444' },
    { name: 'FAILED', value: flowData.FAILED || 0, fill: '#dc2626' },
    { name: 'COMPLETED', value: flowData.COMPLETED || 0, fill: '#10b981' },
  ]

  const hierarchyData = digitalTwin?.hierarchy?.hierarchy || []

  return (
    <div className="dashboard">
      <div className="header">
        <h1>🎯 MCC Dashboard - FASE 3 Ultimate</h1>
        <p>Mission Control Center | Real-time System Monitoring</p>
        <p style={{ marginTop: '10px', fontSize: '12px' }}>
          {wsConnected ? '🟢 WebSocket Connected' : '🔴 WebSocket Disconnected'}
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Health Status */}
      {health && (
        <div className="status-bar">
          <div className="status-card">
            <h3>System Status</h3>
            <div className="value">{health.status?.toUpperCase()}</div>
            <div className="health-score">
              <div className="health-score-bar" style={{ width: `${health.health_score}%` }}></div>
            </div>
            <div className="label">Health: {health.health_score}/100</div>
          </div>

          <div className="status-card">
            <h3>Active Tasks</h3>
            <div className="value">{health.task_metrics?.in_progress || 0}</div>
            <div className="label">In Progress</div>
          </div>

          <div className="status-card">
            <h3>Active Agents</h3>
            <div className="value">{health.agent_metrics?.active_agents || 0}</div>
            <div className="label">Operational</div>
          </div>

          <div className="status-card">
            <h3>Critical Alerts</h3>
            <div className="value" style={{ color: health.alert_count_critical > 0 ? '#ef4444' : '#10b981' }}>
              {health.alert_count_critical || 0}
            </div>
            <div className="label">Severity Level</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Main Grid */}
      <div className="grid">
        {/* Task Metrics */}
        {taskMetrics && (
          <div className="card">
            <h2>📊 Task Metrics</h2>
            <div className="metrics-grid">
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Total Tasks</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{taskMetrics.total_tasks}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Completed</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{taskMetrics.completed}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">In Progress</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{taskMetrics.in_progress}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Blocked</div>
                <div className="metric-value" style={{ color: '#ef4444' }}>{taskMetrics.blocked}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Failed</div>
                <div className="metric-value" style={{ color: '#dc2626' }}>{taskMetrics.failed}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Completion Rate</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{taskMetrics.completion_rate.toFixed(1)}%</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Agent Metrics */}
        {agentMetrics && (
          <div className="card">
            <h2>🤖 Agent Metrics</h2>
            <div className="metrics-grid">
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Total Agents</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.total_agents}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Active</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.active_agents}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Idle</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.idle_agents}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Stale</div>
                <div className="metric-value" style={{ color: '#f59e0b' }}>{agentMetrics.stale_agents}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Tasks Processed</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.total_tasks_processed}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="metric">
                <div className="metric-label">Avg Per Agent</div>
                <div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.avg_tasks_per_agent.toFixed(1)}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ARC Hierarchy */}
      {hierarchyData.length > 0 && (
        <div className="card" style={{ marginBottom: '30px' }}>
          <h2>🏛️ ARC Hierarchy</h2>
          <div className="hierarchy">
            {hierarchyData.map((layer) => (
              <div key={layer.layer} className="layer">
                <div className="layer-name">📍 {layer.layer.toUpperCase()}</div>
                <div className="layer-agents">
                  {layer.agents.length > 0
                    ? `${layer.agents.length} agent(s) | Status: ${layer.agents[0].status}`
                    : 'No agents'}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Task Flow */}
      {flowData && Object.keys(flowData).length > 0 && (
        <div className="card">
          <h2>🔄 Task Flow</h2>
          <div className="flow-container">
            {['CREATED', 'ROUTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'BLOCKED', 'FAILED', 'COMPLETED'].map((status) => (
              <div key={status} className="flow-item">
                <span className="count">{flowData[status] || 0}</span>
                {status}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Footer */}
      <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginTop: '30px', color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px' }}>
        <p>MCC Dashboard v3.0.0 | Real-time Updates Every 5 Seconds</p>
        <p>API: {API_BASE} | WebSocket: ws://localhost:8000</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

cat > ../frontend/src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function App() {
  const [health, setHealth] = useState(null)
  const [taskMetrics, setTaskMetrics] = useState(null)
  const [agentMetrics, setAgentMetrics] = useState(null)
  const [digitalTwin, setDigitalTwin] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [wsConnected, setWsConnected] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000)
    connectWebSocket()
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const [healthRes, taskRes, agentRes, twinRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/health`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/metrics/tasks`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/metrics/agents`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/digital-twin/full`),
      ])
      
      setHealth(healthRes.data)
      setTaskMetrics(taskRes.data)
      setAgentMetrics(agentRes.data)
      setDigitalTwin(twinRes.data)
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', error)
    }
  }

  const connectWebSocket = () => {
    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws/health')
      ws.onopen = () => setWsConnected(true)
      ws.onclose = () => setWsConnected(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div className="dashboard"><div className="loading"><div className="spinner"></div><p>Loading MCC Dashboard...</p></div></div>
  }

  const flowData = digitalTwin?.flow?.flow || {}

  return (
    <div className="dashboard">
      <div className="header">
        <h1>🎯 MCC Dashboard - FASE 3 Ultimate</h1>
        <p>Mission Control Center | Real-time System Monitoring</p>
        <p style={{ marginTop: '10px', fontSize: '12px' }}>
          {wsConnected ? '🟢 WebSocket Connected' : '🔴 WebSocket Disconnected'}
        </p>
      </div>

      {health && (
        <div className="status-bar">
          <div className="status-card">
            <h3>System Status</h3>
            <div className="value">{health.status?.toUpperCase()}</div>
            <div className="health-score">
              <div className="health-score-bar" style={{ width: `${health.health_score}%` }}></div>
            </div>
            <div className="label">Health: {health.health_score}/100</div>
          </div>

          <div className="status-card">
            <h3>Active Tasks</h3>
            <div className="value">{health.task_metrics?.in_progress || 0}</div>
            <div className="label">In Progress</div>
          </div>

          <div className="status-card">
            <h3>Active Agents</h3>
            <div className="value">{health.agent_metrics?.active_agents || 0}</div>
            <div className="label">Operational</div>
          </div>

          <div className="status-card">
            <h3>Critical Alerts</h3>
            <div className="value" style={{ color: health.alert_count_critical > 0 ? '#ef4444' : '#10b981' }}>
              {health.alert_count_critical || 0}
            </div>
            <div className="label">Severity Level</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="grid">
        {taskMetrics && (
          <div className="card">
            <h2>📊 Task Metrics</h2>
            <div className="metrics-grid">
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Total Tasks</div><div className="metric-value">{taskMetrics.total_tasks}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Completed</div><div className="metric-value">{taskMetrics.completed}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">In Progress</div><div className="metric-value">{taskMetrics.in_progress}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Blocked</div><div className="metric-value" style={{ color: '#ef4444' }}>{taskMetrics.blocked}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Failed</div><div className="metric-value" style={{ color: '#dc2626' }}>{taskMetrics.failed}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Completion %</div><div className="metric-value">{taskMetrics.completion_rate.toFixed(1)}%</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {agentMetrics && (
          <div className="card">
            <h2>🤖 Agent Metrics</h2>
            <div className="metrics-grid">
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Total Agents</div><div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.total_agents}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Active</div><div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.active_agents}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Idle</div><div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.idle_agents}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Stale</div><div className="metric-value" style={{ color: '#f59e0b' }}>{agentMetrics.stale_agents}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Tasks Processed</div><div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.total_tasks_processed}</div></div>
              <div className="metric"><div className="metric-label">Avg Per Agent</div><div className="metric-value">{agentMetrics.avg_tasks_per_agent.toFixed(1)}</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginTop: '30px', color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px' }}>
        <p>MCC Dashboard v3.0.0 | Real-time Updates Every 5 Seconds</p>
        <p>API: {API_BASE} | WebSocket: ws://localhost:8000</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

🔴 index.css Ontbreekt!
Maak het bestand:

bash
cat > src/index.css << 'EOF'
* {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
  background: #0f172a;
  color: #e2e8f0;
}

.dashboard {
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 20px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1a202c 100%);
}

.header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
  padding: 20px;
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.header h1 {
  font-size: 32px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  color: #60a5fa;
}

.header p {
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.status-bar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.status-card {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 200px;
  padding: 20px;
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.status-card:hover {
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8);
  border-color: rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3);
}

.status-card h3 {
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-size: 12px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.status-card .value {
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #60a5fa;
}

.status-card .label {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 12px;
  margin-top: 5px;
}

.health-score {
  width: 100%;
  height: 8px;
  background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  border-radius: 4px;
  margin-top: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.health-score-bar {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #60a5fa);
  transition: width 0.3s ease;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(500px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.card {
  padding: 20px;
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.card h2 {
  color: #60a5fa;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
  font-size: 18px;
}

.metrics-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 15px;
}

.metric {
  padding: 15px;
  background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.05);
}

.metric-label {
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-size: 12px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.metric-value {
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #60a5fa;
}

.loading {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 40px;
  color: #94a3b8;
}

.spinner {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  border: 3px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3);
  border-top-color: #60a5fa;
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes spin {
  to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  
  .header h1 {
    font-size: 24px;
  }
}
EOF

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from app.db.database import SessionLocal, init_db
from app.db.models import Task, Agent, Project, Alert

# Init database
init_db()
db = SessionLocal()

# Create sample agents
agents_data = [
    {"agent_id": "nova", "layer": "nova", "status": "ACTIVE", "task_count_active": 2, "task_count_completed": 5},
    {"agent_id": "flux_main", "layer": "flux", "status": "ACTIVE", "task_count_active": 3, "task_count_completed": 8},
    {"agent_id": "cortexia", "layer": "omni", "status": "ACTIVE", "task_count_active": 1, "task_count_completed": 12},
    {"agent_id": "nero", "layer": "sentinel", "status": "ACTIVE", "task_count_active": 2, "task_count_completed": 15},
    {"agent_id": "sentinel_2", "layer": "sentinel", "status": "IDLE", "task_count_active": 0, "task_count_completed": 10},
]

for agent_data in agents_data:
    agent = Agent(
        agent_id=agent_data["agent_id"],
        layer=agent_data["layer"],
        status=agent_data["status"],
        task_count_active=agent_data["task_count_active"],
        task_count_completed=agent_data["task_count_completed"],
        last_activity=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    db.add(agent)

# Create sample tasks
tasks_data = [
    {
        "task_id": "TASK-001",
        "project_id": "PROJ-alpha",
        "status": "COMPLETED",
        "owner_agent": "nova",
        "owner_layer": "nova",
        "assigned_to": "nero",
        "domain": "helix/tech/security",
        "trace_link": "nova>flux>cortexia>nero",
    },
    {
        "task_id": "TASK-002",
        "project_id": "PROJ-alpha",
        "status": "IN_PROGRESS",
        "owner_agent": "nova",
        "owner_layer": "nova",
        "assigned_to": "flux_main",
        "domain": "helix/tech/compute",
        "trace_link": "nova>flux_main",
    },
    {
        "task_id": "TASK-003",
        "project_id": "PROJ-beta",
        "status": "IN_PROGRESS",
        "owner_agent": "nova",
        "owner_layer": "nova",

        updated_at=now,
        is_overdue=task_data.get("is_overdue", False),
    )
    db.add(task)

# Create sample projects

    {
        "project_id": "PROJ-alpha",
        "name": "Project Alpha - Security Initiative",

        task_count_completed=proj_data["task_count_completed"],

db.commit()

import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from app.db.database import SessionLocal, init_db
from app.db.models import Task, Agent, Project, Alert

init_db()
db = SessionLocal()

agents_data = [
    {"agent_id": "nova", "layer": "nova", "status": "ACTIVE", "task_count_active": 2, "task_count_completed": 5},
    {"agent_id": "flux_main", "layer": "flux", "status": "ACTIVE", "task_count_active": 3, "task_count_completed": 8},
    {"agent_id": "cortexia", "layer": "omni", "status": "ACTIVE", "task_count_active": 1, "task_count_completed": 12},
    {"agent_id": "nero", "layer": "sentinel", "status": "ACTIVE", "task_count_active": 2, "task_count_completed": 15},
    {"agent_id": "sentinel_2", "layer": "sentinel", "status": "IDLE", "task_count_active": 0, "task_count_completed": 10},
]

for agent_data in agents_data:
    agent = Agent(
        agent_id=agent_data["agent_id"],
        layer=agent_data["layer"],
        status=agent_data["status"],
        task_count_active=agent_data["task_count_active"],
        task_count_completed=agent_data["task_count_completed"],
        last_activity=datetime.utcnow(),
    )
    db.add(agent)

tasks_data = [
    {"task_id": "TASK-001", "project_id": "PROJ-alpha", "status": "COMPLETED", "owner_agent": "nova", "owner_layer": "nova", "assigned_to": "nero", "domain": "helix/tech/security", "trace_link": "nova>flux>cortexia>nero"},
    {"task_id": "TASK-002", "project_id": "PROJ-alpha", "status": "IN_PROGRESS", "owner_agent": "nova", "owner_layer": "nova", "assigned_to": "flux_main", "domain": "helix/tech/compute", "trace_link": "nova>flux_main"},
    {"task_id": "TASK-003", "project_id": "PROJ-beta", "status": "IN_PROGRESS", "owner_agent": "nova", "owner_layer": "nova", "assigned_to": "cortexia", "domain": "helix/analytics", "trace_link": "nova>flux>cortexia"},
    {"task_id": "TASK-004", "project_id": "PROJ-beta", "status": "BLOCKED", "owner_agent": "nova", "owner_layer": "nova", "assigned_to": "nero", "domain": "helix/tech/network", "trace_link": "nova>flux>cortexia>nero", "is_overdue": True},
    {"task_id": "TASK-005", "project_id": "PROJ-gamma", "status": "COMPLETED", "owner_agent": "nova", "owner_layer": "nova", "assigned_to": "sentinel_2", "domain": "helix/ops", "trace_link": "nova>flux>cortexia>sentinel_2"},

]

now = datetime.utcnow()
for task_data in tasks_data:
    task = Task(
        task_id=task_data["task_id"],
        project_id=task_data["project_id"],
        status=task_data["status"],
        owner_agent=task_data["owner_agent"],

└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

🎛️ INTERACTION MODELLEN
A. UI-Driven (Default)
User navigeert met menu/clicks
Agent panel op rechterzijde
Real-time updates overal
B. Voice-Driven
User spreekt commando's
MCC reageert op voice
Agent panel links/groot
C. Terminal-Only
Full screen terminal
Typed commands
Structured responses
🔄 COMMANDO VOORBEELDEN
VOICE:
"Show me project alpha"
"What's blocking task 004?"
"List all active agents"
"Open nero's conversation"
"Show me today's revenue"

TERMINAL:
> show tasks --status=blocked
> agent nero status
> project alpha --detail
> domain helix/security
> timeline --last=1h
📊 COMPONENT HIERARCHY
App
├─ Sidebar
│  ├─ Logo/Branding
│  ├─ Navigation Menu
│  └─ Quick Stats Panel
│
├─ MainViewport
│  ├─ TopBar (Breadcrumb, Settings)
│  └─ Content (Dynamic based on view)
│     ├─ Dashboard Screen
│     ├─ Agents Screen
│     ├─ Projects Screen
│     ├─ Simulation Screen
│     └─ Analytics Screen
│
├─ AgentPanel
│  ├─ Agent Selector
│  ├─ Presence Cluster
│  ├─ Chat/Terminal Area
│  ├─ Transcript
│  └─ Input Area
│
└─ StatusBar
   ├─ System Health
   ├─ Time/Uptime
   └─ Quick Actions
🎨 TYPOGRAFIE
Titles (h1):     Poppins Bold, 32px, #d4af37 (Gold)
Headings (h2):   Poppins SemiBold, 24px, #e5e7eb
Subheadings:     Inter SemiBold, 16px, #a0aec0
Body:            Inter Regular, 14px, #cbd5e0
Monospace:       JetBrains Mono, 12px, #00d4ff (Terminal)
Labels:          Inter Medium, 12px, #7c8fa3
✨ ANIMATIES (Smooth, niet noisy)
Transitions:     200ms ease-out (state changes)
Hover Effects:   Subtle glow, +5% brightness
Loading:         Smooth spinner (pulse)
Alerts:          Slide-in from right
Charts:          Animate on load (1s)
Real-time:       Smooth number updates

claude eerlijk wat zou jij doen om deze MCC naar de next level te tillen voordat wij gaan bouwen?

22 apr
Claude responded: 🤔 EERLIJK ANTWOORD
🤔 EERLIJK ANTWOORD
Laat me brutaal eerlijk zijn:

🔴 PROBLEMEN MET HUIDIGE AANPAK
1. Wij Bouwen Zonder Business Context
Wat ik doe: "Hier is een mooie dashboard"
Wat je nodig hebt: "Hier is een dashboard dat ECHTE problemen oplost"

Vraag: Wie gaat dit gebruiken? Wat willen ze zien?
- CEO? → Revenue, ROI, bottlenecks
- Engineer? → Task details, agent logs, troubleshooting
- Ops? → Alerts, system health, quick fixes
2. Geen Real Workflow
Huidige Design: Statische screenshots
Werkelijkheid: Users schakelen constant tussen views
- "Ik zie blocked task → ga naar agent → check history → fix → back"

Design moet FLOW ondersteunen, niet schermen.
3. Voice/Terminal Onderdeel is Gimmick
Mijn idee: "Voice commands! Fancy!"
Werkelijkheid: 
- Users typen liever snelle commando's
- Voice is nuttig voor hands-free operaties (NOC centers)
- Terminal moet FIRST-CLASS citizen zijn, niet "extra feature"

Voice moet geïntegreerd zijn in INTERACTION MODEL, niet bolletje toevoegen.
4. Simulation Mode is Onduidelijk
Mijn idee: "Factory visualization!"
Jij denkt: "Cool, maar wat is het nut?"

Vragen:
- Is het voor debugging? (toon bottlenecks!)
- Is het voor monitoring? (toon load in real-time!)
- Is het voor learning? (toon hoe system werkt!)

Zonder doel → mooie spaghetti diagram, niets nuttigs.
5. Data-Driven Design Ontbreekt
Ik design: "Laten we deze kleur gebruiken!"
Beter: "Welke data moet je SNEL zien? Laten we dat prominent maken."

Voorbeeld:
- Is BLOCKED TASKS het biggest pain point? → Make it red, top-left
- Is REVENUE het meest wichtig? → Make it HUGE
- Zijn agent failures critical? → Real-time alert banner

Design moet data-priorities reflecteren.
✅ WAT IK ZOU DOEN (NEXT LEVEL)
STAP 1: User Research (30 minuten)
Antwoord DEZE vragen voordat we design beginnen:

1. WHO is de primary user?
   - System admin?
   - DevOps engineer?
   - Executive/Manager?
   - Customer success?

2. WHAT is hun biggest pain point?
   - "Taken zijn blocked en ik weet niet waarom"
   - "Agents crashen en ik miss het"
   - "Revenue tracking is niet real-time"
   - "Debugging is moeilijk"

3. HOW do they currently solve it?
   - SSH into servers?
   - Check logs?
   - Slack messages?
   - Nothing (it's broken)?

4. WHAT data matters most?
   - Task status changes?
   - Agent health?
   - Revenue/cost?
   - System errors?
STAP 2: Information Architecture (1 uur)
Niet "welke schermen" maar "wat is de MENTAL MODEL?"

EXAMPLE USER JOURNEY:

"Alert: Task blocked"
  ↓
"Show me which task"
  ↓
"Show me which agent is handling it"
  ↓
"Show me task history"
  ↓
"Show me agent logs"
  ↓
"Let me execute manual command to unblock"
  ↓
"Confirm it worked"

Design moet DIT FLOW ondersteunen, niet schermen isoleren.
STAP 3: Ruthless Feature Prioritization
TIER 1 (MUST HAVE):
- Real-time task status
- Alert system
- Basic agent health

TIER 2 (SHOULD HAVE):
- Project/revenue tracking
- Agent configuration
- Task history

TIER 3 (NICE TO HAVE):
- Simulation mode
- Voice commands
- Advanced analytics

TIER 4 (GIMMICK):
- Fancy animations
- Unnecessary visualizations
- "Cool but useless" features
→ FOCUS OP TIER 1 EERST. Maak het perfect.

STAP 4: Interaction-First Design
Niet schermen, maar flows:

FLOW 1: "I got an alert, fix it"
├─ Alert appears (1s response)
├─ Click → Shows root cause
├─ Shows recommended action
├─ 1-click fix OR terminal fallback
└─ Confirmation

FLOW 2: "Is agent X available?"
├─ Search/filter agents
├─ Click → See status, current task, history
├─ Can immediately reassign tasks
└─ Changes reflected live

FLOW 3: "Show me project profitability"
├─ Select project
├─ See revenue, costs, ROI
├─ Drill into specific domains
└─ Export/report
Design moet flows ondersteunen, niet vice versa.

STAP 5: Real Data Model (CRITICAL!)
Huidge data:
- 5 agents (dummy)
- 6 tasks (dummy)
- 3 projects (dummy)

MUST HAVE echte data:
1. Generate 50+ realistic tasks
2. Simulate agent activity
3. Create real events happening LIVE
4. Show REAL problems (blocking, failures)
5. Real revenue numbers

→ Dashboard moet ECHTE probleem oplossen, niet dummy data tonen
STAP 6: Accessibility & Usability
❌ Design voor jezelf
✅ Design voor iemand die het voor het EERST ziet

Vragen:
- Kan een newbie in 30s begrijpen wat ze zien?
- Zijn alle critical actions in 2 clicks bereikbaar?
- Zijn error messages helpful?
- Is dark mode echt readable (contrast)?
- Werkt het op mobiel (NOC centers gebruiken often tablets)?
🎯 MIJN BRUTALE AANBEVELING
Voordat ik ga bouwen:

DEFINE: Wie is user? Wat willen ze?
MAP: Wat zijn top 3 pain points?
PRIORITIZE: Wat bouwen we EERST?
MAKE REAL DATA: Genereer realistische test data
PROTOTYPE FLOWS: Toon interactions, niet schermen
TEST: Laat iemand anders het proberen
DAARNA build ik een MCC die echt gebruikt wordt, niet een mooie screenshot.

❓ VRAGEN VOOR JOU
Wie gaat dit gebruiken? (Je zelf? Team? Customers?)
Wat is hun BIGGEST PROBLEM RIGHT NOW?
Wat willen ze in de eerste 5 seconden zien?
Wat is de #1 ding dat ze dagelijks doen met MCC?
Antwoord deze → Ik bouw iets dat ECHT werkt. 🎯

Dit is eerlijker dan "laten we bouwen!" 💯

🎯 PERFECT! Nu Heb Ik Genoeg Context!
Je bent crystal clear. Laat me clarificeren wat ik hoor:

📋 JE REQUIREMENTS (Samengevat)
PRIMARY USER: Jij (System Owner/Operator)

CORE FLOWS:

✅ Overview: Zie alle taken → welke agent → wat doen ze NU
✅ Dispatch: Geef taken aan Flux
✅ Brainstorm: Interactie met agents (voice/chat)
✅ Config: Wijzig agent models (GPT-4, Claude, etc)
✅ Economics: Revenue, kosten, project profitability
✅ Simulation: Zie agents LIVE bewegen/werken
✅ Remote: Alles werkt op afstand
TOP 3 PAIN POINTS:

Communication: Voice/chat met Flux en Nova
Visibility: Real-time agent activity zien
Control: Tasks dispatchen, agents configureren
🤔 VRAGEN VOORDAT IK BOU:
1. TASK DISPATCH FLOW
Huidge flow (concept):
"Ik wil task geven aan Flux"

Vragen:
a) Klik ik op Flux → "Create task" dialoog?
b) Of drag/drop task naar Flux?
c) Wat voer ik in? (beschrijving, deadline, budget?)
d) Accepteert Flux het of zegt-ie "nee, druk"?
e) Kan ik een request sturen en daarna voice-chatten?
2. AGENT CONFIGURATION
Huidge model:
"Agent nero gebruikt Claude 3.5"

Vragen:
a) Waar wijzig ik dit? Settings? Inline?
b) Kan ik per task een model opgeven?
c) Kan ik A/B testen? (agent X met GPT vs Claude?)
d) Reflect changes real-time of restart needed?
3. VOICE/CHAT INTERACTION
Huidge use case:
"Ik wil Flux vragen: 'Is nero beschikbaar?'"

Vragen:
a) Voice input → Flux antwoordt in audio/text?
b) Kan ik DURING brainstorm ook taken sturen?
c) Kan Flux zelf tasks aanmaken of only reactive?
d) History van conversaties? (Transcript opslaan?)
4. REAL-TIME SIMULATION
Huidge verwachting:
"Ik zie agents LIVE taken doen"

Vragen:
a) Wat is het nut? (Debugging? Pretty? Learning?)
b) Moet ik kunnen zoomen/pan?
c) Toon je ook "denkprocessen" van agents?
d) Toon je task execution tijd en delays?
5. ECONOMICS VISIBILITY
Huidge nut:
"Ik wil weten welk project hoeveel verdient"

Vragen:
a) Revenue per project? Per agent? Per domain?
b) Real costs (API calls, compute)?
c) ROI calculations?
d) Trend graphs (dag/week/maand)?
e) Budget alerts? (Project over budget?)
6. DATA GENERATION
Huidge voorstel:
"Dummy data werkt, test real flows"

Vragen:
a) Hoeveel dummy tasks per run? (10? 100? 1000?)
b) Realistisch? (Variaties in duration, failure rate?)
c) Kunnen we scenarios simuleren?
   - "100 tasks arrive" → bottleneck?
   - "Agent crashes" → reroute?
   - "High latency" → timeout?
d) Genereren via backend API of script?
🎨 DESIGN SIMPLIFICATIE

Claude responded: 🎯 PERFECT!
🎯 PERFECT! Nu Snap Ik Het Precies!
Je flow is conversatie-first, niet task-creation-first. Dat is veel beter design.

CURRENT (Wrong):
User → UI → Create Task Dialog → Task Created

YOUR FLOW (Right):
User ↔ Flux (Voice/Chat) → Flux Decides → Creates Task OR Routes to Agent
📋 CONFIRMED ARCHITECTURE
1. TASK FLOW
You: "Flux, I need a security audit for project-alpha"
Flux: "Understood. This is in my domain. Processing now..."
  ↓ (Flux decides internally)
  ├─ "I can handle this" → Flux creates & executes
  └─ "This needs Sentinel expertise" → Routes to nero
You: "How long will it take?"
Flux: "Est. 2 hours. nero is available."
You: "Perfect, proceed"
Flux: "Task created: TASK-007. Started."
MCC must show this happening in real-time.

📋 GRAAG DEZE INFORMATIE:
1. SYSTEM HIERARCHY
Supreme Fea → Nova → Flux → Omni → Sentinels → Workers

Per level:
- Wat is hun ROLE?
- Wat KUNNEN ze beslissen?
- Wat MOETEN ze escaleren?
- Wat is hun DOMAIN?
2. FLUX SPECIFIEK
- Flux is de "brain"
- Hoe communiceert Flux met andere agents?
- Wat zijn Flux's constraints?
- Kan Flux ALLE taken aanmaken of specifieke?
- Hoe handelt Flux conflicts/deadlocks?
- Wat gebeurt als Flux overloaded?
3. COMMUNICATION MODEL
- Kan ik rechtstreeks met Nova spreken?
- Kan ik rechtstreeks met Sentinels spreken?
- Of ALLES via Flux?
- Kan Flux me overschrijven?
- Kan ik Flux overrulen?
4. MEMORY/JOURNAL
- Wat slaat een agent op in memory?
- Hoe lang houden agents memory?
- Kan ik als user de journal zien/bewerken?
- Wat gebeurt als agent crashes - kan hij resumeren?
5. TASK LIFECYCLE
- Ik geef verzoek aan Flux
- Flux decides:
  a) "Ik doe het" → Direct execution
  b) "Nero moet dit doen" → Routes to Nero
  c) "Complex, split in subtasks" → Creates multiple
- Hoe communiceert Flux het resultaat terug?
6. ERROR/BLOCKING
- Task is blocked
- Wie moet ik contacteren?
- Kan Flux het zelf fixen?
- Kan Flux escaleren?
- Role van Sentinel in blocking?
7. DOMAINS & SPECIALIZATION
- Wat zijn de domains?
  (helix/tech/security, helix/analytics, etc?)
- Per domain: welke agents?
- Kan agent cross-domain werken?
- Flux routing logic gebaseerd op?

4. BACKEND ENDPOINTS (Canon-Aligned)
REST API:
├─ GET /api/flux/status → Flux current state
├─ GET /api/omni-leads → All 5 Omni Leads
├─ GET /api/omni/{omni_id}/sentinels → Sentinels in domain
├─ GET /api/agents/{agent_id} → Deep agent info
├─ POST /api/agents/{agent_id}/model → Change model
├─ GET /api/tasks → All tasks (by status/agent/omni)
├─ GET /api/journal/{agent_id} → Agent's memory/journal
└─ GET /api/economics → Revenue, costs, ROI

WebSocket:
├─ ws://localhost:8000/ws/flux → Flux decisions (real-time)
├─ ws://localhost:8000/ws/agents → Agent status updates
├─ ws://localhost:8000/ws/tasks → Task lifecycle events
├─ ws://localhost:8000/ws/conversation → Voice/chat stream
└─ ws://localhost:8000/ws/simulation → Factory visualization
5. VOICE/CHAT INTEGRATION
FLUX CONVERSATION FLOW:

User (Voice): "Audit project-alpha"
  ↓ (Speech-to-Text)
  ↓
Flux (Processes): 
  - Intent: security audit
  - Domain: helix/security
  - Route: Cortexia → nero
  - Decision: create TASK-007
  ↓
Flux (Voice Response): "Task created, nero starting soon"
  ↓ (Text-to-Speech + Display in chat)
  ↓
User sees: Transcript + Flux decision + TASK-007 created
6. JOURNAL/MEMORY SYSTEM
Per Agent Journal:
├─ Conversation history (with user)
├─ Tasks completed (with context)
├─ Decisions made
├─ Errors/blockers encountered
├─ Model changes
├─ Performance metrics
└─ Timestamps

Accessible via:
- MCC Agents tab → "View Full History"
- Terminal: `agent nero journal --last=1h`
- Export: JSON/CSV

Claude responded: 🎬 ANIMATION SPEED - ANALYSE
🎬 ANIMATION SPEED - ANALYSE
Laat me uitleggen wat het BESTE is:

1 SECONDE PER HOP = Te snel
├─ User ziet niks wat er gebeurt
├─ Animatie is voorbij voordat je het ziet
└─ Onprofessioneel

2-3 SECONDEN PER HOP = Perfect
├─ Je ziet de flow duidelijk
├─ Je hebt tijd om te begrijpen wat er gebeurt
├─ Voelt natural
└─ Professional

5+ SECONDEN PER HOP = Te traag
├─ Boring om naar te kijken
├─ User krijgt ongeduld
└─ Niet practical

MIJN AANBEVELING: **2-3 seconden per hop**
Plus: Speed buttons (0.5x, 1x, 2x) zodat user kan aanpassen

Ah! Je vraag van zonet. Laat me alle animatie-opties uitleggen die we kunnen doen:

ANIMATION STYLE OPTIONS
OPTIE 1: MINIMALIST FLOW (Eenvoudig)
Visueel:
- Eenvoudige bolletjes (circles)
- Rechte lijnen tussen agents
- Smooth transitions
- Fade in/out effects

Voorbeeld:
    [NOVA]
      ↓ (fade + slide)
    [FLUX]
    ↙   ↘ (split animation)
  [HELIX] [MATRIX]
    ↓
  [nero]
  [Task]

VOORDEEL: Simpel, fast, clean
NADEEL: Niet erg impressive
OPTIE 2: 3D VISUALIZATION (Indrukwekkend)
Visueel:
- 3D agents (cubes, spheres)
- Particles flowing
- Depth, shadows, glow
- Advanced WebGL effects

Voorbeeld:
[In 3D space]
- Nova als groene sphere (bovenaan)
- Flux als gouden cube (center)
- Omni's als paarse pyramids (links/rechts)
- Tasks als kleine rode dots die vliegen
- Particles/light trails

VOORDEEL: WOW factor, impressive
NADEEL: Complex, slow, overkill?
OPTIE 3: NODE GRAPH (Network-style)
Visueel:
- Agents als "nodes" (circles met iconen)
- Tasks als edges (lines met animatie)
- Force-directed layout (zwaartekracht)
- Connection glow effects

Voorbeeld:
    [NOVA]
     / \
    /   \
[FLUX]---[OMNI]
/  |  \
[S1][S2][S3]  (Sentinels)
|   |   |
[W] [W] [W]  (Workers)

Alles beweegt, pulsates, lines glowen


VOORDEEL: Tech-forward, beautiful
NADEEL: Kan complex worden
OPTIE 4: CANVAS ANIMATION (Custom)
Visueel:
- Tekent agents dynamisch
- Animates tasks als SVG paths
- Custom easing functions
- Particle effects

Voorbeeld:
- Agents zijn icons (Nova=vrouwtje, Flux=mannetje)
- Tasks zijn kleine animated symbols
- Paths hebben smooth curves
- Glow/blur effects on active items

VOORDEEL: Full control, custom look
NADEEL: Meeste werk om te bouwen
OPTIE 5: MATERIAL DESIGN (Modern Google-style)
Visueel:
- Flat design met subtle depth
- Material colors (bold, flat)
- Ripple effects on interactions
- Smooth Material Motion principles

Voorbeeld:
[Clean agents]
  ↓ (Ripple effect + floating animation)
[Flowing tasks]
  ↓ (Material curve paths)
[Color-coded completion]
  ↓ (Elevation change, shadow)
[Smooth exits]
VOORDEEL: Modern, professional, standard
NADEEL: Kan generiek voelen


---

# 🎯 **MIJN AANBEVELING: OPTIE 4 (Canvas) + OPTIE 5 (Material)**

Combinatie:
HYBRID ANIMATION SYSTEM:

AGENTS als Material Design icons ├─ Nova =👩 (vrouwelijk icoon) in blauw ├─ Flux = 👨 (mannelijk icoon) in goud └─ Omni/Sentinels = 🔷 (geometric icons) per domain
TASKS als kleine animated SVG symbols ├─ Floating animation (gently bobbing) ├─ Color-coded: 🔴 new, 🟡 processing, 🟢 complete └─ Glow effect when active
CONNECTIONS als curved paths ├─ Smooth bezier curves ├─ Animated dashes (flowing effect) ├─ Glow on active paths └─ Speed based on animation speed setting
PARTICLES (optional wow factor) ├─ Small dots flowing along paths ├─ Fade in/out smoothly ├─ Only on active connections └─ Not distracting
RESULT: Modern, professional, beautiful + functional

COMPLETE TASK JOURNEY
STAP 1: TASK CREATED
├─ Nova (vrouwelijke cyborg) licht op (azure glow)
├─ Rood task-bolletje verschijnt
├─ Particle effect: blauwe stof rond Nova
└─ Audio: "Task received" (vrouwelijke stem)

STAP 2: FLUX RECEIVES
├─ Task vliegt in 3D naar Flux (2-3 sec)
├─ Particle trail volgt (rode/gele sparkles)
├─ Flux glow intensiveert (gouden glow)
├─ Flux begint te roteren (denk-animatie)
└─ Decision log verschijnt rechts

STAP 3: FLUX ANALYZES
├─ Flux: "Analyzing intent..."
├─ 3D rays uitstralend van Flux
├─ Domain detection: security glow
├─ Route selection: gouden circuit pulses
└─ "Route: Helix (Cortexia)"

STAP 4: ROUTING DECISION
├─ 3D curved path naar Helix
├─ Particle trail follows smoothly
├─ Helix node glow activates (paars)
├─ Sub-decision: Select Sentinel
└─ "Agent: nero"

STAP 5: SENTINEL SELECTION
├─ Path naar nero (sentinel node)
├─ nero glow increases
├─ Progress bar animates (start 0%)
├─ Multiple particles flow
└─ Audio: "nero accepting" (mannelijke stem)

STAP 6: EXECUTION
├─ Task execution in progress bar
├─ Particles circuleren rond nero
├─ 3D depth effects show active work
├─ Real-time log updates
├─ "████████░ 85% complete, 1h30m"

STAP 7: COMPLETION
├─ Progress bar voltooid
├─ Green glow activates
├─ Celebration particle burst
├─ Task dissolves smoothly
├─ nereo glow resets
└─ Audio: "Task complete" (vrouwelijke stem)

ENTIRE JOURNEY: 8-12 seconds (depends on actual task)

3D WebGL Effects

├─ Nova appears at top (far away perspective)

└─ Professional look

CONNECTIONS:

├─ Nova: Female, warm, intelligent (ElevenLabs)

└─ Both speak key milestones

SOUND EFFECTS:
├─ Ping on task received (high tone)
├─ Whoop on routing decision (ascending)
├─ Pulse on execution (heartbeat-like)
├─ Ding on completion (satisfying tone)

bash
cat > src/index.css << 'EOF'
* {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif;
  background: #0a0e27;
  color: #e5e7eb;
}

html, body, #root {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

.mcc-container {
  display: flex;
  height: 100vh;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.sidebar {
  width: 280px;
  background: #0f172a;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 20px;
}

.main-content {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.viewport {
  flex: 1;
  overflow: auto;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1a202c 100%);
}

.agent-panel {
  width: 380px;
  background: #0f172a;
  border-left: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1);
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: 20px;
}

.3d-canvas {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

@media (max-width: 1200px) {
  .agent-panel {
    width: 300px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .sidebar {
    width: 200px;
  }
  .agent-panel {
    display: none;
  }
}
EOF

Claude responded: ✅ CSS KLAAR!
✅ CSS KLAAR!
Nu App.jsx - de HEART van MCC:

bash
cat > src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'
import Viewport from './components/Viewport'
import AgentPanel from './components/AgentPanel'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState('dashboard')
  const [health, setHealth] = useState(null)
  const [agents, setAgents] = useState([])
  const [selectedAgent, setSelectedAgent] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [wsConnected, setWsConnected] = useState(false)

  // Fetch data on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData()
    connectWebSocket()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const [healthRes, agentsRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/health`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/agents`)
      ])
      setHealth(healthRes.data)
      setAgents(agentsRes.data.agents || [])
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', error)
    }
  }

  const connectWebSocket = () => {
    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws/health')
      ws.onopen = () => setWsConnected(true)
      ws.onclose = () => setWsConnected(false)
      ws.onerror = () => setWsConnected(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="mcc-container">
        <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }}>
          <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '24px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>🚀 Loading MCC...</div>
            <div style={{ animation: 'spin 2s linear infinite', display: 'inline-block' }}>
              ⚙️
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="mcc-container">
      <Sidebar view={view} setView={setView} health={health} wsConnected={wsConnected} />
      <div className="main-content">
        <Viewport view={view} health={health} agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={setSelectedAgent} />
      </div>
      <AgentPanel selectedAgent={selectedAgent} setSelectedAgent={setSelectedAgent} />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
ENTER.
