Nu de COMPONENTS. Start met Sidebar:

bash
cat > src/components/Sidebar.jsx << 'EOF'
import React from 'react'

export default function Sidebar({ view, setView, health, wsConnected }) {
  const menuItems = [
    { id: 'dashboard', label: '🎯 Dashboard', icon: '📊' },
    { id: 'tasks', label: '📋 Tasks', icon: '✓' },
    { id: 'agents', label: '🤖 Agents', icon: '⚙' },
    { id: 'omni-leads', label: '👥 Omni Leads', icon: '🏛' },
    { id: 'projects', label: '💼 Projects', icon: '$' },
    { id: 'simulation', label: '🎬 Simulation', icon: '3D' },
    { id: 'analytics', label: '📈 Analytics', icon: '📉' },
    { id: 'settings', label: '⚙️ Settings', icon: '🔧' },
  ]

  return (
    <div className="sidebar">
      <div style={{ marginBottom: '40px', paddingBottom: '20px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)' }}>
        <h1 style={{ fontSize: '20px', color: '#00ff88', marginBottom: '5px' }}>🤖 MCC</h1>
        <p style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b' }}>Mission Control Center v3.0</p>
      </div>

      <nav style={{ marginBottom: '40px' }}>
        {menuItems.map(item => (
          <button
            key={item.id}
            onClick={() => setView(item.id)}
            style={{
              width: '100%',
              padding: '12px 16px',
              marginBottom: '8px',
              backgroundColor: view === item.id ? 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1)' : 'transparent',
              border: view === item.id ? '1px solid #00ff88' : '1px solid transparent',
              color: view === item.id ? '#00ff88' : '#cbd5e0',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontSize: '14px',
              textAlign: 'left',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
          >
            {item.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </nav>

      <div style={{ paddingTop: '20px', borderTop: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)' }}>
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '16px' }}>
          <p style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b', marginBottom: '8px' }}>System Status</p>
          {health && (
            <>
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '4px' }}>
                <span>Health:</span>
                <span style={{ color: health.health_score >= 80 ? '#00ff88' : '#fbbf24' }}>
                  {health.health_score}/100
                </span>
              </div>
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '4px' }}>
                <span>Status:</span>
                <span style={{ color: '#00ff88' }}>{health.status?.toUpperCase()}</span>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>

        <div>
          <p style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b', marginBottom: '8px' }}>WebSocket</p>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '8px' }}>
            <div style={{
              width: '8px',
              height: '8px',
              borderRadius: '50%',
              backgroundColor: wsConnected ? '#00ff88' : '#ef4444',
            }} />
            <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: wsConnected ? '#00ff88' : '#ef4444' }}>
              {wsConnected ? 'Connected' : 'Disconnected'}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

Claude responded: ✅ VIEWPORT COMPONENT
✅ VIEWPORT COMPONENT
bash
cat > src/components/Viewport.jsx << 'EOF'
import React from 'react'
import Dashboard from './views/Dashboard'
import TasksView from './views/TasksView'
import AgentsView from './views/AgentsView'
import OmniLeadsView from './views/OmniLeadsView'
import ProjectsView from './views/ProjectsView'
import SimulationView from './views/SimulationView'
import AnalyticsView from './views/AnalyticsView'
import SettingsView from './views/SettingsView'

export default function Viewport({ view, health, agents, setSelectedAgent }) {
  const renderView = () => {
    switch (view) {
      case 'dashboard':
        return <Dashboard health={health} agents={agents} />
      case 'tasks':
        return <TasksView />
      case 'agents':
        return <AgentsView agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={setSelectedAgent} />
      case 'omni-leads':
        return <OmniLeadsView />
      case 'projects':
        return <ProjectsView />
      case 'simulation':
        return <SimulationView agents={agents} />
      case 'analytics':
        return <AnalyticsView health={health} />
      case 'settings':
        return <SettingsView />
      default:
        return <Dashboard health={health} agents={agents} />
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="viewport">
      {renderView()}
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
ENTER.

bash
cat > src/components/AgentPanel.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState } from 'react'

export default function AgentPanel({ selectedAgent, setSelectedAgent }) {
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([])

  const handleSendMessage = () => {
    if (inputValue.trim()) {
      setMessages([...messages, { role: 'user', text: inputValue }])
      setInputValue('')
      // Simulate agent response
      setTimeout(() => {
        setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'agent', text: 'Processing your request...' }])
      }, 500)
    }
  }

  if (!selectedAgent) {
    return (
      <div className="agent-panel">
        <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', color: '#64748b', paddingTop: '40px' }}>
          <div style={{ fontSize: '40px', marginBottom: '16px' }}>🤖</div>
          <p>Select an agent to interact</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="agent-panel">
      <div style={{ marginBottom: '20px', paddingBottom: '20px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)' }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: '18px', color: '#00ff88', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          🤖 {selectedAgent.agent_id}
        </h2>
        <p style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: '#64748b' }}>
          {selectedAgent.layer} | {selectedAgent.status}
        </p>
      </div>

      <div style={{
        flex: 1,
        overflow: 'auto',
        marginBottom: '16px',
        maxHeight: 'calc(100% - 200px)',
      }}>
        {messages.map((msg, idx) => (
          <div key={idx} style={{
            marginBottom: '12px',
            padding: '10px',
            backgroundColor: msg.role === 'user' ? 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1)' : 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.1)',
            borderRadius: '6px',
            borderLeft: `3px solid ${msg.role === 'user' ? '#00ff88' : '#d4af37'}`,
            fontSize: '12px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: msg.role === 'user' ? '#00ff88' : '#d4af37', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '4px' }}>
              {msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : selectedAgent.agent_id}
            </p>
            <p style={{ color: '#cbd5e0' }}>{msg.text}</p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px' }}>
        <input
          type="text"
          value={inputValue}
          onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
          onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSendMessage()}
          placeholder="Type command..."
          style={{
            flex: 1,
            padding: '10px 12px',
            backgroundColor: '#1a1f3a',
            border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2)',
            borderRadius: '6px',
            color: '#e5e7eb',
            fontSize: '12px',
          }}
        />
        <button
          onClick={handleSendMessage}
          style={{
            padding: '10px 16px',
            backgroundColor: '#00ff88',
            color: '#000',
            border: 'none',
            borderRadius: '6px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
            fontWeight: 'bold',
            fontSize: '12px',
          }}
        >
          Send
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React from 'react'

export default function Dashboard({ health, agents }) {
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '32px', color: '#00ff88', marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🎯 Dashboard
      </h1>

      {health && (
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr))', gap: '20px', marginBottom: '40px' }}>
          <div style={{
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.2)',
            borderRadius: '10px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '10px' }}>System Status</p>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: '#00ff88', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
              {health.status?.toUpperCase()}
            </h2>
            <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '4px', backgroundColor: 'rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)', borderRadius: '2px', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
              <div style={{
                width: `${health.health_score}%`,
                height: '100%',
                backgroundColor: health.health_score >= 80 ? '#00ff88' : '#fbbf24',
              }} />
            </div>
            <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '8px' }}>
              Health: {health.health_score}/100
            </p>
          </div>

          <div style={{
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.2)',
            borderRadius: '10px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '10px' }}>Active Tasks</p>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: '#d4af37' }}>
              {health.task_metrics?.in_progress || 0}
            </h2>
            <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '8px' }}>In Progress</p>
          </div>

          <div style={{
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(100, 200, 255, 0.2)',
            borderRadius: '10px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '10px' }}>Active Agents</p>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: '#00d4ff' }}>
              {health.agent_metrics?.active_agents || 0}
            </h2>
            <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '8px' }}>Operational</p>
          </div>

          <div style={{
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2)',
            borderRadius: '10px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '10px' }}>Critical Alerts</p>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: health.alert_count_critical > 0 ? '#ef4444' : '#00ff88' }}>
              {health.alert_count_critical || 0}
            </h2>
            <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '8px' }}>Severity Level</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div style={{ marginTop: '40px' }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: '20px', color: '#cbd5e0', marginBottom: '20px' }}>🤖 Active Agents</h2>
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))', gap: '16px' }}>
          {agents.slice(0, 5).map((agent) => (
            <div key={agent.agent_id} style={{
              padding: '16px',
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5)',
              border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
              borderRadius: '8px',
            }}>
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: '12px' }}>
                <h3 style={{ color: '#00ff88', fontSize: '14px' }}>{agent.agent_id}</h3>
                <span style={{
                  width: '8px',
                  height: '8px',
                  borderRadius: '50%',
                  backgroundColor: agent.status === 'ACTIVE' ? '#00ff88' : '#fbbf24',
                }} />
              </div>
              <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
                Layer: {agent.layer}
              </p>
              <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px' }}>
                Tasks: {agent.task_count_active} active | {agent.task_count_completed} completed
              </p>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React from 'react'

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent }) {
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '32px', color: '#00ff88', marginBottom: '30px' }}>🤖 Agents Management</h1>
      <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr))', gap: '20px' }}>
        {agents.map((agent) => (
          <div
            key={agent.agent_id}
            onClick={() => setSelectedAgent(agent)}
            style={{
              padding: '20px',
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5)',
              border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
              borderRadius: '10px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)'
              e.currentTarget.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8)'
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.borderColor = 'rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)'
              e.currentTarget.style.backgroundColor = 'rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5)'
            }}
          >
            <h3 style={{ color: '#00ff88', fontSize: '16px', marginBottom: '12px' }}>
              👤 {agent.agent_id}
            </h3>
            <div style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '12px' }}>
              <p>Layer: {agent.layer}</p>
              <p>Status: {agent.status}</p>
              <p>Tasks: {agent.task_count_active} active, {agent.task_count_completed} completed</p>
            </div>
            <button style={{
              width: '100%',
              padding: '8px',
              backgroundColor: '#00ff88',
              color: '#000',
              border: 'none',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}>
              View Details
            </button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

cat > src/scenes/Scene3D.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

export default function Scene3D() {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef(null)
  const cameraRef = useRef(null)
  const rendererRef = useRef(null)
  const novaRef = useRef(null)
  const fluxRef = useRef(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    // SCENE SETUP
    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)
    sceneRef.current = scene

    // CAMERA
    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
      75,
      containerRef.current.clientWidth / containerRef.current.clientHeight,
      0.1,
      1000
    )
    camera.position.z = 8
    cameraRef.current = camera

    // RENDERER
    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true })
    renderer.setSize(containerRef.current.clientWidth, containerRef.current.clientHeight)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)
    rendererRef.current = renderer

    // LIGHTING
    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const novaLight = new THREE.PointLight(0x00ff88, 1, 50)
    novaLight.position.set(-3, 0, 0)
    novaLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(novaLight)

    const fluxLight = new THREE.PointLight(0xd4af37, 1, 50)
    fluxLight.position.set(3, 0, 0)
    fluxLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(fluxLight)

    // CREATE NOVA (Vrouwelijke cyborg - groene ogen)
    const novaGroup = new THREE.Group()
    novaGroup.position.set(-4, 0, 0)

    const novaBody = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    const novaMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x1a1f3a,
      metalness: 0.8,
      roughness: 0.2,
    })
    const novaMesh = new THREE.Mesh(novaBody, novaMaterial)
    novaMesh.castShadow = true
    novaMesh.receiveShadow = true
    novaGroup.add(novaMesh)

    // NOVA Eyes (Groene glow)
    const novaEyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
    const novaEyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x00ff88,
      emissive: 0x00ff88,
      emissiveIntensity: 2,
    })
    const novaLeftEye = new THREE.Mesh(novaEyeGeometry, novaEyeMaterial)
    novaLeftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
    novaGroup.add(novaLeftEye)

    const novaRightEye = new THREE.Mesh(novaEyeGeometry, novaEyeMaterial)
    novaRightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
    novaGroup.add(novaRightEye)

    // NOVA Glow sphere
    const novaGlowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
    const novaGlowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: 0x00ff88,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.1,
      wireframe: true,
    })
    const novaGlow = new THREE.Mesh(novaGlowGeometry, novaGlowMaterial)
    novaGroup.add(novaGlow)

    scene.add(novaGroup)
    novaRef.current = novaGroup

    // CREATE FLUX (Mannelijke cyborg - gouden ogen)
    const fluxGroup = new THREE.Group()
    fluxGroup.position.set(4, 0, 0)

    const fluxBody = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8, 1.2, 0.8)
    const fluxMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x2b1810,
      metalness: 0.8,
      roughness: 0.2,
    })
    const fluxMesh = new THREE.Mesh(fluxBody, fluxMaterial)
    fluxMesh.castShadow = true
    fluxMesh.receiveShadow = true
    fluxGroup.add(fluxMesh)

    // FLUX Eyes (Gouden glow)
    const fluxEyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
    const fluxEyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0xffd700,
      emissive: 0xd4af37,
      emissiveIntensity: 2,
    })
    const fluxLeftEye = new THREE.Mesh(fluxEyeGeometry, fluxEyeMaterial)
    fluxLeftEye.position.set(-0.2, 0.3, 0.5)
    fluxGroup.add(fluxLeftEye)

    const fluxRightEye = new THREE.Mesh(fluxEyeGeometry, fluxEyeMaterial)
    fluxRightEye.position.set(0.2, 0.3, 0.5)
    fluxGroup.add(fluxRightEye)

    // FLUX Glow sphere
    const fluxGlowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.3, 32, 32)
    const fluxGlowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: 0xd4af37,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.1,
      wireframe: true,
    })
    const fluxGlow = new THREE.Mesh(fluxGlowGeometry, fluxGlowMaterial)
    fluxGroup.add(fluxGlow)

    scene.add(fluxGroup)
    fluxRef.current = fluxGroup

    // ANIMATION LOOP
    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)

      // Rotate cyborgs
      novaGroup.rotation.y += 0.005
      fluxGroup.rotation.y -= 0.005

      // Pulse glow
      const time = Date.now() * 0.001
      novaGlow.material.opacity = 0.1 + Math.sin(time) * 0.05
      fluxGlow.material.opacity = 0.1 + Math.sin(time) * 0.05

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    // HANDLE RESIZE
    const handleResize = () => {
      if (!containerRef.current) return
      const width = containerRef.current.clientWidth
      const height = containerRef.current.clientHeight
      camera.aspect = width / height
      camera.updateProjectionMatrix()
      renderer.setSize(width, height)
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize)

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize)
      containerRef.current?.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
    }
  }, [])

  return <div ref={containerRef} style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }} />
}
EOF

cat > src/scenes/ParticleSystem.jsx << 'EOF'
import * as THREE from 'three'

export default class ParticleSystem {
  constructor(scene) {
    this.scene = scene
    this.particles = []
    this.particlePool = []

    // Create particle geometry (reusable)
    this.particleGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.05, 8, 8)
    
    // Nova particles (green)
    this.novaParticleMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x00ff88,
      emissive: 0x00ff88,
      emissiveIntensity: 1,
    })

    // Flux particles (golden)
    this.fluxParticleMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0xd4af37,
      emissive: 0xd4af37,
      emissiveIntensity: 1,
    })
  }

  createTaskParticle(startPos, endPos, color = 'nova') {
    const material = color === 'nova' ? this.novaParticleMaterial : this.fluxParticleMaterial
    const particle = new THREE.Mesh(this.particleGeometry, material)
    
    particle.position.copy(startPos)
    particle.userData = {
      startPos: startPos.clone(),
      endPos: endPos.clone(),
      progress: 0,
      duration: 3, // 3 seconds
      startTime: Date.now(),
      color,
    }

    this.scene.add(particle)
    this.particles.push(particle)
    return particle
  }

  update() {
    const now = Date.now()
    
    for (let i = this.particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const particle = this.particles[i]
      const elapsed = (now - particle.userData.startTime) / 1000
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / particle.userData.duration, 1)

      if (progress < 1) {
        // Lerp position along curve
        particle.position.lerpVectors(
          particle.userData.startPos,
          particle.userData.endPos,
          progress
        )

        // Add some wave effect
        const wave = Math.sin(progress * Math.PI) * 0.5
        particle.position.y += wave

        // Fade out near end
        particle.material.opacity = 1 - progress * 0.5
      } else {
        // Remove particle when done
        this.scene.remove(particle)
        this.particles.splice(i, 1)
      }
    }
  }

  clear() {
    this.particles.forEach(p => this.scene.remove(p))
    this.particles = []
  }
}
EOF

cat > src/scenes/Scene3D.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'
import ParticleSystem from './ParticleSystem'

export default function Scene3D() {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef(null)
  const cameraRef = useRef(null)
  const rendererRef = useRef(null)
  const novaRef = useRef(null)
  const fluxRef = useRef(null)
  const particleSystemRef = useRef(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    // SCENE SETUP
    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)
    sceneRef.current = scene

    // CAMERA
    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
      75,
      containerRef.current.clientWidth / containerRef.current.clientHeight,
      0.1,
      1000
    )
    camera.position.z = 8
    cameraRef.current = camera

    // RENDERER
    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true })
    renderer.setSize(containerRef.current.clientWidth, containerRef.current.clientHeight)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)
    rendererRef.current = renderer

    // PARTICLE SYSTEM
    const particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(scene)
    particleSystemRef.current = particleSystem

    // LIGHTING
    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const novaLight = new THREE.PointLight(0x00ff88, 1, 50)
    novaLight.position.set(-3, 0, 0)
    novaLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(novaLight)

    const fluxLight = new THREE.PointLight(0xd4af37, 1, 50)
    fluxLight.position.set(3, 0, 0)
    fluxLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(fluxLight)

    // CREATE NOVA (Vrouwelijke cyborg - groene ogen)
    const novaGroup = new THREE.Group()
    novaGroup.position.set(-4, 0, 0)

    const novaBody = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    const novaMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x1a1f3a,
      metalness: 0.8,
      roughness: 0.2,
    })
    const novaMesh = new THREE.Mesh(novaBody, novaMaterial)
    novaMesh.castShadow = true
    novaMesh.receiveShadow = true
    novaGroup.add(novaMesh)

    // NOVA Eyes (Groene glow)
    const novaEyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
    const novaEyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x00ff88,
      emissive: 0x00ff88,
      emissiveIntensity: 2,
    })
    const novaLeftEye = new THREE.Mesh(novaEyeGeometry, novaEyeMaterial)
    novaLeftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
    novaGroup.add(novaLeftEye)

    const novaRightEye = new THREE.Mesh(novaEyeGeometry, novaEyeMaterial)
    novaRightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
    novaGroup.add(novaRightEye)

    // NOVA Glow sphere
    const novaGlowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
    const novaGlowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: 0x00ff88,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.1,
      wireframe: true,
    })
    const novaGlow = new THREE.Mesh(novaGlowGeometry, novaGlowMaterial)
    novaGroup.add(novaGlow)

    scene.add(novaGroup)
    novaRef.current = novaGroup

    // CREATE FLUX (Mannelijke cyborg - gouden ogen)
    const fluxGroup = new THREE.Group()
    fluxGroup.position.set(4, 0, 0)

    const fluxBody = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8, 1.2, 0.8)
    const fluxMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x2b1810,
      metalness: 0.8,
      roughness: 0.2,
    })
    const fluxMesh = new THREE.Mesh(fluxBody, fluxMaterial)
    fluxMesh.castShadow = true
    fluxMesh.receiveShadow = true
    fluxGroup.add(fluxMesh)

    // FLUX Eyes (Gouden glow)
    const fluxEyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
    const fluxEyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0xffd700,
      emissive: 0xd4af37,
      emissiveIntensity: 2,
    })
    const fluxLeftEye = new THREE.Mesh(fluxEyeGeometry, fluxEyeMaterial)
    fluxLeftEye.position.set(-0.2, 0.3, 0.5)
    fluxGroup.add(fluxLeftEye)

    const fluxRightEye = new THREE.Mesh(fluxEyeGeometry, fluxEyeMaterial)
    fluxRightEye.position.set(0.2, 0.3, 0.5)
    fluxGroup.add(fluxRightEye)

    // FLUX Glow sphere
    const fluxGlowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.3, 32, 32)
    const fluxGlowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: 0xd4af37,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.1,
      wireframe: true,
    })
    const fluxGlow = new THREE.Mesh(fluxGlowGeometry, fluxGlowMaterial)
    fluxGroup.add(fluxGlow)

    scene.add(fluxGroup)
    fluxRef.current = fluxGroup

    // DEMO: Launch particle every 2 seconds
    let taskCounter = 0
    const taskInterval = setInterval(() => {
      if (particleSystemRef.current && novaRef.current && fluxRef.current) {
        const color = taskCounter % 2 === 0 ? 'nova' : 'flux'
        const start = color === 'nova' ? novaRef.current.position : fluxRef.current.position
        const end = color === 'nova' ? fluxRef.current.position : novaRef.current.position
        
        particleSystemRef.current.createTaskParticle(
          start.clone(),
          end.clone(),
          color
        )
        taskCounter++
      }
    }, 2000)

    // ANIMATION LOOP
    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)

      // Rotate cyborgs
      novaGroup.rotation.y += 0.005
      fluxGroup.rotation.y -= 0.005

      // Pulse glow
      const time = Date.now() * 0.001
      novaGlow.material.opacity = 0.1 + Math.sin(time) * 0.05
      fluxGlow.material.opacity = 0.1 + Math.sin(time) * 0.05

      // Update particles
      if (particleSystemRef.current) {
        particleSystemRef.current.update()
      }

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    // HANDLE RESIZE
    const handleResize = () => {
      if (!containerRef.current) return
      const width = containerRef.current.clientWidth
      const height = containerRef.current.clientHeight
      camera.aspect = width / height
      camera.updateProjectionMatrix()
      renderer.setSize(width, height)
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize)

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize)
      clearInterval(taskInterval)
      if (containerRef.current && rendererRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(rendererRef.current.domElement)
      }
    }
  }, [])

  return <div ref={containerRef} style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }} />
}
EOF

cat > src/components/FluxPanel.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function FluxPanel() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([
    { type: 'system', text: 'FLUX v3.0 Online', timestamp: new Date() }
  ])
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const [isListening, setIsListening] = useState(false)
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null)

  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom()
  }, [messages])

  const handleSendMessage = async () => {
    if (!inputValue.trim()) return

    const userMessage = { type: 'user', text: inputValue, timestamp: new Date() }
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage])
    setInputValue('')

    // Simulate Flux response with decision log
    const decisionSteps = [
      { step: 'Received', text: `Task: ${inputValue}` },
      { step: 'Analyzing', text: 'Intent detection in progress...' },
      { step: 'Domain', text: 'Detected: Helix (Tech)' },
      { step: 'Route', text: 'Selected: Cortexia → nero' },
      { step: 'Decision', text: 'Task created: TASK-NEW' },
    ]

    // Add decision log messages
    for (const decision of decisionSteps) {
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500))
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
        type: 'decision',
        step: decision.step,
        text: decision.text,
        timestamp: new Date(),
      }])
    }

    // Final response
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500))
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
      type: 'flux',
      text: `✓ Task routed successfully. nero accepting...`,
      timestamp: new Date(),
    }])
  }

  return (
    <div style={{
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
      backgroundColor: '#0f172a',
      borderLeft: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
    }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '20px',
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <div style={{
            width: '10px',
            height: '10px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: '#d4af37',
            animation: 'pulse 2s infinite',
          }} />
          <h2 style={{ color: '#d4af37', fontSize: '16px', margin: 0 }}>👨‍🦾 FLUX</h2>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '11px', margin: 0 }}>Orchestration Engine</p>
      </div>

      {/* Messages */}
      <div style={{
        flex: 1,
        overflowY: 'auto',
        padding: '16px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        gap: '12px',
      }}>
        {messages.map((msg, idx) => (
          <div key={idx} style={{
            padding: '12px',
            backgroundColor: msg.type === 'user' ? 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1)' : 
                           msg.type === 'decision' ? 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.08)' :
                           'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.05)',
            borderLeft: `3px solid ${msg.type === 'user' ? '#00ff88' : 
                                    msg.type === 'decision' ? '#d4af37' : 
                                    '#64748b'}`,
            borderRadius: '6px',
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}>
            {msg.type === 'decision' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#d4af37', fontWeight: 'bold', margin: '0 0 4px 0' }}>
                [{msg.step}]
              </p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'system' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#64748b', margin: 0 }}>🔧 {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'user' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>You: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'flux' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#d4af37', margin: 0 }}>FLUX: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            <p style={{ color: '#475569', margin: '4px 0 0 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
              {msg.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString()}
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
      </div>

      {/* Input */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderTop: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <input
            type="text"
            value={inputValue}
            onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
            onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSendMessage()}
            placeholder="Command to FLUX..."
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px 12px',
              backgroundColor: '#1a1f3a',
              border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2)',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              color: '#e5e7eb',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          />
          <button
            onClick={handleSendMessage}
            style={{
              padding: '10px 16px',
              backgroundColor: '#d4af37',
              color: '#000',
              border: 'none',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          >
            Send
          </button>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '10px', margin: 0 }}>
          🎤 Voice input coming soon
        </p>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.5; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

Nu update App.jsx om FluxPanel te gebruiken:

bash
cat > src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'
import Viewport from './components/Viewport'
import FluxPanel from './components/FluxPanel'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState('dashboard')
  const [health, setHealth] = useState(null)
  const [agents, setAgents] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [wsConnected, setWsConnected] = useState(false)

  // Fetch data on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData()
    connectWebSocket()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const [healthRes, agentsRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/health`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/agents`)
      ])
      setHealth(healthRes.data)
      setAgents(agentsRes.data.agents || [])
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', error)
    }
  }

  const connectWebSocket = () => {
    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws/health')
      ws.onopen = () => setWsConnected(true)
      ws.onclose = () => setWsConnected(false)
      ws.onerror = () => setWsConnected(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="mcc-container">
        <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }}>
          <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '24px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>🚀 Loading MCC...</div>
            <div style={{ animation: 'spin 2s linear infinite', display: 'inline-block' }}>
              ⚙️
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', height: '100vh', gap: '0' }}>
      <Sidebar view={view} setView={setView} health={health} wsConnected={wsConnected} />
      <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>
        <Viewport view={view} health={health} agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={() => {}} />
      </div>
      <FluxPanel />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

cat > src/components/FluxPanel.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function FluxPanel() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([
    { type: 'system', text: 'FLUX v3.0 Online', timestamp: new Date() }
  ])
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const [isListening, setIsListening] = useState(false)
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null)

  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom()
  }, [messages])

  const handleSendMessage = async () => {
    if (!inputValue.trim()) return

    const userMessage = { type: 'user', text: inputValue, timestamp: new Date() }
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage])
    setInputValue('')

    // Simulate Flux response with decision log
    const decisionSteps = [
      { step: 'Received', text: `Task: ${inputValue}` },
      { step: 'Analyzing', text: 'Intent detection in progress...' },
      { step: 'Domain', text: 'Detected: Helix (Tech)' },
      { step: 'Route', text: 'Selected: Cortexia → nero' },
      { step: 'Decision', text: 'Task created: TASK-NEW' },
    ]

    // Add decision log messages
    for (const decision of decisionSteps) {
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500))
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
        type: 'decision',
        step: decision.step,
        text: decision.text,
        timestamp: new Date(),
      }])
    }

    // Final response
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500))
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
      type: 'flux',
      text: `✓ Task routed successfully. nero accepting...`,
      timestamp: new Date(),
    }])
  }

  return (
    <div style={{
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
      backgroundColor: '#0f172a',
      borderLeft: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      width: '380px',
    }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '20px',
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <div style={{
            width: '10px',
            height: '10px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: '#d4af37',
            animation: 'pulse 2s infinite',
          }} />
          <h2 style={{ color: '#d4af37', fontSize: '16px', margin: 0 }}>
            👨🏿‍💼 FLUX
          </h2>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '11px', margin: 0 }}>Orchestration Engine</p>
      </div>

      {/* Messages */}
      <div style={{
        flex: 1,
        overflowY: 'auto',
        padding: '16px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        gap: '12px',
      }}>
        {messages.map((msg, idx) => (
          <div key={idx} style={{
            padding: '12px',
            backgroundColor: msg.type === 'user' ? 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1)' : 
                           msg.type === 'decision' ? 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.08)' :
                           'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.05)',
            borderLeft: `3px solid ${msg.type === 'user' ? '#00ff88' : 
                                    msg.type === 'decision' ? '#d4af37' : 
                                    '#64748b'}`,
            borderRadius: '6px',
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}>
            {msg.type === 'decision' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#d4af37', fontWeight: 'bold', margin: '0 0 4px 0' }}>
                [{msg.step}]
              </p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'system' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#64748b', margin: 0 }}>🔧 {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'user' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>👩🏿‍💻 You: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'flux' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#d4af37', margin: 0 }}>👨🏿‍💼 FLUX: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            <p style={{ color: '#475569', margin: '4px 0 0 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
              {msg.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString()}
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
      </div>

      {/* Input */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderTop: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <input
            type="text"
            value={inputValue}
            onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
            onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSendMessage()}
            placeholder="Command to FLUX..."
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px 12px',
              backgroundColor: '#1a1f3a',
              border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2)',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              color: '#e5e7eb',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          />
          <button
            onClick={handleSendMessage}
            style={{
              padding: '10px 16px',
              backgroundColor: '#d4af37',
              color: '#000',
              border: 'none',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          >
            Send
          </button>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '10px', margin: 0 }}>
          🎤 Voice input coming soon
        </p>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.5; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

2. NOVA/FLUX SWITCH - Add to App.jsx:
bash
cat > src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'
import Viewport from './components/Viewport'
import FluxPanel from './components/FluxPanel'
import NovaPanel from './components/NovaPanel'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState('dashboard')
  const [health, setHealth] = useState(null)
  const [agents, setAgents] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [wsConnected, setWsConnected] = useState(false)
  const [activeAgent, setActiveAgent] = useState('flux') // 'flux' or 'nova'

  // Fetch data on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData()
    connectWebSocket()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const [healthRes, agentsRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/health`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/agents`)
      ])
      setHealth(healthRes.data)
      setAgents(agentsRes.data.agents || [])
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', error)
    }
  }

  const connectWebSocket = () => {
    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws/health')
      ws.onopen = () => setWsConnected(true)
      ws.onclose = () => setWsConnected(false)
      ws.onerror = () => setWsConnected(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="mcc-container">
        <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }}>
          <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '24px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>🚀 Loading MCC...</div>
            <div style={{ animation: 'spin 2s linear infinite', display: 'inline-block' }}>
              ⚙️
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', height: '100vh', gap: '0' }}>
      <Sidebar view={view} setView={setView} health={health} wsConnected={wsConnected} />
      <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>
        <Viewport view={view} health={health} agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={() => {}} />
      </div>
      
      {/* RIGHT PANEL - SWITCH BETWEEN FLUX & NOVA */}
      <div style={{
        width: '380px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        backgroundColor: '#0f172a',
        borderLeft: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        {/* Toggle Buttons */}
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex',
          gap: '8px',
          padding: '12px',
          borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
        }}>
          <button
            onClick={() => setActiveAgent('flux')}
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px',
              backgroundColor: activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#d4af37' : '#1a1f3a',
              color: activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#000' : '#d4af37',
              border: `1px solid ${activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#d4af37' : 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3)'}`,
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
          >
            👨🏿‍💼 FLUX
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setActiveAgent('nova')}
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px',
              backgroundColor: activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#00ff88' : '#1a1f3a',
              color: activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#000' : '#00ff88',
              border: `1px solid ${activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#00ff88' : 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)'}`,
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
          >
            👩🏿‍💼 NOVA
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Panel Content */}
        {activeAgent === 'flux' ? (
          <FluxPanel />
        ) : (
          <NovaPanel />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'

export default function NovaPanel() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([
    { type: 'system', text: 'NOVA v3.0 Online - Intake Gateway', timestamp: new Date() }
  ])
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null)

  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom()
  }, [messages])

  const handleSendMessage = async () => {
    if (!inputValue.trim()) return

    const userMessage = { type: 'user', text: inputValue, timestamp: new Date() }
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage])
    setInputValue('')

    // Simulate Nova intake
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 300))
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
      type: 'nova',
      text: `📥 Intake received. Routing to FLUX for orchestration...`,
      timestamp: new Date(),
    }])
  }

  return (
    <div style={{
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
      overflow: 'hidden',
    }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <div style={{
            width: '10px',
            height: '10px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: '#00ff88',
            animation: 'pulse 2s infinite',
          }} />
          <h2 style={{ color: '#00ff88', fontSize: '16px', margin: 0 }}>
            👩🏿‍💼 NOVA
          </h2>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '11px', margin: 0 }}>Intake Gateway</p>
      </div>

      {/* Messages */}
      <div style={{
        flex: 1,
        overflowY: 'auto',
        padding: '16px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        gap: '12px',
      }}>
        {messages.map((msg, idx) => (
          <div key={idx} style={{
            padding: '12px',
            backgroundColor: msg.type === 'user' ? 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1)' : 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.05)',
            borderLeft: `3px solid ${msg.type === 'user' ? '#00ff88' : '#64748b'}`,
            borderRadius: '6px',
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}>
            {msg.type === 'system' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#64748b', margin: 0 }}>🔧 {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'user' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>You: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'nova' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>👩🏿‍💼 NOVA: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            <p style={{ color: '#475569', margin: '4px 0 0 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
              {msg.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString()}
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
      </div>

      {/* Input */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderTop: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <input
            type="text"
            value={inputValue}
            onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
            onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSendMessage()}
            placeholder="Request to NOVA..."
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px 12px',
              backgroundColor: '#1a1f3a',
              border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2)',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              color: '#e5e7eb',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          />
          <button
            onClick={handleSendMessage}
            style={{
              padding: '10px 16px',
              backgroundColor: '#00ff88',
              color: '#000',
              border: 'none',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          >
            Send
          </button>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '10px', margin: 0 }}>
          🎤 Voice input coming soon
        </p>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.5; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

import React from 'react'
import Scene3D from '../../scenes/Scene3D'

export default function SimulationView({ agents }) {
  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%', position: 'relative' }}>
      <Scene3D />
      
      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        top: '20px',
        left: '20px',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9)',
        border: '1px solid rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)',
        padding: '20px',
        borderRadius: '10px',
        maxWidth: '300px',
      }}>
        <h2 style={{ color: '#00ff88', marginBottom: '16px', fontSize: '16px' }}>
          🎬 3D System Visualization
        </h2>
        <div style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '12px' }}>
          <p style={{ marginBottom: '8px' }}>👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA (green eyes - Feminine)</p>
          <p style={{ marginBottom: '8px' }}>👨🏿 FLUX (golden eyes - Masculine)</p>
          <p style={{ marginBottom: '12px' }}>Total Agents: {agents.length}</p>
          <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', fontSize: '10px' }}>
            Rotating... task flows coming soon
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        bottom: '20px',
        right: '20px',
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9)',
        border: '1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3)',
        padding: '16px',
        borderRadius: '10px',
      }}>
        <p style={{ color: '#d4af37', fontSize: '12px' }}>
          ⚡ Real-time 3D Rendering
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > src/components/FluxPanel.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function FluxPanel() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([
    { type: 'system', text: 'FLUX v3.0 Online', timestamp: new Date() }
  ])
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const [isListening, setIsListening] = useState(false)
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null)

  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom()
  }, [messages])

  const handleSendMessage = async () => {
    if (!inputValue.trim()) return

    const userMessage = { type: 'user', text: inputValue, timestamp: new Date() }
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage])
    setInputValue('')

    // Simulate Flux response with decision log
    const decisionSteps = [
      { step: 'Received', text: `Task: ${inputValue}` },
      { step: 'Analyzing', text: 'Intent detection in progress...' },
      { step: 'Domain', text: 'Detected: Helix (Tech)' },
      { step: 'Route', text: 'Selected: Cortexia → nero' },
      { step: 'Decision', text: 'Task created: TASK-NEW' },
    ]

    // Add decision log messages
    for (const decision of decisionSteps) {
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500))
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
        type: 'decision',
        step: decision.step,
        text: decision.text,
        timestamp: new Date(),
      }])
    }

    // Final response
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500))
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
      type: 'flux',
      text: `✓ Task routed successfully. nero accepting...`,
      timestamp: new Date(),
    }])
  }

  return (
    <div style={{
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
      backgroundColor: '#0f172a',
      borderLeft: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      width: '380px',
    }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '20px',
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <div style={{
            width: '10px',
            height: '10px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: '#d4af37',
            animation: 'pulse 2s infinite',
          }} />
          <h2 style={{ color: '#d4af37', fontSize: '16px', margin: 0 }}>
            👨🏿 FLUX
          </h2>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '11px', margin: 0 }}>Orchestration Engine</p>
      </div>

      {/* Messages */}
      <div style={{
        flex: 1,
        overflowY: 'auto',
        padding: '16px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        gap: '12px',
      }}>
        {messages.map((msg, idx) => (
          <div key={idx} style={{
            padding: '12px',
            backgroundColor: msg.type === 'user' ? 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1)' : 
                           msg.type === 'decision' ? 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.08)' :
                           'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.05)',
            borderLeft: `3px solid ${msg.type === 'user' ? '#00ff88' : 
                                    msg.type === 'decision' ? '#d4af37' : 
                                    '#64748b'}`,
            borderRadius: '6px',
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}>
            {msg.type === 'decision' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#d4af37', fontWeight: 'bold', margin: '0 0 4px 0' }}>
                [{msg.step}]
              </p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'system' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#64748b', margin: 0 }}>🔧 {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'user' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>👩🏿‍🦰 You: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'flux' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#d4af37', margin: 0 }}>👨🏿 FLUX: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            <p style={{ color: '#475569', margin: '4px 0 0 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
              {msg.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString()}
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
      </div>

      {/* Input */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderTop: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <input
            type="text"
            value={inputValue}
            onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
            onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSendMessage()}
            placeholder="Command to FLUX..."
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px 12px',
              backgroundColor: '#1a1f3a',
              border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2)',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              color: '#e5e7eb',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          />
          <button
            onClick={handleSendMessage}
            style={{
              padding: '10px 16px',
              backgroundColor: '#d4af37',
              color: '#000',
              border: 'none',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          >
            Send
          </button>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '10px', margin: 0 }}>
          🎤 Voice input coming soon
        </p>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.5; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'

export default function NovaPanel() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([
    { type: 'system', text: 'NOVA v3.0 Online - Intake Gateway', timestamp: new Date() }
  ])
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null)

  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom()
  }, [messages])

  const handleSendMessage = async () => {
    if (!inputValue.trim()) return

    const userMessage = { type: 'user', text: inputValue, timestamp: new Date() }
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage])
    setInputValue('')

    // Simulate Nova intake
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 300))
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
      type: 'nova',
      text: `📥 Intake received. Routing to FLUX for orchestration...`,
      timestamp: new Date(),
    }])
  }

  return (
    <div style={{
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
      overflow: 'hidden',
    }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <div style={{
            width: '10px',
            height: '10px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: '#00ff88',
            animation: 'pulse 2s infinite',
          }} />
          <h2 style={{ color: '#00ff88', fontSize: '16px', margin: 0 }}>
            👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA
          </h2>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '11px', margin: 0 }}>Intake Gateway</p>
      </div>

      {/* Messages */}
      <div style={{
        flex: 1,
        overflowY: 'auto',
        padding: '16px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        gap: '12px',
      }}>
        {messages.map((msg, idx) => (
          <div key={idx} style={{
            padding: '12px',
            backgroundColor: msg.type === 'user' ? 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1)' : 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.05)',
            borderLeft: `3px solid ${msg.type === 'user' ? '#00ff88' : '#64748b'}`,
            borderRadius: '6px',
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}>
            {msg.type === 'system' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#64748b', margin: 0 }}>🔧 {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'user' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>You: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'nova' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            <p style={{ color: '#475569', margin: '4px 0 0 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
              {msg.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString()}
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
      </div>

      {/* Input */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderTop: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <input
            type="text"
            value={inputValue}
            onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
            onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSendMessage()}
            placeholder="Request to NOVA..."
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px 12px',
              backgroundColor: '#1a1f3a',
              border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2)',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              color: '#e5e7eb',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          />
          <button
            onClick={handleSendMessage}
            style={{
              flex: 0,
              padding: '10px 16px',
              backgroundColor: '#00ff88',
              color: '#000',
              border: 'none',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          >
            Send
          </button>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '10px', margin: 0 }}>
          🎤 Voice input coming soon
        </p>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.5; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}

bash
cat > src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'
import Viewport from './components/Viewport'
import FluxPanel from './components/FluxPanel'
import NovaPanel from './components/NovaPanel'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState('dashboard')
  const [health, setHealth] = useState(null)
  const [agents, setAgents] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [wsConnected, setWsConnected] = useState(false)
  const [activeAgent, setActiveAgent] = useState('flux') // 'flux' or 'nova'

  // Fetch data on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData()
    connectWebSocket()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const [healthRes, agentsRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/health`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/agents`)
      ])
      setHealth(healthRes.data)
      setAgents(agentsRes.data.agents || [])
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', error)
    }
  }

  const connectWebSocket = () => {
    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws/health')
      ws.onopen = () => setWsConnected(true)
      ws.onclose = () => setWsConnected(false)
      ws.onerror = () => setWsConnected(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="mcc-container">
        <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }}>
          <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '24px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>🚀 Loading MCC...</div>
            <div style={{ animation: 'spin 2s linear infinite', display: 'inline-block' }}>
              ⚙️
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', height: '100vh', gap: '0' }}>
      <Sidebar view={view} setView={setView} health={health} wsConnected={wsConnected} />
      <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>
        <Viewport view={view} health={health} agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={() => {}} />
      </div>
      
      {/* RIGHT PANEL - SWITCH BETWEEN FLUX & NOVA */}
      <div style={{
        width: '380px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        backgroundColor: '#0f172a',
        borderLeft: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        {/* Toggle Buttons */}
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex',
          gap: '8px',
          padding: '12px',
          borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
        }}>
          <button
            onClick={() => setActiveAgent('flux')}
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px',
              backgroundColor: activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#d4af37' : '#1a1f3a',
              color: activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#000' : '#d4af37',
              border: `1px solid ${activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#d4af37' : 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3)'}`,
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
          >
            👨🏿 FLUX
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setActiveAgent('nova')}
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px',
              backgroundColor: activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#00ff88' : '#1a1f3a',
              color: activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#000' : '#00ff88',
              border: `1px solid ${activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#00ff88' : 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)'}`,
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
          >
            👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Panel Content */}
        {activeAgent === 'flux' ? (
          <FluxPanel />
        ) : (
          <NovaPanel />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

cat > src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'
import Viewport from './components/Viewport'
import FluxPanel from './components/FluxPanel'
import NovaPanel from './components/NovaPanel'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState('dashboard')
  const [health, setHealth] = useState(null)
  const [agents, setAgents] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [wsConnected, setWsConnected] = useState(false)
  const [activeAgent, setActiveAgent] = useState('flux')

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData()
    connectWebSocket()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const [healthRes, agentsRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/health`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/agents`)
      ])
      setHealth(healthRes.data)
      setAgents(agentsRes.data.agents || [])
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', error)
    }
  }

  const connectWebSocket = () => {
    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws/health')
      ws.onopen = () => setWsConnected(true)
      ws.onclose = () => setWsConnected(false)
      ws.onerror = () => setWsConnected(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="mcc-container">
        <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center' }}>
          <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '24px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>🚀 Loading MCC...</div>
            <div style={{ animation: 'spin 2s linear infinite', display: 'inline-block' }}>
              ⚙️
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', height: '100vh' }}>
      <Sidebar view={view} setView={setView} health={health} wsConnected={wsConnected} />
      
      <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>
        <Viewport view={view} health={health} agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={() => {}} />
      </div>
      
      {/* RIGHT PANEL */}
      <div style={{
        width: '380px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        backgroundColor: '#0f172a',
        borderLeft: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        {/* TOGGLE BUTTONS */}
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex',
          gap: '8px',
          padding: '12px',
          borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
          backgroundColor: '#0a0e27',
        }}>
          <button
            onClick={() => setActiveAgent('flux')}
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '12px',
              backgroundColor: activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#d4af37' : '#1a1f3a',
              color: activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#000' : '#d4af37',
              border: `2px solid ${activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#d4af37' : 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3)'}`,
              borderRadius: '8px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '14px',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              if (activeAgent !== 'flux') {
                e.target.style.borderColor = 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.6)'
              }
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              if (activeAgent !== 'flux') {
                e.target.style.borderColor = 'rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3)'
              }
            }}
          >
            👨🏿 FLUX
          </button>
          
          <button
            onClick={() => setActiveAgent('nova')}
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '12px',
              backgroundColor: activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#00ff88' : '#1a1f3a',
              color: activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#000' : '#00ff88',
              border: `2px solid ${activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#00ff88' : 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)'}`,
              borderRadius: '8px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '14px',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              if (activeAgent !== 'nova') {
                e.target.style.borderColor = 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.6)'
              }
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              if (activeAgent !== 'nova') {
                e.target.style.borderColor = 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3)'
              }
            }}
          >
            👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* PANEL CONTENT */}
        <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
          {activeAgent === 'flux' ? <FluxPanel /> : <NovaPanel />}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'

export default function NovaPanel() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([
    { type: 'system', text: 'NOVA v3.0 Online - Intake Gateway', timestamp: new Date() }
  ])
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null)

  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom()
  }, [messages])

  const handleSendMessage = async () => {
    if (!inputValue.trim()) return

    const userMessage = { type: 'user', text: inputValue, timestamp: new Date() }
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage])
    setInputValue('')

    // Simulate Nova intake
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 300))
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
      type: 'nova',
      text: `📥 Intake received. Routing to FLUX for orchestration...`,
      timestamp: new Date(),
    }])
  }

  return (
    <div style={{
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
      overflow: 'hidden',
    }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <div style={{
            width: '10px',
            height: '10px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: '#00ff88',
            animation: 'pulse 2s infinite',
          }} />
          <h2 style={{ color: '#00ff88', fontSize: '16px', margin: 0 }}>
            👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA
          </h2>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '11px', margin: 0 }}>Intake Gateway</p>
      </div>

      {/* Messages */}
      <div style={{
        flex: 1,
        overflowY: 'auto',
        padding: '16px',
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        gap: '12px',
      }}>
        {messages.map((msg, idx) => (
          <div key={idx} style={{
            padding: '12px',
            backgroundColor: msg.type === 'user' ? 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.1)' : 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.05)',
            borderLeft: `3px solid ${msg.type === 'user' ? '#00ff88' : '#64748b'}`,
            borderRadius: '6px',
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}>
            {msg.type === 'system' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#64748b', margin: 0 }}>🔧 {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'user' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>You: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            {msg.type === 'nova' && (
              <p style={{ color: '#00ff88', margin: 0 }}>👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA: {msg.text}</p>
            )}
            <p style={{ color: '#475569', margin: '4px 0 0 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
              {msg.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString()}
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
      </div>

      {/* Input */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        borderTop: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
          <input
            type="text"
            value={inputValue}
            onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
            onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSendMessage()}
            placeholder="Request to NOVA..."
            style={{
              flex: 1,
              padding: '10px 12px',
              backgroundColor: '#1a1f3a',
              border: '1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2)',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              color: '#e5e7eb',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          />
          <button
            onClick={handleSendMessage}
            style={{
              padding: '10px 16px',
              backgroundColor: '#00ff88',
              color: '#000',
              border: 'none',
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontWeight: 'bold',
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}
          >
            Send
          </button>
        </div>
        <p style={{ color: '#64748b', fontSize: '10px', margin: 0 }}>
          🎤 Voice input coming soon
        </p>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.5; }
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
