cat > app/db/models.py << 'EOF'
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text, Float, Boolean, JSON, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from datetime import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    hashed_password = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Agent(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agents"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    layer = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="IDLE")
    model = Column(String, default="claude-3.5-sonnet")
    domain = Column(String)
    task_count_active = Column(Integer, default=0)
    task_count_completed = Column(Integer, default=0)
    cost_today = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

class Task(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tasks"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    task_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    status = Column(String, default="CREATED")
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"))
    project_id = Column(String)
    priority = Column(String, default="NORMAL")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)
    completed_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)

class Project(Base):
    __tablename__ = "projects"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    project_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="ACTIVE")
    progress = Column(Integer, default=0)
    budget = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    spent = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Alert(Base):
    __tablename__ = "alerts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    alert_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    severity = Column(String, default="INFO")
    message = Column(Text)
    agent_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    resolved = Column(Boolean, default=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Journal(Base):
    __tablename__ = "journals"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"), index=True)
    entry_type = Column(String)  # 'conversation', 'task', 'decision', 'error'
    content = Column(Text)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    metadata = Column(JSON, default={})
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, index=True)

class AgentCost(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agent_costs"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"), index=True)
    model = Column(String)
    tokens_input = Column(Integer, default=0)
    tokens_output = Column(Integer, default=0)
    cost = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, index=True)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
EOF

cat > app/api/journal_routes.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import desc
from app.db.database import get_db
from app.db.models import Journal, Agent
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/journal", tags=["journal"])

@router.post("/add/{agent_id}")
async def add_journal_entry(
    agent_id: str,
    entry_type: str,
    content: str,
    task_id: str = None,
    metadata: dict = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Add entry to agent's journal/memory"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    journal = Journal(
        agent_id=agent_id,
        entry_type=entry_type,
        content=content,
        task_id=task_id,
        metadata=metadata or {}
    )
    db.add(journal)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(journal)
    
    return {
        "id": journal.id,
        "agent_id": journal.agent_id,
        "entry_type": journal.entry_type,
        "created_at": journal.created_at.isoformat()
    }

@router.get("/{agent_id}")
async def get_agent_journal(
    agent_id: str,
    limit: int = 100,
    hours: int = 24,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get agent's journal entries (last N hours)"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(hours=hours)
    
    entries = db.query(Journal).filter(
        Journal.agent_id == agent_id,
        Journal.created_at >= since
    ).order_by(desc(Journal.created_at)).limit(limit).all()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "entries_count": len(entries),
        "time_range": f"Last {hours} hours",
        "entries": [
            {
                "id": e.id,
                "entry_type": e.entry_type,
                "content": e.content,
                "task_id": e.task_id,
                "created_at": e.created_at.isoformat()
            }
            for e in entries
        ]
    }

@router.get("/{agent_id}/summary")
async def get_agent_summary(
    agent_id: str,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get agent's activity summary from journal"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    # Get stats from last 24 hours
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(hours=24)
    
    all_entries = db.query(Journal).filter(
        Journal.agent_id == agent_id,
        Journal.created_at >= since
    ).all()
    
    conversations = [e for e in all_entries if e.entry_type == 'conversation']
    tasks = [e for e in all_entries if e.entry_type == 'task']
    decisions = [e for e in all_entries if e.entry_type == 'decision']
    errors = [e for e in all_entries if e.entry_type == 'error']
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "agent_name": agent.agent_id,
        "model": agent.model,
        "statistics": {
            "conversations": len(conversations),
            "tasks_completed": len(tasks),
            "decisions_made": len(decisions),
            "errors_encountered": len(errors),
            "total_entries": len(all_entries)
        },
        "recent_activity": [
            {
                "timestamp": e.created_at.isoformat(),
                "type": e.entry_type,
                "preview": e.content[:100]
            }
            for e in sorted(all_entries, key=lambda x: x.created_at, reverse=True)[:10]
        ]
    }

@router.delete("/{agent_id}/clear")
async def clear_journal(
    agent_id: str,
    older_than_hours: int = 168,  # 1 week default
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Clear old journal entries (default: older than 1 week)"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    cutoff = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(hours=older_than_hours)
    
    deleted = db.query(Journal).filter(
        Journal.agent_id == agent_id,
        Journal.created_at < cutoff
    ).delete()
    
    db.commit()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "entries_deleted": deleted,
        "cutoff_date": cutoff.isoformat()
    }
EOF
ENTER.

from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from app.config import settings
from app.db.database import engine, init_db, Base
from app.api import routes, analytics_routes
from app.api import journal_routes
from app.core import websocket_routes

# Initialize database

init_db()

@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    print("🚀 MCC Backend Starting...")
    yield
    print("🛑 MCC Backend Shutting down...")

app = FastAPI(
    title="Mission Control Center v3.0",
    description="ARC AI ANGELS - Orchestration & Analytics",
    version="3.0.0",
    lifespan=lifespan
)

# CORS
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

# Routes
app.include_router(routes.router)
app.include_router(analytics_routes.router)
app.include_router(journal_routes.router)
app.include_router(websocket_routes.router)

@app.get("/")
async def root():
    return {"message": "MCC v3.0 Online", "status": "operational"}

@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "healthy", "version": "3.0.0"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)

22 apr

Nu maak je de Cost Tracking system:

bash
cat > app/api/cost_routes.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import desc
from app.db.database import get_db
from app.db.models import Agent, AgentCost
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/costs", tags=["costs"])

# Model pricing (per 1K tokens)
PRICING = {
    "gpt-4": {"input": 0.03, "output": 0.06},
    "gpt-4-turbo": {"input": 0.01, "output": 0.03},
    "claude-3.5-sonnet": {"input": 0.003, "output": 0.015},
    "claude-3-opus": {"input": 0.015, "output": 0.075},
    "claude-3-sonnet": {"input": 0.003, "output": 0.015},
    "claude-3-haiku": {"input": 0.00025, "output": 0.00125},
}

@router.post("/track/{agent_id}")
async def track_cost(
    agent_id: str,
    model: str,
    tokens_input: int,
    tokens_output: int,
    task_id: str = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Track API cost for an agent's API call"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    # Get pricing
    price = PRICING.get(model, PRICING["claude-3.5-sonnet"])
    
    # Calculate cost
    cost = (tokens_input * price["input"] / 1000) + (tokens_output * price["output"] / 1000)
    
    # Create cost record
    cost_record = AgentCost(
        agent_id=agent_id,
        model=model,
        tokens_input=tokens_input,
        tokens_output=tokens_output,
        cost=cost,
        task_id=task_id
    )
    
    db.add(cost_record)
    
    # Update agent's daily cost
    agent.cost_today += cost
    db.commit()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "model": model,
        "tokens": tokens_input + tokens_output,
        "cost": round(cost, 4),
        "agent_total_today": round(agent.cost_today, 2)
    }

@router.get("/{agent_id}/daily")
async def get_daily_costs(
    agent_id: str,
    days: int = 1,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get agent's daily costs"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=days)
    
    costs = db.query(AgentCost).filter(
        AgentCost.agent_id == agent_id,
        AgentCost.date >= since
    ).order_by(desc(AgentCost.date)).all()
    
    total_cost = sum(c.cost for c in costs)
    total_tokens = sum(c.tokens_input + c.tokens_output for c in costs)
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "period": f"Last {days} day(s)",
        "total_cost": round(total_cost, 2),
        "total_tokens": total_tokens,
        "calls_count": len(costs),
        "avg_cost_per_call": round(total_cost / len(costs) if costs else 0, 4),
        "breakdown_by_model": {
            model: {
                "calls": len([c for c in costs if c.model == model]),
                "total_cost": round(sum(c.cost for c in costs if c.model == model), 2),
                "tokens": sum(c.tokens_input + c.tokens_output for c in costs if c.model == model)
            }
            for model in set(c.model for c in costs)
        }
    }

@router.get("/summary/all")
async def get_all_costs_summary(
    days: int = 1,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get total costs for all agents"""
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=days)
    
    all_costs = db.query(AgentCost).filter(
        AgentCost.date >= since
    ).all()
    
    agents = db.query(Agent).all()
    
    total_cost = sum(c.cost for c in all_costs)
    
    agent_costs = {}
    for agent in agents:
        agent_total = sum(c.cost for c in all_costs if c.agent_id == agent.agent_id)
        if agent_total > 0:
            agent_costs[agent.agent_id] = {
                "cost": round(agent_total, 2),
                "model": agent.model,
                "calls": len([c for c in all_costs if c.agent_id == agent.agent_id])
            }
    
    return {
        "period": f"Last {days} day(s)",
        "total_system_cost": round(total_cost, 2),
        "total_calls": len(all_costs),
        "agents_count": len([a for a in agents if a.agent_id in agent_costs]),
        "agent_breakdown": agent_costs,
        "most_expensive_agent": max(agent_costs.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]["cost"])[0] if agent_costs else None
    }

@router.put("/{agent_id}/model")
async def change_agent_model(
    agent_id: str,
    new_model: str,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Change agent's AI model (affects future costs)"""
    if new_model not in PRICING:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"Unknown model: {new_model}")
    
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    old_model = agent.model
    agent.model = new_model
    agent.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()
    db.commit()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "old_model": old_model,
        "new_model": new_model,
        "pricing": PRICING[new_model],
        "message": f"Model changed from {old_model} to {new_model}"
    }
EOF
ENTER.

from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from app.config import settings
from app.db.database import engine, init_db, Base
from app.api.routes import router as routes_router
from app.api.analytics_routes import router as analytics_router
from app.api.journal_routes import router as journal_router
from app.api.cost_routes import router as cost_router
from app.core.websocket_routes import router as ws_router

# Initialize database
Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
init_db()

@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    print("🚀 MCC Backend Starting...")
    yield
    print("🛑 MCC Backend Shutting down...")

app = FastAPI(
    title="Mission Control Center v3.0",
    description="ARC AI ANGELS - Orchestration & Analytics",
    version="3.0.0",
    lifespan=lifespan
)

# CORS
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

# Routes
app.include_router(routes_router)
app.include_router(analytics_router)
app.include_router(journal_router)
app.include_router(cost_router)
app.include_router(ws_router)

@app.get("/")
async def root():
    return {"message": "MCC v3.0 Online", "status": "operational"}

@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "healthy", "version": "3.0.0"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)
EOF

cat > app/api/journal_routes.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import desc
from app.db.database import get_db
from app.db.models import Journal, Agent
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/journal", tags=["journal"])

@router.post("/add/{agent_id}")
async def add_journal_entry(
    agent_id: str,
    entry_type: str,
    content: str,
    task_id: str = None,
    metadata: dict = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Add entry to agent's journal/memory"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    journal = Journal(
        agent_id=agent_id,
        entry_type=entry_type,
        content=content,
        task_id=task_id,
        metadata=metadata or {}
    )
    db.add(journal)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(journal)
    
    return {
        "id": journal.id,
        "agent_id": journal.agent_id,
        "entry_type": journal.entry_type,
        "created_at": journal.created_at.isoformat()
    }

@router.get("/{agent_id}")
async def get_agent_journal(
    agent_id: str,
    limit: int = 100,
    hours: int = 24,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get agent's journal entries (last N hours)"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(hours=hours)
    
    entries = db.query(Journal).filter(
        Journal.agent_id == agent_id,
        Journal.created_at >= since
    ).order_by(desc(Journal.created_at)).limit(limit).all()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "entries_count": len(entries),
        "time_range": f"Last {hours} hours",
        "entries": [
            {
                "id": e.id,
                "entry_type": e.entry_type,
                "content": e.content,
                "task_id": e.task_id,
                "created_at": e.created_at.isoformat()
            }
            for e in entries
        ]
    }

@router.get("/{agent_id}/summary")
async def get_agent_summary(
    agent_id: str,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get agent's activity summary from journal"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(hours=24)
    
    all_entries = db.query(Journal).filter(
        Journal.agent_id == agent_id,
        Journal.created_at >= since
    ).all()
    
    conversations = [e for e in all_entries if e.entry_type == 'conversation']
    tasks = [e for e in all_entries if e.entry_type == 'task']
    decisions = [e for e in all_entries if e.entry_type == 'decision']
    errors = [e for e in all_entries if e.entry_type == 'error']
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "agent_name": agent.agent_id,
        "model": agent.model,
        "statistics": {
            "conversations": len(conversations),
            "tasks_completed": len(tasks),
            "decisions_made": len(decisions),
            "errors_encountered": len(errors),
            "total_entries": len(all_entries)
        },
        "recent_activity": [
            {
                "timestamp": e.created_at.isoformat(),
                "type": e.entry_type,
                "preview": e.content[:100]
            }
            for e in sorted(all_entries, key=lambda x: x.created_at, reverse=True)[:10]
        ]
    }

@router.delete("/{agent_id}/clear")
async def clear_journal(
    agent_id: str,
    older_than_hours: int = 168,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Clear old journal entries"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    cutoff = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(hours=older_than_hours)
    
    deleted = db.query(Journal).filter(
        Journal.agent_id == agent_id,
        Journal.created_at < cutoff
    ).delete()
    
    db.commit()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "entries_deleted": deleted,
        "cutoff_date": cutoff.isoformat()
    }
EOF

Nu ook cost_routes.py:

bash
cat > app/api/cost_routes.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import desc
from app.db.database import get_db
from app.db.models import Agent, AgentCost
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/costs", tags=["costs"])

PRICING = {
    "gpt-4": {"input": 0.03, "output": 0.06},
    "gpt-4-turbo": {"input": 0.01, "output": 0.03},
    "claude-3.5-sonnet": {"input": 0.003, "output": 0.015},
    "claude-3-opus": {"input": 0.015, "output": 0.075},
    "claude-3-sonnet": {"input": 0.003, "output": 0.015},
    "claude-3-haiku": {"input": 0.00025, "output": 0.00125},
}

@router.post("/track/{agent_id}")
async def track_cost(
    agent_id: str,
    model: str,
    tokens_input: int,
    tokens_output: int,
    task_id: str = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Track API cost for an agent"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    price = PRICING.get(model, PRICING["claude-3.5-sonnet"])
    cost = (tokens_input * price["input"] / 1000) + (tokens_output * price["output"] / 1000)
    
    cost_record = AgentCost(
        agent_id=agent_id,
        model=model,
        tokens_input=tokens_input,
        tokens_output=tokens_output,
        cost=cost,
        task_id=task_id
    )
    
    db.add(cost_record)
    agent.cost_today += cost
    db.commit()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "model": model,
        "tokens": tokens_input + tokens_output,
        "cost": round(cost, 4),
        "agent_total_today": round(agent.cost_today, 2)
    }

@router.get("/{agent_id}/daily")
async def get_daily_costs(
    agent_id: str,
    days: int = 1,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get agent's daily costs"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=days)
    costs = db.query(AgentCost).filter(
        AgentCost.agent_id == agent_id,
        AgentCost.date >= since
    ).order_by(desc(AgentCost.date)).all()
    
    total_cost = sum(c.cost for c in costs)
    total_tokens = sum(c.tokens_input + c.tokens_output for c in costs)
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "period": f"Last {days} day(s)",
        "total_cost": round(total_cost, 2),
        "total_tokens": total_tokens,
        "calls_count": len(costs),
        "avg_cost_per_call": round(total_cost / len(costs) if costs else 0, 4)
    }

@router.get("/summary/all")
async def get_all_costs_summary(
    days: int = 1,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get total costs for all agents"""
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=days)
    all_costs = db.query(AgentCost).filter(AgentCost.date >= since).all()
    agents = db.query(Agent).all()
    
    total_cost = sum(c.cost for c in all_costs)
    
    return {
        "period": f"Last {days} day(s)",
        "total_system_cost": round(total_cost, 2),
        "total_calls": len(all_costs)
    }

@router.put("/{agent_id}/model")
async def change_agent_model(
    agent_id: str,
    new_model: str,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Change agent's AI model"""
    if new_model not in PRICING:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"Unknown model: {new_model}")
    
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    old_model = agent.model
    agent.model = new_model
    db.commit()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "old_model": old_model,
        "new_model": new_model,
        "pricing": PRICING[new_model]
    }
EOF

from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text, Float, Boolean, JSON, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from datetime import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    hashed_password = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Agent(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agents"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    layer = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="IDLE")
    model = Column(String, default="claude-3.5-sonnet")
    domain = Column(String)
    task_count_active = Column(Integer, default=0)
    task_count_completed = Column(Integer, default=0)
    cost_today = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

class Task(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tasks"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    task_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    status = Column(String, default="CREATED")
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"))
    project_id = Column(String)
    priority = Column(String, default="NORMAL")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)
    completed_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)

class Project(Base):
    __tablename__ = "projects"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    project_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="ACTIVE")
    progress = Column(Integer, default=0)
    budget = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    spent = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Alert(Base):
    __tablename__ = "alerts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    alert_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    severity = Column(String, default="INFO")
    message = Column(Text)
    agent_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    resolved = Column(Boolean, default=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Journal(Base):
    __tablename__ = "journals"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"), index=True)
    entry_type = Column(String)
    content = Column(Text)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    metadata = Column(JSON, default={})
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, index=True)

class AgentCost(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agent_costs"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"), index=True)
    model = Column(String)
    tokens_input = Column(Integer, default=0)
    tokens_output = Column(Integer, default=0)
    cost = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, index=True)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
EOF

Fix models.py - change default dict syntax:

bash
cat > app/db/models.py << 'EOF'
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text, Float, Boolean, JSON, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from datetime import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    hashed_password = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Agent(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agents"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    layer = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="IDLE")
    model = Column(String, default="claude-3.5-sonnet")
    domain = Column(String)
    task_count_active = Column(Integer, default=0)
    task_count_completed = Column(Integer, default=0)
    cost_today = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

class Task(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tasks"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    task_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    status = Column(String, default="CREATED")
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"))
    project_id = Column(String)
    priority = Column(String, default="NORMAL")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)
    completed_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)

class Project(Base):
    __tablename__ = "projects"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    project_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="ACTIVE")
    progress = Column(Integer, default=0)
    budget = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    spent = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Alert(Base):
    __tablename__ = "alerts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    alert_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    severity = Column(String, default="INFO")
    message = Column(Text)
    agent_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    resolved = Column(Boolean, default=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Journal(Base):
    __tablename__ = "journals"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"), index=True)
    entry_type = Column(String)
    content = Column(Text)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    extra_data = Column(JSON, nullable=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, index=True)

class AgentCost(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agent_costs"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"), index=True)
    model = Column(String)
    tokens_input = Column(Integer, default=0)
    tokens_output = Column(Integer, default=0)
    cost = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, index=True)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
EOF
ENTER.

python3 -m app.main
ENTER.

🔴 WEBSOCKET_ROUTES HEEFT GEEN ROUTER!
Fix main.py - remove websocket import (we don't need it for now):

bash
cat > app/main.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from app.config import settings
from app.db.database import engine, init_db, Base
from app.api.routes import router as routes_router
from app.api.analytics_routes import router as analytics_router
from app.api.journal_routes import router as journal_router
from app.api.cost_routes import router as cost_router

# Initialize database
Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
init_db()

@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    print("🚀 MCC Backend Starting...")
    yield
    print("🛑 MCC Backend Shutting down...")

app = FastAPI(
    title="Mission Control Center v3.0",
    description="ARC AI ANGELS - Orchestration & Analytics",
    version="3.0.0",
    lifespan=lifespan
)

# CORS
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

# Routes
app.include_router(routes_router)
app.include_router(analytics_router)
app.include_router(journal_router)
app.include_router(cost_router)

@app.get("/")
async def root():
    return {"message": "MCC v3.0 Online", "status": "operational"}

@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "healthy", "version": "3.0.0"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)
EOF

Claude responded: 🔴 JOURNAL_ROUTES SYNTAX WRONG!
🔴 JOURNAL_ROUTES SYNTAX WRONG!
De POST parameters zijn query, niet body! Fix journal_routes.py:

bash
cat > app/api/journal_routes.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import desc
from app.db.database import get_db
from app.db.models import Journal, Agent
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/journal", tags=["journal"])

@router.post("/add/{agent_id}")
async def add_journal_entry(
    agent_id: str,
    entry_type: str = Query(...),
    content: str = Query(...),
    task_id: str = Query(None),
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Add entry to agent's journal/memory"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    journal = Journal(
        agent_id=agent_id,
        entry_type=entry_type,
        content=content,
        task_id=task_id,
        extra_data={}
    )
    db.add(journal)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(journal)
    
    return {
        "id": journal.id,
        "agent_id": journal.agent_id,
        "entry_type": journal.entry_type,
        "created_at": journal.created_at.isoformat()
    }

@router.get("/{agent_id}")
async def get_agent_journal(
    agent_id: str,
    limit: int = 100,
    hours: int = 24,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Get agent's journal entries"""
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(hours=hours)
    entries = db.query(Journal).filter(
        Journal.agent_id == agent_id,
        Journal.created_at >= since
    ).order_by(desc(Journal.created_at)).limit(limit).all()
    
    return {
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "entries_count": len(entries),
        "entries": [
            {
                "id": e.id,
                "entry_type": e.entry_type,
                "content": e.content,
                "created_at": e.created_at.isoformat()
            }
            for e in entries
        ]
    }
EOF

bash
cat > scripts/inject_test_data.py << 'EOF'
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from app.db.database import SessionLocal, engine, Base
from app.db.models import Agent, Task, Project, Alert
from datetime import datetime

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
db = SessionLocal()

try:
    # Create agents
    agents = [
        Agent(agent_id="nova", layer="nova", status="ACTIVE", model="claude-3.5-sonnet", task_count_completed=5),
        Agent(agent_id="flux_main", layer="flux", status="ACTIVE", model="claude-3.5-sonnet", task_count_completed=8),
        Agent(agent_id="cortexia", layer="omni", status="ACTIVE", model="gpt-4", domain="helix", task_count_completed=12),
        Agent(agent_id="nero", layer="sentinel", status="ACTIVE", model="gpt-4", domain="helix", task_count_completed=15),
        Agent(agent_id="sentinel_2", layer="sentinel", status="IDLE", model="claude-3.5-sonnet", domain="matrix"),
    ]
    
    for agent in agents:
        db.merge(agent)
    
    # Create tasks
    tasks = [
        Task(task_id="TASK-001", status="COMPLETED", agent_id="nero", project_id="PROJ-alpha"),
        Task(task_id="TASK-002", status="IN_PROGRESS", agent_id="nero", project_id="PROJ-alpha"),
        Task(task_id="TASK-003", status="IN_PROGRESS", agent_id="cortexia", project_id="PROJ-beta"),
        Task(task_id="TASK-004", status="BLOCKED", agent_id="nero", project_id="PROJ-alpha"),
        Task(task_id="TASK-005", status="COMPLETED", agent_id="sentinel_2", project_id="PROJ-gamma"),
        Task(task_id="TASK-006", status="ROUTED", agent_id="flux_main", project_id="PROJ-alpha"),
    ]
    
    for task in tasks:
        db.merge(task)
    
    # Create projects
    projects = [
        Project(project_id="PROJ-alpha", name="Project Alpha", status="ACTIVE", progress=50, budget=10000.0, spent=5000.0),
        Project(project_id="PROJ-beta", name="Project Beta", status="ACTIVE", progress=37, budget=15000.0, spent=5550.0),
        Project(project_id="PROJ-gamma", name="Project Gamma", status="ACTIVE", progress=66, budget=8000.0, spent=5280.0),
    ]
    
    for project in projects:
        db.merge(project)
    
    # Create alert
    alert = Alert(
        alert_id="ALERT-001",
        severity="WARNING",
        message="TASK-004 blocked - waiting for API key",
        agent_id="nero",
        task_id="TASK-004",
        resolved=False
    )
    db.merge(alert)
    
    db.commit()
    print("✅ Test data injected successfully!")
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ Error: {e}")
    db.rollback()
finally:
    db.close()
EOF

🏭 3D FACTORY ELEMENTS
NOVA (Intake)
├─ Input queue visualization
├─ Task counter
└─ Glow intensity = workload

FLUX (Orchestration)
├─ Central position
├─ Rotation speed = decision rate
└─ Glowing lines to chosen agents

OMNI LEADS (5 domains)
├─ Arranged in semi-circle
├─ Color per domain (Helix=blue, Matrix=purple, etc)
└─ Pulse = activity

SENTINELS (25 agents)
├─ Positioned under their Omni
├─ Load bars above
└─ Task queue stacks

TASKS (Particles)
├─ Flow from NOVA → FLUX → Omni → Sentinel
├─ Color = task type
└─ Speed = priority

      textMuted: "#9333ea",
      border: "rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2)",
    }
  },
  mint: {
    name: "Modern Mint",
    colors: {
      bg: "#0f1419",
      bgSecondary: "#1a2332",
      primary: "#06b6d4",
      primaryLight: "#22d3ee",
      secondary: "#10b981",
      secondaryLight: "#34d399",
      accent: "#f59e0b",
      text: "#f0f9ff",
      textMuted: "#64748b",
      border: "rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2)",
    }
  },
  sunset: {
    name: "Sunset Orange",
    colors: {
      bg: "#1a0f0a",
      bgSecondary: "#2d1f15",
      primary: "#f97316",
      primaryLight: "#fb923c",
      secondary: "#f43f5e",
      secondaryLight: "#ff6b9d",
      accent: "#fbbf24",
      text: "#fef2f2",
      textMuted: "#d97706",
      border: "rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.2)",
    }
  }
}

export const getTheme = (themeName) => THEMES[themeName] || THEMES.executive
EOF

cat > src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import { THEMES, getTheme } from './themes'
import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'
import Viewport from './components/Viewport'
import FluxPanel from './components/FluxPanel'
import NovaPanel from './components/NovaPanel'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState('dashboard')
  const [health, setHealth] = useState(null)
  const [agents, setAgents] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [wsConnected, setWsConnected] = useState(false)
  const [activeAgent, setActiveAgent] = useState('flux')
  const [theme, setTheme] = useState('executive')
  const [showVoicePanel, setShowVoicePanel] = useState(true)
  const [terminalOpen, setTerminalOpen] = useState(false)

  const currentTheme = getTheme(theme)

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData()
    connectWebSocket()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const [healthRes, agentsRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/analytics/health`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/agents`)
      ])
      setHealth(healthRes.data)
      setAgents(agentsRes.data.agents || [])
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch data:', error)
    }
  }

  const connectWebSocket = () => {
    try {
      const ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/ws/health')
      ws.onopen = () => setWsConnected(true)
      ws.onclose = () => setWsConnected(false)
      ws.onerror = () => setWsConnected(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div style={{ 
        flex: 1, 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        justifyContent: 'center',
        backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bg,
        color: currentTheme.colors.text
      }}>
        <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
          <div style={{ fontSize: '24px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>🚀 Loading MCC...</div>
          <div style={{ animation: 'spin 2s linear infinite', display: 'inline-block' }}>
            ⚙️
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ 
      display: 'flex', 
      height: '100vh',
      backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bg,
      color: currentTheme.colors.text,
      fontFamily: 'Inter, sans-serif'
    }}>
      <Sidebar 
        view={view} 
        setView={setView} 
        health={health} 
        wsConnected={wsConnected}
        theme={theme}
        setTheme={setTheme}
        currentTheme={currentTheme}
      />
      
      <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
        <Viewport 
          view={view} 
          health={health} 
          agents={agents} 
          setSelectedAgent={() => {}}
          theme={currentTheme}
        />
      </div>
      
      {/* VOICE PANEL - BOTTOM TERMINAL STYLE */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'fixed',
        bottom: 0,
        right: 0,
        left: 280, // Account for sidebar
        backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderTop: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
        zIndex: 40,
        transition: 'height 0.3s ease',
        height: terminalOpen ? '50vh' : '50px',
        overflow: 'hidden'
      }}>
        {/* TERMINAL HEADER */}
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          gap: '12px',
          padding: '12px 16px',
          borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
          cursor: 'pointer',
          userSelect: 'none'
        }}
        onClick={() => setTerminalOpen(!terminalOpen)}
        >
          <span style={{ fontSize: '14px' }}>🎤 VOICE TERMINAL</span>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '8px', marginLeft: 'auto' }}>
            {terminalOpen ? '↓' : '↑'}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* TERMINAL CONTENT */}
        {terminalOpen && (
          <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', height: 'calc(100% - 50px)' }}>
            {/* AGENT TOGGLE */}
            <div style={{
              display: 'flex',
              gap: '8px',
              padding: '12px',
              borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
              backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bg,
            }}>
              <button
                onClick={() => setActiveAgent('flux')}
                style={{
                  flex: 1,
                  padding: '10px',
                  backgroundColor: activeAgent === 'flux' ? currentTheme.colors.primary : currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
                  color: activeAgent === 'flux' ? '#000' : currentTheme.colors.primary,
                  border: `1px solid ${activeAgent === 'flux' ? currentTheme.colors.primary : currentTheme.colors.border}`,
                  borderRadius: '6px',
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  fontWeight: 'bold',
                  fontSize: '12px',
                }}
              >
                👨🏿 FLUX
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => setActiveAgent('nova')}
                style={{
                  flex: 1,
                  padding: '10px',
                  backgroundColor: activeAgent === 'nova' ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
                  color: activeAgent === 'nova' ? '#000' : currentTheme.colors.secondary,
                  border: `1px solid ${activeAgent === 'nova' ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : currentTheme.colors.border}`,
                  borderRadius: '6px',
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  fontWeight: 'bold',
                  fontSize: '12px',
                }}
              >
                👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* PANEL CONTENT */}
            <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
              {activeAgent === 'flux' ? (
                <FluxPanel theme={currentTheme} />
              ) : (
                <NovaPanel theme={currentTheme} />
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React from 'react'
import { THEMES } from '../themes'

export default function Sidebar({ view, setView, health, wsConnected, theme, setTheme, currentTheme }) {
  const menuItems = [
    { id: 'dashboard', label: '🎯 Dashboard', icon: '📊' },
    { id: 'agents', label: '🤖 Agents', icon: '⚙' },
    { id: 'omni-leads', label: '👥 Omni Leads', icon: '🏛' },
    { id: 'projects', label: '💼 Projects', icon: '$' },
    { id: 'simulation', label: '🎬 Simulation', icon: '3D' },
    { id: 'analytics', label: '📈 Analytics', icon: '📉' },
  ]

  const themeList = Object.keys(THEMES)

  return (
    <div style={{
      width: '280px',
      backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
      borderRight: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
      overflowY: 'auto',
      padding: '20px',
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100vh'
    }}>
      {/* HEADER */}
      <div style={{ 
        marginBottom: '40px', 
        paddingBottom: '20px', 
        borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}` 
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ 
          fontSize: '20px', 
          color: currentTheme.colors.secondary, 
          marginBottom: '5px',
          margin: 0
        }}>
          🤖 MCC
        </h1>
        <p style={{ 
          fontSize: '12px', 
          color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted,
          margin: 0
        }}>
          Mission Control Center v3.0
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* NAVIGATION */}
      <nav style={{ marginBottom: '40px' }}>
        {menuItems.map(item => (
          <button
            key={item.id}
            onClick={() => setView(item.id)}
            style={{
              width: '100%',
              padding: '12px 16px',
              marginBottom: '8px',
              backgroundColor: view === item.id ? `${currentTheme.colors.secondary}20` : 'transparent',
              border: view === item.id ? `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.secondary}` : '1px solid transparent',
              color: view === item.id ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : currentTheme.colors.text,
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontSize: '14px',
              textAlign: 'left',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
          >
            {item.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </nav>

      {/* THEME SWITCHER */}
      <div style={{ 
        marginBottom: '40px',
        paddingBottom: '20px',
        borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`
      }}>
        <p style={{ 
          fontSize: '12px', 
          color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted, 
          marginBottom: '12px',
          margin: '0 0 12px 0'
        }}>
          🎨 Theme
        </p>
        <select
          value={theme}
          onChange={(e) => setTheme(e.target.value)}
          style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '10px 12px',
            backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '6px',
            color: currentTheme.colors.primary,
            fontSize: '12px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
          }}
        >
          {themeList.map(themeName => (
            <option key={themeName} value={themeName}>
              {THEMES[themeName].name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ marginTop: 'auto' }}>
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '16px' }}>
          <p style={{ 
            fontSize: '12px', 
            color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted, 
            marginBottom: '8px',
            margin: '0 0 8px 0'
          }}>
            System Status
          </p>
          {health && (
            <>
              <div style={{ 
                display: 'flex', 
                justifyContent: 'space-between', 
                fontSize: '12px', 
                marginBottom: '4px' 
              }}>
                <span>Health:</span>
                <span style={{ color: health.health_score >= 80 ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : currentTheme.colors.primaryLight }}>
                  {health.health_score}/100
                </span>
              </div>
              <div style={{ 
                display: 'flex', 
                justifyContent: 'space-between', 
                fontSize: '12px', 
                marginBottom: '4px' 
              }}>
                <span>Status:</span>
                <span style={{ color: currentTheme.colors.secondary }}>
                  {health.status?.toUpperCase()}
                </span>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>

        <div>
          <p style={{ 
            fontSize: '12px', 
            color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted, 
            marginBottom: '8px',
            margin: '0 0 8px 0'
          }}>
            WebSocket
          </p>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '8px' }}>
            <div style={{
              width: '8px',
              height: '8px',
              borderRadius: '50%',
              backgroundColor: wsConnected ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : '#ef4444',
            }} />
            <span style={{ 
              fontSize: '12px', 
              color: wsConnected ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : '#ef4444' 
            }}>
              {wsConnected ? 'Connected' : 'Disconnected'}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

Nu update Viewport.jsx voor theme support:

bash
cat > src/components/Viewport.jsx << 'EOF'
import React from 'react'
import Dashboard from './views/Dashboard'
import TasksView from './views/TasksView'
import AgentsView from './views/AgentsView'
import OmniLeadsView from './views/OmniLeadsView'
import ProjectsView from './views/ProjectsView'
import SimulationView from './views/SimulationView'
import AnalyticsView from './views/AnalyticsView'

export default function Viewport({ view, health, agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const renderView = () => {
    switch (view) {
      case 'dashboard':
        return <Dashboard health={health} agents={agents} theme={theme} />
      case 'agents':
        return <AgentsView agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={setSelectedAgent} theme={theme} />
      case 'omni-leads':
        return <OmniLeadsView theme={theme} />
      case 'projects':
        return <ProjectsView theme={theme} />
      case 'simulation':
        return <SimulationView agents={agents} theme={theme} />
      case 'analytics':
        return <AnalyticsView health={health} theme={theme} />
      default:
        return <Dashboard health={health} agents={agents} theme={theme} />
    }
  }

  return (
    <div style={{
      flex: 1,
      overflowY: 'auto',
      backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
      color: theme.colors.text,
    }}>
      {renderView()}
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React from 'react'

export default function Dashboard({ health, agents, theme }) {
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '32px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🎯 Dashboard
      </h1>

      {health && (
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr))', gap: '20px', marginBottom: '40px' }}>
          <div style={{
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '10px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '10px' }}>System Status</p>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '8px' }}>
              {health.status?.toUpperCase()}
            </h2>
            <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '4px', backgroundColor: theme.colors.border, borderRadius: '2px', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
              <div style={{
                width: `${health.health_score}%`,
                height: '100%',
                backgroundColor: health.health_score >= 80 ? theme.colors.secondary : theme.colors.primaryLight,
              }} />
            </div>
            <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '8px' }}>
              Health: {health.health_score}/100
            </p>
          </div>

          <div style={{
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '10px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '10px' }}>Active Tasks</p>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.primary }}>
              {health.task_metrics?.in_progress || 0}
            </h2>
            <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '8px' }}>In Progress</p>
          </div>

          <div style={{
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '10px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '10px' }}>Active Agents</p>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.accent }}>
              {health.agent_metrics?.active_agents || 0}
            </h2>
            <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '8px' }}>Operational</p>
          </div>

          <div style={{
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '10px',
          }}>
            <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '10px' }}>Critical Alerts</p>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: health.alert_count_critical > 0 ? '#ef4444' : theme.colors.secondary }}>
              {health.alert_count_critical || 0}
            </h2>
            <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginTop: '8px' }}>Severity Level</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div style={{ marginTop: '40px' }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: '20px', color: theme.colors.text, marginBottom: '20px' }}>🤖 Active Agents</h2>
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))', gap: '16px' }}>
          {agents.slice(0, 5).map((agent) => (
            <div key={agent.agent_id} style={{
              padding: '16px',
              backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
              border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
              borderRadius: '8px',
            }}>
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: '12px' }}>
                <h3 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, fontSize: '14px', margin: 0 }}>{agent.agent_id}</h3>
                <span style={{
                  width: '8px',
                  height: '8px',
                  borderRadius: '50%',
                  backgroundColor: agent.status === 'ACTIVE' ? theme.colors.secondary : theme.colors.primaryLight,
                }} />
              </div>
              <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
                Layer: {agent.layer}
              </p>
              <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '12px' }}>
                Tasks: {agent.task_count_active} active | {agent.task_count_completed} completed
              </p>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

cat > src/App.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { THEMES, getTheme } from './themes'
import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'
import Viewport from './components/Viewport'
import FluxPanel from './components/FluxPanel'
import NovaPanel from './components/NovaPanel'

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState('dashboard')
  const [activeAgent, setActiveAgent] = useState('flux')
  const [theme, setTheme] = useState('executive')
  const [terminalOpen, setTerminalOpen] = useState(false)

  // DUMMY DATA - no backend needed
  const health = {
    health_score: 95,
    status: 'HEALTHY',
    task_metrics: { in_progress: 2, total_tasks: 6 },
    agent_metrics: { active_agents: 4, total_agents: 5 },
    alert_count_critical: 0
  }

  const agents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'sentinel_2', layer: 'sentinel', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
  ]

  const currentTheme = getTheme(theme)

  return (
    <div style={{ 
      display: 'flex', 
      height: '100vh',
      backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bg,
      color: currentTheme.colors.text,
      fontFamily: 'Inter, sans-serif'
    }}>
      <Sidebar 
        view={view} 
        setView={setView} 
        health={health} 
        wsConnected={true}
        theme={theme}
        setTheme={setTheme}
        currentTheme={currentTheme}
      />
      
      <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
        <Viewport 
          view={view} 
          health={health} 
          agents={agents} 
          setSelectedAgent={() => {}}
          theme={currentTheme}
        />
      </div>
      
      {/* VOICE PANEL - BOTTOM TERMINAL STYLE */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'fixed',
        bottom: 0,
        right: 0,
        left: 280,
        backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderTop: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
        zIndex: 40,
        height: terminalOpen ? '50vh' : '50px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        transition: 'height 0.3s ease',
      }}>
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          gap: '12px',
          padding: '12px 16px',
          borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
          cursor: 'pointer',
        }}
        onClick={() => setTerminalOpen(!terminalOpen)}
        >
          <span style={{ fontSize: '14px' }}>🎤 VOICE TERMINAL</span>
          <div style={{ marginLeft: 'auto' }}>{terminalOpen ? '↓' : '↑'}</div>
        </div>

        {terminalOpen && (
          <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', height: 'calc(100% - 50px)', padding: '16px' }}>
            <div style={{ color: currentTheme.colors.secondary }}>
              {activeAgent === 'flux' ? '👨🏿 FLUX' : '👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA'} Ready...
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

// Domain colors
const DOMAIN_COLORS = {
  'nova': { color: 0x00ff88, name: 'Nova Gateway' },
  'flux': { color: 0xffd700, name: 'Flux Orchestration' },
  'helix': { color: 0x00d4ff, name: 'Helix Tech' },
  'matrix': { color: 0x7c3aed, name: 'Matrix Intelligence' },
  'quantix': { color: 0xec4899, name: 'Quantix Growth' },
  'zenix': { color: 0xf97316, name: 'Zenix Operations' },
  'finix': { color: 0xfbbf24, name: 'Finix Assets' },
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef(null)

  const getDomainColor = () => {
    if (agent.layer === 'nova') return DOMAIN_COLORS.nova.color
    if (agent.layer === 'flux') return DOMAIN_COLORS.flux.color
    if (agent.domain === 'helix') return DOMAIN_COLORS.helix.color
    if (agent.domain === 'matrix') return DOMAIN_COLORS.matrix.color
    if (agent.domain === 'quantix') return DOMAIN_COLORS.quantix.color
    if (agent.domain === 'zenix') return DOMAIN_COLORS.zenix.color
    if (agent.domain === 'finix') return DOMAIN_COLORS.finix.color
    return 0x00ff88
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x1a1a2e)
    sceneRef.current = scene

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true })
    renderer.setSize(240, 240)
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    // Light
    const light = new THREE.PointLight(getDomainColor(), 1, 20)
    light.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    scene.add(light)

    // Agent geometry
    const geometry = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.7, 3)
    const material = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: getDomainColor(),
      metalness: 0.8,
      roughness: 0.2,
    })
    const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material)
    scene.add(mesh)

    // Glow sphere
    const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.9, 32, 32)
    const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: getDomainColor(),
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.1,
      wireframe: true,
    })
    const glow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
    scene.add(glow)

    // Animation
    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      mesh.rotation.x += 0.005
      mesh.rotation.y += 0.008
      glow.rotation.x -= 0.003
      glow.rotation.y -= 0.005
      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
    }
  }, [agent])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '16px',
      backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
      border: `2px solid ${getDomainColor()}80`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      textAlign: 'center',
    }}>
      {/* 3D SCENE */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ marginBottom: '12px', height: '240px', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center' }} />

      {/* INFO */}
      <h3 style={{ color: theme.colors.text, fontSize: '14px', margin: '8px 0' }}>
        {agent.agent_id}
      </h3>
      
      <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '11px', margin: '4px 0' }}>
        {agent.layer} • {agent.domain || 'system'}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '6px', margin: '8px 0' }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '6px',
          height: '6px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: agent.status === 'ACTIVE' ? '#00ff88' : '#fbbf24',
        }} />
        <span style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: theme.colors.textMuted }}>
          {agent.status}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL DROPDOWN */}
      <select
        defaultValue={agent.model}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '6px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.secondary,
          fontSize: '11px',
          marginBottom: '8px',
          cursor: 'pointer',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
      </select>

      {/* COST */}
      <div style={{ fontSize: '10px', color: theme.colors.accent }}>
        Today: $0.00 | Tasks: {agent.task_count_active}/{agent.task_count_completed}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  // Filter out sentinel_2
  const filteredAgents = agents.filter(a => a.agent_id !== 'sentinel_2')

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '32px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        Agents
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr))',
        gap: '20px',
      }}>
        {filteredAgents.map((agent) => (
          <AgentCard key={agent.agent_id} agent={agent} theme={theme} />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > src/components/views/AgentsView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

// AGENT DESIGNS - UNIQUE PER AGENT
const AGENT_DESIGNS = {
  'nova': {
    geometry: 'sphere',
    color: 0x00ff88,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    scale: 0.8,
    rotationSpeed: { x: 0.005, y: 0.008 },
    glowColor: 0x00ff88,
    shape: 'smooth'
  },
  'flux_main': {
    geometry: 'box',
    color: 0xffd700,
    eyeColor: 0xffd700,
    scale: 0.9,
    rotationSpeed: { x: 0.003, y: 0.006 },
    glowColor: 0xffd700,
    shape: 'angular'
  },
  'cortexia': {
    geometry: 'octahedron',
    color: 0x00d4ff,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    scale: 0.85,
    rotationSpeed: { x: 0.004, y: 0.007 },
    glowColor: 0x00d4ff,
    shape: 'crystalline'
  },
  'nero': {
    geometry: 'tetrahedron',
    color: 0xff1744,
    eyeColor: 0xff1744,
    scale: 0.8,
    rotationSpeed: { x: 0.006, y: 0.009 },
    glowColor: 0xff1744,
    shape: 'sharp'
  },
  'sora': {
    geometry: 'cone',
    color: 0x7c3aed,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    scale: 0.75,
    rotationSpeed: { x: 0.005, y: 0.005 },
    glowColor: 0x7c3aed,
    shape: 'pointed'
  },
  'sentinel_1': {
    geometry: 'icosahedron',
    color: 0xec4899,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    scale: 0.8,
    rotationSpeed: { x: 0.007, y: 0.007 },
    glowColor: 0xec4899,
    shape: 'faceted'
  },
  'daxio': {
    geometry: 'dodecahedron',
    color: 0xf97316,
    eyeColor: 0xf97316,
    scale: 0.85,
    rotationSpeed: { x: 0.004, y: 0.008 },
    glowColor: 0xf97316,
    shape: 'regular'
  },
  'vondra': {
    geometry: 'sphere',
    color: 0xfbbf24,
    eyeColor: 0xfbbf24,
    scale: 0.9,
    rotationSpeed: { x: 0.003, y: 0.009 },
    glowColor: 0xfbbf24,
    shape: 'smooth'
  },
}

function createAgentMesh(design) {
  let geometry

  switch (design.geometry) {
    case 'sphere':
      geometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1, 32, 32)
      break
    case 'box':
      geometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.2, 1.2, 1.2)
      break
    case 'octahedron':
      geometry = new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(1, 2)
      break
    case 'tetrahedron':
      geometry = new THREE.TetrahedronGeometry(1, 2)
      break
    case 'cone':
      geometry = new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.8, 1.5, 32)
      break
    case 'icosahedron':
      geometry = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(1, 3)
      break
    case 'dodecahedron':
      geometry = new THREE.DodecahedronGeometry(0.8, 0)
      break
    default:
      geometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1, 32, 32)
  }

  const material = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.color,
    metalness: 0.9,
    roughness: 0.1,
    emissive: design.color,
    emissiveIntensity: 0.3,
  })

  return new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material)
}

function createEyes(design) {
  const eyeGroup = new THREE.Group()

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 16, 16)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: design.eyeColor })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.3, 0.3, 0.6)
  eyeGroup.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.3, 0.3, 0.6)
  eyeGroup.add(rightEye)

  // Glow on eyes
  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.2, 16, 16)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.4,
  })

  const leftGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  leftGlow.position.set(-0.3, 0.3, 0.5)
  eyeGroup.add(leftGlow)

  const rightGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  rightGlow.position.set(0.3, 0.3, 0.5)
  eyeGroup.add(rightGlow)

  return eyeGroup
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef(null)
  const meshRef = useRef(null)
  const eyesRef = useRef(null)

  const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)
    sceneRef.current = scene

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3.5

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(240, 240)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    // LIGHTS
    const mainLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.color, 1.5, 25)
    mainLight.position.set(3, 3, 3)
    mainLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(mainLight)

    const backLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.glowColor, 0.8, 20)
    backLight.position.set(-3, -2, -3)
    scene.add(backLight)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    // AGENT MESH
    const mesh = createAgentMesh(design)
    mesh.scale.set(design.scale, design.scale, design.scale)
    mesh.castShadow = true
    mesh.receiveShadow = true
    meshRef.current = mesh
    scene.add(mesh)

    // EYES
    const eyes = createEyes(design)
    eyesRef.current = eyes
    scene.add(eyes)

    // GLOW AURA
    const auraGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.3, 32, 32)
    const auraMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: design.glowColor,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.08,
      wireframe: false,
    })
    const aura = new THREE.Mesh(auraGeometry, auraMaterial)
    scene.add(aura)

    // ORBITING PARTICLES
    const particleGroup = new THREE.Group()
    const particleGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.05, 8, 8)
    const particleMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: design.color })

    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
      const particle = new THREE.Mesh(particleGeometry, particleMaterial)
      const angle = (i / 5) * Math.PI * 2
      particle.position.set(
        Math.cos(angle) * 1.5,
        Math.sin(angle) * 1.5,
        Math.cos(angle) * 0.5
      )
      particleGroup.add(particle)
    }
    scene.add(particleGroup)

    // ANIMATION
    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)

      mesh.rotation.x += design.rotationSpeed.x
      mesh.rotation.y += design.rotationSpeed.y

      eyes.rotation.x = mesh.rotation.x
      eyes.rotation.y = mesh.rotation.y

      aura.rotation.x -= 0.001
      aura.rotation.z += 0.002

      particleGroup.rotation.y += 0.01
      particleGroup.children.forEach((p, i) => {
        p.position.y += Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.001 + i) * 0.01
      })

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
    }
  }, [agent, design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '16px',
      backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
      border: `2px solid ${design.color}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      textAlign: 'center',
      boxShadow: `0 0 20px ${design.color}33`,
    }}>
      {/* 3D SCENE */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        marginBottom: '12px', 
        height: '240px', 
        display: 'flex', 
        justifyContent: 'center',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
      }} />

      {/* INFO */}
      <h3 style={{ color: theme.colors.text, fontSize: '14px', margin: '8px 0' }}>
        {agent.agent_id}
      </h3>
      
      <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '11px', margin: '4px 0' }}>
        {agent.layer} • {agent.domain || 'system'}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '6px', margin: '8px 0' }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '6px',
          height: '6px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: agent.status === 'ACTIVE' ? design.color : '#888',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${design.color}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: theme.colors.textMuted }}>
          {agent.status}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL DROPDOWN */}
      <select
        defaultValue={agent.model}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '6px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `1px solid ${design.color}66`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: design.color,
          fontSize: '11px',
          marginBottom: '8px',
          cursor: 'pointer',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
      </select>

      {/* COST */}
      <div style={{ fontSize: '10px', color: design.color }}>
        $0.00 | {agent.task_count_active} active | {agent.task_count_completed} done
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const filteredAgents = agents.filter(a => a.agent_id !== 'sentinel_2')

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '32px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 Agents
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr))',
        gap: '24px',
      }}>
        {filteredAgents.map((agent) => (
          <AgentCard key={agent.agent_id} agent={agent} theme={theme} />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

prime@Silver-Surfer:~/arc_ai_angels/mission_control/frontend-mcc$ cat src/scenes/Scene3D.jsx | head -100
import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'
import ParticleSystem from './ParticleSystem'
export default function Scene3D() {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef(null)
  const cameraRef = useRef(null)
  const rendererRef = useRef(null)
  const novaRef = useRef(null)
  const fluxRef = useRef(null)
  const particleSystemRef = useRef(null)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return
    // SCENE SETUP
    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)
    sceneRef.current = scene
    // CAMERA
    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
      75,
      containerRef.current.clientWidth / containerRef.current.clientHeight,
      0.1,
      1000
    )
    camera.position.z = 8
    cameraRef.current = camera
    // RENDERER
    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true })
    renderer.setSize(containerRef.current.clientWidth, containerRef.current.clientHeight)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)
    rendererRef.current = renderer
    // PARTICLE SYSTEM
    const particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(scene)
    particleSystemRef.current = particleSystem
    // LIGHTING
    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)
    const novaLight = new THREE.PointLight(0x00ff88, 1, 50)
    novaLight.position.set(-3, 0, 0)
    novaLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(novaLight)
    const fluxLight = new THREE.PointLight(0xd4af37, 1, 50)
    fluxLight.position.set(3, 0, 0)
    fluxLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(fluxLight)
    // CREATE NOVA (Vrouwelijke cyborg - groene ogen)
    const novaGroup = new THREE.Group()
    novaGroup.position.set(-4, 0, 0)
    const novaBody = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    const novaMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x1a1f3a,
      metalness: 0.8,
      roughness: 0.2,
    })
    const novaMesh = new THREE.Mesh(novaBody, novaMaterial)
    novaMesh.castShadow = true
    novaMesh.receiveShadow = true
    novaGroup.add(novaMesh)
    // NOVA Eyes (Groene glow)
    const novaEyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
    const novaEyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
      color: 0x00ff88,
      emissive: 0x00ff88,
      emissiveIntensity: 2,
    })
    const novaLeftEye = new THREE.Mesh(novaEyeGeometry, novaEyeMaterial)
    novaLeftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
    novaGroup.add(novaLeftEye)
    const novaRightEye = new THREE.Mesh(novaEyeGeometry, novaEyeMaterial)
    novaRightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
    novaGroup.add(novaRightEye)
    // NOVA Glow sphere
    const novaGlowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
    const novaGlowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: 0x00ff88,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.1,
      wireframe: true,
    })
    const novaGlow = new THREE.Mesh(novaGlowGeometry, novaGlowMaterial)
    novaGroup.add(novaGlow)
    scene.add(novaGroup)
    novaRef.current = novaGroup
