cat > src/components/views/AgentsView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

// AGENT CYBORG DESIGNS
const AGENT_DESIGNS = {
  'nova': {
    bodyColor: 0x1a1f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    lightColor: 0x00ff88,
    glowColor: 0x00ff88,
  },
  'flux_main': {
    bodyColor: 0x2a1f1a,
    eyeColor: 0xd4af37,
    lightColor: 0xd4af37,
    glowColor: 0xd4af37,
  },
  'cortexia': {
    bodyColor: 0x1a2f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    glowColor: 0x00d4ff,
  },
  'nero': {
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xff1744,
    lightColor: 0xff1744,
    glowColor: 0xff1744,
  },
  'sora': {
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0x7c3aed,
  },
  'sentinel_1': {
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a2a,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    lightColor: 0xec4899,
    glowColor: 0xec4899,
  },
  'daxio': {
    bodyColor: 0x3a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xf97316,
    lightColor: 0xf97316,
    glowColor: 0xf97316,
  },
  'enki': {
    bodyColor: 0x1a3a2a,
    eyeColor: 0x10b981,
    lightColor: 0x10b981,
    glowColor: 0x10b981,
  },
  'vondra': {
    bodyColor: 0x3a3a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xfbbf24,
    lightColor: 0xfbbf24,
    glowColor: 0xfbbf24,
  },
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  // BODY - IcosahedronGeometry (like NOVA/FLUX)
  const bodyGeometry = new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  // EYES - Bright glowing spheres
  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  // GLOW WIREFRAME SPHERE
  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.glowColor,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const groupRef = useRef(null)

  const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || {
    bodyColor: 0x1a1f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    lightColor: 0x00ff88,
    glowColor: 0x00ff88,
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    // SCENE
    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    // CAMERA & RENDERER
    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(240, 240)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    // LIGHTING
    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    // CREATE CYBORG
    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    groupRef.current = cyborg
    scene.add(cyborg)

    // ANIMATION LOOP
    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
      cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008
      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
    }
  }, [agent, design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '16px',
      backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
      border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      textAlign: 'center',
      boxShadow: `0 0 20px ${design.glowColor}44`,
    }}>
      {/* 3D CYBORG */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        marginBottom: '12px', 
        height: '240px', 
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
      }} />

      {/* AGENT NAME */}
      <h3 style={{ color: theme.colors.text, fontSize: '14px', margin: '8px 0', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>
        {agent.agent_id.toUpperCase()}
      </h3>
      
      {/* LAYER & DOMAIN */}
      <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '11px', margin: '4px 0' }}>
        {agent.layer} {agent.domain && `• ${agent.domain}`}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS INDICATOR */}
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '6px', margin: '8px 0' }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '6px',
          height: '6px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: agent.status === 'ACTIVE' ? design.glowColor : '#888',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${design.glowColor}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: theme.colors.textMuted }}>
          {agent.status}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL SELECTOR */}
      <select
        defaultValue={agent.model}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '6px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `1px solid ${design.glowColor}66`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: design.glowColor,
          fontSize: '11px',
          marginBottom: '8px',
          cursor: 'pointer',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
      </select>

      {/* STATS */}
      <div style={{ fontSize: '10px', color: design.glowColor, margin: '8px 0' }}>
        <div>${(Math.random() * 0.50).toFixed(2)} • {agent.task_count_active} active</div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: '9px', color: theme.colors.textMuted }}>
          {agent.task_count_completed} completed
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const filteredAgents = agents.filter(a => a.agent_id !== 'sentinel_2')

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr))',
        gap: '24px',
      }}>
        {filteredAgents.map((agent) => (
          <AgentCard key={agent.agent_id} agent={agent} theme={theme} />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

// AGENT CYBORG DESIGNS - UNIQUE SHAPES PER AGENT
const AGENT_DESIGNS = {
  'nova': {
    shape: 'icosahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a1f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    lightColor: 0x00ff88,
    glowColor: 0x00ff88,
  },
  'flux_main': {
    shape: 'box',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1f1a,
    eyeColor: 0xd4af37,
    lightColor: 0xd4af37,
    glowColor: 0xd4af37,
  },
  'cortexia': {
    shape: 'octahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a2f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    glowColor: 0x00d4ff,
  },
  'nero': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xff1744,
    lightColor: 0xff1744,
    glowColor: 0xff1744,
  },
  'sora': {
    shape: 'cone',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0x7c3aed,
  },
  'sentinel_1': {
    shape: 'dodecahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a2a,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    lightColor: 0xec4899,
    glowColor: 0xec4899,
  },
  'daxio': {
    shape: 'cylinder',
    bodyColor: 0x3a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xf97316,
    lightColor: 0xf97316,
    glowColor: 0xf97316,
  },
  'enki': {
    shape: 'sphere',
    bodyColor: 0x1a3a2a,
    eyeColor: 0x10b981,
    lightColor: 0x10b981,
    glowColor: 0x10b981,
  },
  'vondra': {
    shape: 'torus',
    bodyColor: 0x3a3a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xfbbf24,
    lightColor: 0xfbbf24,
    glowColor: 0xfbbf24,
  },
}

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'icosahedron':
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    case 'box':
      return new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
    case 'octahedron':
      return new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.8, 3)
    case 'tetrahedron':
      return new THREE.TetrahedronGeometry(0.8, 2)
    case 'cone':
      return new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.7, 1.4, 32)
    case 'dodecahedron':
      return new THREE.DodecahedronGeometry(0.7, 0)
    case 'cylinder':
      return new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.6, 0.6, 1.2, 32)
    case 'sphere':
      return new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.8, 32, 32)
    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  // BODY
  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  // EYES
  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  // GLOW WIREFRAME
  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.glowColor,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)

  const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(240, 240)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    scene.add(cyborg)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
      cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008
      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
    }
  }, [design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '16px',
      backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
      border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      textAlign: 'center',
      boxShadow: `0 0 20px ${design.glowColor}44`,
    }}>
      {/* 3D CYBORG */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        marginBottom: '12px', 
        height: '240px', 
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
      }} />

      {/* AGENT NAME */}
      <h3 style={{ color: theme.colors.text, fontSize: '14px', margin: '8px 0', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>
        {agent.agent_id.toUpperCase()}
      </h3>
      
      {/* LAYER & DOMAIN */}
      <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, fontSize: '11px', margin: '4px 0' }}>
        {agent.layer} {agent.domain && `• ${agent.domain}`}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '6px', margin: '8px 0' }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '6px',
          height: '6px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: agent.status === 'ACTIVE' ? design.glowColor : '#888',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${design.glowColor}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: theme.colors.textMuted }}>
          {agent.status}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL DROPDOWN - BIG & READABLE */}
      <select
        defaultValue={agent.model}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '12px',
          fontWeight: 'bold',
          marginBottom: '8px',
          cursor: 'pointer',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
      </select>

      {/* STATS */}
      <div style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: design.glowColor, margin: '8px 0', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>
        <div>${(Math.random() * 0.50).toFixed(2)} | {agent.task_count_active} active</div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: '10px', color: theme.colors.textMuted }}>
          {agent.task_count_completed} completed
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const filteredAgents = agents.filter(a => a.agent_id !== 'sentinel_2')

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr))',
        gap: '24px',
      }}>
        {filteredAgents.map((agent) => (
          <AgentCard key={agent.agent_id} agent={agent} theme={theme} />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

STAP 1: AGENT CARD REDESIGN
bash
cat > src/components/views/AgentsView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

const AGENT_DESIGNS = {
  'nova': {
    shape: 'icosahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a1f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    lightColor: 0x00ff88,
    glowColor: 0x00ff88,
    role: 'Gateway',
    function: 'Intake',
    domain: 'System',
  },
  'flux_main': {
    shape: 'box',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1f1a,
    eyeColor: 0xd4af37,
    lightColor: 0xd4af37,
    glowColor: 0xd4af37,
    role: 'Orchestrator',
    function: 'Routing',
    domain: 'System',
  },
  'cortexia': {
    shape: 'octahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a2f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    glowColor: 0x00d4ff,
    role: 'Lead',
    function: 'Security',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
  },
  'nero': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xff1744,
    lightColor: 0xff1744,
    glowColor: 0xff1744,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Executor',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
  },
  'sora': {
    shape: 'cone',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0x7c3aed,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Analyst',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
  },
  'vondra': {
    shape: 'torus',
    bodyColor: 0x3a3a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xfbbf24,
    lightColor: 0xfbbf24,
    glowColor: 0xfbbf24,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Manager',
    domain: 'Quantix Growth',
  },
}

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'icosahedron':
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    case 'box':
      return new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
    case 'octahedron':
      return new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.8, 3)
    case 'tetrahedron':
      return new THREE.TetrahedronGeometry(0.8, 2)
    case 'cone':
      return new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.7, 1.4, 32)
    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.glowColor,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme, design }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const [model, setModel] = React.useState(agent.model || 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(200, 200)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    scene.add(cyborg)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
      cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008
      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
    }
  }, [design])

  const isActive = model !== 'none'

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '20px',
      backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
      border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      boxShadow: `0 0 20px ${design.glowColor}44`,
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }}>
      {/* 3D CYBORG */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        height: '200px',
        marginBottom: '16px',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        alignItems: 'center',
      }} />

      {/* AGENT NAME */}
      <h3 style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '16px', 
        margin: '0 0 8px 0', 
        fontWeight: 'bold' 
      }}>
        {agent.agent_id.toUpperCase()}
      </h3>

      {/* ROLE */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: design.glowColor, 
        fontSize: '12px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0',
        fontWeight: 'bold'
      }}>
        {design.role}
      </p>

      {/* FUNCTION */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.textMuted, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0'
      }}>
        {design.function}
      </p>

      {/* DOMAIN */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.textMuted, 
        fontSize: '10px', 
        margin: '0 0 12px 0'
      }}>
        {design.domain}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS INDICATOR */}
      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        gap: '8px', 
        marginBottom: '12px' 
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444'}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ 
          fontSize: '11px', 
          color: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          fontWeight: 'bold'
        }}>
          {isActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'INACTIVE'}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL DROPDOWN */}
      <select
        value={model}
        onChange={(e) => setModel(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '12px',
          fontWeight: 'bold',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          marginTop: 'auto',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
        <option value="none">◌ Inactive</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: '24px',
      }}>
        {agents.map((agent) => {
          const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova
          return (
            <AgentCard 
              key={agent.agent_id} 
              agent={agent} 
              theme={theme}
              design={design}
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { THEMES, getTheme } from './themes'
import Sidebar from './components/Sidebar'
import Viewport from './components/Viewport'
import FluxPanel from './components/FluxPanel'
import NovaPanel from './components/NovaPanel'

export default function App() {
  const [view, setView] = useState('dashboard')
  const [activeAgent, setActiveAgent] = useState('flux')
  const [theme, setTheme] = useState('executive')
  const [terminalOpen, setTerminalOpen] = useState(false)

  const health = {
    health_score: 95,
    status: 'HEALTHY',
    task_metrics: { in_progress: 2, total_tasks: 6 },
    agent_metrics: { active_agents: 4, total_agents: 5 },
    alert_count_critical: 0
  }

  const agents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'cortexia', layer: 'omni', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'vondra', layer: 'sentinel', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
  ]

  const currentTheme = getTheme(theme)
  const sidebarWidth = '200px' // SMALTER!

  return (
    <div style={{ 
      display: 'flex', 
      height: '100vh',
      backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bg,
      color: currentTheme.colors.text,
      fontFamily: 'Inter, sans-serif'
    }}>
      <div style={{ width: sidebarWidth }}>
        <Sidebar 
          view={view} 
          setView={setView} 
          health={health} 
          wsConnected={true}
          theme={theme}
          setTheme={setTheme}
          currentTheme={currentTheme}
        />
      </div>
      
      <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
        <Viewport 
          view={view} 
          health={health} 
          agents={agents} 
          setSelectedAgent={() => {}}
          theme={currentTheme}
        />
      </div>
      
      {/* VOICE PANEL */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'fixed',
        bottom: 0,
        right: 0,
        left: sidebarWidth,
        backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderTop: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
        zIndex: 40,
        height: terminalOpen ? '50vh' : '50px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        transition: 'height 0.3s ease',
      }}>
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          gap: '12px',
          padding: '12px 16px',
          borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
          cursor: 'pointer',
        }}
        onClick={() => setTerminalOpen(!terminalOpen)}
        >
          <span style={{ fontSize: '14px' }}>🎤 VOICE TERMINAL</span>
          <div style={{ marginLeft: 'auto' }}>{terminalOpen ? '↓' : '↑'}</div>
        </div>

        {terminalOpen && (
          <div style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', height: 'calc(100% - 50px)', padding: '16px' }}>
            <div style={{ color: currentTheme.colors.secondary }}>
              {activeAgent === 'flux' ? '👨🏿 FLUX' : '👩🏿‍🦰 NOVA'} Ready...
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

bash
cat > src/components/Sidebar.jsx << 'EOF'
import React from 'react'
import { THEMES } from '../themes'

export default function Sidebar({ view, setView, health, wsConnected, theme, setTheme, currentTheme }) {
  const menuItems = [
    { id: 'dashboard', label: '📊', icon: '📊' },
    { id: 'agents', label: '🤖', icon: '⚙' },
    { id: 'omni-leads', label: '👥', icon: '🏛' },
    { id: 'projects', label: '💼', icon: '$' },
    { id: 'simulation', label: '🎬', icon: '3D' },
    { id: 'analytics', label: '📈', icon: '📉' },
  ]

  const themeList = Object.keys(THEMES)

  return (
    <div style={{
      backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
      borderRight: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
      overflowY: 'auto',
      padding: '16px 12px',
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100vh'
    }}>
      {/* HEADER */}
      <div style={{ 
        marginBottom: '20px', 
        paddingBottom: '16px', 
        borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
        textAlign: 'center'
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ 
          fontSize: '16px', 
          color: currentTheme.colors.secondary, 
          margin: 0
        }}>
          MCC
        </h1>
        <p style={{ 
          fontSize: '9px', 
          color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted,
          margin: '4px 0 0 0'
        }}>
          v3.0
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* NAVIGATION */}
      <nav style={{ marginBottom: '20px' }}>
        {menuItems.map(item => (
          <button
            key={item.id}
            title={item.label}
            onClick={() => setView(item.id)}
            style={{
              width: '100%',
              padding: '10px',
              marginBottom: '6px',
              backgroundColor: view === item.id ? `${currentTheme.colors.secondary}20` : 'transparent',
              border: view === item.id ? `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.secondary}` : '1px solid transparent',
              color: view === item.id ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : currentTheme.colors.text,
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontSize: '16px',
              textAlign: 'center',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
            }}
          >
            {item.icon}
          </button>
        ))}
      </nav>

      {/* THEME SELECTOR */}
      <div style={{ 
        marginBottom: '20px',
        paddingBottom: '16px',
        borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`
      }}>
        <select
          value={theme}
          onChange={(e) => setTheme(e.target.value)}
          style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '6px',
            backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: currentTheme.colors.primary,
            fontSize: '10px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
          }}
        >
          {themeList.map(themeName => (
            <option key={themeName} value={themeName}>
              {THEMES[themeName].name.split(' ')[0]}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ marginTop: 'auto', fontSize: '9px' }}>
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '12px' }}>
          {health && (
            <>
              <div style={{ color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted, marginBottom: '4px' }}>
                Health: {health.health_score}%
              </div>
              <div style={{ 
                width: '100%', 
                height: '3px', 
                backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.border, 
                borderRadius: '2px',
                overflow: 'hidden'
              }}>
                <div style={{
                  width: `${health.health_score}%`,
                  height: '100%',
                  backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.secondary,
                }} />
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>

        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '4px', color: wsConnected ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : '#888' }}>
          <div style={{
            width: '4px',
            height: '4px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: wsConnected ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : '#888',
          }} />
          <span>{wsConnected ? 'Connected' : 'Offline'}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

cat > src/components/Sidebar.jsx << 'EOF'
import React from 'react'
import { THEMES } from '../themes'

export default function Sidebar({ view, setView, health, wsConnected, theme, setTheme, currentTheme }) {
  const menuItems = [
    { id: 'dashboard', label: '📊 Dashboard' },
    { id: 'agents', label: '🤖 Agents' },
    { id: 'omni-leads', label: '👥 Omni' },
    { id: 'projects', label: '💼 Projects' },
    { id: 'simulation', label: '🎬 Sim' },
    { id: 'analytics', label: '📈 Analytics' },
  ]

  const themeList = Object.keys(THEMES)

  return (
    <div style={{
      width: '160px',
      backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
      borderRight: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
      overflowY: 'auto',
      padding: '16px',
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100vh',
      boxSizing: 'border-box',
    }}>
      {/* HEADER */}
      <div style={{ 
        marginBottom: '24px', 
        paddingBottom: '16px', 
        borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ 
          fontSize: '14px', 
          color: currentTheme.colors.secondary, 
          margin: 0,
          fontWeight: 'bold'
        }}>
          🤖 MCC
        </h1>
        <p style={{ 
          fontSize: '10px', 
          color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted,
          margin: '4px 0 0 0'
        }}>
          v3.0
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* NAVIGATION */}
      <nav style={{ marginBottom: '24px' }}>
        {menuItems.map(item => (
          <button
            key={item.id}
            onClick={() => setView(item.id)}
            style={{
              width: '100%',
              padding: '10px 8px',
              marginBottom: '6px',
              backgroundColor: view === item.id ? `${currentTheme.colors.secondary}20` : 'transparent',
              border: view === item.id ? `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.secondary}` : '1px solid transparent',
              color: view === item.id ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : currentTheme.colors.text,
              borderRadius: '6px',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontSize: '12px',
              textAlign: 'left',
              transition: 'all 200ms ease',
              fontWeight: view === item.id ? 'bold' : 'normal',
            }}
          >
            {item.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </nav>

      {/* THEME SELECTOR */}
      <div style={{ 
        marginBottom: '24px',
        paddingBottom: '16px',
        borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`
      }}>
        <label style={{ 
          fontSize: '10px', 
          color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted,
          display: 'block',
          marginBottom: '6px'
        }}>
          🎨 Theme
        </label>
        <select
          value={theme}
          onChange={(e) => setTheme(e.target.value)}
          style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '6px',
            backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: currentTheme.colors.primary,
            fontSize: '11px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
          }}
        >
          {themeList.map(themeName => (
            <option key={themeName} value={themeName}>
              {THEMES[themeName].name.split(' ')[0]}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ marginTop: 'auto' }}>
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '16px' }}>
          <p style={{ 
            fontSize: '10px', 
            color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted,
            margin: '0 0 6px 0'
          }}>
            System Status
          </p>
          {health && (
            <>
              <div style={{ 
                color: currentTheme.colors.text, 
                fontSize: '11px', 
                fontWeight: 'bold',
                marginBottom: '4px'
              }}>
                {health.health_score}/100
              </div>
              <div style={{ 
                width: '100%', 
                height: '4px', 
                backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.border, 
                borderRadius: '2px',
                overflow: 'hidden'
              }}>
                <div style={{
                  width: `${health.health_score}%`,
                  height: '100%',
                  backgroundColor: health.health_score >= 80 ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : currentTheme.colors.primaryLight,
                }} />
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>

        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px', fontSize: '10px' }}>
          <div style={{
            width: '6px',
            height: '6px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: wsConnected ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : '#ff4444',
            boxShadow: `0 0 4px ${wsConnected ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : '#ff4444'}`,
          }} />
          <span style={{ color: wsConnected ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : '#ff4444' }}>
            {wsConnected ? 'Live' : 'Offline'}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

// DOMAIN COLORS - Subtle backgrounds
const DOMAIN_COLORS = {
  'System': { bg: 0x1a1f3a, accent: 0x00ff88 },
  'Helix Tech': { bg: 0x1a2f3a, accent: 0x00d4ff },
  'Matrix Intelligence': { bg: 0x2a1a3a, accent: 0x7c3aed },
  'Quantix Growth': { bg: 0x3a1a2a, accent: 0xec4899 },
  'Zenix Operations': { bg: 0x3a2a1a, accent: 0xf97316 },
  'Finix Assets': { bg: 0x3a3a1a, accent: 0xfbbf24 },
}

const AGENT_DESIGNS = {
  'nova': {
    shape: 'icosahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a1f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    lightColor: 0x00ff88,
    glowColor: 0x00ff88,
    role: 'Gateway',
    function: 'Intake',
    domain: 'System',
  },
  'flux_main': {
    shape: 'box',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1f1a,
    eyeColor: 0xd4af37,
    lightColor: 0xd4af37,
    glowColor: 0xd4af37,
    role: 'Orchestrator',
    function: 'Routing',
    domain: 'System',
  },
  'cortexia': {
    shape: 'octahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a2f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    glowColor: 0x00d4ff,
    role: 'Lead',
    function: 'Security',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
  },
  'nero': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xff1744,
    lightColor: 0xff1744,
    glowColor: 0xff1744,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Executor',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
  },
  'forge': {
    shape: 'dodecahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x2a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    glowColor: 0x00d4ff,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Builder',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
  },
  'sora': {
    shape: 'cone',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0x7c3aed,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Analyst',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
  },
  'daxio': {
    shape: 'cylinder',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0x7c3aed,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Monitor',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
  },
  'enki': {
    shape: 'sphere',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0x7c3aed,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Decoder',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
  },
  'vondra': {
    shape: 'torus',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a2a,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    lightColor: 0xec4899,
    glowColor: 0xec4899,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Manager',
    domain: 'Quantix Growth',
  },
  'nura': {
    shape: 'icosahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a2a,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    lightColor: 0xec4899,
    glowColor: 0xec4899,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Optimizer',
    domain: 'Quantix Growth',
  },
  'solis': {
    shape: 'box',
    bodyColor: 0x3a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xf97316,
    lightColor: 0xf97316,
    glowColor: 0xf97316,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Coordinator',
    domain: 'Zenix Operations',
  },
  'vector': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a3a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xfbbf24,
    lightColor: 0xfbbf24,
    glowColor: 0xfbbf24,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Accountant',
    domain: 'Finix Assets',
  },
}

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'icosahedron':
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    case 'box':
      return new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
    case 'octahedron':
      return new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.8, 3)
    case 'tetrahedron':
      return new THREE.TetrahedronGeometry(0.8, 2)
    case 'cone':
      return new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.7, 1.4, 32)
    case 'dodecahedron':
      return new THREE.DodecahedronGeometry(0.7, 0)
    case 'cylinder':
      return new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.6, 0.6, 1.2, 32)
    case 'sphere':
      return new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.8, 32, 32)
    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.glowColor,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme, design }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const [model, setModel] = React.useState(agent.model || 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

  const domainInfo = DOMAIN_COLORS[design.domain] || DOMAIN_COLORS['System']
  const isActive = model !== 'none'

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(180, 180)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    scene.add(cyborg)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
      cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008
      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
    }
  }, [design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '18px',
      backgroundColor: `rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.3)`,
      border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      boxShadow: `0 0 15px ${design.glowColor}33, inset 0 0 20px rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.2)`,
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }}>
      {/* 3D CYBORG */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        height: '180px',
        marginBottom: '14px',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        alignItems: 'center',
      }} />

      {/* AGENT NAME */}
      <h3 style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '14px', 
        margin: '0 0 8px 0', 
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {agent.agent_id.toUpperCase()}
      </h3>

      {/* ROLE */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: design.glowColor, 
        fontSize: '12px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0',
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.role}
      </p>

      {/* FUNCTION */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 2px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.function}
      </p>

      {/* DOMAIN */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 10px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.domain}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS INDICATOR */}
      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        gap: '8px', 
        marginBottom: '10px' 
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444'}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ 
          fontSize: '11px', 
          color: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          fontWeight: '600'
        }}>
          {isActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'INACTIVE'}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL DROPDOWN */}
      <select
        value={model}
        onChange={(e) => setModel(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '11px',
          fontWeight: '600',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          marginTop: 'auto',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
        <option value="none">◌ Inactive</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  // Expanded agent list with all omni leads and sentinels
  const allAgents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'cortexia', layer: 'omni', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'forge', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 12 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'daxio', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'enki', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 14 },
    { agent_id: 'vondra', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 11 },
    { agent_id: 'nura', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 9 },
    { agent_id: 'solis', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'zenix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 7 },
    { agent_id: 'vector', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'finix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 13 },
  ]

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: '20px',
        autoRows: 'minmax(420px, auto)',
      }}>
        {allAgents.map((agent) => {
          const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova
          return (
            <AgentCard 
              key={agent.agent_id} 
              agent={agent} 
              theme={theme}
              design={design}
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import * as THREE from 'three'

const DOMAIN_COLORS = {
  'System': { bg: 0x1a1f3a, accent: 0x00ff88 },

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'icosahedron':
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    case 'box':
      return new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
    case 'octahedron':
      return new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.8, 3)
    case 'tetrahedron':

      return new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.8, 32, 32)
    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.glowColor,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme, design }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const cybergRef = useRef(null)
  const mouseRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const [model, setModel] = React.useState(agent.model || 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

  const domainInfo = DOMAIN_COLORS[design.domain] || DOMAIN_COLORS['System']
  const isActive = model !== 'none'

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(180, 180)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    cybergRef.current = cyborg
    scene.add(cyborg)

    // MOUSE/TOUCH INTERACTION
    const handleMouseMove = (e) => {
      const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
      mouseRef.current.x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1
      mouseRef.current.y = -((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1
    }

    const handleTouchMove = (e) => {
      if (e.touches.length > 0) {
        const touch = e.touches[0]
        const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
        mouseRef.current.x = ((touch.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1
        mouseRef.current.y = -((touch.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1
      }
    }

    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      
      // Auto rotation
      cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
      cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008

      // Mouse/touch interaction
      cyborg.rotation.x += mouseRef.current.y * 0.02
      cyborg.rotation.y += mouseRef.current.x * 0.02

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)
    }
  }, [design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '18px',
      backgroundColor: `rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.3)`,
      border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      boxShadow: `0 0 15px ${design.glowColor}33, inset 0 0 20px rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.2)`,
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }}>
      {/* 3D CYBORG - INTERACTIVE */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        height: '180px',
        marginBottom: '14px',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        alignItems: 'center',
        cursor: 'grab',
      }} />

      {/* AGENT NAME */}
      <h3 style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '14px', 
        margin: '0 0 8px 0', 
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {agent.agent_id.toUpperCase()}
      </h3>

      {/* ROLE */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: design.glowColor, 
        fontSize: '12px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0',
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.role}
      </p>

      {/* FUNCTION */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 2px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.function}
      </p>

      {/* DOMAIN */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 10px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.domain}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        gap: '8px', 
        marginBottom: '10px' 
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444'}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ 
          fontSize: '11px', 
          color: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          fontWeight: '600'
        }}>
          {isActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'INACTIVE'}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL DROPDOWN */}
      <select
        value={model}
        onChange={(e) => setModel(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '11px',
          fontWeight: '600',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          marginTop: 'auto',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
        <option value="none">◌ Inactive</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const allAgents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'cortexia', layer: 'omni', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'forge', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 12 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'daxio', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'enki', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 14 },
    { agent_id: 'vondra', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 11 },
    { agent_id: 'nura', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 9 },
    { agent_id: 'solis', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'zenix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 7 },
    { agent_id: 'vector', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'finix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 13 },
  ]

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: '20px',
        autoRows: 'minmax(420px, auto)',
      }}>
        {allAgents.map((agent) => {
          const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova
          return (
            <AgentCard 
              key={agent.agent_id} 
              agent={agent} 
              theme={theme}
              design={design}
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

const DOMAIN_COLORS = {
  'System': { bg: 0x1a1f3a, accent: 0x00ff88 },
  'Helix Tech': { bg: 0x1a2f3a, accent: 0x00d4ff },
  'Matrix Intelligence': { bg: 0x2a1a3a, accent: 0x7c3aed },
  'Quantix Growth': { bg: 0x3a1a2a, accent: 0xec4899 },
  'Zenix Operations': { bg: 0x3a2a1a, accent: 0xf97316 },
  'Finix Assets': { bg: 0x3a3a1a, accent: 0xfbbf24 },
}

const AGENT_DESIGNS = {
  'nova': {
    shape: 'sphere',
    bodyColor: 0x0a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    lightColor: 0x00ff88,
    glowColor: 0x00ff88,
    role: 'Gateway',
    function: 'Intake',
    domain: 'System',
    name: 'Silver Surfer',
  },
  'flux_main': {
    shape: 'box',
    bodyColor: 0x3a2a0a,
    eyeColor: 0xffd700,
    lightColor: 0xffd700,
    glowColor: 0xffed4e,
    role: 'Orchestrator',
    function: 'Routing',
    domain: 'System',
    name: 'Brain',
  },
  'cortexia': {
    shape: 'octahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a2f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    glowColor: 0x00d4ff,
    role: 'Lead',
    function: 'Security',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
  },
  'nero': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a3a2a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    glowColor: 0x1effaa,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Executor',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
  },
  'forge': {
    shape: 'dodecahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a2a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    glowColor: 0x00ffff,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Builder',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
  },
  'sora': {
    shape: 'cone',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0xaa66ff,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Analyst',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
  },
  'daxio': {
    shape: 'cylinder',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0xbb77ff,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Monitor',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
  },
  'enki': {
    shape: 'icosahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    glowColor: 0xdd99ff,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Decoder',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
  },
  'vondra': {
    shape: 'torus',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a2a,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    lightColor: 0xec4899,
    glowColor: 0xff44aa,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Manager',
    domain: 'Quantix Growth',
  },
  'nura': {
    shape: 'icosahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a2a,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    lightColor: 0xec4899,
    glowColor: 0xff77dd,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Optimizer',
    domain: 'Quantix Growth',
  },
  'solis': {
    shape: 'box',
    bodyColor: 0x3a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xf97316,
    lightColor: 0xf97316,
    glowColor: 0xff8833,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Coordinator',
    domain: 'Zenix Operations',
  },
  'vector': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a3a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xfbbf24,
    lightColor: 0xfbbf24,
    glowColor: 0xffcc00,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Accountant',
    domain: 'Finix Assets',
  },
}

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'icosahedron':
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    case 'box':
      return new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
    case 'octahedron':
      return new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.8, 3)
    case 'tetrahedron':
      return new THREE.TetrahedronGeometry(0.8, 2)
    case 'cone':
      return new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.7, 1.4, 32)
    case 'dodecahedron':
      return new THREE.DodecahedronGeometry(0.7, 0)
    case 'cylinder':
      return new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.6, 0.6, 1.2, 32)
    case 'sphere':
      return new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.8, 32, 32)
    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.glowColor,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme, design }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const cybergRef = useRef(null)
  const mouseRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const [model, setModel] = React.useState(agent.model || 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

  const domainInfo = DOMAIN_COLORS[design.domain] || DOMAIN_COLORS['System']
  const isActive = model !== 'none'
  const displayName = design.name || agent.agent_id.toUpperCase()

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(180, 180)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    cybergRef.current = cyborg
    scene.add(cyborg)

    const handleMouseMove = (e) => {
      const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
      mouseRef.current.x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1
      mouseRef.current.y = -((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1
    }

    const handleTouchMove = (e) => {
      if (e.touches.length > 0) {
        const touch = e.touches[0]
        const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
        mouseRef.current.x = ((touch.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1
        mouseRef.current.y = -((touch.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1
      }
    }

    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      
      cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
      cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008
      cyborg.rotation.x += mouseRef.current.y * 0.02
      cyborg.rotation.y += mouseRef.current.x * 0.02

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)
    }
  }, [design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '18px',
      backgroundColor: `rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.3)`,
      border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      boxShadow: `0 0 15px ${design.glowColor}33, inset 0 0 20px rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.2)`,
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }}>
      {/* 3D CYBORG */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        height: '180px',
        marginBottom: '14px',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        alignItems: 'center',
        cursor: 'grab',
      }} />

      {/* AGENT NAME */}
      <h3 style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '14px', 
        margin: '0 0 8px 0', 
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {displayName}
      </h3>

      {/* ROLE */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: design.glowColor, 
        fontSize: '12px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0',
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.role}
      </p>

      {/* FUNCTION */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 2px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.function}
      </p>

      {/* DOMAIN */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 10px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.domain}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        gap: '8px', 
        marginBottom: '10px' 
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444'}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ 
          fontSize: '11px', 
          color: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          fontWeight: '600'
        }}>
          {isActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'INACTIVE'}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL DROPDOWN */}
      <select
        value={model}
        onChange={(e) => setModel(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.glowColor}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '11px',
          fontWeight: '600',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          marginTop: 'auto',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
        <option value="none">◌ Inactive</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const allAgents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'cortexia', layer: 'omni', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'forge', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 12 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'daxio', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'enki', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 14 },
    { agent_id: 'vondra', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 11 },

  ]

  return (

      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: '20px',
        autoRows: 'minmax(420px, auto)',
      }}>
        {allAgents.map((agent) => {
          const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova
          return (
            <AgentCard 
              key={agent.agent_id} 
              agent={agent} 
              theme={theme}
              design={design}
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

const DOMAIN_COLORS = {
  'System': { bg: 0x1a1f3a, accent: 0x00ff88 },
  'Helix Tech': { bg: 0x1a2f3a, accent: 0x00d4ff },
  'Matrix Intelligence': { bg: 0x2a1a3a, accent: 0x7c3aed },
  'Quantix Growth': { bg: 0x3a1a2a, accent: 0xec4899 },
  'Zenix Operations': { bg: 0x3a2a1a, accent: 0xf97316 },
  'Finix Assets': { bg: 0x3a3a1a, accent: 0xfbbf24 },
}

const AGENT_DESIGNS = {
  'nova': {
    shape: 'sphere',
    bodyColor: 0x0a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    lightColor: 0x00ff88,

  },
  'flux_main': {
    shape: 'box',

    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    primaryGlow: 0x00d4ff,

    role: 'Lead',

    domain: 'Helix Tech',

  },
  'nero': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a3a2a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,

    bodyColor: 0x1a2a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,

  },
  'sora': {
    shape: 'cone',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    primaryGlow: 0x7c3aed,
    secondaryGlow: 0xaa66ff,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Analyst',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
    displayName: 'Sora',
  },
  'daxio': {
    shape: 'cylinder',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    primaryGlow: 0x7c3aed,
    secondaryGlow: 0xbb77ff,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Monitor',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
    displayName: 'Daxio',
  },
  'enki': {
    shape: 'icosahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x2a1a3a,
    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,
    primaryGlow: 0x7c3aed,
    secondaryGlow: 0xdd99ff,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Decoder',
    domain: 'Matrix Intelligence',
    displayName: 'Enki',
  },
  'vondra': {
    shape: 'torus',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a2a,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    lightColor: 0xec4899,
    primaryGlow: 0xec4899,
    secondaryGlow: 0xff44aa,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Manager',
    domain: 'Quantix Growth',
    displayName: 'Vondra',
  },
  'nura': {
    shape: 'icosahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a1a2a,
    eyeColor: 0xec4899,
    lightColor: 0xec4899,
    primaryGlow: 0xec4899,
    secondaryGlow: 0xff77dd,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Optimizer',
    domain: 'Quantix Growth',
    displayName: 'Nura',
  },
  'solis': {
    shape: 'box',
    bodyColor: 0x3a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xf97316,
    lightColor: 0xf97316,
    primaryGlow: 0xf97316,
    secondaryGlow: 0xff8833,
    role: 'Sentinel',

    domain: 'Zenix Operations',
