  },
  'vector': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x3a3a1a,
    eyeColor: 0xfbbf24,
    lightColor: 0xfbbf24,
    primaryGlow: 0xfbbf24,
    secondaryGlow: 0xffdd55,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Accountant',
    domain: 'Finix Assets',
    displayName: 'Vector',
  },
}

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'icosahedron':
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    case 'box':
      return new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
    case 'octahedron':
      return new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.8, 3)
    case 'tetrahedron':
      return new THREE.TetrahedronGeometry(0.8, 2)
    case 'cone':
      return new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.7, 1.4, 32)
    case 'dodecahedron':
      return new THREE.DodecahedronGeometry(0.7, 0)
    case 'cylinder':
      return new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.6, 0.6, 1.2, 32)
    case 'sphere':
      return new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.8, 32, 32)
    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.primaryGlow,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme, design }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const cybergRef = useRef(null)
  const mouseRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const targetRotationRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const [model, setModel] = React.useState(agent.model || 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

  const domainInfo = DOMAIN_COLORS[design.domain] || DOMAIN_COLORS['System']
  const isActive = model !== 'none'

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(180, 180)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    cybergRef.current = cyborg
    scene.add(cyborg)

    // DUAL-COLOR GLOW EFFECT
    const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.3, 32, 32)
    const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: design.secondaryGlow,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.05,
      wireframe: false,
    })
    const secondaryGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
    scene.add(secondaryGlow)

    // MOUSE/TOUCH INTERACTION - 360 DEGREE
    const handleMouseMove = (e) => {
      const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
      const centerX = rect.width / 2
      const centerY = rect.height / 2
      const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left
      const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top

      // Calculate angle from center
      const deltaX = mouseX - centerX
      const deltaY = mouseY - centerY
      
      // Normalize to -1 to 1
      mouseRef.current.x = deltaX / centerX
      mouseRef.current.y = -deltaY / centerY

      // Target rotation based on mouse position
      targetRotationRef.current.x = mouseRef.current.y * Math.PI * 0.25
      targetRotationRef.current.y = mouseRef.current.x * Math.PI * 0.25
    }

    const handleTouchMove = (e) => {
      if (e.touches.length > 0) {
        const touch = e.touches[0]
        const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
        const centerX = rect.width / 2
        const centerY = rect.height / 2
        const touchX = touch.clientX - rect.left
        const touchY = touch.clientY - rect.top

        const deltaX = touchX - centerX
        const deltaY = touchY - centerY
        
        mouseRef.current.x = deltaX / centerX
        mouseRef.current.y = -deltaY / centerY

        targetRotationRef.current.x = mouseRef.current.y * Math.PI * 0.25
        targetRotationRef.current.y = mouseRef.current.x * Math.PI * 0.25
      }
    }

    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      
      // Auto rotation
      cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
      cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008

      // Smooth interpolation to target rotation
      cyborg.rotation.x += (targetRotationRef.current.x - cyborg.rotation.x) * 0.1
      cyborg.rotation.y += (targetRotationRef.current.y - cyborg.rotation.y) * 0.1

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)
    }
  }, [design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '18px',
      backgroundColor: `rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.3)`,
      border: `2px solid ${design.primaryGlow}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      boxShadow: `0 0 15px ${design.primaryGlow}33, inset 0 0 20px rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.2)`,
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }}>
      {/* 3D CYBORG - INTERACTIVE */}
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        height: '180px',
        marginBottom: '14px',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        alignItems: 'center',
        cursor: 'grab',
      }} />

      {/* AGENT NAME */}
      <h3 style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '14px', 
        margin: '0 0 8px 0', 
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.displayName}
      </h3>

      {/* ROLE */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: design.primaryGlow, 
        fontSize: '12px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0',
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.role}
      </p>

      {/* FUNCTION */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 2px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.function}
      </p>

      {/* DOMAIN */}
      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 10px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.domain}
      </p>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        gap: '8px', 
        marginBottom: '10px' 
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444'}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ 
          fontSize: '11px', 
          color: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          fontWeight: '600'
        }}>
          {isActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'INACTIVE'}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* MODEL DROPDOWN */}
      <select
        value={model}
        onChange={(e) => setModel(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.primaryGlow}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '11px',
          fontWeight: '600',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          marginTop: 'auto',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
        <option value="none">◌ Inactive</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const allAgents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'cortexia', layer: 'omni', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'forge', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 12 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'daxio', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'enki', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 14 },
    { agent_id: 'vondra', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 11 },
    { agent_id: 'nura', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 9 },
    { agent_id: 'solis', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'zenix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 7 },
    { agent_id: 'vector', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'finix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 13 },
  ]

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: '20px',
        autoRows: 'minmax(420px, auto)',
      }}>
        {allAgents.map((agent) => {
          const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova
          return (
            <AgentCard 
              key={agent.agent_id} 
              agent={agent} 
              theme={theme}
              design={design}
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

const DOMAIN_COLORS = {
  'System': { bg: 0x1a1f3a, accent: 0x00ff88 },
  'Helix Tech': { bg: 0x1a2f3a, accent: 0x00d4ff },
  'Matrix Intelligence': { bg: 0x2a1a3a, accent: 0x7c3aed },
  'Quantix Growth': { bg: 0x3a1a2a, accent: 0xec4899 },
  'Zenix Operations': { bg: 0x3a2a1a, accent: 0xf97316 },
  'Finix Assets': { bg: 0x3a3a1a, accent: 0xfbbf24 },
}

const AGENT_DESIGNS = {
  'nova': {
    shape: 'sphere',
    bodyColor: 0x0a2a1a,
    eyeColor: 0x00ff88,
    lightColor: 0x00ff88,
    primaryGlow: 0x00ff88,
    secondaryGlow: 0x00ffaa,
    role: 'Gateway',
    function: 'Intake',
    domain: 'Silver Surfer',
    displayName: 'Nova',
  },
  'flux_main': {
    shape: 'box',
    bodyColor: 0x3a2a0a,
    eyeColor: 0xffd700,
    lightColor: 0xffd700,
    primaryGlow: 0xffd700,
    secondaryGlow: 0xffed4e,
    role: 'Orchestrator',
    function: 'Routing',
    domain: 'Brain',
    displayName: 'Flux',
  },
  'cortexia': {
    shape: 'octahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a2f3a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    primaryGlow: 0x00d4ff,
    secondaryGlow: 0x00ffff,
    role: 'Lead',
    function: 'Security',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
    displayName: 'Cortexia',
  },
  'nero': {
    shape: 'tetrahedron',
    bodyColor: 0x1a3a2a,
    eyeColor: 0x00d4ff,
    lightColor: 0x00d4ff,
    primaryGlow: 0x00d4ff,
    secondaryGlow: 0x1effaa,
    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Executor',
    domain: 'Helix Tech',
    displayName: 'Nero',
  },
  'forge': {

  },

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'icosahedron':
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    case 'box':
      return new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
    case 'octahedron':
      return new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.8, 3)
    case 'tetrahedron':
      return new THREE.TetrahedronGeometry(0.8, 2)
    case 'cone':
      return new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.7, 1.4, 32)
    case 'dodecahedron':
      return new THREE.DodecahedronGeometry(0.7, 0)
    case 'cylinder':
      return new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.6, 0.6, 1.2, 32)
    case 'sphere':
      return new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.8, 32, 32)
    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.primaryGlow,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme, design }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const cybergRef = useRef(null)
  const mouseRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const targetRotationRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const [model, setModel] = React.useState(agent.model || 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

  const domainInfo = DOMAIN_COLORS[design.domain] || DOMAIN_COLORS['System']
  const isActive = model !== 'none'

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(180, 180)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    cybergRef.current = cyborg
    scene.add(cyborg)

    const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.3, 32, 32)
    const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: design.secondaryGlow,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.05,
      wireframe: false,
    })
    const secondaryGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
    scene.add(secondaryGlow)

    // MOUSE/TOUCH - 360 DEGREE ROTATION FIX
    const handleMouseMove = (e) => {
      const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
      const centerX = rect.width / 2
      const centerY = rect.height / 2
      const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left
      const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top

      const deltaX = mouseX - centerX
      const deltaY = mouseY - centerY
      
      mouseRef.current.x = deltaX / centerX
      mouseRef.current.y = deltaY / centerY // FIXED: Removed negative

      // Target rotation - CORRECTED
      targetRotationRef.current.x = mouseRef.current.y * Math.PI * 0.25 // UP muis = UP agent
      targetRotationRef.current.y = mouseRef.current.x * Math.PI * 0.25 // RIGHT muis = RIGHT agent
    }

    const handleTouchMove = (e) => {
      if (e.touches.length > 0) {
        const touch = e.touches[0]
        const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
        const centerX = rect.width / 2
        const centerY = rect.height / 2
        const touchX = touch.clientX - rect.left
        const touchY = touch.clientY - rect.top

        const deltaX = touchX - centerX
        const deltaY = touchY - centerY
        
        mouseRef.current.x = deltaX / centerX
        mouseRef.current.y = deltaY / centerY // FIXED: Removed negative

        targetRotationRef.current.x = mouseRef.current.y * Math.PI * 0.25
        targetRotationRef.current.y = mouseRef.current.x * Math.PI * 0.25
      }
    }

    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      
      // Auto rotation
      cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
      cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008

      // Smooth interpolation to target rotation
      cyborg.rotation.x += (targetRotationRef.current.x - cyborg.rotation.x) * 0.1
      cyborg.rotation.y += (targetRotationRef.current.y - cyborg.rotation.y) * 0.1

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)
    }
  }, [design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '18px',
      backgroundColor: `rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.3)`,
      border: `2px solid ${design.primaryGlow}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      boxShadow: `0 0 15px ${design.primaryGlow}33, inset 0 0 20px rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.2)`,
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }}>
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        height: '180px',
        marginBottom: '14px',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        alignItems: 'center',
        cursor: 'grab',
      }} />

      <h3 style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '14px', 
        margin: '0 0 8px 0', 
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.displayName}
      </h3>

      <p style={{ 
        color: design.primaryGlow, 
        fontSize: '12px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0',
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.role}
      </p>

      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 2px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.function}
      </p>

      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 10px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.domain}
      </p>

      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        gap: '8px', 
        marginBottom: '10px' 
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444'}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ 
          fontSize: '11px', 
          color: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          fontWeight: '600'
        }}>
          {isActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'INACTIVE'}
        </span>
      </div>

      <select
        value={model}
        onChange={(e) => setModel(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.primaryGlow}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '11px',
          fontWeight: '600',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          marginTop: 'auto',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
        <option value="none">◌ Inactive</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const allAgents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'cortexia', layer: 'omni', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'forge', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 12 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'daxio', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'enki', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 14 },
    { agent_id: 'vondra', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 11 },
    { agent_id: 'nura', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 9 },
    { agent_id: 'solis', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'zenix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 7 },
    { agent_id: 'vector', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'finix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 13 },
  ]

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: '20px',
        autoRows: 'minmax(420px, auto)',
      }}>
        {allAgents.map((agent) => {
          const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova
          return (
            <AgentCard 
              key={agent.agent_id} 
              agent={agent} 
              theme={theme}
              design={design}
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {

    case 'cylinder':

    case 'sphere':

    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({

    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  group.add(leftEye)

    color: design.primaryGlow,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme, design }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const cybergRef = useRef(null)
  const mouseRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const targetRotationRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const isMouseOverRef = useRef(false)
  const [model, setModel] = React.useState(agent.model || 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

  const domainInfo = DOMAIN_COLORS[design.domain] || DOMAIN_COLORS['System']
  const isActive = model !== 'none'

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(180, 180)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    cybergRef.current = cyborg
    scene.add(cyborg)

    const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.3, 32, 32)
    const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: design.secondaryGlow,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.05,
      wireframe: false,
    })
    const secondaryGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
    scene.add(secondaryGlow)

    // MOUSE EVENTS
    const handleMouseEnter = () => {
      isMouseOverRef.current = true
    }

    const handleMouseLeave = () => {
      isMouseOverRef.current = false
      mouseRef.current = { x: 0, y: 0 }
    }

    const handleMouseMove = (e) => {
      const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
      const centerX = rect.width / 2
      const centerY = rect.height / 2
      const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left
      const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top

      const deltaX = mouseX - centerX
      const deltaY = mouseY - centerY
      
      mouseRef.current.x = deltaX / centerX
      mouseRef.current.y = deltaY / centerY

      if (isMouseOverRef.current) {
        targetRotationRef.current.x = mouseRef.current.y * Math.PI * 0.25
        targetRotationRef.current.y = mouseRef.current.x * Math.PI * 0.25
      }
    }

    const handleTouchMove = (e) => {
      if (e.touches.length > 0) {
        const touch = e.touches[0]
        const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
        const centerX = rect.width / 2
        const centerY = rect.height / 2
        const touchX = touch.clientX - rect.left
        const touchY = touch.clientY - rect.top

        const deltaX = touchX - centerX
        const deltaY = touchY - centerY
        
        mouseRef.current.x = deltaX / centerX
        mouseRef.current.y = deltaY / centerY

        targetRotationRef.current.x = mouseRef.current.y * Math.PI * 0.25
        targetRotationRef.current.y = mouseRef.current.x * Math.PI * 0.25
      }
    }

    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mouseenter', handleMouseEnter)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      
      if (!isMouseOverRef.current) {
        // AUTO ROTATE when no mouse
        cyborg.rotation.x += 0.005
        cyborg.rotation.y += 0.008
      } else {
        // SMOOTH interpolation to mouse target
        cyborg.rotation.x += (targetRotationRef.current.x - cyborg.rotation.x) * 0.1
        cyborg.rotation.y += (targetRotationRef.current.y - cyborg.rotation.y) * 0.1
      }

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mouseenter', handleMouseEnter)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)
    }
  }, [design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '18px',
      backgroundColor: `rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.3)`,
      border: `2px solid ${design.primaryGlow}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      boxShadow: `0 0 15px ${design.primaryGlow}33, inset 0 0 20px rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.2)`,
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }}>
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        height: '180px',
        marginBottom: '14px',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        alignItems: 'center',
        cursor: 'grab',
      }} />

      <h3 style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '14px', 
        margin: '0 0 8px 0', 
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.displayName}
      </h3>

      <p style={{ 
        color: design.primaryGlow, 
        fontSize: '12px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0',
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.role}
      </p>

      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 2px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.function}
      </p>

      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 10px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.domain}
      </p>

      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        gap: '8px', 
        marginBottom: '10px' 
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444'}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ 
          fontSize: '11px', 
          color: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          fontWeight: '600'
        }}>
          {isActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'INACTIVE'}
        </span>
      </div>

      <select
        value={model}
        onChange={(e) => setModel(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.primaryGlow}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '11px',
          fontWeight: '600',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          marginTop: 'auto',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
        <option value="none">◌ Inactive</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const allAgents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'cortexia', layer: 'omni', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'forge', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 12 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'daxio', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'enki', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 14 },
    { agent_id: 'vondra', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 11 },
    { agent_id: 'nura', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 9 },
    { agent_id: 'solis', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'zenix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 7 },
    { agent_id: 'vector', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'finix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 13 },
  ]

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: '20px',
        autoRows: 'minmax(420px, auto)',
      }}>
        {allAgents.map((agent) => {
          const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova
          return (
            <AgentCard 
              key={agent.agent_id} 
              agent={agent} 
              theme={theme}
              design={design}
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import * as THREE from 'three'

const DOMAIN_COLORS = {
  'System': { bg: 0x1a1f3a, accent: 0x00ff88 },
  'Helix Tech': { bg: 0x1a2f3a, accent: 0x00d4ff },

}

const AGENT_DESIGNS = {

    eyeColor: 0x7c3aed,
    lightColor: 0x7c3aed,

  },

    role: 'Sentinel',
    function: 'Accountant',
    domain: 'Finix Assets',
    displayName: 'Vector',
    rotationX: 0.008,
    rotationY: 0.007,
  },
}

function createBodyGeometry(shape) {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'icosahedron':
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
    case 'box':
      return new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
    case 'octahedron':
      return new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.8, 3)
    case 'tetrahedron':
      return new THREE.TetrahedronGeometry(0.8, 2)
    case 'cone':
      return new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.7, 1.4, 32)
    case 'dodecahedron':
      return new THREE.DodecahedronGeometry(0.7, 0)
    case 'cylinder':
      return new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.6, 0.6, 1.2, 32)
    case 'sphere':
      return new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.8, 32, 32)
    case 'torus':
      return new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.3, 16, 100)
    default:
      return new THREE.IcosahedronGeometry(0.8, 4)
  }
}

function createCyborg(design) {
  const group = new THREE.Group()

  const bodyGeometry = createBodyGeometry(design.shape)
  const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.bodyColor,
    metalness: 0.8,
    roughness: 0.2,
  })
  const bodyMesh = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial)
  bodyMesh.castShadow = true
  bodyMesh.receiveShadow = true
  group.add(bodyMesh)

  const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 32, 32)
  const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
    color: design.eyeColor,
    emissive: design.eyeColor,
    emissiveIntensity: 2,
  })

  const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  leftEye.position.set(-0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(leftEye)

  const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial)
  rightEye.position.set(0.25, 0.3, 0.7)
  group.add(rightEye)

  const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.2, 32, 32)
  const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: design.primaryGlow,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.1,
    wireframe: true,
  })
  const glowSphere = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
  group.add(glowSphere)

  return group
}

function AgentCard({ agent, theme, design }) {
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const cybergRef = useRef(null)
  const mouseRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const targetRotationRef = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
  const isMouseOverRef = useRef(false)
  const [model, setModel] = React.useState(agent.model || 'claude-3.5-sonnet')

  const domainInfo = DOMAIN_COLORS[design.domain] || DOMAIN_COLORS['System']
  const isActive = model !== 'none'

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return

    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x0a0e27)

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, 1, 0.1, 1000)
    camera.position.z = 3

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(180, 180)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)

    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.3)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const pointLight = new THREE.PointLight(design.lightColor, 1.2, 30)
    pointLight.position.set(2, 2, 2)
    pointLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(pointLight)

    const cyborg = createCyborg(design)
    cybergRef.current = cyborg
    scene.add(cyborg)

    const glowGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.3, 32, 32)
    const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: design.secondaryGlow,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.05,
      wireframe: false,
    })
    const secondaryGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial)
    scene.add(secondaryGlow)

    const handleMouseEnter = () => {
      isMouseOverRef.current = true
    }

    const handleMouseLeave = () => {
      isMouseOverRef.current = false
      mouseRef.current = { x: 0, y: 0 }
    }

    const handleMouseMove = (e) => {
      const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
      const centerX = rect.width / 2
      const centerY = rect.height / 2
      const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left
      const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top

      const deltaX = mouseX - centerX
      const deltaY = mouseY - centerY
      
      mouseRef.current.x = deltaX / centerX
      mouseRef.current.y = deltaY / centerY

      if (isMouseOverRef.current) {
        targetRotationRef.current.x = mouseRef.current.y * Math.PI * 0.25
        targetRotationRef.current.y = mouseRef.current.x * Math.PI * 0.25
      }
    }

    const handleTouchMove = (e) => {
      if (e.touches.length > 0) {
        const touch = e.touches[0]
        const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect()
        const centerX = rect.width / 2
        const centerY = rect.height / 2
        const touchX = touch.clientX - rect.left
        const touchY = touch.clientY - rect.top

        const deltaX = touchX - centerX
        const deltaY = touchY - centerY
        
        mouseRef.current.x = deltaX / centerX
        mouseRef.current.y = deltaY / centerY

        targetRotationRef.current.x = mouseRef.current.y * Math.PI * 0.25
        targetRotationRef.current.y = mouseRef.current.x * Math.PI * 0.25
      }
    }

    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mouseenter', handleMouseEnter)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)

    const animate = () => {
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
      
      if (!isMouseOverRef.current) {
        // UNIQUE AUTO-ROTATE per agent
        cyborg.rotation.x += design.rotationX
        cyborg.rotation.y += design.rotationY
      } else {
        // SMOOTH interpolation to mouse target
        cyborg.rotation.x += (targetRotationRef.current.x - cyborg.rotation.x) * 0.1
        cyborg.rotation.y += (targetRotationRef.current.y - cyborg.rotation.y) * 0.1
      }

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
    }
    animate()

    return () => {
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement.parentNode === containerRef.current) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement)
      }
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mouseenter', handleMouseEnter)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove)
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove)
    }
  }, [design])

  return (
    <div style={{
      padding: '18px',
      backgroundColor: `rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.3)`,
      border: `2px solid ${design.primaryGlow}99`,
      borderRadius: '12px',
      boxShadow: `0 0 15px ${design.primaryGlow}33, inset 0 0 20px rgba(${((domainInfo.bg >> 16) & 255)}, ${((domainInfo.bg >> 8) & 255)}, ${(domainInfo.bg & 255)}, 0.2)`,
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }}>
      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ 
        height: '180px',
        marginBottom: '14px',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'center',
        alignItems: 'center',
        cursor: 'grab',
      }} />

      <h3 style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '14px', 
        margin: '0 0 8px 0', 
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.displayName}
      </h3>

      <p style={{ 
        color: design.primaryGlow, 
        fontSize: '12px', 
        margin: '0 0 4px 0',
        fontWeight: '600'
      }}>
        {design.role}
      </p>

      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 2px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.function}
      </p>

      <p style={{ 
        color: theme.colors.text, 
        fontSize: '11px', 
        margin: '0 0 10px 0',
        fontWeight: '500'
      }}>
        {design.domain}
      </p>

      <div style={{ 
        display: 'flex', 
        alignItems: 'center', 
        gap: '8px', 
        marginBottom: '10px' 
      }}>
        <div style={{
          width: '8px',
          height: '8px',
          borderRadius: '50%',
          backgroundColor: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444'}`,
        }} />
        <span style={{ 
          fontSize: '11px', 
          color: isActive ? '#00ff88' : '#ff4444',
          fontWeight: '600'
        }}>
          {isActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'INACTIVE'}
        </span>
      </div>

      <select
        value={model}
        onChange={(e) => setModel(e.target.value)}
        style={{
          width: '100%',
          padding: '8px',
          backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
          border: `2px solid ${design.primaryGlow}`,
          borderRadius: '6px',
          color: theme.colors.text,
          fontSize: '11px',
          fontWeight: '600',
          cursor: 'pointer',
          marginTop: 'auto',
        }}
      >
        <option value="claude-3.5-sonnet">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
        <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
        <option value="gpt-4-turbo">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
        <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
        <option value="none">◌ Inactive</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function AgentsView({ agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const allAgents = [
    { agent_id: 'nova', layer: 'nova', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 5 },
    { agent_id: 'flux_main', layer: 'flux', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'cortexia', layer: 'omni', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'nero', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 15 },
    { agent_id: 'forge', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'helix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 12 },
    { agent_id: 'sora', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 10 },
    { agent_id: 'daxio', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 8 },
    { agent_id: 'enki', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'matrix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 14 },
    { agent_id: 'vondra', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 11 },
    { agent_id: 'nura', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'quantix', status: 'IDLE', task_count_active: 0, task_count_completed: 9 },
    { agent_id: 'solis', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'zenix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 1, task_count_completed: 7 },
    { agent_id: 'vector', layer: 'sentinel', domain: 'finix', status: 'ACTIVE', task_count_active: 2, task_count_completed: 13 },
  ]

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🤖 AGENTS
      </h1>

      <div style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)',
        gap: '20px',
        autoRows: 'minmax(420px, auto)',
      }}>
        {allAgents.map((agent) => {
          const design = AGENT_DESIGNS[agent.agent_id] || AGENT_DESIGNS.nova
          return (
            <AgentCard 
              key={agent.agent_id} 
              agent={agent} 
              theme={theme}
              design={design}
            />
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

bash
cat > app/db/models.py << 'EOF'
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text, Float, Boolean, JSON, ForeignKey, Enum
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from datetime import datetime
import enum

Base = declarative_base()

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    hashed_password = Column(String)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Agent(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agents"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    layer = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="IDLE")
    model = Column(String, default="claude-3.5-sonnet")
    domain = Column(String)
    task_count_active = Column(Integer, default=0)
    task_count_completed = Column(Integer, default=0)
    cost_today = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

class Task(Base):
    __tablename__ = "tasks"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    task_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    status = Column(String, default="CREATED")
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"))
    project_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("projects.project_id"))
    priority = Column(String, default="NORMAL")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)
    completed_at = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)

class Project(Base):
    __tablename__ = "projects"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    project_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    name = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, default="ACTIVE")
    progress = Column(Integer, default=0)
    budget = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    spent = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    lead_agent = Column(String, nullable=True)
    deadline = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Alert(Base):
    __tablename__ = "alerts"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    alert_id = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    severity = Column(String, default="INFO")
    message = Column(Text)
    agent_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    resolved = Column(Boolean, default=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Journal(Base):
    __tablename__ = "journals"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"), index=True)
    entry_type = Column(String)
    content = Column(Text)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    extra_data = Column(JSON, nullable=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, index=True)

class AgentCost(Base):
    __tablename__ = "agent_costs"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    agent_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("agents.agent_id"), index=True)
    model = Column(String)
    tokens_input = Column(Integer, default=0)
    tokens_output = Column(Integer, default=0)
    cost = Column(Float, default=0.0)
    date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, index=True)
    task_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
EOF

Nu PROJECTS API ROUTES:

bash
cat > app/api/projects_routes.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import desc
from app.db.database import get_db
from app.db.models import Project, Task, Agent
from datetime import datetime

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/projects", tags=["projects"])

@router.get("/")
async def get_all_projects(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get all projects with task counts"""
    projects = db.query(Project).all()
    
    result = []
    for project in projects:
        tasks = db.query(Task).filter(Task.project_id == project.project_id).all()
        in_progress = len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "IN_PROGRESS"])
        completed = len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "COMPLETED"])
        queued = len([t for t in tasks if t.status == "CREATED"])
        
        result.append({
            "project_id": project.project_id,
            "name": project.name,
            "status": project.status,
            "progress": project.progress,
            "budget": project.budget,
            "spent": project.spent,
            "lead_agent": project.lead_agent,
            "deadline": project.deadline.isoformat() if project.deadline else None,
            "tasks": {
                "total": len(tasks),
                "queued": queued,
                "in_progress": in_progress,
                "completed": completed,
            }
        })
    
    return {"projects": result}

@router.get("/{project_id}")
async def get_project(project_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get single project with full task details"""
    project = db.query(Project).filter(Project.project_id == project_id).first()
    if not project:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Project not found")
    
    tasks = db.query(Task).filter(Task.project_id == project_id).all()
    
    return {
        "project_id": project.project_id,
        "name": project.name,
        "status": project.status,
        "progress": project.progress,
        "budget": project.budget,
        "spent": project.spent,
        "lead_agent": project.lead_agent,
        "deadline": project.deadline.isoformat() if project.deadline else None,
        "tasks": [
            {
                "task_id": t.task_id,
                "status": t.status,
                "agent_id": t.agent_id,
                "priority": t.priority,
                "created_at": t.created_at.isoformat(),
            }
            for t in tasks
        ]
    }

@router.get("/{project_id}/task-queue")
async def get_project_task_queue(project_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Get real-time task queue for production line"""
    project = db.query(Project).filter(Project.project_id == project_id).first()
    if not project:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Project not found")
    
    tasks = db.query(Task).filter(Task.project_id == project_id).order_by(Task.created_at).all()
    
    # Organize by status
    queued = [t for t in tasks if t.status == "CREATED"]
    in_progress = [t for t in tasks if t.status == "IN_PROGRESS"]
    completed = [t for t in tasks if t.status == "COMPLETED"]
    
    # Get agents with task info
    agents = db.query(Agent).all()
    agent_info = []
    for agent in agents:
        agent_tasks = [t for t in in_progress if t.agent_id == agent.agent_id]
        if agent_tasks or agent.agent_id in ['nova', 'flux_main']:
            agent_info.append({
                "agent_id": agent.agent_id,
                "status": agent.status,
                "current_task": agent_tasks[0].task_id if agent_tasks else None,
                "task_count_active": len(agent_tasks),
            })
    
    return {
        "project_id": project_id,
        "project_name": project.name,
        "progress": project.progress,
        "queued_tasks": [{"task_id": t.task_id, "priority": t.priority} for t in queued],
        "agents": agent_info,
        "completed_count": len(completed),
        "total_tasks": len(tasks),
    }

@router.post("/{project_id}/task/assign")
async def assign_task_to_agent(
    project_id: str,
    task_id: str,
    agent_id: str,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Assign a task to an agent"""
    task = db.query(Task).filter(Task.task_id == task_id).first()
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
    
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
    if not agent:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Agent not found")
    
    task.agent_id = agent_id
    task.status = "IN_PROGRESS"
    agent.task_count_active += 1
    db.commit()
    
    return {
        "task_id": task_id,
        "agent_id": agent_id,
        "status": "IN_PROGRESS"
    }

@router.put("/{project_id}/task/{task_id}/complete")
async def complete_task(
    project_id: str,
    task_id: str,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db)
):
    """Mark task as completed"""
    task = db.query(Task).filter(Task.task_id == task_id).first()
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
    
    agent = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == task.agent_id).first()
    
    task.status = "COMPLETED"
    task.completed_at = datetime.utcnow()
    if agent:
        agent.task_count_active = max(0, agent.task_count_active - 1)
        agent.task_count_completed += 1
    
    db.commit()
    
    return {
        "task_id": task_id,
        "status": "COMPLETED",
        "completed_at": task.completed_at.isoformat()
    }
EOF

Nu UPDATE app/main.py om routes in te laden:

bash
cat > app/main.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from app.config import settings
from app.db.database import engine, init_db, Base
from app.api.routes import router as routes_router
from app.api.analytics_routes import router as analytics_router
from app.api.journal_routes import router as journal_router
from app.api.cost_routes import router as cost_router
from app.api.projects_routes import router as projects_router

# Initialize database
Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
init_db()

@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    print("🚀 MCC Backend Starting...")
    yield
    print("🛑 MCC Backend Shutting down...")

app = FastAPI(
    title="Mission Control Center v3.0",
    description="ARC AI ANGELS - Orchestration & Analytics",
    version="3.0.0",
    lifespan=lifespan
)

# CORS
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

# Routes
app.include_router(routes_router)
app.include_router(analytics_router)
app.include_router(journal_router)
app.include_router(cost_router)
app.include_router(projects_router)

@app.get("/")
async def root():
    return {"message": "MCC v3.0 Online", "status": "operational"}

@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "healthy", "version": "3.0.0"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)
EOF

Nu FAKE DATA GENERATOR voor projects:

bash
cat > scripts/inject_projects.py << 'EOF'
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from app.db.database import SessionLocal, engine, Base
from app.db.models import Agent, Task, Project
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import random

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
db = SessionLocal()

try:
    # Clear old projects & tasks
    db.query(Task).delete()
    db.query(Project).delete()
    db.commit()

    # Create 5 projects
    projects = [
        Project(
            project_id="PROJ-alpha",
            name="Project Alpha",
            status="ACTIVE",
            progress=45,
            budget=10000.0,
            spent=4500.0,
            lead_agent="cortexia",
            deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=30)
        ),
        Project(
            project_id="PROJ-beta",
            name="Project Beta",
            status="ACTIVE",
            progress=62,
            budget=15000.0,
            spent=9300.0,
            lead_agent="sora",
            deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=20)
        ),
        Project(
            project_id="PROJ-gamma",
            name="Project Gamma",
            status="ACTIVE",
            progress=28,
            budget=8000.0,
            spent=2240.0,
            lead_agent="vondra",
            deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=45)
        ),
        Project(
            project_id="PROJ-delta",
            name="Project Delta",
            status="ACTIVE",
            progress=81,
            budget=12000.0,
            spent=9720.0,
            lead_agent="solis",
            deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=10)
        ),
        Project(
            project_id="PROJ-epsilon",
            name="Project Epsilon",
            status="PAUSED",
            progress=15,
            budget=6000.0,
            spent=900.0,
            lead_agent="nero",
            deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=60)
        ),
    ]

    for project in projects:
        db.add(project)
    db.commit()

    # Create tasks per project
    agent_list = ['nova', 'flux_main', 'nero', 'sora', 'cortexia', 'daxio', 'enki', 'vondra', 'nura', 'solis', 'vector']
    
    task_count = 1
    for project in projects:
        num_tasks = random.randint(8, 15)
        
        for i in range(num_tasks):
            task_status = random.choices(
                ['CREATED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED'],
                weights=[40, 40, 20]
            )[0]
            
            assigned_agent = None
            if task_status in ['IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED']:
                assigned_agent = random.choice(agent_list)
            
            task = Task(
                task_id=f"TASK-{task_count:04d}",
                status=task_status,
                agent_id=assigned_agent,
                project_id=project.project_id,
                priority=random.choice(['LOW', 'NORMAL', 'HIGH']),
            )
            db.add(task)
            task_count += 1
    
    db.commit()
    print("✅ Projects & Tasks injected successfully!")
    print(f"   - 5 projects created")
    print(f"   - {task_count - 1} tasks created")
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ Error: {e}")
    db.rollback()
finally:
    db.close()
EOF

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

                layer='sentinel' if agent_id not in ['nova', 'flux_main'] else agent_id,
                status='ACTIVE',

        ),

            name="Project Delta",
            status="ACTIVE",
            progress=81,
            budget=12000.0,
            spent=9720.0,
            lead_agent="solis",
            deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=10)
        ),
        Project(
            project_id="PROJ-epsilon",
            name="Project Epsilon",
            status="PAUSED",
            progress=15,
            budget=6000.0,
            spent=900.0,
            lead_agent="nero",
            deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=60)
        ),
    ]

        db.add(project)

    print(f"   - {task_count - 1} tasks created")
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ Error: {e}")
    db.rollback()
finally:
    db.close()

Then ONE master script - alleen agents + projects:

bash
cat > scripts/init_data.py << 'EOF'
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from app.db.database import SessionLocal, engine, Base
from app.db.models import Agent, Task, Project
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import random

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
db = SessionLocal()

try:
    # 1. CREATE ALL AGENTS
    agents_data = [
        ('nova', 'nova'), ('flux_main', 'flux'),
        ('cortexia', 'omni'), ('nero', 'sentinel'), ('forge', 'sentinel'),
        ('sora', 'sentinel'), ('daxio', 'sentinel'), ('enki', 'sentinel'),
        ('vondra', 'sentinel'), ('nura', 'sentinel'),
        ('solis', 'sentinel'), ('vector', 'sentinel'),
    ]
    
    for agent_id, layer in agents_data:
        existing = db.query(Agent).filter(Agent.agent_id == agent_id).first()
        if not existing:
            agent = Agent(agent_id=agent_id, layer=layer, status='ACTIVE', model='claude-3.5-sonnet')
            db.add(agent)
    db.commit()
    print("✅ 12 Agents created")

    # 2. CREATE 5 PROJECTS
    projects = [
        Project(project_id="PROJ-alpha", name="Project Alpha", status="ACTIVE", progress=45, budget=10000.0, spent=4500.0, lead_agent="cortexia", deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=30)),
        Project(project_id="PROJ-beta", name="Project Beta", status="ACTIVE", progress=62, budget=15000.0, spent=9300.0, lead_agent="sora", deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=20)),
        Project(project_id="PROJ-gamma", name="Project Gamma", status="ACTIVE", progress=28, budget=8000.0, spent=2240.0, lead_agent="vondra", deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=45)),
        Project(project_id="PROJ-delta", name="Project Delta", status="ACTIVE", progress=81, budget=12000.0, spent=9720.0, lead_agent="solis", deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=10)),
        Project(project_id="PROJ-epsilon", name="Project Epsilon", status="PAUSED", progress=15, budget=6000.0, spent=900.0, lead_agent="nero", deadline=datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=60)),
    ]
    for project in projects:
        db.add(project)
    db.commit()
    print("✅ 5 Projects created")

    # 3. CREATE TASKS
    agent_list = [a[0] for a in agents_data]
    task_count = 1
    for project in projects:
        num_tasks = random.randint(8, 15)
        for i in range(num_tasks):
            task_status = random.choices(['CREATED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED'], weights=[40, 40, 20])[0]
            assigned_agent = None if task_status == 'CREATED' else random.choice(agent_list)
            task = Task(task_id=f"TASK-{task_count:04d}", status=task_status, agent_id=assigned_agent, project_id=project.project_id, priority=random.choice(['LOW', 'NORMAL', 'HIGH']))
            db.add(task)
            task_count += 1
    db.commit()
    print(f"✅ {task_count - 1} Tasks created")
    print("\n✅ ALL DATA INITIALIZED!")
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ Error: {e}")
    db.rollback()
finally:
    db.close()
EOF

import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects && res.data.projects.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch projects:', error)
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch task queue:', error)
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>
        Loading production line...
      </div>
    )
  }

  if (!selectedProject || !taskQueue) {
    return (
      <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>
        No projects available
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: '40px', paddingBottom: '100px' }}>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: '28px', color: theme.colors.secondary, marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        🎬 Production Line: {taskQueue.project_name}
      </h1>

      {/* PROJECT SELECTOR */}
      <div style={{ marginBottom: '30px' }}>
        <select
          value={selectedProject}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '10px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '6px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '14px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((proj) => (
            <option key={proj.project_id} value={proj.project_id}>
              {proj.name} - {proj.progress}% complete
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* PRODUCTION LINE */}
      <div style={{
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
        borderRadius: '12px',
        padding: '20px',
        marginBottom: '30px',
      }}>
        {/* PROGRESS BAR */}
        <div style={{ marginBottom: '20px' }}>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: '8px' }}>
            <span style={{ color: theme.colors.text }}>Project Progress</span>
            <span style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary }}>{taskQueue.total_tasks} total tasks</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '8px', backgroundColor: theme.colors.border, borderRadius: '4px', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
            <div style={{
              width: `${(taskQueue.completed_count / taskQueue.total_tasks) * 100}%`,
              height: '100%',
              backgroundColor: theme.colors.secondary,
            }} />
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* INPUT → AGENTS → OUTPUT */}
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          gap: '20px',
          justifyContent: 'space-between',
          margin: '40px 0',
          position: 'relative',
        }}>
          {/* INPUT QUEUE */}
          <div style={{
            flex: 0.2,
            textAlign: 'center',
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            borderRadius: '8px',
            border: `2px solid ${theme.colors.primaryLight}`,
          }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '32px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>📥</div>
            <div style={{ color: theme.colors.text, fontWeight: 'bold' }}>QUEUE</div>
            <div style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, fontSize: '20px', marginTop: '8px' }}>
              {taskQueue.queued_tasks.length}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* AGENTS PROCESSING */}
          <div style={{
            flex: 0.6,
            display: 'grid',
            gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr))',
            gap: '12px',
          }}>
            {taskQueue.agents.map((agent) => {
              const isActive = agent.agent_id in ['nova', 'flux_main'] || agent.current_task
              const bgColor = isActive ? `${theme.colors.secondary}20` : theme.colors.bgSecondary
              const borderColor = isActive ? theme.colors.secondary : theme.colors.border

              return (
                <div key={agent.agent_id} style={{
                  padding: '12px',
                  backgroundColor: bgColor,
                  border: `2px solid ${borderColor}`,
                  borderRadius: '8px',
                  textAlign: 'center',
                }}>
                  <div style={{ color: theme.colors.text, fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>
                    {agent.agent_id}
                  </div>
                  <div style={{
                    width: '8px',
                    height: '8px',
                    borderRadius: '50%',
                    backgroundColor: agent.status === 'ACTIVE' ? theme.colors.secondary : '#888',
                    margin: '8px auto',
                    boxShadow: agent.status === 'ACTIVE' ? `0 0 8px ${theme.colors.secondary}` : 'none',
                  }} />
                  {agent.current_task && (
                    <div style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, fontSize: '11px', marginTop: '4px' }}>
                      {agent.current_task}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              )
            })}
          </div>

          {/* OUTPUT COMPLETED */}
          <div style={{
            flex: 0.2,
            textAlign: 'center',
            padding: '20px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            borderRadius: '8px',
            border: `2px solid ${theme.colors.secondary}`,
          }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: '32px', marginBottom: '8px' }}>✅</div>
            <div style={{ color: theme.colors.text, fontWeight: 'bold' }}>DONE</div>
            <div style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, fontSize: '20px', marginTop: '8px' }}>
              {taskQueue.completed_count}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* TASK LIST */}
      <div style={{
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
        borderRadius: '12px',
        padding: '20px',
      }}>
        <h2 style={{ color: theme.colors.text, marginBottom: '16px' }}>📋 Queued Tasks</h2>
        <div style={{
          display: 'grid',
          gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr))',
          gap: '12px',
        }}>
          {taskQueue.queued_tasks.map((task) => (
            <div key={task.task_id} style={{
              padding: '12px',
              backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
              border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
              borderRadius: '6px',
              textAlign: 'center',
              color: theme.colors.text,
              fontSize: '12px',
            }}>
              <div style={{ fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{task.task_id}</div>
              <div style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, marginTop: '4px' }}>
                Priority: {task.priority}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import React from 'react'
import Dashboard from './views/Dashboard'
import TasksView from './views/TasksView'
import AgentsView from './views/AgentsView'
import OmniLeadsView from './views/OmniLeadsView'
import ProjectsView from './views/ProjectsView'
import SimulationView from './views/SimulationView'
import AnalyticsView from './views/AnalyticsView'

export default function Viewport({ view, health, agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const renderView = () => {
    switch (view) {
      case 'dashboard':
        return <Dashboard health={health} agents={agents} theme={theme} />
      case 'agents':
        return <AgentsView agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={setSelectedAgent} theme={theme} />
      case 'omni-leads':
        return <OmniLeadsView theme={theme} />
      case 'projects':
        return <SimulationView theme={theme} />
      case 'simulation':
        return <SimulationView theme={theme} />
      case 'analytics':
        return <AnalyticsView health={health} theme={theme} />
      default:
        return <Dashboard health={health} agents={agents} theme={theme} />
    }
  }

  return (
    <div style={{
      flex: 1,
      overflowY: 'auto',
      backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
      color: theme.colors.text,
    }}>
      {renderView()}
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
