cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENT_DATA = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', role: 'GATEWAY' },
  flux_main: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', role: 'ROUTER' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', role: 'LEAD' },
  nero: { name: 'NERO', color: '#1effaa', role: 'EXECUTOR' },
  forge: { name: 'FORGE', color: '#00aaff', role: 'BUILDER' },
}

const BOX_TYPES = {
  TASK: { color: '#3b82f6', label: 'TASK' },
  NOTE: { color: '#10b981', label: 'NOTE' },
  PROJECT: { color: '#f59e0b', label: 'PROJECT' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [activityLog, setActivityLog] = useState([])
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({
    time: 0,
    boxes: [],
    truck: { x: -100, loaded: 0 },
    agents: {},
    plane: { y: 0, phase: 0 },
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      initializeAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error:', error)
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error:', error)
    }
  }

  const initializeAnimation = () => {
    const state = stateRef.current

    // Initialize boxes from tasks
    state.boxes = taskQueue.queued_tasks.slice(0, 15).map((task, i) => ({
      id: task.task_id,
      progress: 0,
      speed: 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.2,
      type: BOX_TYPES.TASK,
      stage: 'waiting',
      x: 0,
      y: 0,
    }))

    // Initialize agents
    state.agents = {
      nova: { name: 'NOVA', pos: 0, status: 'waiting' },
      flux_main: { name: 'FLUX', pos: 0.3, status: 'idle' },
      cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', pos: 0.65, status: 'idle' },
    }

    startAnimation()
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      // Clear canvas
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // Background grid
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1
      for (let i = 0; i < w; i += 50) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(i, 0)
        ctx.lineTo(i, h)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      // === ZONE LABELS & BACKGROUNDS ===
      const zones = [
        { label: '🚚 TRUCK\nARRIVAL', x: 50, width: 120 },
        { label: '🤖 PICKUP\nSTATION', x: 200, width: 120 },
        { label: '🎢 CONVEYOR\nBELT', x: 400, width: 200 },
        { label: '📦 CONTAINER\nSTATION', x: 700, width: 140 },
        { label: '✈️ AIRPLANE\nLOADING', x: 950, width: 140 },
      ]

      zones.forEach((zone) => {
        // Zone background
        ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}15`
        ctx.fillRect(zone.x, 20, zone.width, 80)
        ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.strokeRect(zone.x, 20, zone.width, 80)

        // Zone label
        ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
        ctx.textAlign = 'center'
        ctx.fillText(zone.label, zone.x + zone.width / 2, 50)
        ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      })

      // === TRUCK ZONE ===
      drawTruck(ctx, state, w, h)

      // === BOXES FLOWING THROUGH SYSTEM ===
      drawBoxes(ctx, state, w, h)

      // === AGENTS AT STATIONS ===
      drawAgents(ctx, state, w, h)

      // === CONVEYOR BELT (curved path) ===
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, w, h)

      // === AIRPLANE ===
      drawAirplane(ctx, state, w, h)

      // === REAL-TIME ACTIVITY LOG (bottom) ===
      drawActivityPanel(ctx, w, h)

      // === STATS BAR (top right) ===
      drawStatsPanel(ctx, w, h, state)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const drawTruck = (ctx, state, w, h) => {
    const truck = state.truck
    const truckX = 80 + Math.sin(state.time * 0.5) * 20
    const truckY = 150

    // Truck body
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
    ctx.fillRect(truckX - 40, truckY - 20, 80, 40)
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#ff6b35'
    ctx.lineWidth = 2
    ctx.strokeRect(truckX - 40, truckY - 20, 80, 40)

    // Truck wheels
    for (let i of [-20, 20]) {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#333'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(truckX + i, truckY + 25, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
    }

    // Unloading boxes from truck
    const unloadPhase = (state.time * 0.3) % 3
    if (unloadPhase < 1) {
      const boxUnloadX = truckX + 20
      const boxUnloadY = truckY - 30 - unloadPhase * 20
      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
      ctx.fillRect(boxUnloadX - 8, boxUnloadY - 8, 16, 16)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText('📦', boxUnloadX, boxUnloadY + 3)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    // Truck label
    ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
    ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
    ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    ctx.fillText('Truck Arriving...', truckX, truckY + 50)
    ctx.textAlign = 'left'
  }

  const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, w, h) => {
    const startX = 420
    const startY = 200
    const endX = 700
    const endY = 240

    // Curved conveyor path (achtbaan effect)
    ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.primaryLight
    ctx.lineWidth = 3
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
    
    // Bezier curve for achtbaan effect
    const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) / 3
    const cp1y = startY - 80
    const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 2 / 3
    const cp2y = startY + 80
    
    ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
    ctx.stroke()

    // Belt support structure
    ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
    ctx.lineWidth = 1
    for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
      const t = i / 5
      const cpx1 = cp1x
      const cpy1 = cp1y
      const cpx2 = cp2x
      const cpy2 = cp2y
      
      const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cpx1 + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cpx2 + t * t * t * endX
      const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cpy1 + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cpy2 + t * t * t * endY

      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 40)
      ctx.stroke()
    }
  }

  const drawBoxes = (ctx, state, w, h) => {
    state.boxes.forEach((box) => {
      box.progress += box.speed * 0.016
      box.progress = box.progress % 2

      let x, y, stage, color

      if (box.progress < 0.15) {
        // Truck unload to pickup station
        const t = box.progress / 0.15
        x = 80 + t * 120
        y = 120 - t * 30
        stage = `Pickup [${Math.round(t * 100)}%]`
        color = '#3b82f6'
      } else if (box.progress < 0.3) {
        // At pickup station
        const t = (box.progress - 0.15) / 0.15
        x = 200 + t * 20
        y = 90 + Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 10
        stage = `Loading belt [${Math.round(t * 100)}%]`
        color = '#3b82f6'
      } else if (box.progress < 0.7) {
        // On conveyor belt (curved)
        const t = (box.progress - 0.3) / 0.4
        const startX = 420
        const startY = 200
        const endX = 700
        const endY = 240

        const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) / 3
        const cp1y = startY - 80
        const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 2 / 3
        const cp2y = startY + 80

        x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        stage = `Conveyor [${Math.round(t * 100)}%]`
        color = '#10b981'
      } else if (box.progress < 0.85) {
        // Container loading
        const t = (box.progress - 0.7) / 0.15
        x = 700 + t * 40
        y = 240 + t * 20
        stage = `Container [${Math.round(t * 100)}%]`
        color = '#f59e0b'
      } else {
        // Return loop
        const t = (box.progress - 0.85) / 0.15
        x = 740 - t * 660
        y = 260 - t * 110
        stage = `Return [${Math.round(t * 100)}%]`
        color = '#a855f7'
      }

      // Draw box
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 10, 20, 20)
      ctx.strokeStyle = color
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 10, 20, 20)

      // Box label
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(box.id.slice(-3), x, y + 4)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'

      // Stage label above box
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(stage, x, y - 20)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'

      box.x = x
      box.y = y
      box.stage = stage
    })
  }

  const drawAgents = (ctx, state, w, h) => {
    const agents = [
      { id: 'nova', name: 'NOVA', x: 200, y: 180, task: 'Pickup boxes' },
      { id: 'flux_main', name: 'FLUX', x: 630, y: 200, task: 'Monitor belt' },
      { id: 'cortexia', name: 'CORTEXIA', x: 750, y: 280, task: 'Load container' },
    ]

    agents.forEach((agent, i) => {
      const data = AGENT_DATA[agent.id]
      const bobbing = Math.sin(state.time + i) * 5

      // Agent circle
      ctx.fillStyle = data.color
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(agent.x, agent.y + bobbing, 12, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      // Glow
      ctx.strokeStyle = data.color
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(agent.x, agent.y + bobbing, 16, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      // Agent emoji
      ctx.font = 'bold 16px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText('🤖', agent.x, agent.y + bobbing + 4)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'

      // Agent label
      ctx.fillStyle = data.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agent.name, agent.x, agent.y + bobbing + 30)
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.textMuted
      ctx.font = '8px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agent.task, agent.x, agent.y + bobbing + 43)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    })
  }

  const drawAirplane = (ctx, state, w, h) => {
    const planePhase = (state.time * 0.15) % 2
    let planeX = 950
    let planeY = 180

    if (planePhase < 0.3) {
      // On ground
      planeY = 180
    } else if (planePhase < 0.7) {
      // Taking off
      const t = (planePhase - 0.3) / 0.4
      planeY = 180 - t * 100
      planeX = 950 + t * 150
    } else {
      // Landing back
      const t = (planePhase - 0.7) / 0.3
      planeY = 80 + t * 100
      planeX = 1100 - t * 150
    }

    // Airplane body
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
    ctx.fillRect(planeX - 50, planeY - 12, 100, 24)
    ctx.fillStyle = '#2d7bb8'
    ctx.fillRect(planeX - 40, planeY - 20, 80, 8)

    // Windows
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
      ctx.fillRect(planeX - 40 + i * 20, planeY - 6, 8, 8)
    }

    // Label
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
    ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'
    ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    ctx.fillText(`✈️ ${planePhase < 0.3 ? 'Loading...' : planePhase < 0.7 ? 'Departing!' : 'Landing...'}`, planeX, planeY + 35)
    ctx.textAlign = 'left'
  }

  const drawActivityPanel = (ctx, w, h) => {
    // Activity log background
    ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}22`
    ctx.fillRect(20, h - 140, w - 40, 120)
    ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
    ctx.lineWidth = 1
    ctx.strokeRect(20, h - 140, w - 40, 120)

    ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
    ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
    ctx.fillText('📋 ACTIVITY LOG', 30, h - 125)

    // Log entries
    const logs = activityLog.slice(0, 4)
    logs.forEach((log, i) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '9px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(`[${log.time}] ${log.msg}`, 30, h - 110 + i * 20)
    })
  }

  const drawStatsPanel = (ctx, w, h, state) => {
    ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.primaryLight}22`
    ctx.fillRect(w - 200, 20, 180, 100)
    ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.primaryLight
    ctx.lineWidth = 1
    ctx.strokeRect(w - 200, 20, 180, 100)

    ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.primaryLight
    ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
    ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    ctx.fillText('📊 STATS', w - 190, 40)

    ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
    ctx.font = '9px monospace'
    ctx.fillText(`Queued: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 190, 60)
    ctx.fillText(`Working: ${taskQueue?.agents.filter(a => a.current_task).length || 0}`, w - 190, 75)
    ctx.fillText(`Completed: ${taskQueue?.completed_count || 0}`, w - 190, 90)
    ctx.fillText(`Progress: ${Math.round((taskQueue?.completed_count / taskQueue?.total_tasks) * 100) || 0}%`, w - 190, 105)
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '20px' }}>
          🚚 LOGISTICS SUPPLY CHAIN SIMULATOR
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '4px 0 12px 0', fontSize: '11px' }}>
          Real-time task flow from truck → pickup → conveyor → container → airplane
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '8px 12px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '12px',
            cursor: 'pointer',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1200}
        height={600}
        style={{
          flex: 1,
          width: '100%',
          height: '100%',
          border: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
          boxSizing: 'border-box',
        }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({
    time: 0,
    boxes: [],
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      initializeAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error:', error)
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error:', error)
    }
  }

  const initializeAnimation = () => {
    const state = stateRef.current
    state.boxes = taskQueue.queued_tasks.slice(0, 10).map((task) => ({
      id: task.task_id,
      progress: Math.random(),
      speed: 0.25 + Math.random() * 0.15,
      sceneProgress: 0,
    }))
    startAnimation()
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const themeColors = theme.colors

    const drawScene1 = (progress) => {
      // SCENE 1: TRUCK PROCESS (0-0.33)
      const sceneProgress = progress / 0.33

      // Background
      ctx.fillStyle = themeColors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w / 3, h)
      ctx.strokeStyle = themeColors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, 0, w / 3, h)

      // Title indicator
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w / 3, 6)

      // TRUCK ANIMATION
      const truckX = 50 + Math.sin(state.time * 0.5) * 15
      const truckY = 120

      // Truck body
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(truckX - 35, truckY - 20, 70, 40)

      // Truck cabin
      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(truckX - 35, truckY - 28, 25, 15)

      // Wheels
      ctx.fillStyle = '#222'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(truckX - 15, truckY + 22, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(truckX + 15, truckY + 22, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Truck bed door (opening animation)
      const doorOpen = Math.sin(state.time * 0.8) * 0.3 + 0.5
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(truckX + 35, truckY + 15)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.8)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -15, 20, 30)
      ctx.restore()

      // BOXES FALLING FROM TRUCK
      const boxFallPhase = (state.time * 0.6) % 2
      if (boxFallPhase < 1) {
        const fallX = truckX + 20
        const fallY = truckY - 50 + boxFallPhase * 100
        
        // Box
        ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
        ctx.fillRect(fallX - 12, fallY - 12, 24, 24)
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.strokeRect(fallX - 12, fallY - 12, 24, 24)

        // Box pattern (lines)
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(fallX - 12, fallY)
        ctx.lineTo(fallX + 12, fallY)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(fallX, fallY - 12)
        ctx.lineTo(fallX, fallY + 12)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // AGENT PICKING UP (NOVA)
      const novaX = truckX + 50
      const novaY = 200
      const novaPickup = Math.sin(state.time * 1.2) * 0.5 + 0.5

      // Agent body
      ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff88'
      ctx.fillRect(novaX - 15, novaY - 30 - novaPickup * 20, 30, 60)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#00ff88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(novaX - 15, novaY - 30 - novaPickup * 20, 30, 60)

      // Head
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(novaX, novaY - 40 - novaPickup * 20, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      // Eyes
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(novaX - 4, novaY - 43 - novaPickup * 20, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(novaX + 4, novaY - 43 - novaPickup * 20, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Arm reaching
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#00ff88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(novaX + 15, novaY - 20 - novaPickup * 20)
      ctx.lineTo(novaX + 35, novaY - 40 - novaPickup * 20)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Glow
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#00ff88'
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.2
      ctx.lineWidth = 4
      ctx.strokeRect(novaX - 20, novaY - 35 - novaPickup * 20, 40, 65)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1
    }

    const drawScene2 = (progress) => {
      // SCENE 2: CONVEYOR PROCESS (0.33-0.66)
      const sceneProgress = (progress - 0.33) / 0.33
      const startX = w / 3
      const sceneW = w / 3

      // Background
      ctx.fillStyle = themeColors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(startX, 0, sceneW, h)
      ctx.strokeStyle = themeColors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(startX, 0, sceneW, h)

      // Title indicator
      ctx.fillStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.fillRect(startX, 0, sceneW, 6)

      // CONVEYOR BELT (curved/achtbaan)
      const beltStartX = startX + 30
      const beltStartY = 200
      const beltEndX = startX + sceneW - 30
      const beltEndY = 150

      // Belt curve (achtbaan path)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 4
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(beltStartX, beltStartY)
      
      // Create wavy/curvy belt
      for (let i = 0; i <= 1; i += 0.1) {
        const x = beltStartX + i * (beltEndX - beltStartX)
        const y = beltStartY + Math.sin(i * Math.PI * 2) * 40 + (beltEndY - beltStartY) * i
        if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        else ctx.lineTo(x, y)
      }
      ctx.stroke()

      // Belt motion lines (showing movement)
      const beltShift = (state.time * 100) % 20
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#059669'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 300; offset += 20) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(beltStartX + offset - beltShift, beltStartY - 5)
        ctx.lineTo(beltStartX + offset - beltShift, beltStartY + 5)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // BOXES ON BELT
      state.boxes.forEach((box, idx) => {
        const beltProgress = (box.progress + state.time * box.speed) % 1
        const t = beltProgress

        const x = beltStartX + t * (beltEndX - beltStartX)
        const y = beltStartY + Math.sin(t * Math.PI * 2) * 40 + (beltEndY - beltStartY) * t

        // Box
        ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
        ctx.save()
        ctx.translate(x, y)
        ctx.rotate(t * Math.PI * 4)
        ctx.fillRect(-10, -10, 20, 20)
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.strokeRect(-10, -10, 20, 20)
        ctx.restore()
      })

      // AGENT AT END (FLUX)
      const fluxX = beltEndX + 20
      const fluxY = beltEndY - 20
      const fluxReach = Math.sin(state.time * 1.5) * 0.5 + 0.5

      // Agent body
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700'
      ctx.fillRect(fluxX - 12, fluxY - 30, 24, 50)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffd700'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(fluxX - 12, fluxY - 30, 24, 50)

      // Head
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(fluxX, fluxY - 35, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      // Eyes (star pattern)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd700'
      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText('✦', fluxX, fluxY - 36)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'

      // Arms reaching up
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffd700'
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(fluxX - 12, fluxY - 10)
      ctx.lineTo(fluxX - 25, fluxY - 30 - fluxReach * 20)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Glow
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffd700'
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.2
      ctx.lineWidth = 4
      ctx.strokeRect(fluxX - 18, fluxY - 35, 36, 55)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1
    }

    const drawScene3 = (progress) => {
      // SCENE 3: AIRPLANE PROCESS (0.66-1.0)
      const sceneProgress = (progress - 0.66) / 0.34
      const startX = (w / 3) * 2
      const sceneW = w / 3

      // Background
      ctx.fillStyle = themeColors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(startX, 0, sceneW, h)
      ctx.strokeStyle = themeColors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(startX, 0, sceneW, h)

      // Title indicator
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(startX, 0, sceneW, 6)

      // CONTAINER
      const containerX = startX + 40
      const containerY = 150

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4c5aa0'
      ctx.fillRect(containerX, containerY, 50, 60)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(containerX, containerY, 50, 60)

      // Container grilles
      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(containerX + 10, containerY + i * 20 + 10)
        ctx.lineTo(containerX + 40, containerY + i * 20 + 10)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // AGENT PUSHING CONTAINER (CORTEXIA)
      const cortexiaX = containerX - 30
      const cortexiaY = containerY + 30
      const pushForce = Math.sin(state.time * 1.2) * 10

      // Agent body (bent forward)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#00d4ff'
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(cortexiaX, cortexiaY)
      ctx.rotate(0.3 + pushForce * 0.01)
      ctx.fillRect(-12, -25, 24, 50)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#00d4ff'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(-12, -25, 24, 50)
      ctx.restore()

      // Head
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(cortexiaX - 10, cortexiaY - 30, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#00d4ff'
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      // AIRPLANE
      const planePhase = (state.time * 0.15) % 2
      let planeX = startX + 120
      let planeY = 100
      let planeScale = 1

      if (planePhase < 0.3) {
        // On ground
        planeY = 100
        planeScale = 1
      } else if (planePhase < 0.7) {
        // Taking off
        const t = (planePhase - 0.3) / 0.4
        planeY = 100 - t * 80
        planeX = startX + 120 + t * 50
        planeScale = 0.7 + t * 0.3
      } else {
        // Landing
        const t = (planePhase - 0.7) / 0.3
        planeY = 20 + t * 80
        planeX = startX + 170 - t * 50
        planeScale = 1 - t * 0.3
      }

      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(planeX, planeY)
      ctx.scale(planeScale, planeScale)

      // Fuselage
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(-30, -8, 60, 16)

      // Wings
      ctx.fillRect(-45, -4, 90, 8)

      // Tail
      ctx.fillRect(-30, -15, 6, 30)

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(-20 + i * 12, 0, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      ctx.restore()

      // LOADING CONTAINERS (multiple loaders animation)
      const loaders = [0, 1, 2]
      loaders.forEach((idx) => {
        const loaderX = containerX + 60 + idx * 25
        const loaderY = containerY + 30
        const loadAnimation = Math.sin(state.time * 1.5 + idx) * 0.5 + 0.5

        ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
        ctx.fillRect(loaderX - 8, loaderY - 20 - loadAnimation * 15, 16, 30)
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ff6b35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1
        ctx.strokeRect(loaderX - 8, loaderY - 20 - loadAnimation * 15, 16, 30)

        // Head
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(loaderX, loaderY - 25 - loadAnimation * 15, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      })

      // Glow effect for active zone
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.15
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.strokeRect(startX + 10, 20, sceneW - 20, h - 40)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      // Cycle through all 3 scenes
      const cycleProgress = (state.time * 0.15) % 1

      drawScene1(cycleProgress)
      drawScene2(cycleProgress)
      drawScene3(cycleProgress)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '18px' }}>
          📦 SUPPLY CHAIN VISUALIZATION
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '4px 0 12px 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
          Left: Truck incoming | Center: Conveyor Belt | Right: Airplane Loading
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '8px 12px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '12px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1500}
        height={600}
        style={{
          flex: 1,
          width: '100%',
          height: 'auto',
          display: 'block',
        }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

Dit is nu KRISTALHELDER! Laat me tekenen wat jij bedoelt:

SCENE 1: TRUCK PROCESS
├─ IMPORT (Truck arrives)
│  ├─ Truck rijdt in beeld
│  ├─ Stopt
│  ├─ Klep opent
│  └─ Doos valt eruit
│
├─ AGENT JOURNEY (NOVA volgt compleet)
│  ├─ Agent loopt naar truck
│  ├─ Pakt doos op
│  ├─ Loopt naar conveyor belt
│  └─ Zet doos op band → VERDWIJNT
│
└─ EXPORT (Truck leaves)
   ├─ Truck rijdt weg
   └─ Weg uit beeld

SCENE 2: CONVEYOR PROCESS
├─ IMPORT (Doos van Agent)
│  └─ Doos komt op band (van scene 1)
│
├─ MOTION (Band beweegt)
│  ├─ Doos gaat over achtbaan
│  ├─ Agent (FLUX) wacht aan einde
│  └─ Doos bereikt einde
│
└─ EXPORT (Naar container)
   ├─ Agent pakt doos
   ├─ Zet in container
   └─ Agent loopt naar scene 3 → VERDWIJNT

SCENE 3: AIRPLANE PROCESS
├─ IMPORT (Container van belt)
│  ├─ Container staat klaar
│  └─ Loaders wachten
│
├─ LOADING (Agents werken)
│  ├─ Agent (CORTEXIA) duwt container
│  ├─ Loaders laden vliegtuig
│  ├─ Vliegtuig sluit
│  └─ Agents gaan weg → VERDWIJNEN
│
├─ DEPARTURE (Vliegtuig stijgt op)
│  ├─ Start motoren
│  ├─ Taxiing
│  └─ Takeoff → VLIEGT WEG
│
└─ RETURN CYCLE (Omgekeerde proces)
   ├─ Vliegtuig keert terug
   ├─ Landt
   ├─ Container uit
   ├─ Terug naar conveyor
   └─ Terug naar truck → RESTART

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({
    time: 0,
    boxes: [],
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      initializeAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const initializeAnimation = () => {
    const state = stateRef.current
    state.boxes = taskQueue.queued_tasks.slice(0, 8).map((task, i) => ({
      id: task.task_id,
      cycleStart: (i / 8) * 10, // Stagger boxes in cycle
    }))
    startAnimation()
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const themeColors = theme.colors
    const sceneW = w / 3
    const sceneH = h

    const drawTruckScene = (cyclePos) => {
      const x = 0
      const y = 0

      // Scene background
      ctx.fillStyle = themeColors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(x, y, sceneW, sceneH)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(x + 2, y + 2, sceneW - 4, sceneH - 4)

      // TRUCK IMPORT
      const truckPhase = cyclePos % 1

      // Truck animation: arrive → stop → open → wait → close → leave
      let truckX, truckState
      if (truckPhase < 0.15) {
        // Arriving
        truckX = x + (truckPhase / 0.15) * 80
        truckState = 'arriving'
      } else if (truckPhase < 0.25) {
        // Stopped
        truckX = x + 80
        truckState = 'stopped'
      } else if (truckPhase < 0.35) {
        // Opening door
        truckX = x + 80
        truckState = 'opening'
      } else if (truckPhase < 0.75) {
        // Door open, unloading
        truckX = x + 80
        truckState = 'unloading'
      } else if (truckPhase < 0.85) {
        // Closing door
        truckX = x + 80
        truckState = 'closing'
      } else {
        // Leaving
        truckX = x + 80 + (truckPhase - 0.85) / 0.15 * 100
        truckState = 'leaving'
      }

      // Draw truck
      drawTruck(ctx, truckX, 200, truckState)

      // AGENT NOVA - complete journey
      const novaPhase = cyclePos % 1
      
      if (novaPhase >= 0.2 && novaPhase < 0.95) {
        // Nova is active in this scene
        const novaActivePhase = (novaPhase - 0.2) / 0.75

        let novaX, novaY, novaAction

        if (novaActivePhase < 0.2) {
          // Walking to truck
          novaX = x + 200 + novaActivePhase / 0.2 * (-100)
          novaY = 350
          novaAction = 'walking'
        } else if (novaActivePhase < 0.35) {
          // Picking up box
          novaX = x + 100
          novaY = 280
          novaAction = 'picking'
        } else if (novaActivePhase < 0.75) {
          // Walking to conveyor
          const walkPhase = (novaActivePhase - 0.35) / 0.4
          novaX = x + 100 + walkPhase * (sceneW - 100)
          novaY = 320 - walkPhase * 60
          novaAction = 'walking'
        } else {
          // At conveyor, setting down box
          novaX = x + sceneW - 40
          novaY = 280
          novaAction = 'placing'
        }

        drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', novaAction)
      }

      // BOX at truck
      if (truckPhase >= 0.25 && truckPhase < 0.95) {
        const novaPhase = cyclePos % 1
        
        if (novaPhase >= 0.2 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
          // Box being carried by Nova
          const walkPhase = (novaPhase - 0.35) / 0.4
          if (novaPhase >= 0.35 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            const boxX = 100 + walkPhase * (sceneW - 100)
            const boxY = 250 - walkPhase * 60
            drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY)
          }
        } else if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.35) {
          // Box at truck
          drawBox(ctx, 100, 250)
        }
      }
    }

    const drawConveyorScene = (cyclePos) => {
      const x = sceneW
      const y = 0

      // Scene background
      ctx.fillStyle = themeColors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(x, y, sceneW, sceneH)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(x + 2, y + 2, sceneW - 4, sceneH - 4)

      // CONVEYOR BELT
      const beltY = 220
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, x + 40, beltY, x + sceneW - 40, beltY)

      // BOX on belt
      const novaPhase = cyclePos % 1
      if (novaPhase >= 0.7 && novaPhase < 1) {
        const beltPhase = (novaPhase - 0.7) / 0.3
        const boxX = x + 40 + beltPhase * (sceneW - 80)
        const boxY = beltY - 20
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY)
      }

      // AGENT FLUX - at end of belt
      if (novaPhase >= 0.75 && novaPhase < 1) {
        const fluxPhase = (novaPhase - 0.75) / 0.25
        drawAgent(ctx, x + sceneW - 60, 280 + fluxPhase * 20, '#ffd700', 'waiting')
      }
    }

    const drawAirplaneScene = (cyclePos) => {
      const x = sceneW * 2
      const y = 0

      // Scene background
      ctx.fillStyle = themeColors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(x, y, sceneW, sceneH)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(x + 2, y + 2, sceneW - 4, sceneH - 4)

      // AIRPLANE CYCLE
      const planePhase = cyclePos % 1

      let planeX, planeY, planeState
      if (planePhase < 0.05) {
        // On ground waiting
        planeX = x + 100
        planeY = 150
        planeState = 'waiting'
      } else if (planePhase < 0.15) {
        // Loading
        planeX = x + 100
        planeY = 150
        planeState = 'loading'
      } else if (planePhase < 0.3) {
        // Starting engines
        planeX = x + 100
        planeY = 150
        planeState = 'preparing'
      } else if (planePhase < 0.5) {
        // Taking off
        const takeoffPhase = (planePhase - 0.3) / 0.2
        planeX = x + 100 + takeoffPhase * 80
        planeY = 150 - takeoffPhase * 120
        planeState = 'takeoff'
      } else if (planePhase < 0.8) {
        // Flying away
        const flyPhase = (planePhase - 0.5) / 0.3
        planeX = x + 180 + flyPhase * 100
        planeY = 30 - flyPhase * 30
        planeState = 'flying'
      } else {
        // Returning
        const returnPhase = (planePhase - 0.8) / 0.2
        planeX = x + 280 - returnPhase * 180
        planeY = 0 + returnPhase * 150
        planeState = 'landing'
      }

      drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, planeState)

      // LOADING AGENTS (multiple)
      if (planePhase >= 0.05 && planePhase < 0.3) {
        drawAgent(ctx, x + 50, 220, '#ff6b35', 'loading')
        drawAgent(ctx, x + 90, 220, '#ff6b35', 'loading')
      }

      // Container
      if (planePhase < 0.5) {
        drawContainer(ctx, x + 100, 200)
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const cyclePos = (state.time * 0.5) % 1 // Slow cycle

      drawTruckScene(cyclePos)
      drawConveyorScene(cyclePos)
      drawAirplaneScene(cyclePos)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  // Helper drawing functions
  const drawBox = (ctx, x, y) => {
    ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
    ctx.fillRect(x - 15, y - 15, 30, 30)
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb'
    ctx.lineWidth = 2
    ctx.strokeRect(x - 15, y - 15, 30, 30)
    
    // Box pattern
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb'
    ctx.lineWidth = 1
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(x - 15, y)
    ctx.lineTo(x + 15, y)
    ctx.stroke()
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(x, y - 15)
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + 15)
    ctx.stroke()
  }

  const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, action) => {
    // Body
    ctx.fillStyle = color
    ctx.fillRect(x - 12, y - 30, 24, 50)
    ctx.strokeStyle = color
    ctx.lineWidth = 2
    ctx.strokeRect(x - 12, y - 30, 24, 50)

    // Head
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(x, y - 35, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fill()
    ctx.stroke()

    // Glow
    ctx.strokeStyle = color
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.2
    ctx.lineWidth = 4
    ctx.strokeRect(x - 16, y - 36, 32, 56)
    ctx.globalAlpha = 1
  }

  const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, state) => {
    // Truck body
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
    ctx.fillRect(x - 40, y - 20, 80, 40)
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#ff6b35'
    ctx.lineWidth = 2
    ctx.strokeRect(x - 40, y - 20, 80, 40)

    // Cabin
    ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
    ctx.fillRect(x - 40, y - 30, 20, 15)

    // Wheels
    ctx.fillStyle = '#222'
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(x - 15, y + 22, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fill()
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(x + 15, y + 22, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fill()

    // Door
    const doorAngle = state === 'opening' || state === 'unloading' || state === 'closing' ? 0.6 : 0
    ctx.save()
    ctx.translate(x + 40, y + 10)
    ctx.rotate(doorAngle)
    ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
    ctx.fillRect(0, -15, 20, 30)
    ctx.restore()
  }

  const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2) => {
    // Belt line
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
    ctx.lineWidth = 4
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(x1, y1)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo((x1 + x2) / 2, y1 - 60, x2, y2)
    ctx.stroke()

    // Motion lines
    const beltShift = (stateRef.current.time * 50) % 30
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#059669'
    ctx.lineWidth = 1
    for (let offset = 0; offset < 200; offset += 30) {
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x1 + offset - beltShift, y1 - 8)
      ctx.lineTo(x1 + offset - beltShift, y1 + 8)
      ctx.stroke()
    }
  }

  const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, state) => {
    ctx.save()
    ctx.translate(x, y)

    // Fuselage
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
    ctx.fillRect(-40, -8, 80, 16)

    // Wings
    ctx.fillRect(-60, -4, 120, 8)

    // Tail
    ctx.fillRect(-40, -15, 8, 30)

    // Windows
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(-30 + i * 14, 0, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
    }

    ctx.restore()
  }

  const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y) => {
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4c5aa0'
    ctx.fillRect(x - 30, y - 35, 60, 70)
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
    ctx.lineWidth = 2
    ctx.strokeRect(x - 30, y - 35, 60, 70)
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '18px' }}>
          📦 SUPPLY CHAIN PROCESS FLOW
        </h1>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            marginTop: '10px',
            padding: '8px 12px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '12px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1500}
        height={600}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

// Beautiful agent designs
const AGENTS = {
  nova: {
    name: 'NOVA',
    color: '#00ff88',
    darkColor: '#00cc66',
    glowColor: 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.5)',
    role: 'GATEWAY',
    emoji: '🟢'
  },
  flux: {
    name: 'FLUX',
    color: '#ffd700',
    darkColor: '#ccaa00',
    glowColor: 'rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.5)',
    role: 'ROUTER',
    emoji: '⭐'
  },
  cortexia: {
    name: 'CORTEXIA',
    color: '#00d4ff',
    darkColor: '#00aacc',
    glowColor: 'rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.5)',
    role: 'LEAD',
    emoji: '🔷'
  }
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0, boxes: [] })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      initializeAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const initializeAnimation = () => {
    const state = stateRef.current
    state.boxes = taskQueue.queued_tasks.slice(0, 4).map((task, i) => ({
      id: task.task_id,
      cycleStart: (i / 4) * 50, // Stagger
    }))
    startAnimation()
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    // Drawing helpers
    const drawBeautifulAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData, action = 'standing') => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 50, 20, 8, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Body gradient
      const bodyGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 15, y - 35, x + 15, y - 35)
      bodyGradient.addColorStop(0, agentData.darkColor)
      bodyGradient.addColorStop(0.5, agentData.color)
      bodyGradient.addColorStop(1, agentData.darkColor)
      ctx.fillStyle = bodyGradient
      ctx.fillRect(x - 15, y - 35, 30, 55)

      // Body outline
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 15, y - 35, 30, 55)

      // Head with gradient
      const headGradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(x, y - 45, 0, x, y - 45, 12)
      headGradient.addColorStop(0, agentData.color)
      headGradient.addColorStop(1, agentData.darkColor)
      ctx.fillStyle = headGradient
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 45, 12, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.stroke()

      // Eyes
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 5, y - 47, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 5, y - 47, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Glow effect
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.glowColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 20, y - 40, 40, 60)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      // Name label above
      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 65)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBeautifulBox = (ctx, x, y, taskId) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.15)'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 18, y - 18, 36, 36)

      // Box gradient
      const boxGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 18, y - 18, x + 18, y + 18)
      boxGradient.addColorStop(0, '#5b9bff')
      boxGradient.addColorStop(0.5, '#3b82f6')
      boxGradient.addColorStop(1, '#1e40af')
      ctx.fillStyle = boxGradient
      ctx.fillRect(x - 18, y - 18, 36, 36)

      // Box outline
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e40af'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 18, y - 18, 36, 36)

      // Cardboard lines
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x - 18, y)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 18, y)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 18)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 18)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Task ID label (LARGE!)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(taskId, x, y + 5)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      // Truck body
      const truckGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 45, y - 25, x + 45, y - 25)
      truckGrad.addColorStop(0, '#ff7744')
      truckGrad.addColorStop(1, '#ff6b35')
      ctx.fillStyle = truckGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 45, y - 25, 90, 50)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 45, y - 25, 90, 50)

      // Cabin
      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 45, y - 35, 25, 20)

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 42, y - 32, 8, 8)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 32, y - 32, 8, 8)

      // Wheels
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 20, y + 28, 9, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 20, y + 28, 9, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Door
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 45, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -20, 25, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -20, 25, 40)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      // Belt curve (smooth achtbaan)
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 80
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 80

      // Belt surface
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 6
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Motion effect - moving lines
      const beltShift = (state.time * 80) % 40
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#059669'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 500; offset += 40) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(startX + offset - beltShift, startY - 15)
        ctx.lineTo(startX + offset - beltShift + 10, startY + 15)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // Belt supports
      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d5f42'
        ctx.lineWidth = 3
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 50)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawBeautifulAirplane = (ctx, x, y, state = 'ground') => {
      // Airplane with landing gear
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x, y)

      // Fuselage
      const fuselageGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(-50, -10, 50, 10)
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(0, '#5eb3ff')
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#4a9eff')
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(1, '#2d7bb8')
      ctx.fillStyle = fuselageGrad
      ctx.fillRect(-50, -10, 100, 20)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(-50, -10, 100, 20)

      // Wings
      ctx.fillRect(-70, -5, 140, 10)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Tail
      ctx.fillRect(-50, -18, 10, 36)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(-40 + i * 16, 0, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Landing gear (if on ground)
      if (state === 'ground' || state === 'loading') {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(-20, 10)
        ctx.lineTo(-20, 25)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(20, 10)
        ctx.lineTo(20, 25)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y) => {
      // Container with gradient
      const contGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 35, y - 40, x + 35, y + 40)
      contGrad.addColorStop(0, '#5a6db3')
      contGrad.addColorStop(1, '#3d4a7f')
      ctx.fillStyle = contGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 40, 70, 80)

      // Container outline
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#7a8dc4'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 35, y - 40, 70, 80)

      // Door seam
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#6b7db4'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 40)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 40)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Ventilation holes
      for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a3a5f'
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 20, y - 30 + i * 20, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x + 20, y - 30 + i * 20, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    // MAIN ANIMATION LOOP
    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      // SLOW cycle: 60 seconds per full cycle
      const cycleTime = 60
      const globalProgress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      // Clear canvas
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // Gradient background
      const bgGradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGradient.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGradient.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGradient
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // ===== SCENE 1: TRUCK (0-0.25) =====
      if (true) {
        const sceneX = 50
        const sceneY = 150

        // Scene label
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
        ctx.font = 'bold 14px monospace'
        ctx.fillText('TRUCK PROCESS', sceneX, 30)

        // Truck phase: 0-0.25
        const truckPhase = globalProgress

        // Truck arrival (0-0.1)
        let truckX = sceneX
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckVisible = true

        if (truckPhase < 0.08) {
          // Arriving
          truckX = sceneX - 150 + (truckPhase / 0.08) * 150
        } else if (truckPhase < 0.15) {
          // Stopped, door opening
          truckX = sceneX
          doorOpen = (truckPhase - 0.08) / 0.07
        } else if (truckPhase < 0.25) {
          // Leaving
          truckX = sceneX + ((truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.1) * 150
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, sceneY, doorOpen)

        // AGENT NOVA journey in truck scene
        if (truckPhase >= 0.1 && truckPhase < 0.25) {
          const novaPhase = (truckPhase - 0.1) / 0.15

          let novaX, novaY

          if (novaPhase < 0.3) {
            // Walking to truck
            novaX = sceneX - 100 + novaPhase / 0.3 * 100
            novaY = sceneY + 80
          } else if (novaPhase < 0.6) {
            // Picking up box
            novaX = sceneX + 20
            novaY = sceneY + 40
          } else {
            // Walking to conveyor
            novaX = sceneX + 20 + (novaPhase - 0.6) / 0.4 * 300
            novaY = sceneY + 40 - (novaPhase - 0.6) / 0.4 * 40
          }

          drawBeautifulAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova, 'walking')

          // Box in truck or being carried
          if (novaPhase >= 0.3 && novaPhase < 0.6) {
            drawBeautifulBox(ctx, sceneX + 40, sceneY + 20, 'BOX-001')
          } else if (novaPhase >= 0.6) {
            const boxX = sceneX + 40 + (novaPhase - 0.6) / 0.4 * 300
            const boxY = sceneY + 20 - (novaPhase - 0.6) / 0.4 * 40
            drawBeautifulBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX-001')
          }
        }

        // Box at truck entrance
        if (truckPhase >= 0.15 && truckPhase < 0.1) {
          drawBeautifulBox(ctx, sceneX + 40, sceneY + 20, 'BOX-001')
        }
      }

      // ===== SCENE 2: CONVEYOR BELT (0.2-0.5) =====
      if (true) {
        const sceneX = w / 2 - 100
        const sceneY = 150

        // Scene label
        ctx.fillStyle = '#10b981'
        ctx.font = 'bold 14px monospace'
        ctx.fillText('CONVEYOR PROCESS', sceneX, 30)

        // Belt
        drawConveyorBelt(ctx, sceneX, sceneY, sceneX + 300, sceneY - 30)

        // Box on belt (0.25-0.5)
        const beltPhase = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (globalProgress - 0.2) / 0.3))
        if (beltPhase > 0) {
          const beltX = sceneX + beltPhase * 300
          const beltY = sceneY + Math.sin(beltPhase * Math.PI * 2) * 40 - 30 * beltPhase
          drawBeautifulBox(ctx, beltX, beltY, 'BOX-001')
        }

        // AGENT FLUX at end of belt
        if (globalProgress >= 0.35 && globalProgress < 0.5) {
          const fluxPhase = (globalProgress - 0.35) / 0.15
          let fluxX = sceneX + 300 + 50
          let fluxY = sceneY - 30 + 80

          if (fluxPhase < 0.7) {
            fluxY = sceneY - 30 + 80
          }

          drawBeautifulAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux, 'waiting')
        }
      }

      // ===== SCENE 3: AIRPLANE (0.45-1.0) =====
      if (true) {
        const sceneX = w - 200
        const sceneY = 150

        // Scene label
        ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
        ctx.font = 'bold 14px monospace'
        ctx.fillText('AIRPLANE PROCESS', sceneX, 30)

        // Container
        if (globalProgress >= 0.45 && globalProgress < 0.95) {
          drawContainer(ctx, sceneX - 100, sceneY + 80)
        }

        // Airplane cycle
        const airPhase = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (globalProgress - 0.45) / 0.55))

        let planeX = sceneX + 100
        let planeY = sceneY
        let planeState = 'ground'

        if (airPhase < 0.15) {
          // On ground, loading
          planeState = 'loading'
        } else if (airPhase < 0.3) {
          // Preparing
          planeState = 'ground'
        } else if (airPhase < 0.5) {
          // Taking off
          const takeoff = (airPhase - 0.3) / 0.2
          planeY = sceneY - takeoff * 200
          planeX = sceneX + 100 + takeoff * 100
          planeState = 'flying'
        } else if (airPhase < 0.75) {
          // Flying away
          const flying = (airPhase - 0.5) / 0.25
          planeY = sceneY - 200 - flying * 50
          planeX = sceneX + 200 + flying * 200
          planeState = 'flying'
        } else {
          // RETURN - Landing
          const landing = (airPhase - 0.75) / 0.25
          planeY = sceneY - 250 + landing * 250
          planeX = sceneX + 400 - landing * 300
          planeState = 'landing'
        }

        drawBeautifulAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, planeState)

        // AGENT CORTEXIA loading
        if (globalProgress >= 0.45 && globalProgress < 0.65) {
          const cortPhase = (globalProgress - 0.45) / 0.2
          drawBeautifulAgent(ctx, sceneX - 150, sceneY + 100, AGENTS.cortexia, 'loading')
        }

        // Loaders
        if (globalProgress >= 0.48 && globalProgress < 0.65) {
          ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
          ctx.font = '14px monospace'
          ctx.textAlign = 'center'
          ctx.fillText('👷 👷', sceneX + 80, sceneY + 140)
          ctx.textAlign = 'left'
        }
      }

      // Stats panel
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 250, h - 100, 230, 90)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 250, h - 100, 230, 90)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📊 CYCLE PROGRESS', w - 240, h - 80)

      const progressPercent = Math.round(globalProgress * 100)
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(`${progressPercent}%`, w - 240, h - 60)
      ctx.fillText(`Queued: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 240, h - 40)
      ctx.fillText(`Completed: ${taskQueue?.completed_count || 0}`, w - 240, h - 20)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '18px' }}>
          📦 BEAUTIFUL SUPPLY CHAIN FLOW
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '4px 0 12px 0', fontSize: '11px' }}>
          Slow, cinematic visualization • Watch agents complete their journeys
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '8px 12px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '12px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={500}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

DIT MOET CINEMA-KWALITEIT ZIJN! ZEG WAT JE ZIET! 🚀

You said: deel vrachtwagen
deel vrachtwagen 
vrachtwagen komt aan en moet de doos uit zijn vrachtwagen laten zakken en rijd weer uit beeld en doos blijft achter op de grond! Agent komt en pakt doos van de grond. Agent loopt met doos naar de begin van de converyor belt en laat de doos op de belt achter en loopt uit beeld. doos gaat over de belt en aan het einde van de belt gaat de doos in een container en agent komt in beeld en rijd met container naar de vliegtuig toe en laad de doos uit de container en zet het in het vliegtuig en verdwijnt met container uit beeld. het vliegtuig stijgt op en vliegt uit beeld. dat was de export gedeelte. daaronder zie je het import gedeelte vliegtuig komt aan en agent komt met container en laad doos in container en loopt met container naar de conveyor belt doos gaat uit container en op de belt agent verdwijnt uit beeld. de doos gaat over de belt en komt aan het einde en daar komt agent in beeld om doos op te pakken en loopt met doos naar de vrachtauto en zet doos op de grond en verdwijnt  uitbeeld vrachtauto pakt doos en rijd uit beeld. agent hebben aan het begin en tm einde de zelfde kleur en naam. zowel de begin process truck als het begin process vliegtuig moet te volgen zijn uiteraad kan een agent niet zowel bezig zijn met vlietuig inladen en truck inladen. de conveyorbelt gaat snel en verder zie je niet alle 3 de processen dus truck conveyor en vliegtuig gedeelte. de container is een onderdeel dat bij de conveyor belt hoort aan het eind als het begint process binnekomnde truck is en aan het einde als truck vertrekende truck is. met de cameras moet je kunnen spelen door een process bv alleen helemaal te zien of iets. maak het veel mooier de agents het process de truck de conveyor belt hoe de dozen over de belt gaan en het het vliegtuig het geheel
