bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66', glowColor: 'rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.5)' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00', glowColor: 'rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.5)' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc', glowColor: 'rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.5)' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [zoomMode, setZoomMode] = useState(null) // null, 'truck', 'belt', 'plane'
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue, zoomMode])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    // ===== DRAWING HELPERS =====
    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData, isWalking = false, direction = 1) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.25)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 45, 18, 7, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Body
      const bodyGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 14, y - 32, x + 14, y + 18)
      bodyGrad.addColorStop(0, agentData.darkColor)
      bodyGrad.addColorStop(0.5, agentData.color)
      bodyGrad.addColorStop(1, agentData.darkColor)
      ctx.fillStyle = bodyGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 14, y - 32, 28, 50)

      // Body outline
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 14, y - 32, 28, 50)

      // Head
      const headGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(x, y - 42, 0, x, y - 42, 11)
      headGrad.addColorStop(0, agentData.color)
      headGrad.addColorStop(1, agentData.darkColor)
      ctx.fillStyle = headGrad
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 42, 11, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.stroke()

      // Eyes
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 4, y - 44, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 4, y - 44, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Smile
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#000'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 42, 4, 0, Math.PI, false)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Arms (animated if walking)
      if (isWalking) {
        const armSwing = Math.sin(state.time * 3) * 0.4
        ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.color
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 14, y - 10)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 25, y - 15 + armSwing * 10)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 14, y - 10)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 25, y - 15 - armSwing * 10)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // Glow
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.glowColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.35
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 18, y - 37, 36, 55)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      // Name tag
      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 58)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxId) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 16, y - 16, 32, 32)

      // Box gradient
      const boxGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 16, y - 16, x + 16, y + 16)
      boxGrad.addColorStop(0, '#6ba3ff')
      boxGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#3b82f6')
      boxGrad.addColorStop(1, '#1e40af')
      ctx.fillStyle = boxGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 16, y - 16, 32, 32)

      // Box outline with depth
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f2456'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 16, y - 16, 32, 32)

      // 3D depth effect
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x + 16, y - 16)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 20, y - 12)
      ctx.moveTo(x + 16, y + 16)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 20, y + 20)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Cardboard lines
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x - 16, y)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 16, y)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 16)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 16)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Task ID
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxId, x, y + 4)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      // Truck body
      const truckGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 50, y - 28, x + 50, y + 22)
      truckGrad.addColorStop(0, '#ff8855')
      truckGrad.addColorStop(1, '#ff6b35')
      ctx.fillStyle = truckGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y - 28, 100, 50)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 50, y - 28, 100, 50)

      // Cabin
      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y - 38, 28, 22)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#aa3a19'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 50, y - 38, 28, 22)

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#5eb3ff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 46, y - 34, 10, 10)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 34, y - 34, 10, 10)

      // Wheels
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      for (let wheel of [-20, 20]) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x + wheel, y + 28, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // Door (animated opening/closing)
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 50, y + 10)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -20, 28, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -20, 28, 40)
      ctx.restore()

      // Door handle
      if (doorOpen > 0) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#666'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x + 50 + doorOpen * 15, y + 10, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      // Belt curve (smooth achtbaan)
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.35
      const cp1y = startY - 90
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.65
      const cp2y = startY + 90

      // Belt surface with gradient
      const beltGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(startX, startY - 10, endX, endY + 10)
      beltGrad.addColorStop(0, '#1d9a6f')
      beltGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#10b981')
      beltGrad.addColorStop(1, '#059669')

      // Draw belt as thick curve
      ctx.strokeStyle = beltGrad
      ctx.lineWidth = 10
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.lineJoin = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Motion effect - moving dots
      const beltShift = (state.time * 120) % 50
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0d5f42'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 600; offset += 50) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 600) / 600
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Belt supports
      for (let i = 0; i <= 6; i++) {
        const t = i / 6
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d4a35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 4
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 60)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y, boxInside = false) => {
      // Container body with gradient
      const contGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 40, y - 45, x + 40, y + 45)
      contGrad.addColorStop(0, '#6b7db4')
      contGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#4c5aa0')
      contGrad.addColorStop(1, '#3d4a7f')
      ctx.fillStyle = contGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 40, y - 45, 80, 90)

      // Container outline
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a3a5f'
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 40, y - 45, 80, 90)

      // Door seam
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 45)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 45)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Ventilation
      for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a3a5f'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 30 + i * 18, 4, 6)
        ctx.fillRect(x + 31, y - 30 + i * 18, 4, 6)
      }

      // Box inside if applicable
      if (boxInside) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4)'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 30, y - 30, 60, 60)
      }
    }

    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, state = 'ground') => {
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x, y)

      // Fuselage
      const fuselageGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(-55, -12, 55, 12)
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(0, '#6eb5ff')
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#4a9eff')
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(1, '#2d7bb8')
      ctx.fillStyle = fuselageGrad
      ctx.fillRect(-55, -12, 110, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(-55, -12, 110, 24)

      // Wings
      ctx.fillRect(-80, -6, 160, 12)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Tail fin
      ctx.fillRect(-55, -20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(-45 + i * 15, 0, 3.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Landing gear if on ground
      if (state === 'ground' || state === 'loading') {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#555'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(-25, 12)
        ctx.lineTo(-25, 30)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(25, 12)
        ctx.lineTo(25, 30)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // Engine glow if flying
      if (state === 'flying' || state === 'landing') {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 0, 0.6)'
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(-55, 0, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(55, 0, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      ctx.restore()
    }

    // ===== MAIN ANIMATION =====
    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      // Slow 120-second cycle
      const cycleTime = 120
      const globalProgress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      // Clear
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // Gradient background
      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      if (zoomMode) {
        drawZoomedView(ctx, w, h, globalProgress, zoomMode)
      } else {
        drawFullView(ctx, w, h, globalProgress)
      }

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    const drawFullView = (ctx, w, h, progress) => {
      // ===== TOP HALF: EXPORT CYCLE =====
      const topY = 100

      // Title
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 16px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT CYCLE', 20, 25)

      // Truck phase (0-0.15)
      const truckPhase = progress
      let truckX = 80
      let doorOpen = 0
      let boxAtTruck = false

      if (truckPhase < 0.05) {
        truckX = 80 - (0.05 - truckPhase) / 0.05 * 120
      } else if (truckPhase < 0.1) {
        truckX = 80
        doorOpen = (truckPhase - 0.05) / 0.05
        boxAtTruck = true
      } else if (truckPhase < 0.15) {
        truckX = 80 + (truckPhase - 0.1) / 0.05 * 120
      }

      drawTruck(ctx, truckX, topY, doorOpen)

      // Box from truck
      if (boxAtTruck && truckPhase < 0.12) {
        drawBox(ctx, truckX + 40, topY - 50, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-2) || 'T1')
      }

      // AGENT NOVA - export journey
      if (truckPhase >= 0.08 && truckPhase < 0.4) {
        const novaPhase = (truckPhase - 0.08) / 0.32

        let novaX, novaY, isWalking = true

        if (novaPhase < 0.15) {
          // Walk to truck
          novaX = 250 + novaPhase / 0.15 * (-150)
          novaY = topY + 60
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          // Pick up box
          novaX = 100
          novaY = topY + 20
          isWalking = false
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.85) {
          // Walk to belt
          const walkDist = novaPhase - 0.25
          novaX = 100 + walkDist / 0.6 * 450
          novaY = topY + 20 - walkDist / 0.6 * 30
          isWalking = true
        } else {
          // Disappear
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova, isWalking)
        }

        // Box with nova
        if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.85) {
          const boxX = novaX + 30
          const boxY = novaY - 50
          drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-2) || 'T1')
        }
      }

      // CONVEYOR BELT
      const beltStartX = 600
      const beltStartY = topY
      const beltEndX = 1150
      const beltEndY = topY - 40

      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, beltStartY, beltEndX, beltEndY)

      // Box on belt (0.35-0.65)
      if (progress >= 0.3 && progress < 0.65) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.3) / 0.35
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.35
        const cp1y = beltStartY - 90
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.65
        const cp2y = beltStartY + 90

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * beltEndY

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-2) || 'T1')
      }

      // Container at belt end
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 1) {
        const containerX = beltEndX + 60
        const containerY = beltEndY + 50
        const boxInsideContainer = progress >= 0.63

        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, containerY, boxInsideContainer)

        // AGENT FLUX - container management
        if (progress >= 0.6 && progress < 0.95) {
          const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.6) / 0.35

          let fluxX, fluxY

          if (fluxPhase < 0.3) {
            // At container
            fluxX = containerX - 60
            fluxY = containerY + 50
          } else if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            // Push container to plane
            fluxX = containerX + fluxPhase / 0.5 * 200
            fluxY = containerY
          } else {
            // Disappear
            fluxX = -100
          }

          if (fluxX > -50) {
            drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux, true)
          }
        }
      }

      // AIRPLANE - export
      if (progress >= 0.65 && progress < 1) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.65) / 0.35

        let planeX = 1300
        let planeY = topY - 80
        let planeState = 'loading'

        if (planePhase < 0.2) {
          planeState = 'loading'
        } else if (planePhase < 0.4) {
          planeState = 'preparing'
        } else if (planePhase < 0.75) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.4) / 0.35
          planeY = topY - 80 - takeoff * 150
          planeX = 1300 + takeoff * 100
          planeState = 'flying'
        } else {
          const flying = (planePhase - 0.75) / 0.25
          planeY = topY - 230 - flying * 60
          planeX = 1400 + flying * 150
          planeState = 'flying'
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, planeState)

        // Loaders
        if (planePhase < 0.3) {
          ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
          ctx.font = '14px monospace'
          ctx.textAlign = 'center'
          ctx.fillText('👷 LOADER 👷', 1300, topY - 120)
          ctx.textAlign = 'left'
        }
      }

      // ===== BOTTOM HALF: IMPORT CYCLE =====
      const bottomY = 320

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 16px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT CYCLE', 20, 245)

      // AIRPLANE - import (returns)
      if (progress >= 0 && progress < 0.4) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.4

        let returnX = w + 100 - returnPhase * 250
        let returnY = bottomY - 150
        let returnState = 'flying'

        if (returnPhase > 0.75) {
          returnY = bottomY - 150 + (returnPhase - 0.75) / 0.25 * 150
          returnState = 'landing'
        } else if (returnPhase > 0.9) {
          returnState = 'ground'
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, returnState)
      }

      // Container at belt end (import side)
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.5) {
        const containerX = beltEndX + 60
        const containerY = bottomY + 50
        const boxInsideContainer = progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.4

        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, containerY, boxInsideContainer)

        // AGENT CORTEXIA - unloading from plane
        if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.45) {
          const cortexiaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.3

          let cortexiaX, cortexiaY

          if (cortexiaPhase < 0.5) {
            // At plane
            cortexiaX = 1250
            cortexiaY = bottomY - 100
          } else {
            // Push container to belt
            cortexiaX = 1250 - cortexiaPhase / 0.5 * 200
            cortexiaY = bottomY + 50
          }

          drawAgent(ctx, cortexiaX, cortexiaY, AGENTS.cortexia, true)
        }
      }

      // Box on belt (import - reverse)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.7) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.35
        const t = 1 - beltPhase // Reverse direction

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.35
        const cp1y = beltStartY - 90
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.65
        const cp2y = beltStartY + 90

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * (beltStartY + 220) + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * (cp1y + 220) + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * (cp2y + 220) + t * t * t * (beltEndY + 220)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-2) || 'T1')
      }

      // AGENT FLUX - import (pickup from belt)
      if (progress >= 0.65 && progress < 1) {
        const fluxImportPhase = (progress - 0.65) / 0.35

        let fluxX, fluxY

        if (fluxImportPhase < 0.3) {
          // At belt end
          fluxX = beltEndX
          fluxY = bottomY + 50
        } else if (fluxImportPhase < 0.9) {
          // Walk to truck
          fluxX = beltEndX - fluxImportPhase / 0.6 * 500
          fluxY = bottomY + 50 + fluxImportPhase / 0.6 * 20
        } else {
          // Disappear
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux, true)
        }
      }

      // Truck (import - receives box)
      if (progress >= 0.8 && progress < 1) {
        const truckImportPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2

        let truckImportX = 80
        let doorImportOpen = 0

        if (truckImportPhase < 0.6) {
          doorImportOpen = truckImportPhase / 0.6
        } else if (truckImportPhase < 0.9) {
          doorImportOpen = 1
        } else {
          truckImportX = 80 + (truckImportPhase - 0.9) / 0.1 * 120
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckImportX, bottomY, doorImportOpen)

        // Box at truck end
        if (truckImportPhase >= 0.5 && truckImportPhase < 0.85) {
          drawBox(ctx, 100, bottomY - 50, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-2) || 'T1')
        }
      }

      // Progress indicator
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 240, h - 70, 220, 60)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 240, h - 70, 220, 60)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE', w - 230, h - 52)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '10px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% complete`, w - 230, h - 35)
      ctx.fillText(`Queued: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 230, h - 20)

      // Zoom buttons
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('🔍 Zoom:', 20, h - 50)

      const buttons = [
        { label: 'Truck', mode: 'truck', x: 80 },
        { label: 'Belt', mode: 'belt', x: 130 },
        { label: 'Plane', mode: 'plane', x: 170 },
        { label: 'Full', mode: null, x: 220 },
      ]

      buttons.forEach((btn) => {
        ctx.fillStyle = zoomMode === btn.mode ? theme.colors.secondary : theme.colors.border
        ctx.fillRect(btn.x, h - 65, 35, 18)
        ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
        ctx.font = '8px monospace'
        ctx.textAlign = 'center'
        ctx.fillText(btn.label, btn.x + 17.5, h - 52)
        ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      })
    }

    const drawZoomedView = (ctx, w, h, progress, mode) => {
      // Zoomed detail view
      const centerX = w / 2
      const centerY = h / 2

      if (mode === 'truck') {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
        ctx.font = 'bold 20px monospace'
        ctx.textAlign = 'center'
        ctx.fillText('🚚 TRUCK DETAIL VIEW', centerX, 40)
        ctx.textAlign = 'left'

        const truckPhase = progress
        let truckX = centerX
        let doorOpen = 0

        if (truckPhase < 0.1) {
          doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.1
        } else if (truckPhase < 0.15) {
          doorOpen = 1
        }

        ctx.scale(2, 2)
        drawTruck(ctx, centerX / 2, centerY / 2, doorOpen)
        ctx.scale(0.5, 0.5)

        if (doorOpen > 0.5) {
          drawBox(ctx, centerX - 50, centerY - 100, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-2) || 'T1')
        }
      } else if (mode === 'belt') {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#10b981'
        ctx.font = 'bold 20px monospace'
        ctx.textAlign = 'center'
        ctx.fillText('🎢 CONVEYOR DETAIL VIEW', centerX, 40)
        ctx.textAlign = 'left'

        const beltPhase = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (progress - 0.3) / 0.35))
        const t = beltPhase

        ctx.translate(centerX - 300, centerY - 100)
        drawConveyorBelt(ctx, 0, 0, 600, -40)
        ctx.translate(-(centerX - 300), -(centerY - 100))

        if (beltPhase > 0) {
          const cp1x = 300 * 0.35
          const cp1y = -90
          const cp2x = 300 * 0.65
          const cp2y = 90

          const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * 0 + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * 600 + (centerX - 300)
          const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * 0 + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * -40 + (centerY - 100)

          drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-2) || 'T1')
        }
      } else if (mode === 'plane') {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
        ctx.font = 'bold 20px monospace'
        ctx.textAlign = 'center'
        ctx.fillText('✈️ AIRPLANE DETAIL VIEW', centerX, 40)
        ctx.textAlign = 'left'

        const planePhase = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (progress - 0.65) / 0.35))

        let planeX = centerX
        let planeY = centerY
        let planeState = 'ground'

        if (planePhase < 0.2) {
          planeState = 'loading'
        } else if (planePhase < 0.5) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.2) / 0.3
          planeY = centerY - takeoff * 150
          planeState = 'flying'
        } else {
          planeState = 'flying'
        }

        ctx.scale(2.5, 2.5)
        drawAirplane(ctx, centerX / 2.5, centerY / 2.5, planeState)
        ctx.scale(0.4, 0.4)
      }

      // Back button
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText('← Back to Full View', centerX, h - 30)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '12px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '16px' }}>
          🎬 CINEMATIC SUPPLY CHAIN FLOW
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
          Export (top) & Import (bottom) cycles • 120 second slow cycle • Click to zoom scenes
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '6px 10px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={600}
        onClick={(e) => {
          const rect = canvasRef.current.getBoundingClientRect()
          const x = e.clientX - rect.left
          const y = e.clientY - rect.top

          // Zoom buttons hit detection
          if (y > 500 && y < 580) {
            if (x > 80 && x < 115) setZoomMode('truck')
            else if (x > 130 && x < 165) setZoomMode('belt')
            else if (x > 170 && x < 205) setZoomMode('plane')
            else if (x > 220 && x < 255) setZoomMode(null)
          }
        }}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block', cursor: 'pointer' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    // Drawing functions
    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData, isWalking = false) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 40, 16, 6, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Body
      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 12, y - 28, 24, 45)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 12, y - 28, 24, 45)

      // Head
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 35, 9, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      // Eyes
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 37, 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 37, 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Glow
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.25
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 16, y - 32, 32, 50)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      // Name
      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 50)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxId) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 14, y - 14, 28, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e40af'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 14, y - 14, 28, 28)

      // Lines
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x - 14, y)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 14, y)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 14)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 14)
      ctx.stroke()

      // ID
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxId, x, y + 3)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 45, y - 24, 90, 45)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 45, y - 24, 90, 45)

      // Cabin
      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 45, y - 34, 24, 18)

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#5eb3ff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 42, y - 30, 8, 8)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 32, y - 30, 8, 8)

      // Wheels
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 18, y + 23, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 18, y + 23, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Door
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 45, y + 8)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -18, 24, 36)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -18, 24, 36)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      // Belt curve
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 70
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 70

      // Belt surface
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Motion lines
      const beltShift = (state.time * 100) % 40
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0d5f42'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 800; offset += 40) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 800) / 800
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Supports
      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d4a35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 3
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 50)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4c5aa0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 40, 70, 80)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a3a5f'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 35, y - 40, 70, 80)

      // Door seam
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 40)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 40)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Vents
      for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a3a5f'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 32, y - 28 + i * 20, 3, 5)
        ctx.fillRect(x + 29, y - 28 + i * 20, 3, 5)
      }
    }

    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      // Fuselage
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y - 10, 100, 20)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 50, y - 10, 100, 20)

      // Wings
      ctx.fillRect(x - 70, y - 5, 140, 10)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Tail
      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y - 18, 10, 36)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 40 + i * 14, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Wheels
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 20, y + 10)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 20, y + 25)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 20, y + 10)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 20, y + 25)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      // 90 second cycle
      const cycleTime = 90
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      // Clear
      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // Background gradient
      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // ===== EXPORT CYCLE (TOP) =====
      const topY = 80

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 50)

      // Positions
      const truckStartX = 50
      const agentPickupX = 150
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 750
      const containerX = 850
      const planeX = 1050

      // TRUCK PHASE (0-0.15)
      let truckX = truckStartX
      let doorOpen = 0
      let boxAtTruck = false

      if (progress < 0.05) {
        truckX = truckStartX - (0.05 - progress) / 0.05 * 80
      } else if (progress < 0.1) {
        truckX = truckStartX
        doorOpen = (progress - 0.05) / 0.05
        boxAtTruck = true
      } else if (progress < 0.15) {
        truckX = truckStartX + (progress - 0.1) / 0.05 * 80
        boxAtTruck = false
      }

      drawTruck(ctx, truckX, topY, doorOpen)

      // Box at truck
      if (boxAtTruck && progress < 0.12) {
        drawBox(ctx, truckX + 35, topY - 45, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
      }

      // AGENT NOVA - export
      if (progress >= 0.08 && progress < 0.45) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.08) / 0.37

        let novaX, novaY

        if (novaPhase < 0.15) {
          novaX = agentPickupX + novaPhase / 0.15 * (-70)
          novaY = topY + 50
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.3) {
          novaX = agentPickupX - 70
          novaY = topY + 50 - (novaPhase - 0.15) / 0.15 * 30
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.8) {
          novaX = agentPickupX - 70 + (novaPhase - 0.3) / 0.5 * 420
          novaY = topY + 20
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova, true)
        }

        // Box with nova
        if (novaPhase >= 0.3 && novaPhase < 0.8) {
          drawBox(ctx, novaX + 28, novaY - 45, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
        }
      }

      // CONVEYOR BELT (0.3-0.65)
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 30)

      // Box on belt
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.65) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.3
        const t = beltPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 70
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 70

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 30)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
      }

      // CONTAINER
      if (progress >= 0.55) {
        const boxInContainer = progress >= 0.63
        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, topY + 30)

        // Box in container
        if (boxInContainer && progress < 0.9) {
          drawBox(ctx, containerX, topY + 30, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
        }

        // AGENT FLUX - container
        if (progress >= 0.6 && progress < 0.95) {
          const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.6) / 0.35

          let fluxX, fluxY

          if (fluxPhase < 0.4) {
            fluxX = containerX - 50
            fluxY = topY + 80
          } else if (fluxPhase < 0.85) {
            fluxX = containerX - 50 + (fluxPhase - 0.4) / 0.45 * 150
            fluxY = topY + 30
          } else {
            fluxX = -100
          }

          if (fluxX > -50) {
            drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux, true)
          }
        }
      }

      // AIRPLANE - EXPORT
      if (progress >= 0.65) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.65) / 0.35

        let planeY = topY - 60
        let planeState = true

        if (planePhase >= 0.5) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.5) / 0.5
          planeY = topY - 60 - takeoff * 120
          planeState = false
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, planeState)

        // Loaders
        if (planePhase < 0.3) {
          ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
          ctx.font = '12px monospace'
          ctx.textAlign = 'center'
          ctx.fillText('👷', planeX - 40, topY - 10)
          ctx.fillText('👷', planeX + 40, topY - 10)
          ctx.textAlign = 'left'
        }
      }

      // ===== CENTER SEPARATOR =====
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // ===== IMPORT CYCLE (BOTTOM) =====
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 80

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, h / 2 + 30)

      // AIRPLANE - RETURN
      if (progress < 0.35) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.35

        let returnX = w + 100 - returnPhase * 250
        let returnY = bottomY - 80
        let returnState = true

        if (returnPhase > 0.8) {
          returnState = false
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, returnState)

        // Box in plane
        if (returnPhase > 0.15 && returnPhase < 0.8) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 30, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
        }
      }

      // CONTAINER - IMPORT
      if (progress >= 0.1 && progress < 0.5) {
        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, bottomY + 30)

        // AGENT CORTEXIA - unload from plane
        if (progress >= 0.12 && progress < 0.45) {
          const cortexiaPhase = (progress - 0.12) / 0.33

          let cortexiaX, cortexiaY

          if (cortexiaPhase < 0.4) {
            cortexiaX = planeX + cortexiaPhase / 0.4 * (-100)
            cortexiaY = bottomY - 80
          } else if (cortexiaPhase < 0.8) {
            cortexiaX = planeX - 100 + (cortexiaPhase - 0.4) / 0.4 * 130
            cortexiaY = bottomY + 30
          } else {
            cortexiaX = -100
          }

          if (cortexiaX > -50) {
            drawAgent(ctx, cortexiaX, cortexiaY, AGENTS.cortexia, true)
          }
        }

        // Box in container
        if (progress >= 0.2 && progress < 0.35) {
          drawBox(ctx, containerX, bottomY + 30, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
        }
      }

      // BELT - IMPORT (REVERSE)
      if (progress >= 0.3 && progress < 0.65) {
        drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 30)

        // Box on belt (return)
        const beltReturnPhase = (progress - 0.3) / 0.35
        const t = 1 - beltReturnPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 70
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 70

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 30)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
      }

      // AGENT FLUX - IMPORT (FROM BELT)
      if (progress >= 0.65 && progress < 1) {
        const fluxImportPhase = (progress - 0.65) / 0.35

        let fluxX, fluxY

        if (fluxImportPhase < 0.3) {
          fluxX = beltEndX
          fluxY = bottomY + 50
        } else if (fluxImportPhase < 0.9) {
          fluxX = beltEndX - (fluxImportPhase - 0.3) / 0.6 * 400
          fluxY = bottomY + 50
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux, true)
        }

        // Box with flux
        if (fluxImportPhase >= 0.3 && fluxImportPhase < 0.9) {
          drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
        }
      }

      // TRUCK - IMPORT
      if (progress >= 0.8) {
        const truckReturnPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2

        let truckReturnX = truckStartX
        let doorReturnOpen = 0

        if (truckReturnPhase < 0.6) {
          doorReturnOpen = truckReturnPhase / 0.6
        } else if (truckReturnPhase < 0.9) {
          doorReturnOpen = 1
        } else {
          truckReturnX = truckStartX + (truckReturnPhase - 0.9) / 0.1 * 80
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckReturnX, bottomY, doorReturnOpen)

        // Box at truck
        if (truckReturnPhase >= 0.5 && truckReturnPhase < 0.85) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckReturnX + 35, bottomY - 45, taskQueue?.queued_tasks[0]?.task_id?.slice(-3) || 'T01')
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 220, h - 60, 200, 50)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 220, h - 60, 200, 50)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE PROGRESS', w - 210, h - 42)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '9px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% | Queued: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 210, h - 27)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '12px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '15px' }}>
          🎬 COMPLETE SUPPLY CHAIN FLOW
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '3px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
          Export (top) & Import (bottom) • Both cycles visible • 90 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '6px 10px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={800}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 40, 14, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 11, y - 26, 22, 42)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 11, y - 26, 22, 42)

      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 33, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 35, 1.2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 35, 1.2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.2
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 15, y - 30, 30, 48)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 48)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, label) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 13, y - 13, 26, 26)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e40af'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 13, y - 13, 26, 26)

      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x - 13, y)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 13, y)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 13)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 13)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 7px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(label, x, y + 2)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0, label = 'TRUCK') => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 42, y - 22, 84, 42)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 42, y - 22, 84, 42)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 42, y - 32, 20, 16)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#5eb3ff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 39, y - 28, 7, 7)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 30, y - 28, 7, 7)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 15, y + 20, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 15, y + 20, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 42, y + 6)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -16, 22, 32)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -16, 22, 32)
      ctx.restore()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData?.color || '#888'
      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(label, x, y - 40)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY, reverse = false) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 65
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 65

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 7
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      const beltShift = (state.time * 100) % 40
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0d5f42'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 800; offset += 40) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 800) / 800
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d4a35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 45)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y, hasBox = false) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4c5aa0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 32, y - 37, 64, 74)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a3a5f'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 32, y - 37, 64, 74)

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 37)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 37)
      ctx.stroke()

      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a3a5f'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 29, y - 25 + i * 25, 2.5, 4)
        ctx.fillRect(x + 26.5, y - 25 + i * 25, 2.5, 4)
      }

      if (hasBox) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 25, y - 28, 50, 56)
      }
    }

    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 48, y - 9, 96, 18)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 48, y - 9, 96, 18)

      ctx.fillRect(x - 65, y - 4, 130, 8)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillRect(x - 48, y - 16, 9, 32)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 38 + i * 13, y, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 18, y + 9)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 18, y + 22)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 18, y + 9)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 18, y + 22)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // Cargo door
      if (doorOpen > 0) {
        ctx.save()
        ctx.translate(x - 48, y)
        ctx.rotate(-doorOpen * 0.8)
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100, 150, 200, 0.5)'
        ctx.fillRect(0, -12, 20, 24)
        ctx.restore()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      const cycleTime = 100
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // ===== EXPORT (TOP) =====
      const topY = 100

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT CYCLE', 20, topY - 60)

      const truckX = 60
      const pickupX = 180
      const beltStartX = 340
      const beltEndX = 720
      const containerX = 840
      const planeX = 1050

      // TRUCK EXPORT: Arrives, stops, opens, THEN nova picks up
      let doorOpen = 0
      let truckPhase = 0

      if (progress < 0.1) {
        doorOpen = progress / 0.1
        truckPhase = 1
      } else if (progress < 0.2) {
        doorOpen = 1
        truckPhase = 1
      } else if (progress < 0.3) {
        doorOpen = 1 - (progress - 0.2) / 0.1
        truckPhase = 1
      } else if (progress < 0.35) {
        truckPhase = 1 + (progress - 0.3) / 0.05 * 0.5
      }

      drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckPhase * 60, topY, doorOpen, 'TRUCK')

      // Box AT truck (only during truck phase)
      if (progress >= 0.08 && progress < 0.25) {
        drawBox(ctx, truckX - truckPhase * 60 + 30, topY - 40, 'BOX→FLUX')
      }

      // NOVA EXPORT: Only picks up AFTER truck has opened and box is visible
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.45) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.3

        let novaX, novaY

        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          // Walk to box
          novaX = pickupX - novaPhase / 0.25 * 80
          novaY = topY + 50
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.5) {
          // Pick up and walk to belt
          const walkPhase = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.25
          novaX = pickupX - 80 + walkPhase * 200
          novaY = topY + 50 - walkPhase * 30
        } else {
          // DISAPPEAR
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova)

          // Box with nova
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.5) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 26, novaY - 42, 'BOX→FLUX')
          }
        }
      }

      // CONVEYOR BELT EXPORT
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 28)

      // Box on belt (ONLY after nova places it)
      if (progress >= 0.4 && progress < 0.65) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.4) / 0.25
        const t = beltPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 65
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 65

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 28)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→FLUX')
      }

      // FLUX EXPORT: Picks up at belt end, places in container
      if (progress >= 0.6 && progress < 0.9) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.6) / 0.3

        let fluxX, fluxY

        if (fluxPhase < 0.4) {
          // At belt end, picking up
          fluxX = beltEndX
          fluxY = topY + 50
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
          // Walk to container
          const walkPhase = (fluxPhase - 0.4) / 0.4
          fluxX = beltEndX + walkPhase * 80
          fluxY = topY + 50 - walkPhase * 20
        } else {
          // DISAPPEAR
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux)
        }
      }

      // CONTAINER with box
      if (progress >= 0.65) {
        const hasBox = progress >= 0.75 && progress < 0.95
        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, topY + 25, hasBox)
      }

      // AIRPLANE EXPORT: Door opens, container goes in, then plane leaves
      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25

        let doorOpenPlane = 0
        let planeY = topY - 70

        if (planePhase < 0.4) {
          doorOpenPlane = planePhase / 0.4
        } else if (planePhase < 0.8) {
          doorOpenPlane = 1
        } else {
          doorOpenPlane = Math.max(0, 1 - (planePhase - 0.8) / 0.2)
        }

        // Plane takes off AFTER door closes
        if (planePhase >= 0.9) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.9) / 0.1
          planeY = topY - 70 - takeoff * 120
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, planePhase < 0.9, doorOpenPlane)

        // Loaders
        if (planePhase < 0.6) {
          ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
          ctx.font = '11px monospace'
          ctx.textAlign = 'center'
          ctx.fillText('👷', planeX - 30, topY - 20)
          ctx.fillText('👷', planeX + 30, topY - 20)
          ctx.textAlign = 'left'
        }
      }

      // ===== SEPARATOR =====
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.setLineDash([4, 4])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // ===== IMPORT (BOTTOM) =====
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 100

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT CYCLE', 20, h / 2 + 40)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Lands, door opens, loaders unload
      if (progress < 0.4) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.4

        let returnY = bottomY - 80
        let doorReturnOpen = 0

        if (returnPhase > 0.3 && returnPhase < 0.7) {
          doorReturnOpen = (returnPhase - 0.3) / 0.4
        }

        // Plane coming from far right
        const returnX = w + 100 - returnPhase * 300

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, returnPhase > 0.8, doorReturnOpen)

        // Box in plane during early phase
        if (returnPhase > 0.1 && returnPhase < 0.65) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 30, 'BOX→NOVA')
        }

        // Loaders unloading
        if (returnPhase > 0.35 && returnPhase < 0.75) {
          ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
          ctx.font = '11px monospace'
          ctx.textAlign = 'center'
          ctx.fillText('👷', returnX - 30, bottomY - 20)
          ctx.fillText('👷', returnX + 30, bottomY - 20)
          ctx.textAlign = 'left'
        }
      }

      // CONTAINER IMPORT: Unloaded from plane
      if (progress >= 0.3 && progress < 0.65) {
        const containerPhase = (progress - 0.3) / 0.35
        const hasBoxInContainer = containerPhase >= 0.2 && containerPhase < 0.8

        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, bottomY + 25, hasBoxInContainer)

        // CORTEXIA: Walks container away from plane
        if (containerPhase < 0.7) {
          const cortX = planeX - containerPhase / 0.7 * 200
          const cortY = bottomY - 20

          drawAgent(ctx, cortX, cortY, AGENTS.cortexia)
        }
      }

      // CONVEYOR BELT IMPORT (REVERSE)
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 28, true)

      // Box on belt return (ONLY after container unloads)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.8) {
        const beltReturnPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.25
        const t = 1 - beltReturnPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 65
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 65

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 28)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→NOVA')
      }

      // FLUX IMPORT: Picks up at belt start, disappears
      if (progress >= 0.75 && progress < 1) {
        const fluxReturnPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25

        let fluxRetX = beltStartX + fluxReturnPhase / 0.3 * 80
        let fluxRetY = bottomY + 50

        if (fluxReturnPhase > 0.3) {
          fluxRetX = -100
        }

        if (fluxRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxRetX, fluxRetY, AGENTS.flux)

          // Box with flux
          if (fluxReturnPhase < 0.3) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxRetX + 26, fluxRetY - 42, 'BOX→NOVA')
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK IMPORT: Receives box, closes door, leaves
      if (progress >= 0.8) {
        const truckReturnPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2

        let doorReturnOpen = 0
        let truckRetPhase = 0

        if (truckReturnPhase < 0.5) {
          doorReturnOpen = 1 - truckReturnPhase / 0.5
          truckRetPhase = 1
        } else if (truckReturnPhase < 0.7) {
          doorReturnOpen = 0
          truckRetPhase = 1
        } else {
          doorReturnOpen = 0
          truckRetPhase = 1 + (truckReturnPhase - 0.7) / 0.3 * 0.5
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckRetPhase * 60, bottomY, doorReturnOpen, 'TRUCK')

        // Box at truck
        if (truckReturnPhase >= 0.3 && truckReturnPhase < 0.6) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX - truckRetPhase * 60 + 30, bottomY - 40, 'BOX→NOVA')
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 200, h - 50, 180, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 200, h - 50, 180, 40)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE', w - 190, h - 32)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '8px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% | Queue: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 190, h - 20)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '12px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🎬 SUPPLY CHAIN - SMOOTH HANDOFFS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Complete export & import cycles • Smooth sequential flow • Box labels show destination
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '6px 10px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '10px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={750}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
