Code heeft een bug. Laat me quick fixen:

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && canvasRef.current) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching projects:', error)
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching task queue:', error)
    }
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData) => {
      if (!ctx || !agentData) return

      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 40, 14, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 11, y - 26, 22, 42)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 11, y - 26, 22, 42)

      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 33, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 35, 1.2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 35, 1.2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.2
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 15, y - 30, 30, 48)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 48)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, label) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 13, y - 13, 26, 26)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e40af'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 13, y - 13, 26, 26)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 7px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(label, x, y + 2)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 42, y - 22, 84, 42)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 42, y - 22, 84, 42)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 42, y - 32, 20, 16)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#5eb3ff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 39, y - 28, 7, 7)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 30, y - 28, 7, 7)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 15, y + 20, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 15, y + 20, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 42, y + 6)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -16, 22, 32)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -16, 22, 32)
      ctx.restore()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText('TRUCK', x, y - 40)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 65
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 65

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 7
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      const beltShift = (state.time * 100) % 40
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0d5f42'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 800; offset += 40) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 800) / 800
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d4a35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 45)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y, hasBox = false) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4c5aa0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 32, y - 37, 64, 74)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a3a5f'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 32, y - 37, 64, 74)

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 37)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 37)
      ctx.stroke()

      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a3a5f'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 29, y - 25 + i * 25, 2.5, 4)
        ctx.fillRect(x + 26.5, y - 25 + i * 25, 2.5, 4)
      }

      if (hasBox) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3)'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 25, y - 28, 50, 56)
      }
    }

    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 48, y - 9, 96, 18)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 48, y - 9, 96, 18)

      ctx.fillRect(x - 65, y - 4, 130, 8)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillRect(x - 48, y - 16, 9, 32)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 38 + i * 13, y, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 18, y + 9)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 18, y + 22)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 18, y + 9)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 18, y + 22)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      const cycleTime = 100
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // EXPORT (TOP)
      const topY = 100
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 60)

      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 340
      const beltEndX = 720
      const containerX = 840
      const planeX = 1050

      // Truck
      if (progress < 0.35) {
        const doorOpen = progress < 0.1 ? progress / 0.1 : progress < 0.3 ? 1 : Math.max(0, 1 - (progress - 0.3) / 0.05)
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, topY, doorOpen)

        if (progress >= 0.08 && progress < 0.25) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 30, topY - 40, 'BOX→FLUX')
        }
      }

      // Nova
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.45) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.3
        let novaX = 180 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 80
        let novaY = topY + 50

        if (novaPhase >= 0.25) {
          const walkPhase = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.25
          novaX = 100 + walkPhase * 200
          novaY = topY + 20
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova)
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.5) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 26, novaY - 42, 'BOX→FLUX')
          }
        }
      }

      // Belt
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 28)

      if (progress >= 0.4 && progress < 0.65) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.4) / 0.25
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 65
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 65

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 28)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→FLUX')
      }

      // Flux
      if (progress >= 0.6 && progress < 0.9) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.6) / 0.3
        let fluxX = beltEndX
        let fluxY = topY + 50

        if (fluxPhase >= 0.4 && fluxPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (fluxPhase - 0.4) / 0.4
          fluxX = beltEndX + walkPhase * 80
          fluxY = topY + 30
        } else if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux)
        }
      }

      // Container
      if (progress >= 0.65) {
        const hasBox = progress >= 0.75 && progress < 0.95
        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, topY + 25, hasBox)
      }

      // Plane
      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
        let planeY = topY - 70

        if (planePhase >= 0.9) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.9) / 0.1
          planeY = topY - 70 - takeoff * 120
        }

        const doorOpen = planePhase < 0.4 ? planePhase / 0.4 : planePhase < 0.8 ? 1 : Math.max(0, 1 - (planePhase - 0.8) / 0.2)

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, planePhase < 0.9, doorOpen)
      }

      // SEPARATOR
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.setLineDash([4, 4])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // IMPORT (BOTTOM)
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 100

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, h / 2 + 40)

      // Plane return
      if (progress < 0.4) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.4
        const returnX = w + 100 - returnPhase * 300
        const returnY = bottomY - 80

        const doorReturnOpen = returnPhase > 0.3 && returnPhase < 0.7 ? (returnPhase - 0.3) / 0.4 : 0

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, returnPhase > 0.8, doorReturnOpen)

        if (returnPhase > 0.1 && returnPhase < 0.65) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 30, 'BOX→NOVA')
        }
      }

      // Container import
      if (progress >= 0.3 && progress < 0.65) {
        const containerPhase = (progress - 0.3) / 0.35
        const hasBoxInContainer = containerPhase >= 0.2 && containerPhase < 0.8
        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, bottomY + 25, hasBoxInContainer)
      }

      // Belt return
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 28)

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.8) {
        const beltReturnPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.25
        const t = 1 - beltReturnPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 65
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 65

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 28)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→NOVA')
      }

      // Truck import
      if (progress >= 0.8) {
        const truckReturnPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2
        const doorReturnOpen = truckReturnPhase < 0.5 ? 1 - truckReturnPhase / 0.5 : 0

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, doorReturnOpen)

        if (truckReturnPhase >= 0.3 && truckReturnPhase < 0.6) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 30, bottomY - 40, 'BOX→NOVA')
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 200, h - 50, 180, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 200, h - 50, 180, 40)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE', w - 190, h - 32)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '8px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% complete`, w - 190, h - 20)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '12px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🎬 SUPPLY CHAIN FLOW
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Complete export & import cycles with smooth handoffs
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '6px 10px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '10px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={750}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && canvasRef.current) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 4, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)

      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 7px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, label) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 12, y - 12, 24, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e40af'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 12, y - 12, 24, 24)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 6px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(label, x, y + 2)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#5eb3ff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 6
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      const beltShift = (state.time * 120) % 35
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0d5f42'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 700; offset += 35) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 700) / 700
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 1.8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d4a35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 40)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y, hasBox = false) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4c5aa0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 28, y - 33, 56, 66)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a3a5f'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 28, y - 33, 56, 66)

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.7
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 33)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 33)
      ctx.stroke()

      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a3a5f'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 26, y - 22 + i * 22, 2, 3)
        ctx.fillRect(x + 24, y - 22 + i * 22, 2, 3)
      }

      if (hasBox) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4)'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 25, 44, 50)
      }
    }

    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 44, y - 8, 88, 16)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.6
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 44, y - 8, 88, 16)

      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 3, 120, 6)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillRect(x - 44, y - 14, 8, 28)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 35 + i * 12, y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 16, y + 8)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 16, y + 20)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 16, y + 8)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 16, y + 20)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      // FASTER: 60 second cycle
      const cycleTime = 60
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // ===== EXPORT (TOP HALF) =====
      const topY = 80

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 50)

      const truckX = 55
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 650
      const containerX = 760
      const planeX = 950

      // TRUCK: Arrives, opens, closes, LEAVES (0-0.15)
      if (progress < 0.15) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.15
        
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) {
          doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        } else if (truckPhase < 0.12) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.03)
        }
        
        if (truckPhase > 0.12) {
          truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.03
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)

        // Box at truck (only while door open)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.12) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 35, 'BOX→FLX')
        }
      }

      // NOVA: Picks up AFTER truck leaves (0.12-0.35)
      if (progress >= 0.12 && progress < 0.35) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.12) / 0.23

        let novaX = 140
        let novaY = topY + 45

        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walkPhase = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walkPhase * 190
          novaY = topY + 45 - walkPhase * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova)

          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 22, novaY - 38, 'BOX→FLX')
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      // Box on belt (0.3-0.55)
      if (progress >= 0.3 && progress < 0.55) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.3) / 0.25
        const t = beltPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→FLX')
      }

      // FLUX: At belt end, picks up, walks to container (0.5-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.5 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.5) / 0.25

        let fluxX = beltEndX
        let fluxY = topY + 45

        if (fluxPhase >= 0.3 && fluxPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (fluxPhase - 0.3) / 0.5
          fluxX = beltEndX + walkPhase * 70
          fluxY = topY + 20
        } else if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux)
        }
      }

      // CONTAINER: Box goes IN (0.62-0.85)
      if (progress >= 0.62) {
        const hasBox = progress >= 0.65 && progress < 0.82
        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, topY + 22, hasBox)
      }

      // AIRPLANE EXPORT: Door opens, container loads, door closes, THEN takeoff (0.7-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.7) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.3

        let planeY = topY - 60
        let onGround = true

        // Container in plane phase
        if (planePhase >= 0.1 && planePhase < 0.6) {
          // Container is loading/inside
        }

        // Takeoff phase
        if (planePhase >= 0.65) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.65) / 0.35
          planeY = topY - 60 - takeoff * 100
          onGround = false
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // ===== SEPARATOR =====
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2
      ctx.setLineDash([3, 3])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // ===== IMPORT (BOTTOM HALF) =====
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 80

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, h / 2 + 30)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Returns, lands (0-0.25)
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.25

        const returnX = w + 80 - returnPhase * 280
        const returnY = bottomY - 70
        const onGround = returnPhase > 0.8

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, onGround)

        // Box in plane
        if (returnPhase > 0.1 && returnPhase < 0.7) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 28, 'BOX→NOV')
        }
      }

      // CONTAINER IMPORT: Unloaded (0.18-0.45)
      if (progress >= 0.18 && progress < 0.45) {
        const containerPhase = (progress - 0.18) / 0.27
        const hasBoxInContainer = containerPhase >= 0.15 && containerPhase < 0.7

        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, bottomY + 22, hasBoxInContainer)

        // CORTEXIA: Walks container away
        if (containerPhase < 0.6) {
          const cortX = planeX - containerPhase / 0.6 * 180
          const cortY = bottomY - 20

          drawAgent(ctx, cortX, cortY, AGENTS.cortexia)
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT (REVERSE)
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt return (0.4-0.65)
      if (progress >= 0.4 && progress < 0.65) {
        const beltReturnPhase = (progress - 0.4) / 0.25
        const t = 1 - beltReturnPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→NOV')
      }

      // FLUX IMPORT: Picks up at belt start (0.6-0.8)
      if (progress >= 0.6 && progress < 0.8) {
        const fluxReturnPhase = (progress - 0.6) / 0.2

        let fluxRetX = beltEndX - fluxReturnPhase / 0.3 * 70
        let fluxRetY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxReturnPhase > 0.35) {
          fluxRetX = -100
        }

        if (fluxRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxRetX, fluxRetY, AGENTS.flux)
        }
      }

      // NOVA IMPORT: Walks box to truck (0.75-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.75 && progress < 1) {
        const novaReturnPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25

        let novaRetX = beltStartX
        let novaRetY = bottomY + 45

        if (novaReturnPhase < 0.6) {
          const walkPhase = novaReturnPhase / 0.6
          novaRetX = beltStartX - walkPhase * 185
          novaRetY = bottomY + 45 - walkPhase * 25
        } else if (novaReturnPhase < 0.9) {
          novaRetX = beltStartX - 185
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20
        } else {
          novaRetX = -100
        }

        if (novaRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaRetX, novaRetY, AGENTS.nova)

          if (novaReturnPhase >= 0.6 && novaReturnPhase < 0.9) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaRetX + 22, novaRetY - 38, 'BOX→NOV')
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK IMPORT: Receives box (0.85-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.85) {
        const truckReturnPhase = (progress - 0.85) / 0.15

        let doorReturnOpen = 0

        if (truckReturnPhase < 0.5) {
          doorReturnOpen = truckReturnPhase / 0.5
        } else if (truckReturnPhase < 0.8) {
          doorReturnOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorReturnOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckReturnPhase - 0.8) / 0.2)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, doorReturnOpen)

        // Box at truck
        if (truckReturnPhase >= 0.35 && truckReturnPhase < 0.75) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 35, 'BOX→NOV')
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 170, h - 45, 150, 35)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 170, h - 45, 150, 35)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE', w - 160, h - 28)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '7px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% | Queue: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 160, h - 18)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '13px' }}>
          🎬 SUPPLY CHAIN
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '3px 0 6px 0', fontSize: '8px' }}>
          Export (top) & Import (bottom) • 60 second cycle • Smooth handoffs
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={700}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && canvasRef.current) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    // ===== DRAWING FUNCTIONS =====
    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.25)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 50, 18, 7, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Body with gradient
      const bodyGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 13, y - 28, x + 13, y + 22)
      bodyGrad.addColorStop(0, agentData.darkColor)
      bodyGrad.addColorStop(0.5, agentData.color)
      bodyGrad.addColorStop(1, agentData.darkColor)
      ctx.fillStyle = bodyGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 13, y - 28, 26, 50)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 13, y - 28, 26, 50)

      // Head
      const headGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(x, y - 36, 0, x, y - 36, 10)
      headGrad.addColorStop(0, agentData.color)
      headGrad.addColorStop(1, agentData.darkColor)
      ctx.fillStyle = headGrad
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 36, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.stroke()

      // Eyes
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 4, y - 38, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 4, y - 38, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 4, y - 38, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 4, y - 38, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Glow effect
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.3
      ctx.lineWidth = 3
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 17, y - 33, 34, 56)
      ctx.globalAlpha = 1

      // Name
      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 55)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, label) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 18, 44, 44)

      // Box with gradient
      const boxGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 22, y - 22, x + 22, y + 22)
      boxGrad.addColorStop(0, '#6ba3ff')
      boxGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#3b82f6')
      boxGrad.addColorStop(1, '#1e40af')
      ctx.fillStyle = boxGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)

      // Box outline
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f2456'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)

      // 3D effect
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y - 22)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 28, y - 16)
      ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 22)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 28, y + 28)
      ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 22)
      ctx.lineTo(x - 16, y + 28)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Cardboard lines
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 22)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 22)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Label - BIG AND CLEAR
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(label.split('→')[0], x, y - 4)
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('→ ' + label.split('→')[1], x, y + 10)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y + 22, 100, 12)

      // Truck body
      const truckGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(x - 50, y - 25, x + 50, y + 25)
      truckGrad.addColorStop(0, '#ff8855')
      truckGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#ff6b35')
      truckGrad.addColorStop(1, '#ff4500')
      ctx.fillStyle = truckGrad
      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y - 25, 100, 50)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 50, y - 25, 100, 50)

      // Cabin
      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y - 35, 28, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#aa3a19'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 50, y - 35, 28, 24)

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#5eb3ff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 46, y - 30, 10, 10)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 34, y - 30, 10, 10)

      // Wheels
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 20, y + 28, 9, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#444'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 20, y + 28, 9, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      // Door
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 50, y + 8)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -20, 28, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -20, 28, 40)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 75
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 75

      // Belt surface with gradient
      const beltGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(startX, startY - 15, endX, endY - 15)
      beltGrad.addColorStop(0, '#22c55e')
      beltGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#10b981')
      beltGrad.addColorStop(1, '#059669')

      ctx.strokeStyle = beltGrad
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.lineJoin = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Motion effect
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 50
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0d5f42'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 1000; offset += 50) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 1000) / 1000
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Supports
      for (let i = 0; i <= 6; i++) {
        const t = i / 6
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d4a35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 4
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 55)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y, hasBox = false) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 40, y + 38, 80, 10)

      // Container
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4c5aa0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 40, y - 42, 80, 84)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a3a5f'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 40, y - 42, 80, 84)

      // Door seam
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 42)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 42)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Ventilation
      for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a3a5f'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 36, y - 30 + i * 20, 3, 6)
        ctx.fillRect(x + 33, y - 30 + i * 20, 3, 6)
      }

      // Box inside
      if (hasBox) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5)'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 30, y - 30, 60, 60)
      }
    }

    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x, y)

      // Shadow
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
        ctx.fillRect(-55, 25, 110, 8)
      }

      // Fuselage
      const fuselageGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(-55, -13, 55, 13)
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(0, '#6eb5ff')
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#4a9eff')
      fuselageGrad.addColorStop(1, '#2d7bb8')
      ctx.fillStyle = fuselageGrad
      ctx.fillRect(-55, -13, 110, 26)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(-55, -13, 110, 26)

      // Wings
      ctx.fillRect(-75, -7, 150, 14)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Tail fin
      ctx.fillRect(-55, -22, 12, 44)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Windows
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(-45 + i * 14, 0, 3.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Wheels
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(-22, 13)
        ctx.lineTo(-22, 30)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(22, 13)
        ctx.lineTo(22, 30)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // Engines glow if flying
      if (!onGround) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 0, 0.8)'
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(-55, 0, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(55, 0, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      ctx.restore()
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      const cycleTime = 100
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      // Background
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1f2e'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, '#1a1f2e')
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#242e3f')
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, '#1a1f2e')
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // ===== EXPORT (TOP) =====
      const topY = 85

      // Section background
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 107, 53, 0.08)'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 10, w, h / 2 - 20)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
      ctx.strokeRect(5, 15, w - 10, h / 2 - 30)
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 14px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT CYCLE', 25, 35)

      const truckX = 70
      const beltStartX = 320
      const beltEndX = 700
      const containerX = 820
      const planeX = 1050

      // ===== PLANE LANDS & UNLOADS (0-0.2) =====
      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const planePhase = progress / 0.2

        let planeY = topY - 100

        if (planePhase < 0.8) {
          planeY = topY - 100 + planePhase / 0.8 * 80
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, planePhase > 0.6)

        // Container starts exiting plane
        if (planePhase > 0.4 && planePhase < 0.95) {
          const exitPhase = (planePhase - 0.4) / 0.55
          const contY = topY - 50 - exitPhase * 30
          drawContainer(ctx, planeX + 80 + exitPhase * 60, contY, true)
        }
      }

      // ===== CORTEXIA TAKES CONTAINER (0.15-0.4) =====
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.4) {
        const cortPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.25

        let cortX = planeX + 100
        let cortY = topY - 20

        if (cortPhase < 0.4) {
          cortX = planeX + 100
        } else if (cortPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (cortPhase - 0.4) / 0.4
          cortX = planeX + 100 - walkPhase * 280
          cortY = topY - 20 - walkPhase * 20
        } else {
          cortX = -100
        }

        if (cortX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, cortX, cortY, AGENTS.cortexia)

          // Container with cortexia
          if (cortPhase >= 0.3 && cortPhase < 0.8) {
            drawContainer(ctx, cortX + 50, cortY + 20, true)
          }
        }
      }

      // ===== BELT =====
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 30)

      // ===== FLUX AT BELT START (0.35-0.55) =====
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.55) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.2

        let fluxX = beltStartX - 80
        let fluxY = topY + 60

        if (fluxPhase < 0.4) {
          fluxY = topY + 60
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (fluxPhase - 0.4) / 0.4
          fluxX = beltStartX - 80 + walkPhase * 70
          fluxY = topY + 60 - walkPhase * 40
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux)

          if (fluxPhase >= 0.4 && fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 40, fluxY - 50, 'BOX→NOV')
          }
        }
      }

      // Box on belt (0.5-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.5 && progress < 0.75) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.5) / 0.25
        const t = beltPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 75
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 75

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 30)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→NOV')
      }

      // ===== NOVA AT BELT END (0.7-0.9) =====
      if (progress >= 0.7 && progress < 0.9) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.2

        let novaX = beltEndX + 80
        let novaY = topY + 60

        if (novaPhase < 0.4) {
          novaY = topY + 60
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (novaPhase - 0.4) / 0.4
          novaX = beltEndX + 80 - walkPhase * 380
          novaY = topY + 60 - walkPhase * 30
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova)

          if (novaPhase >= 0.4 && novaPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 40, novaY - 50, 'BOX→NOV')
          }
        }
      }

      // ===== TRUCK ARRIVES & LOADS (0.8-1.0) =====
      if (progress >= 0.8) {
        const truckPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2

        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveIn = 0

        if (truckPhase < 0.3) {
          doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.3
        } else if (truckPhase < 0.7) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.7) / 0.3)
        }

        if (truckPhase < 0.05) {
          truckMoveIn = 1 - truckPhase / 0.05
        } else {
          truckMoveIn = 0
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX + truckMoveIn * 100, topY, doorOpen)

        // Box at truck
        if (truckPhase >= 0.25 && truckPhase < 0.6) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 35, topY - 45, 'BOX→NOV')
        }
      }

      // ===== SEPARATOR =====
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#444'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.setLineDash([8, 8])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // ===== IMPORT (BOTTOM) =====
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 85

      // Section background
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(74, 158, 255, 0.08)'
      ctx.fillRect(0, h / 2 + 10, w, h / 2 - 20)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
      ctx.strokeRect(5, h / 2 + 15, w - 10, h / 2 - 30)
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 14px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT CYCLE (REVERSE)', 25, h / 2 + 35)

      // ===== PLANE RETURNS & LANDS (0-0.25) =====
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.25

        const returnX = w + 150 - returnPhase * 350
        let returnY = bottomY - 100

        if (returnPhase < 0.85) {
          returnY = bottomY - 100 + returnPhase / 0.85 * 80
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, returnPhase > 0.75)

        // Container exits plane
        if (returnPhase > 0.3 && returnPhase < 0.9) {
          const exitPhase = (returnPhase - 0.3) / 0.6
          const contY = bottomY - 60 - exitPhase * 40
          drawContainer(ctx, returnX - 80 - exitPhase * 80, contY, true)
        }
      }

      // ===== FLUX TAKES CONTAINER (0.2-0.45) =====
      if (progress >= 0.2 && progress < 0.45) {
        const fluxRetPhase = (progress - 0.2) / 0.25

        let fluxRetX = planeX - 100
        let fluxRetY = bottomY - 20

        if (fluxRetPhase < 0.4) {
          fluxRetX = planeX - 100
        } else if (fluxRetPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (fluxRetPhase - 0.4) / 0.4
          fluxRetX = planeX - 100 + walkPhase * 280
          fluxRetY = bottomY - 20 - walkPhase * 20
        } else {
          fluxRetX = -100
        }

        if (fluxRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxRetX, fluxRetY, AGENTS.flux)

          if (fluxRetPhase >= 0.3 && fluxRetPhase < 0.8) {
            drawContainer(ctx, fluxRetX - 50, fluxRetY + 20, true)
          }
        }
      }

      // ===== BELT (REVERSE) =====
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 30)

      // Box on belt return (0.4-0.65)
      if (progress >= 0.4 && progress < 0.65) {
        const beltRetPhase = (progress - 0.4) / 0.25
        const t = 1 - beltRetPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 75
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 75

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 30)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→FLUX')
      }

      // ===== CORTEXIA AT BELT END (0.6-0.8) =====
      if (progress >= 0.6 && progress < 0.8) {
        const cortRetPhase = (progress - 0.6) / 0.2

        let cortRetX = beltEndX + 80
        let cortRetY = bottomY + 60

        if (cortRetPhase < 0.4) {
          cortRetY = bottomY + 60
        } else if (cortRetPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (cortRetPhase - 0.4) / 0.4
          cortRetX = beltEndX + 80 - walkPhase * 380
          cortRetY = bottomY + 60 - walkPhase * 30
        } else {
          cortRetX = -100
        }

        if (cortRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, cortRetX, cortRetY, AGENTS.cortexia)

          if (cortRetPhase >= 0.4 && cortRetPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, cortRetX + 40, cortRetY - 50, 'BOX→FLUX')
          }
        }
      }

      // ===== TRUCK RECEIVES (0.75-1.0) =====
      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const truckRetPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25

        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0

        if (truckRetPhase < 0.3) {
          doorOpen = truckRetPhase / 0.3
        } else if (truckRetPhase < 0.7) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckRetPhase - 0.7) / 0.3)
        }

        if (truckRetPhase > 0.75) {
          truckMoveOut = (truckRetPhase - 0.75) / 0.25
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 100, bottomY, doorOpen)

        // Box at truck
        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.25 && truckRetPhase < 0.6) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 35, bottomY - 45, 'BOX→FLUX')
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 107, 53, 0.2)'
      ctx.fillRect(w - 200, h - 50, 190, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 200, h - 50, 190, 40)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE PROGRESS', w - 190, h - 30)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ccc'
      ctx.font = '9px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% | Queue: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 190, h - 15)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '12px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1f2e',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #ff6b35`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#ff6b35', margin: 0, fontSize: '16px' }}>
          🎬 SUPPLY CHAIN CINEMATIC
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '10px' }}>
          Complete bidirectional flow • Export (top) & Import (bottom) • 100 second spectacular cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '6px 10px',
            backgroundColor: '#242e3f',
            border: `1px solid #ff6b35`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '11px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={900}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1f2e' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && canvasRef.current) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    // Simple truck draw
    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 40, y - 20, 80, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 40, y - 20, 80, 40)

      // Wheels
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 15, y + 20, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 15, y + 20, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
    }

    // Simple box draw
    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, label) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 20, y - 20, 40, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e40af'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 20, y - 20, 40, 40)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(label, x, y + 5)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 30) % 1 // 30 second loop

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // Title
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 16px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('TRUCK TEST', 20, 40)

      const centerY = h / 2

      // Truck comes from left
      const truckX = 100 + progress * 600

      drawTruck(ctx, truckX, centerY)

      // Box stays on ground when truck passes
      if (progress > 0.3 && progress < 0.7) {
        drawBox(ctx, 400, centerY + 60, 'BOX-01')
      }

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '12px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🎬 SIMULATION TEST
        </h1>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '6px 10px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '10px',
            marginTop: '8px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={600}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && canvasRef.current) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 4, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)

      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 7px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    // FIX 1: DOOS GROTER & DUIDELIJKER
    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, label) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 20, y - 20, 40, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e40af'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 20, y - 20, 40, 40)

      // 3D effect
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x + 20, y - 20)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 24, y - 16)
      ctx.moveTo(x - 20, y + 20)
      ctx.lineTo(x - 16, y + 24)
      ctx.stroke()

      // LABEL GROTER
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 10px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(label.split('→')[0], x, y - 3)
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('→' + label.split('→')[1], x, y + 10)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#5eb3ff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 6
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      const beltShift = (state.time * 120) % 35
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0d5f42'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 700; offset += 35) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 700) / 700
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 1.8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d4a35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 40)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawContainer = (ctx, x, y, hasBox = false) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4c5aa0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 28, y - 33, 56, 66)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a3a5f'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 28, y - 33, 56, 66)

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#5a6db3'
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.7
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 33)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 33)
      ctx.stroke()

      for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2a3a5f'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 26, y - 22 + i * 22, 2, 3)
        ctx.fillRect(x + 24, y - 22 + i * 22, 2, 3)
      }

      if (hasBox) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4)'
        ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 25, 44, 50)
      }
    }

    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 44, y - 8, 88, 16)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.6
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 44, y - 8, 88, 16)

      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 3, 120, 6)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillRect(x - 44, y - 14, 8, 28)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 35 + i * 12, y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 16, y + 8)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 16, y + 20)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 16, y + 8)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 16, y + 20)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      const cycleTime = 60
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      // ===== EXPORT (TOP HALF) =====
      const topY = 75

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 50)

      const truckX = 55
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 650
      const containerX = 760
      const planeX = 950

      // FIX 2: TRUCK LANGER op grond
      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) {
          doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        } else if (truckPhase < 0.12) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        }
        
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) {
          truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)

        // Box at truck (LANGER zichtbaar)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, 'BOX→FLX')
        }
      }

      // NOVA: Picks up AFTER truck leaves
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.35) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.2

        let novaX = 140
        let novaY = topY + 45

        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walkPhase = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walkPhase * 190
          novaY = topY + 45 - walkPhase * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova)

          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 25, novaY - 42, 'BOX→FLX')
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      // Box on belt
      if (progress >= 0.3 && progress < 0.55) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.3) / 0.25
        const t = beltPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→FLX')
      }

      // FLUX: At belt end
      if (progress >= 0.5 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.5) / 0.25

        let fluxX = beltEndX
        let fluxY = topY + 45

        if (fluxPhase >= 0.3 && fluxPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (fluxPhase - 0.3) / 0.5
          fluxX = beltEndX + walkPhase * 70
          fluxY = topY + 20
        } else if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux)
        }
      }

      // CONTAINER
      if (progress >= 0.62) {
        const hasBox = progress >= 0.65 && progress < 0.82
        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, topY + 22, hasBox)
      }

      // FIX 5: PLANE SPECTACULAR TAKEOFF
      if (progress >= 0.7) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.3

        let planeY = topY - 60
        let onGround = true

        if (planePhase >= 0.65) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.65) / 0.35
          planeY = topY - 60 - takeoff * 150
          onGround = false
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // ===== SEPARATOR =====
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2
      ctx.setLineDash([3, 3])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // ===== IMPORT (BOTTOM HALF) - SMALLER SCALE FIX 6 =====
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 75

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, h / 2 + 25)

      // PLANE IMPORT
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.25

        const returnX = w + 80 - returnPhase * 280
        const returnY = bottomY - 70
        const onGround = returnPhase > 0.8

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, onGround)

        if (returnPhase > 0.1 && returnPhase < 0.7) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 28, 'BOX→NOV')
        }
      }

      // CONTAINER IMPORT
      if (progress >= 0.18 && progress < 0.45) {
        const containerPhase = (progress - 0.18) / 0.27
        const hasBoxInContainer = containerPhase >= 0.15 && containerPhase < 0.7

        drawContainer(ctx, containerX, bottomY + 22, hasBoxInContainer)

        if (containerPhase < 0.6) {
          const cortX = planeX - containerPhase / 0.6 * 180
          const cortY = bottomY - 20

          drawAgent(ctx, cortX, cortY, AGENTS.cortexia)
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt return
      if (progress >= 0.4 && progress < 0.65) {
        const beltReturnPhase = (progress - 0.4) / 0.25
        const t = 1 - beltReturnPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, 'BOX→NOV')
      }

      // FLUX IMPORT
      if (progress >= 0.6 && progress < 0.8) {
        const fluxReturnPhase = (progress - 0.6) / 0.2

        let fluxRetX = beltEndX - fluxReturnPhase / 0.3 * 70
        let fluxRetY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxReturnPhase > 0.35) {
          fluxRetX = -100
        }

        if (fluxRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxRetX, fluxRetY, AGENTS.flux)
        }
      }

      // NOVA IMPORT
      if (progress >= 0.75 && progress < 1) {
        const novaReturnPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25

        let novaRetX = beltStartX
        let novaRetY = bottomY + 45

        if (novaReturnPhase < 0.6) {
          const walkPhase = novaReturnPhase / 0.6
          novaRetX = beltStartX - walkPhase * 185
          novaRetY = bottomY + 45 - walkPhase * 25
        } else if (novaReturnPhase < 0.9) {
          novaRetX = beltStartX - 185
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20
        } else {
          novaRetX = -100
        }

        if (novaRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaRetX, novaRetY, AGENTS.nova)

          if (novaReturnPhase >= 0.6 && novaReturnPhase < 0.9) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaRetX + 25, novaRetY - 42, 'BOX→NOV')
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK IMPORT
      if (progress >= 0.85) {
        const truckReturnPhase = (progress - 0.85) / 0.15

        let doorReturnOpen = 0

        if (truckReturnPhase < 0.5) {
          doorReturnOpen = truckReturnPhase / 0.5
        } else if (truckReturnPhase < 0.8) {
          doorReturnOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorReturnOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckReturnPhase - 0.8) / 0.2)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, doorReturnOpen)

        if (truckReturnPhase >= 0.35 && truckReturnPhase < 0.75) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 35, 'BOX→NOV')
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 170, h - 45, 150, 35)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 170, h - 45, 150, 35)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE', w - 160, h - 28)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '7px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% | Queue: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 160, h - 18)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '13px' }}>
          🎬 SUPPLY CHAIN
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '3px 0 6px 0', fontSize: '8px' }}>
          Export (top) & Import (bottom) • 60 second cycle • Smooth handoffs
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={700}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
