bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && canvasRef.current) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    // Get task ID
    const getTaskId = () => {
      if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
        return taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      }
      return 'T01'
    }

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 4, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)

      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    // FIX: BOX NUMMER DUIDELIJK + GROTER LABEL
    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, taskId) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 20, y - 20, 40, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e40af'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 20, y - 20, 40, 40)

      // 3D effect
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x + 20, y - 20)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 24, y - 16)
      ctx.moveTo(x - 20, y + 20)
      ctx.lineTo(x - 16, y + 24)
      ctx.stroke()

      // GROTE DUIDELIJKE TICKET NUMMER
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 14px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(taskId, x, y + 8)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#5eb3ff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#e84d28'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cc4a29'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#10b981'
      ctx.lineWidth = 6
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      const beltShift = (state.time * 120) % 35
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0d5f42'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 700; offset += 35) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 700) / 700
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 1.8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0d4a35'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 40)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 44, y - 8, 88, 16)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1d4f88'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.6
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 44, y - 8, 88, 16)

      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 3, 120, 6)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillRect(x - 44, y - 14, 8, 28)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 35 + i * 12, y, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 16, y + 8)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 16, y + 20)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 16, y + 8)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 16, y + 20)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      const cycleTime = 60
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const taskId = getTaskId()

      // ===== EXPORT (TOP) =====
      const topY = 65

      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b35'
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 45)

      const truckX = 55
      const beltStartX = 280
      const beltEndX = 620
      const planeX = 900

      // TRUCK: Arrives, opens, closes, LEAVES (0-0.2)
      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) {
          doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        } else if (truckPhase < 0.12) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        }
        
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) {
          truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)

        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, taskId)
        }
      }

      // NOVA: Picks up AFTER truck leaves
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.35) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.2

        let novaX = 140
        let novaY = topY + 45

        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walkPhase = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walkPhase * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walkPhase * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova)

          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 25, novaY - 42, taskId)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT EXPORT
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      // Box on belt EXPORT
      if (progress >= 0.3 && progress < 0.55) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.3) / 0.25
        const t = beltPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, taskId)
      }

      // FLUX: Picks up at belt end
      if (progress >= 0.5 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.5) / 0.25

        let fluxX = beltEndX
        let fluxY = topY + 45

        if (fluxPhase >= 0.3 && fluxPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (fluxPhase - 0.3) / 0.5
          fluxX = beltEndX + walkPhase * 100
          fluxY = topY + 20
        } else if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux)
        }
      }

      // PLANE EXPORT
      if (progress >= 0.7) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.3

        let planeY = topY - 60
        let onGround = true

        if (planePhase >= 0.65) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.65) / 0.35
          planeY = topY - 60 - takeoff * 150
          onGround = false
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // ===== SEPARATOR =====
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2
      ctx.setLineDash([3, 3])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // ===== IMPORT (BOTTOM) - COMPACT SPACING =====
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 65

      ctx.fillStyle = '#4a9eff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, h / 2 + 15)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Returns, lands
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.25

        const returnX = w + 80 - returnPhase * 280
        const returnY = bottomY - 70
        const onGround = returnPhase > 0.8

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, onGround)

        if (returnPhase > 0.1 && returnPhase < 0.7) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 28, taskId)
        }
      }

      // FIX: BELT IMPORT OMGEKEERD (andere richting)
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt IMPORT (REVERSE richting)
      if (progress >= 0.4 && progress < 0.65) {
        const beltReturnPhase = (progress - 0.4) / 0.25
        const t = 1 - beltReturnPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, taskId)
      }

      // CORTEXIA: Picks up from plane, puts on belt
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.4) {
        const cortPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.25

        let cortX = planeX
        let cortY = bottomY - 70

        if (cortPhase < 0.4) {
          cortX = planeX
        } else if (cortPhase < 0.8) {
          const walkPhase = (cortPhase - 0.4) / 0.4
          cortX = planeX - walkPhase * 500
          cortY = bottomY - 70 + walkPhase * 40
        } else {
          cortX = -100
        }

        if (cortX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, cortX, cortY, AGENTS.cortexia)
        }
      }

      // FLUX: Picks up from belt
      if (progress >= 0.6 && progress < 0.8) {
        const fluxReturnPhase = (progress - 0.6) / 0.2

        let fluxRetX = beltStartX - fluxReturnPhase / 0.3 * 70
        let fluxRetY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxReturnPhase > 0.35) {
          fluxRetX = -100
        }

        if (fluxRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxRetX, fluxRetY, AGENTS.flux)
        }
      }

      // NOVA: Walks to truck
      if (progress >= 0.75 && progress < 1) {
        const novaReturnPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25

        let novaRetX = beltStartX
        let novaRetY = bottomY + 45

        if (novaReturnPhase < 0.6) {
          const walkPhase = novaReturnPhase / 0.6
          novaRetX = beltStartX - walkPhase * 185
          novaRetY = bottomY + 45 - walkPhase * 25
        } else if (novaReturnPhase < 0.9) {
          novaRetX = beltStartX - 185
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20
        } else {
          novaRetX = -100
        }

        if (novaRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaRetX, novaRetY, AGENTS.nova)

          if (novaReturnPhase >= 0.6 && novaReturnPhase < 0.9) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaRetX + 25, novaRetY - 42, taskId)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK IMPORT
      if (progress >= 0.85) {
        const truckReturnPhase = (progress - 0.85) / 0.15

        let doorReturnOpen = 0

        if (truckReturnPhase < 0.5) {
          doorReturnOpen = truckReturnPhase / 0.5
        } else if (truckReturnPhase < 0.8) {
          doorReturnOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorReturnOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckReturnPhase - 0.8) / 0.2)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, doorReturnOpen)

        if (truckReturnPhase >= 0.35 && truckReturnPhase < 0.75) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 35, taskId)
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 170, h - 45, 150, 35)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 170, h - 45, 150, 35)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE', w - 160, h - 28)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '7px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% | Queue: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 160, h - 18)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '13px' }}>
          🎬 SUPPLY CHAIN
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '3px 0 6px 0', fontSize: '8px' }}>
          Export (top) & Import (bottom) • 60 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={750}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#00d4ff', darkColor: '#00aacc' },
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && canvasRef.current) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    const getTaskInfo = () => {
      if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
        const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
        return { id, agent: 'FLUX' } // Export: voor FLUX
      }
      return { id: 'T01', agent: 'FLUX' }
    }

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 4, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)

      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    // NIEUWE BOX: Kleur, nummer + agent naam
    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      // Mooie kleur: oranje-rood
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)

      // 3D effect
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y - 22)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 26, y - 18)
      ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 22)
      ctx.lineTo(x - 18, y + 26)
      ctx.stroke()

      // NUMMER
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)

      // AGENT NAAM
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    // NIEUWE BELT: Levendiger
    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55

      // Belt body
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#4CAF50'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Motion effect - größer
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 40
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1B5E20'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 800; offset += 40) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 800) / 800
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Supports
      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1B5E20'
        ctx.lineWidth = 3
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 45)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    // NIEUWE AIRPLANE: Groter, dichterbij
    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y - 10, 100, 20)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 50, y - 10, 100, 20)

      ctx.fillRect(x - 70, y - 4, 140, 8)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillRect(x - 50, y - 16, 10, 32)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 40 + i * 13, y, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 18, y + 10)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 18, y + 24)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 18, y + 10)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 18, y + 24)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      const cycleTime = 80
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.bg
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(0, theme.colors.bg)
      bgGrad.addColorStop(1, theme.colors.bgSecondary)
      ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const task = getTaskInfo()

      // ===== EXPORT (TOP) =====
      const topY = 65

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT: Truck → Box → Belt → Plane', 20, topY - 45)

      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 900

      // TRUCK EXPORT (0-0.2)
      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0

        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)

        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)

        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agent)
        }
      }

      // NOVA picks up & walks to belt (0.15-0.38)
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23

        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45

        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova)
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agent)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      // Box on belt (0.35-0.58)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agent)
      }

      // FLUX at belt end, waits for plane to take (0.55-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2

        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20

        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux)
          
          // Box in flux hand
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agent)
          }
        }
      }

      // PLANE EXPORT: Comes close, takes box from FLUX, leaves (0.65-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.65) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.65) / 0.35

        let planeY = topY - 50
        let onGround = true

        if (planePhase >= 0.7) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.7) / 0.3
          planeY = topY - 50 - takeoff * 140
          onGround = false
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX - 50 + planePhase * 40, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // ===== SEPARATOR =====
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.border
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2
      ctx.setLineDash([3, 3])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // ===== IMPORT (BOTTOM) =====
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 65

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT: Plane → Box → Belt → Truck', 20, h / 2 + 15)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Lands (0-0.25)
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.25
        const returnX = w + 80 - returnPhase * 280
        const returnY = bottomY - 70
        const onGround = returnPhase > 0.8

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, onGround)

        if (returnPhase > 0.1 && returnPhase < 0.65) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 30, task.id, 'NOVA')
        }
      }

      // CORTEXIA picks up from plane, walks to belt (0.18-0.42)
      if (progress >= 0.18 && progress < 0.42) {
        const cortPhase = (progress - 0.18) / 0.24

        let cortX = planeX - 50
        let cortY = bottomY - 70

        if (cortPhase < 0.3) {
          cortX = planeX - 50
          cortY = bottomY - 70
        } else if (cortPhase < 0.8) {
          const walk = (cortPhase - 0.3) / 0.5
          cortX = planeX - 50 - walk * 420
          cortY = bottomY - 70 + walk * 45
        } else {
          cortX = -100
        }

        if (cortX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, cortX, cortY, AGENTS.cortexia)
          
          if (cortPhase >= 0.3 && cortPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, cortX + 27, cortY - 44, task.id, 'NOVA')
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT (reverse)
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt IMPORT (0.38-0.62)
      if (progress >= 0.38 && progress < 0.62) {
        const beltRetPhase = (progress - 0.38) / 0.24
        const t = 1 - beltRetPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, 'NOVA')
      }

      // FLUX at belt end, waits (0.58-0.78)
      if (progress >= 0.58 && progress < 0.78) {
        const fluxRetPhase = (progress - 0.58) / 0.2

        let fluxRetX = beltStartX - 50
        let fluxRetY = bottomY + 20

        if (fluxRetPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxRetX = -100
        }

        if (fluxRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxRetX, fluxRetY, AGENTS.flux)
          
          if (fluxRetPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxRetX + 28, fluxRetY - 45, task.id, 'NOVA')
          }
        }
      }

      // NOVA walks to truck (0.75-0.95)
      if (progress >= 0.75 && progress < 0.95) {
        const novaRetPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.2

        let novaRetX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaRetY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaRetPhase < 0.6) {
          const walk = novaRetPhase / 0.6
          novaRetX = beltStartX - 50 - walk * 180
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20 - walk * 30
        } else if (novaRetPhase < 0.95) {
          novaRetX = beltStartX - 230
          novaRetY = bottomY - 10
        } else {
          novaRetX = -100
        }

        if (novaRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaRetX, novaRetY, AGENTS.nova)
          
          if (novaRetPhase < 0.95) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaRetX + 27, novaRetY - 44, task.id, 'NOVA')
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK IMPORT: Arrives AFTER nova is ready (0.8-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.8) {
        const truckRetPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2

        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveIn = 0

        if (truckRetPhase < 0.05) {
          truckMoveIn = 1 - truckRetPhase / 0.05
        }

        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.1 && truckRetPhase < 0.5) {
          doorOpen = (truckRetPhase - 0.1) / 0.4
        } else if (truckRetPhase >= 0.5 && truckRetPhase < 0.8) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else if (truckRetPhase >= 0.8) {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckRetPhase - 0.8) / 0.2)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX + truckMoveIn * 80, bottomY, doorOpen)

        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.3 && truckRetPhase < 0.75) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 40, task.id, 'NOVA')
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = `${theme.colors.secondary}44`
      ctx.fillRect(w - 170, h - 45, 150, 35)
      ctx.strokeStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.2
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 170, h - 45, 150, 35)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.secondary
      ctx.font = 'bold 8px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ CYCLE', w - 160, h - 28)

      ctx.fillStyle = theme.colors.text
      ctx.font = '7px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% | Queue: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 160, h - 18)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: theme.colors.bgSecondary,
        borderBottom: `2px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: theme.colors.secondary, margin: 0, fontSize: '13px' }}>
          🎬 SUPPLY CHAIN
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: theme.colors.textMuted, margin: '3px 0 6px 0', fontSize: '8px' }}>
          Complete bidirectional flow • 80 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: theme.colors.bg,
            border: `1px solid ${theme.colors.border}`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: theme.colors.text,
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={750}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

const AGENTS = {
  nova: { name: 'NOVA', color: '#00ff88', darkColor: '#00cc66' },
  flux: { name: 'FLUX', color: '#ffd700', darkColor: '#ccaa00' },
  cortexia: { name: 'CORTEXIA', color: '#ff6b9d', darkColor: '#cc5588' }, // Fixed: consistent color
}

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && canvasRef.current) {
      startAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const startAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current

    const getTaskInfo = () => {
      if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
        const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
        return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
      }
      return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }

    // Warehouse background with industrial feel
    const drawWarehouseBackground = (ctx, y, height) => {
      // Main color
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2a2a2a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, y, w, height)

      // Grid pattern (industrial)
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      for (let i = 0; i < w; i += 100) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(i, y)
        ctx.lineTo(i, y + height)
        ctx.stroke()
      }

      // Shadow effect
      const shadowGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, y, 0, y + height)
      shadowGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)')
      shadowGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)')
      ctx.fillStyle = shadowGrad
      ctx.fillRect(0, y, w, height)
    }

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, agentData) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = agentData.darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)

      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.fillStyle = agentData.color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(agentData.name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)

      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y - 22)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 26, y - 18)
      ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 22)
      ctx.lineTo(x - 18, y + 26)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)

      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    // IMPROVED BELT - Industrial look
    const drawConveyorBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55

      // Metal frame
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.lineJoin = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Belt surface (rubber)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Motion dots
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Heavy supports
      for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
        const t = i / 5
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#212121'
        ctx.lineWidth = 4
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x, y)
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + 55)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    // BIGGER AIRPLANE
    const drawAirplane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)

      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }

      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016

      const cycleTime = 80
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      // Dark warehouse background
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const task = getTaskInfo()

      // ===== EXPORT (TOP) =====
      const topY = 65
      drawWarehouseBackground(ctx, 0, h / 2)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 45)

      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 900

      // TRUCK EXPORT (0-0.2)
      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0

        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)

        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)

        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      // NOVA picks up & walks to belt (0.15-0.38)
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23

        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45

        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, AGENTS.nova)
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      // Box on belt (0.35-0.58)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      // FLUX at belt end, waits for plane (0.55-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2

        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20

        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux)

          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      // PLANE EXPORT: Comes, takes box, leaves (0.65-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.65) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.65) / 0.35

        let planeY = topY - 60
        let onGround = true

        // Plane approaches
        const planeX_pos = planeX - 100 + planePhase * 60

        if (planePhase >= 0.7) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.7) / 0.3
          planeY = topY - 60 - takeoff * 180
          onGround = false
        }

        drawAirplane(ctx, planeX_pos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // ===== SEPARATOR =====
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#444'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(0, h / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(w, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])

      // ===== IMPORT (BOTTOM) =====
      const bottomY = h / 2 + 65
      drawWarehouseBackground(ctx, h / 2, h / 2)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, h / 2 + 15)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Arrives, lands, WAITS (0-0.35)
      if (progress < 0.35) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.35
        const returnX = w + 100 - returnPhase * 350
        const returnY = bottomY - 70
        const onGround = returnPhase > 0.75

        drawAirplane(ctx, returnX, returnY, onGround)

        if (returnPhase > 0.1 && returnPhase < 0.9) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // FLUX (NOT CORTEXIA!) picks up from plane, walks to belt (0.28-0.5)
      if (progress >= 0.28 && progress < 0.5) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.28) / 0.22

        let fluxX = w + 100 - 0.3 * 350
        let fluxY = bottomY - 70

        if (fluxPhase < 0.25) {
          fluxX = w + 100 - 0.3 * 350
          fluxY = bottomY - 70
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.25) / 0.55
          fluxX = (w + 100 - 0.3 * 350) - walk * 450
          fluxY = bottomY - 70 + walk * 45
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, AGENTS.flux) // SAME AGENT - SAME COLOR

          if (fluxPhase >= 0.25 && fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT (reverse)
      drawConveyorBelt(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt IMPORT (0.45-0.68)
      if (progress >= 0.45 && progress < 0.68) {
        const beltRetPhase = (progress - 0.45) / 0.23
        const t = 1 - beltRetPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      // NOVA at belt end, waits, walks to truck (0.65-0.95)
      if (progress >= 0.65 && progress < 0.95) {
        const novaRetPhase = (progress - 0.65) / 0.3

        let novaRetX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaRetY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaRetPhase < 0.5) {
          novaRetX = beltStartX - 50
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20
        } else if (novaRetPhase < 0.9) {
          const walk = (novaRetPhase - 0.5) / 0.4
          novaRetX = beltStartX - 50 - walk * 180
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20 - walk * 30
        } else {
          novaRetX = -100
        }

        if (novaRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaRetX, novaRetY, AGENTS.nova)

          if (novaRetPhase < 0.9) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaRetX + 27, novaRetY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK IMPORT: Arrives AFTER nova (0.8-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.8) {
        const truckRetPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2

        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveIn = 0

        if (truckRetPhase < 0.05) {
          truckMoveIn = 1 - truckRetPhase / 0.05
        }

        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.1 && truckRetPhase < 0.5) {
          doorOpen = (truckRetPhase - 0.1) / 0.4
        } else if (truckRetPhase >= 0.5 && truckRetPhase < 0.8) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else if (truckRetPhase >= 0.8) {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckRetPhase - 0.8) / 0.2)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX + truckMoveIn * 80, bottomY, doorOpen)

        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.3 && truckRetPhase < 0.75) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 40, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // Stats
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.5)'
      ctx.fillRect(w - 180, h - 50, 160, 40)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5
      ctx.strokeRect(w - 180, h - 50, 160, 40)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.fillText('⏱️ WAREHOUSE CYCLE', w - 170, h - 32)

      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = '8px monospace'
      const percent = Math.round(progress * 100)
      ctx.fillText(`${percent}% | Tasks: ${taskQueue?.queued_tasks.length || 0}`, w - 170, h - 18)

      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE SUPPLY CHAIN
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Industrial logistics • Full cycle visualization • Scrollable
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        width={1400}
        height={800}
        style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import * as THREE from 'three'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef(null)
  const cameraRef = useRef(null)
  const rendererRef = useRef(null)
  const animationRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && containerRef.current) {
      initThreeScene()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const initThreeScene = () => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return

    // Scene
    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x1a1a1a)
    sceneRef.current = scene

    // Camera - overhead view of warehouse
    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
      75,
      container.clientWidth / container.clientHeight,
      0.1,
      1000
    )
    camera.position.set(0, 8, 15)
    camera.lookAt(0, 0, 0)
    cameraRef.current = camera

    // Renderer
    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true })
    renderer.setSize(container.clientWidth, container.clientHeight)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    container.appendChild(renderer.domElement)
    rendererRef.current = renderer

    // Lighting
    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.6)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const directionalLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.8)
    directionalLight.position.set(10, 10, 5)
    directionalLight.castShadow = true
    scene.add(directionalLight)

    // Warehouse floor
    const floorGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(40, 30)
    const floorMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x2a2a2a })
    const floor = new THREE.Mesh(floorGeometry, floorMaterial)
    floor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2
    floor.receiveShadow = true
    scene.add(floor)

    // Grid helper
    const gridHelper = new THREE.GridHelper(40, 20, 0x444444, 0x222222)
    gridHelper.position.y = 0.01
    scene.add(gridHelper)

    // Handle window resize
    const onWindowResize = () => {
      const width = container.clientWidth
      const height = container.clientHeight
      camera.aspect = width / height
      camera.updateProjectionMatrix()
      renderer.setSize(width, height)
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize', onWindowResize)

    // Animation loop
    const animate = () => {
      stateRef.current.time += 0.016

      const progress = (stateRef.current.time / 80) % 1

      // Update objects based on progress (will add in next step)
      renderer.render(scene, camera)
      animationRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', onWindowResize)
      if (animationRef.current) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(animationRef.current)
      }
      renderer.dispose()
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
        zIndex: 10,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 3D WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Full cycle 3D visualization • Scroll to rotate view
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', overflow: 'auto' }} />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
