cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 80) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 65
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 900

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 45)

      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.65) {
        const planePhase = (progress - 0.65) / 0.35
        let planeY = topY - 60
        const planeX_pos = planeX - 100 + planePhase * 60
        let onGround = true
        if (planePhase >= 0.7) {
          const takeoff = (planePhase - 0.7) / 0.3
          planeY = topY - 60 - takeoff * 180
          onGround = false
        }
        drawPlane(ctx, planeX_pos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 80) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 65
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 950  // Lands at right

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 45)

      // PLANE comes from LEFT, vliegt HELEMAAL DOOR tot rechts, landt (0-0.4)
      if (progress < 0.4) {
        const returnPhase = progress / 0.4
        // Starts left (-150), flies to right (planeX)
        const returnX = -150 + returnPhase * (planeX + 150)
        const returnY = bottomY - 70
        const onGround = returnPhase > 0.75

        drawPlane(ctx, returnX, returnY, onGround)

        if (returnPhase > 0.1 && returnPhase < 1) {
          drawBox(ctx, returnX, returnY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // FLUX picks up from landed plane and walks to belt (0.35-0.6)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.6) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.25

        let fluxX = planeX
        let fluxY = bottomY - 70

        if (fluxPhase < 0.3) {
          // At plane
          fluxX = planeX
          fluxY = bottomY - 70
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.9) {
          // Walk to belt
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.3) / 0.6
          fluxX = planeX - walk * 350
          fluxY = bottomY - 70 + walk * 45
        } else {
          // Disappear
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')

          if (fluxPhase >= 0.3 && fluxPhase < 0.9) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT
      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt (0.55-0.78)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.78) {
        const beltRetPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.23
        const t = 1 - beltRetPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      // NOVA at belt end (0.75-0.95)
      if (progress >= 0.75 && progress < 0.95) {
        const novaRetPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.2

        let novaRetX = beltEndX + 50
        let novaRetY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaRetPhase < 0.4) {
          // At belt end
          novaRetX = beltEndX + 50
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20
        } else if (novaRetPhase < 0.9) {
          // Walk to truck
          const walk = (novaRetPhase - 0.4) / 0.5
          novaRetX = beltEndX + 50 - walk * 380
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20 - walk * 30
        } else {
          // Disappear
          novaRetX = -100
        }

        if (novaRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaRetX, novaRetY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')

          if (novaRetPhase < 0.9) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaRetX + 27, novaRetY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK (0.88-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.88) {
        const truckRetPhase = (progress - 0.88) / 0.12

        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveIn = 0

        if (truckRetPhase < 0.05) {
          truckMoveIn = 1 - truckRetPhase / 0.05
        }

        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.1 && truckRetPhase < 0.5) {
          doorOpen = (truckRetPhase - 0.1) / 0.4
        } else if (truckRetPhase >= 0.5 && truckRetPhase < 0.8) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else if (truckRetPhase >= 0.8) {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckRetPhase - 0.8) / 0.2)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX + truckMoveIn * 80, bottomY, doorOpen)

        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.3 && truckRetPhase < 0.75) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 40, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 80 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 80) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

      // TRUCK (0-0.2)
      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      // NOVA (0.15-0.38)
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT
      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      // Box on belt (0.35-0.58)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      // FLUX (0.55-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      // PLANE EXPORT: Already waiting (0-0.75), takes goods (0.65-0.75), leaves RIGHT to LEFT (0.75-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = topY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          // Waiting for goods
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          // Takes off and flies LEFT (right to left)
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300  // Moves left
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          
          if (departPhase > 0.3) {
            planeY = topY - 50 - (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 150
            onGround = false
          }
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 80) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 200

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

      // PLANE arrives from LEFT (0-0.3)
      if (progress < 0.3) {
        const arrivePhase = progress / 0.3
        const planeXPos = -150 + arrivePhase * (planeX + 150)
        const planeY = bottomY - 50
        const onGround = arrivePhase > 0.7

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)

        if (arrivePhase > 0.1 && arrivePhase < 1) {
          drawBox(ctx, planeXPos, planeY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // FLUX picks up from plane and walks to belt (0.25-0.5)
      if (progress >= 0.25 && progress < 0.5) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.25) / 0.25

        let fluxX = planeX
        let fluxY = bottomY - 50

        if (fluxPhase < 0.3) {
          fluxX = planeX
          fluxY = bottomY - 50
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.9) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.3) / 0.6
          fluxX = planeX + walk * 200
          fluxY = bottomY - 50 + walk * 45
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')

          if (fluxPhase >= 0.3 && fluxPhase < 0.9) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT
      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt (0.48-0.7)
      if (progress >= 0.48 && progress < 0.7) {
        const beltRetPhase = (progress - 0.48) / 0.22
        const t = 1 - beltRetPhase

        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55

        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)

        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      // NOVA at belt end (0.68-0.9)
      if (progress >= 0.68 && progress < 0.9) {
        const novaRetPhase = (progress - 0.68) / 0.22

        let novaRetX = beltEndX + 50
        let novaRetY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaRetPhase < 0.4) {
          novaRetX = beltEndX + 50
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20
        } else if (novaRetPhase < 0.9) {
          const walk = (novaRetPhase - 0.4) / 0.5
          novaRetX = beltEndX + 50 - walk * 380
          novaRetY = bottomY + 20 - walk * 30
        } else {
          novaRetX = -100
        }

        if (novaRetX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaRetX, novaRetY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')

          if (novaRetPhase < 0.9) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaRetX + 27, novaRetY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK (0.87-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.87) {
        const truckRetPhase = (progress - 0.87) / 0.13

        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveIn = 0

        if (truckRetPhase < 0.05) {
          truckMoveIn = 1 - truckRetPhase / 0.05
        }

        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.1 && truckRetPhase < 0.5) {
          doorOpen = (truckRetPhase - 0.1) / 0.4
        } else if (truckRetPhase >= 0.5 && truckRetPhase < 0.8) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else if (truckRetPhase >= 0.8) {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckRetPhase - 0.8) / 0.2)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX + truckMoveIn * 80, bottomY, doorOpen)

        if (truckRetPhase >= 0.3 && truckRetPhase < 0.75) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 40, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 80 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

You said: export process is helmaal goed dus klaar.
export process is helmaal goed dus klaar. voor import moet je het zelfde doen maar dan anders om.  dus misschien eerst een copy van het export process bij het import process laten draaien? dan kunnen we verder fine tunen wat eerst komt ect

Perfect idee. Ik kopieer het export process naar import, dan tunen we:

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 80) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = topY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          
          if (departPhase > 0.3) {
            planeY = topY - 50 - (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 150
            onGround = false
          }
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 80) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 120
      const planeX = 800  // VLIEGTUIG START RECHTS (mirror van export)
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const truckX = 60

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

      // PLANE: Starts RIGHT, waits, FLUX picks up, takes off LEFT (0-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          // Waiting (same as export)
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          // Takes off and flies RIGHT to LEFT (opposite of export)
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          
          if (departPhase > 0.3) {
            planeY = bottomY - 50 - (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 150
            onGround = false
          }
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // FLUX walks from plane to belt (mirror: from right to left) (0.15-0.38)
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let fluxX = planeX - 100
        let fluxY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxPhase < 0.25) {
          fluxX = planeX - 100
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          fluxX = (planeX - 100) - walk * 160
          fluxY = bottomY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase >= 0.25 && fluxPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT
      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt (0.35-0.58)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      // NOVA picks up from belt and walks to truck (mirror) (0.55-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let novaX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaPhase >= 0.8) {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 28, novaY - 45, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK receives (0-0.2) - mirrored
      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, bottomY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 40, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 80 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
