bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 80) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = topY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          
          if (departPhase > 0.3) {
            planeY = topY - 50 - (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 150
            onGround = false
          }
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / 80) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Arrives (0-0.25), lands, waits
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const arrivePhase = progress / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + 300 - arrivePhase * 300  // Comes from RIGHT
        const planeY = bottomY - 50
        const onGround = arrivePhase > 0.7

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)

        if (arrivePhase > 0.1) {
          drawBox(ctx, planeXPos, planeY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // PLANE waits at planeX (0.25-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.25 && progress < 0.75) {
        drawPlane(ctx, planeX, bottomY - 50, true)
      }

      // PLANE departs (0.75-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + departPhase * 300  // Flies RIGHT, exits beeld
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let onGround = true

        if (departPhase > 0.3) {
          planeY = bottomY - 50 - (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 150
          onGround = false
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // FLUX picks up from plane and walks to belt (0.15-0.38) - MIRROR
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let fluxX = planeX - 100
        let fluxY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxPhase < 0.25) {
          fluxX = planeX - 100
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          fluxX = (planeX - 100) - walk * 160
          fluxY = bottomY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase >= 0.25 && fluxPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT
      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, bottomY, beltEndX, bottomY - 24)

      // Box on belt (0.35-0.58)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      // NOVA picks up from belt and walks to truck (0.55-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let novaX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaPhase >= 0.8) {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 28, novaY - 45, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK receives (0.8-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.8) {
        const truckPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, bottomY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.86 && progress < 0.94) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 40, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 80 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = topY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          
          if (departPhase > 0.3) {
            planeY = topY - 50 - (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 150
            onGround = false
          }
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY, reverse = false) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      
      const beltShift = reverse ? -(state.time * 140) % 45 : (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Arrives (0-0.25), lands, waits
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const arrivePhase = progress / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + 300 - arrivePhase * 300
        const planeY = bottomY - 50
        const onGround = arrivePhase > 0.7

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)

        if (arrivePhase > 0.1) {
          drawBox(ctx, planeXPos, planeY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // PLANE waits (0.25-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.25 && progress < 0.75) {
        drawPlane(ctx, planeX, bottomY - 50, true)
      }

      // PLANE departs (0.75-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + departPhase * 300
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let onGround = true

        if (departPhase > 0.3) {
          planeY = bottomY - 50 - (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 150
          onGround = false
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // FLUX picks up from plane and walks to belt (0.15-0.38)
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let fluxX = planeX - 100
        let fluxY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxPhase < 0.25) {
          fluxX = planeX - 100
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          fluxX = (planeX - 100) - walk * 160
          fluxY = bottomY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase >= 0.25 && fluxPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT - REVERSE richting
      drawBelt(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, bottomY - 24, true)

      // Box on belt REVERSE (0.35-0.58)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = 1 - beltPhase  // REVERSE
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      // NOVA picks up from belt and walks to truck (0.55-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let novaX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaPhase >= 0.8) {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 28, novaY - 45, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK WACHT AL (0-0.8), ontvangt doos, vertrekt DAARNA (0.8-1.0)
      if (progress < 0.8) {
        // TRUCK is daar en WACHT
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, 0)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.8) {
        const truckPhase = (progress - 0.8) / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, bottomY, doorOpen)
        
        if (truckPhase >= 0.06 && truckPhase < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, bottomY - 40, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 90 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = topY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          // Plane just drives away horizontally (no takeoff)
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          onGround = true  // Always on ground
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY, reverse = false) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      
      const beltShift = reverse ? -(state.time * 140) % 45 : (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Arrives (0-0.25), lands, waits
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const arrivePhase = progress / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + 300 - arrivePhase * 300
        const planeY = bottomY - 50
        const onGround = arrivePhase > 0.7

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)

        if (arrivePhase > 0.1) {
          drawBox(ctx, planeXPos, planeY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // PLANE waits (0.25-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.25 && progress < 0.75) {
        drawPlane(ctx, planeX, bottomY - 50, true)
      }

      // PLANE departs (0.75-1.0) - drives away, no takeoff
      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + departPhase * 300
        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, bottomY - 50, true)
      }

      // FLUX picks up from plane and walks to belt (0.15-0.38)
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let fluxX = planeX - 100
        let fluxY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxPhase < 0.25) {
          fluxX = planeX - 100
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          fluxX = (planeX - 100) - walk * 160
          fluxY = bottomY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase >= 0.25 && fluxPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT - REVERSE richting
      drawBelt(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, bottomY - 24, true)

      // Box on belt REVERSE (0.35-0.58)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = 1 - beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      // NOVA picks up from belt and walks to truck (0.55-0.7)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.7) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.15
        let novaX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaPhase < 0.4) {
          novaX = beltStartX - 50
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.95) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.4) / 0.55
          novaX = (beltStartX - 50) - walk * 180
          novaY = bottomY + 20 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase < 0.95) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK WACHT AL (0-0.7)
      if (progress < 0.7) {
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, 0)
      }

      // TRUCK ontvangt DOOS (0.7-0.85): klep open, doos erin, klep dicht
      if (progress >= 0.7 && progress < 0.85) {
        const receivePhase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.15

        let doorOpen = 0
        if (receivePhase < 0.3) {
          // Open door
          doorOpen = receivePhase / 0.3
        } else if (receivePhase < 0.7) {
          // Door open, doos erin
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          // Close door
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (receivePhase - 0.7) / 0.3)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, doorOpen)

        // Show box going into truck (0.5-0.7 of receive phase)
        if (receivePhase >= 0.3 && receivePhase < 0.7) {
          const boxProgress = (receivePhase - 0.3) / 0.4
          const boxX = truckX + 25 - boxProgress * 25
          const boxY = bottomY - 40 - boxProgress * 30
          drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // TRUCK vertrekt (0.85-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.85) {
        const truckPhase = (progress - 0.85) / 0.15
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        
        if (truckPhase > 0.1) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.1) / 0.9 * 80
        
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut, bottomY, 0)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 90 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
