cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      // PLANE EXPORT: Waiting (0-0.75), takes off & flies away (0.75-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = topY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          // Waiting
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          // Takes off and flies away
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          
          if (departPhase > 0.3) {
            const takeoff = (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7
            planeY = topY - 50 - takeoff * 150
            onGround = false
          }
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY, reverse = false) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      
      const beltShift = reverse ? -(state.time * 140) % 45 : (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

      // PLANE IMPORT: Arrives (0-0.25), lands, waits (0.25-0.75), takes off (0.75-1.0)
      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const arrivePhase = progress / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + 300 - arrivePhase * 300
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let onGround = arrivePhase > 0.7

        // Descend while arriving
        if (arrivePhase < 0.7) {
          const descent = arrivePhase / 0.7
          planeY = bottomY - 50 - (1 - descent) * 150
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)

        if (arrivePhase > 0.1) {
          drawBox(ctx, planeXPos, planeY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // PLANE waits (0.25-0.75)
      if (progress >= 0.25 && progress < 0.75) {
        drawPlane(ctx, planeX, bottomY - 50, true)
      }

      // PLANE takes off & departs (0.75-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + departPhase * 300
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let onGround = true

        if (departPhase > 0.3) {
          const takeoff = (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7
          planeY = bottomY - 50 - takeoff * 150
          onGround = false
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      // FLUX picks up from plane and walks to belt (0.15-0.38)
      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let fluxX = planeX - 100
        let fluxY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxPhase < 0.25) {
          fluxX = planeX - 100
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          fluxX = (planeX - 100) - walk * 160
          fluxY = bottomY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase >= 0.25 && fluxPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // BELT IMPORT - REVERSE richting
      drawBelt(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, bottomY - 24, true)

      // Box on belt REVERSE (0.35-0.58)
      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = 1 - beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      // NOVA picks up from belt and walks to truck (0.55-0.7)
      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.7) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.15
        let novaX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaPhase < 0.4) {
          novaX = beltStartX - 50
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.95) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.4) / 0.55
          novaX = (beltStartX - 50) - walk * 180
          novaY = bottomY + 20 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase < 0.95) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      // TRUCK WACHT AL (0-0.7)
      if (progress < 0.7) {
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, 0)
      }

      // TRUCK ontvangt DOOS (0.7-0.85): klep open, doos erin, klep dicht
      if (progress >= 0.7 && progress < 0.85) {
        const receivePhase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.15

        let doorOpen = 0
        if (receivePhase < 0.3) {
          doorOpen = receivePhase / 0.3
        } else if (receivePhase < 0.7) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (receivePhase - 0.7) / 0.3)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, doorOpen)

        if (receivePhase >= 0.3 && receivePhase < 0.7) {
          const boxProgress = (receivePhase - 0.3) / 0.4
          const boxX = truckX + 25 - boxProgress * 25
          const boxY = bottomY - 40 - boxProgress * 30
          drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      // TRUCK vertrekt (0.85-1.0)
      if (progress >= 0.85) {
        const truckPhase = (progress - 0.85) / 0.15
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        
        if (truckPhase > 0.1) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.1) / 0.9 * 80
        
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut, bottomY, 0)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 90 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

✅ 3D WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS - FULL CYCLE
Perfect! Ik maak dit in 3D met Three.js - beide cycles zichtbaar:

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import * as THREE from 'three'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef(null)
  const rendererRef = useRef(null)
  const cameraRef = useRef(null)
  const objectsRef = useRef({ export: {}, import: {} })
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && containerRef.current) {
      initThreeScene()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const initThreeScene = () => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return

    // Scene
    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x1a1a1a)
    scene.fog = new THREE.Fog(0x1a1a1a, 100, 200)
    sceneRef.current = scene

    // Camera - overhead isometric view
    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
      50,
      container.clientWidth / container.clientHeight,
      0.1,
      1000
    )
    camera.position.set(15, 15, 20)
    camera.lookAt(0, 0, 0)
    cameraRef.current = camera

    // Renderer
    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true })
    renderer.setSize(container.clientWidth, container.clientHeight)
    renderer.shadowMap.enabled = true
    renderer.shadowMap.type = THREE.PCFShadowShadowMap
    container.appendChild(renderer.domElement)
    rendererRef.current = renderer

    // Lighting
    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.6)
    scene.add(ambientLight)

    const directionalLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.8)
    directionalLight.position.set(20, 30, 20)
    directionalLight.castShadow = true
    directionalLight.shadow.mapSize.width = 2048
    directionalLight.shadow.mapSize.height = 2048
    directionalLight.shadow.camera.far = 150
    directionalLight.shadow.camera.left = -50
    directionalLight.shadow.camera.right = 50
    directionalLight.shadow.camera.top = 50
    directionalLight.shadow.camera.bottom = -50
    scene.add(directionalLight)

    // Warehouse floor
    const floorGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(60, 40)
    const floorMaterial = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color: 0x2a2a2a })
    const floor = new THREE.Mesh(floorGeometry, floorMaterial)
    floor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2
    floor.receiveShadow = true
    scene.add(floor)

    // Grid
    const gridHelper = new THREE.GridHelper(60, 30, 0x444444, 0x222222)
    gridHelper.position.y = 0.01
    scene.add(gridHelper)

    // Create objects
    createWarehouseObjects(scene)

    // Handle resize
    const onWindowResize = () => {
      const width = container.clientWidth
      const height = container.clientHeight
      camera.aspect = width / height
      camera.updateProjectionMatrix()
      renderer.setSize(width, height)
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize', onWindowResize)

    // Animation loop
    const animate = () => {
      stateRef.current.time += 0.016
      const progress = (stateRef.current.time / 90) % 1

      updateAnimation(progress)

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', onWindowResize)
      renderer.dispose()
    }
  }

  const createWarehouseObjects = (scene) => {
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    // EXPORT SIDE
    // Truck
    const truckGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(3, 2, 4)
    const truckMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0x2196F3 })
    const truck = new THREE.Mesh(truckGeo, truckMat)
    truck.position.set(-15, 1, -8)
    truck.castShadow = true
    truck.receiveShadow = true
    truck.userData.type = 'truck'
    truck.userData.side = 'export'
    scene.add(truck)
    objectsRef.current.export.truck = truck

    // Belt
    const beltGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(15, 0.5, 2)
    const beltMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0x558B2F })
    const belt = new THREE.Mesh(beltGeo, beltMat)
    belt.position.set(0, 0.5, -8)
    belt.castShadow = true
    belt.receiveShadow = true
    scene.add(belt)
    objectsRef.current.export.belt = belt

    // Plane
    const planeGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(6, 2, 10)
    const planeMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0xFF6F00 })
    const plane = new THREE.Mesh(planeGeo, planeMat)
    plane.position.set(15, 3, -8)
    plane.castShadow = true
    plane.receiveShadow = true
    plane.userData.type = 'plane'
    plane.userData.side = 'export'
    scene.add(plane)
    objectsRef.current.export.plane = plane

    // IMPORT SIDE (mirrored on Z)
    // Truck Import
    const truckImportGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(3, 2, 4)
    const truckImportMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0x2196F3 })
    const truckImport = new THREE.Mesh(truckImportGeo, truckImportMat)
    truckImport.position.set(-15, 1, 8)
    truckImport.castShadow = true
    truckImport.receiveShadow = true
    truckImport.userData.type = 'truck'
    truckImport.userData.side = 'import'
    scene.add(truckImport)
    objectsRef.current.import.truck = truckImport

    // Belt Import
    const beltImportGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(15, 0.5, 2)
    const beltImportMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0x558B2F })
    const beltImport = new THREE.Mesh(beltImportGeo, beltImportMat)
    beltImport.position.set(0, 0.5, 8)
    beltImport.castShadow = true
    beltImport.receiveShadow = true
    scene.add(beltImport)
    objectsRef.current.import.belt = beltImport

    // Plane Import
    const planeImportGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(6, 2, 10)
    const planeImportMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0xFF6F00 })
    const planeImport = new THREE.Mesh(planeImportGeo, planeImportMat)
    planeImport.position.set(15, 3, 8)
    planeImport.castShadow = true
    planeImport.receiveShadow = true
    planeImport.userData.type = 'plane'
    planeImport.userData.side = 'import'
    scene.add(planeImport)
    objectsRef.current.import.plane = planeImport

    // Agents
    createAgent(scene, 'export', task.agentExport, '#ffd700')
    createAgent(scene, 'import', task.agentImport, '#00ff88')

    // Boxes
    const boxGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1, 1, 1)
    const boxMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0xff5722 })
    
    const boxExport = new THREE.Mesh(boxGeo, boxMat)
    boxExport.castShadow = true
    boxExport.userData.type = 'box'
    boxExport.userData.side = 'export'
    scene.add(boxExport)
    objectsRef.current.export.box = boxExport

    const boxImport = new THREE.Mesh(boxGeo, boxMat)
    boxImport.castShadow = true
    boxImport.userData.type = 'box'
    boxImport.userData.side = 'import'
    scene.add(boxImport)
    objectsRef.current.import.box = boxImport
  }

  const createAgent = (scene, side, name, color) => {
    const group = new THREE.Group()
    group.userData.type = 'agent'
    group.userData.side = side
    group.userData.name = name

    // Body
    const bodyGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8, 1.6, 0.6)
    const bodyMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color })
    const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeo, bodyMat)
    body.position.y = 0.8
    body.castShadow = true
    group.add(body)

    // Head
    const headGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.4, 8, 8)
    const headMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color })
    const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeo, headMat)
    head.position.y = 2.2
    head.castShadow = true
    group.add(head)

    scene.add(group)
    objectsRef.current[side].agent = group
  }

  const updateAnimation = (progress) => {
    const scene = sceneRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    // EXPORT animation
    updateExportAnimation(progress, task)
    // IMPORT animation
    updateImportAnimation(progress, task)
  }

  const updateExportAnimation = (progress, task) => {
    const objs = objectsRef.current.export

    // Truck leaves (0-0.2)
    if (progress < 0.2) {
      const phase = progress / 0.2
      objs.truck.position.x = -15 - phase * 5
    }

    // Agent moves (0.15-0.38)
    if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
      if (objs.agent) {
        objs.agent.position.x = -10 - phase * 8
        objs.agent.position.z = -8
      }
    }

    // Box on belt (0.35-0.58)
    if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
      objs.box.position.copy(objs.belt.position)
      objs.box.position.x = -7.5 + phase * 15
      objs.box.position.y = 1.5
      objs.box.visible = true
    } else {
      objs.box.visible = false
    }

    // Plane takes off (0.75-1.0)
    if (progress >= 0.75) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
      objs.plane.position.x = 15 - phase * 20
      if (phase > 0.3) {
        objs.plane.position.y = 3 + (phase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 8
      }
    }
  }

  const updateImportAnimation = (progress, task) => {
    const objs = objectsRef.current.import

    // Plane arrives (0-0.25)
    if (progress < 0.25) {
      const phase = progress / 0.25
      objs.plane.position.x = 35 - phase * 20
      if (phase < 0.7) {
        objs.plane.position.y = 3 + (1 - phase / 0.7) * 8
      }
    }

    // Agent moves (0.15-0.38)
    if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
      if (objs.agent) {
        objs.agent.position.x = 10 - phase * 18
        objs.agent.position.z = 8
      }
    }

    // Box on belt (0.35-0.58)
    if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
      objs.box.position.copy(objs.belt.position)
      objs.box.position.x = 7.5 - phase * 15
      objs.box.position.y = 1.5
      objs.box.visible = true
    } else {
      objs.box.visible = false
    }

    // Truck receives (0.7-0.85)
    if (progress >= 0.7 && progress < 0.85) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.15
      if (objs.agent) {
        objs.agent.position.x = -8 - phase * 2
      }
    }

    // Truck leaves (0.85-1.0)
    if (progress >= 0.85) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.85) / 0.15
      objs.truck.position.x = -15 - phase * 5
    }

    // Plane departs (0.75-1.0)
    if (progress >= 0.75) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
      objs.plane.position.x = 15 + phase * 20
      if (phase > 0.3) {
        objs.plane.position.y = 3 + (phase - 0.3) / 0.7 * 8
      }
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 3D WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Full cycle visualization • Export & Import • 90 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%' }} />
    </div>
  )
}

Je hebt gelijk, sorry. Laat me teruggaan naar de 2D versie die perfect werkt. Die gaan we houden:

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = topY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          
          if (departPhase > 0.3) {
            const takeoff = (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7
            planeY = topY - 50 - takeoff * 150
            onGround = false
          }
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 35, 12, 5, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 10, y - 24, 20, 38)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 31, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 32, 1, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY, reverse = false) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      
      const beltShift = reverse ? -(state.time * 140) % 45 : (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const arrivePhase = progress / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + 300 - arrivePhase * 300
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let onGround = arrivePhase > 0.7

        if (arrivePhase < 0.7) {
          const descent = arrivePhase / 0.7
          planeY = bottomY - 50 - (1 - descent) * 150
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)

        if (arrivePhase > 0.1) {
          drawBox(ctx, planeXPos, planeY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.25 && progress < 0.75) {
        drawPlane(ctx, planeX, bottomY - 50, true)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + departPhase * 300
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let onGround = true

        if (departPhase > 0.3) {
          const takeoff = (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7
          planeY = bottomY - 50 - takeoff * 150
          onGround = false
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let fluxX = planeX - 100
        let fluxY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxPhase < 0.25) {
          fluxX = planeX - 100
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          fluxX = (planeX - 100) - walk * 160
          fluxY = bottomY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase >= 0.25 && fluxPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, bottomY - 24, true)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = 1 - beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.7) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.15
        let novaX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaPhase < 0.4) {
          novaX = beltStartX - 50
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.95) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.4) / 0.55
          novaX = (beltStartX - 50) - walk * 180
          novaY = bottomY + 20 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase < 0.95) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress < 0.7) {
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, 0)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.7 && progress < 0.85) {
        const receivePhase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.15

        let doorOpen = 0
        if (receivePhase < 0.3) {
          doorOpen = receivePhase / 0.3
        } else if (receivePhase < 0.7) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (receivePhase - 0.7) / 0.3)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, doorOpen)

        if (receivePhase >= 0.3 && receivePhase < 0.7) {
          const boxProgress = (receivePhase - 0.3) / 0.4
          const boxX = truckX + 25 - boxProgress * 25
          const boxY = bottomY - 40 - boxProgress * 30
          drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.85) {
        const truckPhase = (progress - 0.85) / 0.15
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        
        if (truckPhase > 0.1) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.1) / 0.9 * 80
        
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut, bottomY, 0)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 90 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

Goed idee! Ik maak 2D canvas basis + 3D vliegtuigen en agents erboven:

bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import * as THREE from 'three'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef(null)
  const rendererRef = useRef(null)
  const cameraRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue && containerRef.current) {
      initHybridScene()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const initHybridScene = () => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return

    // Canvas 2D
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas')
    canvas.width = container.clientWidth
    canvas.height = container.clientHeight
    container.appendChild(canvas)
    canvasRef.current = canvas

    // THREE.js scene overlaid
    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    scene.background = null
    sceneRef.current = scene

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
      75,
      container.clientWidth / container.clientHeight,
      0.1,
      1000
    )
    camera.position.z = 15
    cameraRef.current = camera

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
    renderer.setSize(container.clientWidth, container.clientHeight)
    renderer.setClearColor(0x000000, 0)
    container.appendChild(renderer.domElement)
    rendererRef.current = renderer

    // Lighting for 3D
    const light = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 1)
    light.position.set(5, 10, 5)
    scene.add(light)
    scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.5))

    // Create 3D elements
    create3DElements(scene, canvas)

    // Handle resize
    const onWindowResize = () => {
      const width = container.clientWidth
      const height = container.clientHeight
      camera.aspect = width / height
      camera.updateProjectionMatrix()
      renderer.setSize(width, height)
      canvas.width = width
      canvas.height = height
    }
    window.addEventListener('resize', onWindowResize)

    // Animation loop
    const animate = () => {
      stateRef.current.time += 0.016
      const progress = (stateRef.current.time / 90) % 1

      // Draw 2D on canvas
      draw2D(canvas, progress)

      // Update 3D
      update3D(scene, progress, canvas)

      renderer.render(scene, camera)
      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const create3DElements = (scene, canvas) => {
    // Create planes
    const planeGeo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(4, 1.5, 6)
    const planeMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0xFF6F00 })
    
    const planeExport = new THREE.Mesh(planeGeo, planeMat)
    planeExport.userData.side = 'export'
    planeExport.castShadow = true
    scene.add(planeExport)

    const planeImport = new THREE.Mesh(planeGeo, planeMat)
    planeImport.userData.side = 'import'
    planeImport.castShadow = true
    scene.add(planeImport)

    // Create agents (simplified 3D models)
    createAgent3D(scene, 'export', 'FLUX', 0xffd700)
    createAgent3D(scene, 'export', 'NOVA', 0x00ff88)
    createAgent3D(scene, 'import', 'FLUX', 0xffd700)
    createAgent3D(scene, 'import', 'NOVA', 0x00ff88)
  }

  const createAgent3D = (scene, side, name, color) => {
    const group = new THREE.Group()
    group.userData.type = 'agent'
    group.userData.side = side
    group.userData.name = name

    // Body
    const bodyGeo = new THREE.CapsuleGeometry(0.3, 1.2, 4, 8)
    const bodyMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color })
    const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeo, bodyMat)
    body.castShadow = true
    group.add(body)

    // Head
    const headGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.25, 8, 8)
    const headMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color })
    const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeo, headMat)
    head.position.y = 0.8
    head.castShadow = true
    group.add(head)

    // Left arm
    const armGeo = new THREE.CapsuleGeometry(0.1, 0.8, 4, 8)
    const armMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0xffdbac })
    const leftArm = new THREE.Mesh(armGeo, armMat)
    leftArm.position.set(-0.5, 0.4, 0)
    leftArm.rotation.z = 0.3
    leftArm.castShadow = true
    group.add(leftArm)

    // Right arm
    const rightArm = new THREE.Mesh(armGeo, armMat)
    rightArm.position.set(0.5, 0.4, 0)
    rightArm.rotation.z = -0.3
    rightArm.castShadow = true
    group.add(rightArm)

    scene.add(group)
    if (!scene.userData.agents) scene.userData.agents = {}
    if (!scene.userData.agents[side]) scene.userData.agents[side] = {}
    scene.userData.agents[side][name] = group
  }

  const draw2D = (canvas, progress) => {
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const task = getTaskInfo()

    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

    const topY = 120
    const bottomY = h / 2 + 120
    const truckX = 60
    const beltStartX = 300
    const beltEndX = 640

    // Title
    ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
    ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
    ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

    ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
    ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

    // Draw trucks, belts, boxes like before (simplified)
    drawTruck2D(ctx, truckX, topY, progress < 0.2 ? 1 - progress / 0.2 : 0)
    drawBelt2D(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX)
    
    if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
      drawBox2D(ctx, beltStartX + phase * (beltEndX - beltStartX), topY, task.id, task.agentExport)
    }

    drawTruck2D(ctx, truckX, bottomY, progress >= 0.85 ? (progress - 0.85) / 0.15 : 0)
    drawBelt2D(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, true)
    
    if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
      const phase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
      drawBox2D(ctx, beltEndX - phase * (beltEndX - beltStartX), bottomY, task.id, task.agentImport)
    }
  }

  const drawTruck2D = (ctx, x, y, alpha) => {
    ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
    ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
    ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
  }

  const drawBelt2D = (ctx, startX, y, endX, reverse) => {
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
    ctx.lineWidth = 8
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(startX, y)
    ctx.lineTo(endX, y)
    ctx.stroke()
  }

  const drawBox2D = (ctx, x, y, num, agent) => {
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
    ctx.fillRect(x - 20, y - 20, 40, 40)
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
    ctx.lineWidth = 2
    ctx.strokeRect(x - 20, y - 20, 40, 40)

    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
    ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
    ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    ctx.fillText(num, x, y)
    ctx.fillText(agent, x, y + 15)
  }

  const update3D = (scene, progress, canvas) => {
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const topY = 120
    const bottomY = h / 2 + 120
    const planeX = 800

    // Update planes
    const planes = scene.children.filter(obj => obj.userData?.type === 'plane')
    
    planes.forEach(plane => {
      if (plane.userData.side === 'export') {
        // Export plane
        if (progress < 0.75) {
          plane.position.x = (planeX / w) * 15 - 7.5
          plane.position.y = 3
          plane.position.z = -2
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          const phase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          plane.position.x = (planeX / w) * 15 - 7.5 - phase * 5
          plane.position.y = 3 + phase * 3
          plane.position.z = -2
        }
      } else if (plane.userData.side === 'import') {
        // Import plane
        if (progress < 0.25) {
          const phase = progress / 0.25
          plane.position.x = 5 - phase * 8
          plane.position.y = 3 - (1 - phase) * 3
          plane.position.z = 2
        } else if (progress < 0.75) {
          plane.position.x = -3
          plane.position.y = 0
          plane.position.z = 2
        } else {
          const phase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          plane.position.x = -3 + phase * 5
          plane.position.y = phase * 3
          plane.position.z = 2
        }
      }
    })

    // Update agents
    if (scene.userData.agents) {
      // Export NOVA
      if (scene.userData.agents.export?.NOVA) {
        const agent = scene.userData.agents.export.NOVA
        if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
          const phase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
          agent.position.x = -5 - phase * 3
          agent.position.y = 0
          agent.position.z = -3
          agent.visible = true
        } else {
          agent.visible = false
        }
      }

      // Export FLUX
      if (scene.userData.agents.export?.FLUX) {
        const agent = scene.userData.agents.export.FLUX
        if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
          agent.position.x = 3
          agent.position.y = 0
          agent.position.z = -3
          agent.visible = true
        } else {
          agent.visible = false
        }
      }

      // Import FLUX
      if (scene.userData.agents.import?.FLUX) {
        const agent = scene.userData.agents.import.FLUX
        if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
          const phase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
          agent.position.x = 5 - phase * 8
          agent.position.y = 0
          agent.position.z = 3
          agent.visible = true
        } else {
          agent.visible = false
        }
      }

      // Import NOVA
      if (scene.userData.agents.import?.NOVA) {
        const agent = scene.userData.agents.import.NOVA
        if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.7) {
          const phase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.15
          agent.position.x = -3 - phase * 3
          agent.position.y = 0
          agent.position.z = 3
          agent.visible = true
        } else {
          agent.visible = false
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
        zIndex: 10,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS - HYBRID 2D/3D
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 90 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%', position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden' }} />
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
