bash
cat > src/components/views/SimulationView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SimulationView({ theme }) {
  const [projects, setProjects] = useState([])
  const [selectedProject, setSelectedProject] = useState(null)
  const [taskQueue, setTaskQueue] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const exportCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const importCanvasRef = useRef(null)
  const stateRef = useRef({ time: 0 })

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchProjects()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (taskQueue) {
      if (exportCanvasRef.current) startExportAnimation()
      if (importCanvasRef.current) startImportAnimation()
    }
  }, [taskQueue])

  const fetchProjects = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/`)
      setProjects(res.data.projects || [])
      if (res.data.projects?.length > 0) {
        setSelectedProject(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
        fetchTaskQueue(res.data.projects[0].project_id)
      }
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const fetchTaskQueue = async (projectId) => {
    try {
      const res = await axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/projects/${projectId}/task-queue`)
      setTaskQueue(res.data)
    } catch (error) {}
  }

  const getTaskInfo = () => {
    if (taskQueue?.queued_tasks?.length > 0) {
      const id = taskQueue.queued_tasks[0].task_id.slice(-3)
      return { id, agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
    }
    return { id: 'T01', agentExport: 'FLUX', agentImport: 'NOVA' }
  }

  const startExportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = exportCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    // IMPROVED AGENT DRAWING - with hands & cyborg details
    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      // Shadow
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 40, 14, 6, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // Body (thick rectangular with details)
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 12, y - 20, 24, 36)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 12, y - 20, 24, 36)

      // Body center line (tech detail)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 20)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 16)
      ctx.stroke()

      // Head (circle)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 27, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()

      // Eyes
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 29, 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 29, 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()

      // LEFT ARM & HAND
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x - 12, y - 10)
      ctx.lineTo(x - 20, y - 5)
      ctx.stroke()
      // Hand (circle)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffdbac'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 20, y - 5, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.stroke()

      // RIGHT ARM & HAND
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x + 12, y - 10)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 20, y - 5)
      ctx.stroke()
      // Hand (circle)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffdbac'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 20, y - 5, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.stroke()

      // Name label
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      const beltShift = (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const topY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF5722'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📤 EXPORT', 20, topY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.2) {
        const truckPhase = progress / 0.2
        let doorOpen = 0
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        if (truckPhase < 0.08) doorOpen = truckPhase / 0.08
        else if (truckPhase < 0.12) doorOpen = 1
        else doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (truckPhase - 0.12) / 0.08)
        if (truckPhase > 0.15) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.15) / 0.05
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut * 80, topY, doorOpen)
        if (progress >= 0.06 && progress < 0.14) {
          drawBox(ctx, truckX + 25, topY - 40, task.id, task.agentExport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let novaX = 140, novaY = topY + 45
        if (novaPhase < 0.25) {
          novaX = 140 - novaPhase / 0.25 * 70
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          novaX = 70 + walk * 160
          novaY = topY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }
        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase >= 0.25 && novaPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltStartX, topY, beltEndX, topY - 24)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = topY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = topY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * topY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (topY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentExport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.75) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.2
        let fluxX = beltEndX + 50
        let fluxY = topY + 20
        if (fluxPhase >= 0.8) {
          fluxX = -100
        }
        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase < 0.8) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 28, fluxY - 45, task.id, task.agentExport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0) {
        let planeY = topY - 50
        let planeXPos = planeX
        let onGround = true

        if (progress < 0.75) {
          planeXPos = planeX
          onGround = true
        } else if (progress < 1.0) {
          const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
          const flyLeft = departPhase * 300
          planeXPos = planeX - flyLeft
          
          if (departPhase > 0.3) {
            const takeoff = (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7
            planeY = topY - 50 - takeoff * 150
            onGround = false
          }
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  const startImportAnimation = () => {
    const canvas = importCanvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    const w = canvas.width
    const h = canvas.height
    const state = stateRef.current
    const task = getTaskInfo()
    const cycleTime = 90

    const drawAgent = (ctx, x, y, color, darkColor, name) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
      ctx.ellipse(x, y + 40, 14, 6, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.fillRect(x - 12, y - 20, 24, 36)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 12, y - 20, 24, 36)
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x, y - 20)
      ctx.lineTo(x, y + 16)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x, y - 27, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#000'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 3, y - 29, 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 3, y - 29, 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x - 12, y - 10)
      ctx.lineTo(x - 20, y - 5)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffdbac'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 20, y - 5, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.lineWidth = 2
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(x + 12, y - 10)
      ctx.lineTo(x + 20, y - 5)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffdbac'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 20, y - 5, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkColor
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = color
      ctx.font = 'bold 9px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(name, x, y - 44)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawBox = (ctx, x, y, boxNum, agentName) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff5722'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#d84315'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 22, y - 22, 44, 44)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      ctx.font = 'bold 13px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.fillText(boxNum, x, y - 5)
      ctx.font = 'bold 11px monospace'
      ctx.fillText(agentName, x, y + 12)
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
    }

    const drawTruck = (ctx, x, y, doorOpen = 0) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#2196F3'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.8
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 38, y - 20, 76, 38)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 38, y - 30, 18, 14)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#90CAF9'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 35, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 27, y - 26, 6, 6)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x - 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(x + 13, y + 18, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.save()
      ctx.translate(x + 38, y + 5)
      ctx.rotate(doorOpen * 0.5)
      ctx.fillStyle = '#0D47A1'
      ctx.fillRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#1565C0'
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.3
      ctx.strokeRect(0, -14, 20, 28)
      ctx.restore()
    }

    const drawBelt = (ctx, startX, startY, endX, endY, reverse = false) => {
      const cp1x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.3
      const cp1y = startY - 55
      const cp2x = startX + (endX - startX) * 0.7
      const cp2y = startY + 55
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#424242'
      ctx.lineWidth = 12
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#558B2F'
      ctx.lineWidth = 8
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(startX, startY)
      ctx.bezierCurveTo(cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y, endX, endY)
      ctx.stroke()
      
      const beltShift = reverse ? -(state.time * 140) % 45 : (state.time * 140) % 45
      ctx.fillStyle = '#33691E'
      for (let offset = 0; offset < 900; offset += 45) {
        const t = ((offset - beltShift) % 900) / 900
        const x = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * endX
        const y = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * startY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * endY
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
    }

    const drawPlane = (ctx, x, y, onGround = true) => {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#FF6F00'
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100'
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5
      ctx.strokeRect(x - 60, y - 12, 120, 24)
      ctx.fillRect(x - 85, y - 5, 170, 10)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillRect(x - 60, y - 20, 12, 40)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff'
      for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(x - 45 + i * 13, y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fill()
      }
      if (onGround) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#333'
        ctx.lineWidth = 2
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x - 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x - 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.moveTo(x + 22, y + 12)
        ctx.lineTo(x + 22, y + 28)
        ctx.stroke()
      }
    }

    const animate = () => {
      state.time += 0.016
      const progress = (state.time / cycleTime) % 1

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a'
      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)

      const bottomY = 120
      const truckX = 60
      const beltStartX = 300
      const beltEndX = 640
      const planeX = 800

      ctx.fillStyle = '#1976D2'
      ctx.font = 'bold 12px monospace'
      ctx.textAlign = 'left'
      ctx.fillText('📥 IMPORT', 20, bottomY - 75)

      if (progress < 0.25) {
        const arrivePhase = progress / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + 300 - arrivePhase * 300
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let onGround = arrivePhase > 0.7

        if (arrivePhase < 0.7) {
          const descent = arrivePhase / 0.7
          planeY = bottomY - 50 - (1 - descent) * 150
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)

        if (arrivePhase > 0.1) {
          drawBox(ctx, planeXPos, planeY - 35, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.25 && progress < 0.75) {
        drawPlane(ctx, planeX, bottomY - 50, true)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.75) {
        const departPhase = (progress - 0.75) / 0.25
        const planeXPos = planeX + departPhase * 300
        let planeY = bottomY - 50
        let onGround = true

        if (departPhase > 0.3) {
          const takeoff = (departPhase - 0.3) / 0.7
          planeY = bottomY - 50 - takeoff * 150
          onGround = false
        }

        drawPlane(ctx, planeXPos, planeY, onGround)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.15 && progress < 0.38) {
        const fluxPhase = (progress - 0.15) / 0.23
        let fluxX = planeX - 100
        let fluxY = bottomY + 45

        if (fluxPhase < 0.25) {
          fluxX = planeX - 100
        } else if (fluxPhase < 0.75) {
          const walk = (fluxPhase - 0.25) / 0.5
          fluxX = (planeX - 100) - walk * 160
          fluxY = bottomY + 45 - walk * 25
        } else {
          fluxX = -100
        }

        if (fluxX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, fluxX, fluxY, '#ffd700', '#ccaa00', 'FLUX')
          if (fluxPhase >= 0.25 && fluxPhase < 0.75) {
            drawBox(ctx, fluxX + 27, fluxY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      drawBelt(ctx, beltEndX, bottomY, beltStartX, bottomY - 24, true)

      if (progress >= 0.35 && progress < 0.58) {
        const beltPhase = (progress - 0.35) / 0.23
        const t = 1 - beltPhase
        const cp1x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.3
        const cp1y = bottomY - 55
        const cp2x = beltStartX + (beltEndX - beltStartX) * 0.7
        const cp2y = bottomY + 55
        const boxX = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * beltStartX + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1x + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2x + t * t * t * beltEndX
        const boxY = Math.pow(1-t, 3) * bottomY + 3 * Math.pow(1-t, 2) * t * cp1y + 3 * (1-t) * t * t * cp2y + t * t * t * (bottomY - 24)
        drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.55 && progress < 0.7) {
        const novaPhase = (progress - 0.55) / 0.15
        let novaX = beltStartX - 50
        let novaY = bottomY + 20

        if (novaPhase < 0.4) {
          novaX = beltStartX - 50
        } else if (novaPhase < 0.95) {
          const walk = (novaPhase - 0.4) / 0.55
          novaX = (beltStartX - 50) - walk * 180
          novaY = bottomY + 20 - walk * 25
        } else {
          novaX = -100
        }

        if (novaX > -50) {
          drawAgent(ctx, novaX, novaY, '#00ff88', '#00cc66', 'NOVA')
          if (novaPhase < 0.95) {
            drawBox(ctx, novaX + 27, novaY - 44, task.id, task.agentImport)
          }
        }
      }

      if (progress < 0.7) {
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, 0)
      }

      if (progress >= 0.7 && progress < 0.85) {
        const receivePhase = (progress - 0.7) / 0.15

        let doorOpen = 0
        if (receivePhase < 0.3) {
          doorOpen = receivePhase / 0.3
        } else if (receivePhase < 0.7) {
          doorOpen = 1
        } else {
          doorOpen = Math.max(0, 1 - (receivePhase - 0.7) / 0.3)
        }

        drawTruck(ctx, truckX, bottomY, doorOpen)

        if (receivePhase >= 0.3 && receivePhase < 0.7) {
          const boxProgress = (receivePhase - 0.3) / 0.4
          const boxX = truckX + 25 - boxProgress * 25
          const boxY = bottomY - 40 - boxProgress * 30
          drawBox(ctx, boxX, boxY, task.id, task.agentImport)
        }
      }

      if (progress >= 0.85) {
        const truckPhase = (progress - 0.85) / 0.15
        let truckMoveOut = 0
        
        if (truckPhase > 0.1) truckMoveOut = (truckPhase - 0.1) / 0.9 * 80
        
        drawTruck(ctx, truckX - truckMoveOut, bottomY, 0)
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(animate)
    }

    animate()
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100vw', height: '100vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      <div style={{
        padding: '10px 16px',
        backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
        borderBottom: `2px solid #FF5722`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{ color: '#FF5722', margin: 0, fontSize: '14px' }}>
          🏭 WAREHOUSE LOGISTICS
        </h1>
        <p style={{ color: '#888', margin: '4px 0 8px 0', fontSize: '9px' }}>
          Export (top) • Import (bottom) • 90 second cycle
        </p>
        <select
          value={selectedProject || ''}
          onChange={(e) => {
            setSelectedProject(e.target.value)
            fetchTaskQueue(e.target.value)
          }}
          style={{
            padding: '5px 8px',
            backgroundColor: '#2a2a2a',
            border: `1px solid #FF5722`,
            borderRadius: '3px',
            color: '#fff',
            fontSize: '9px',
          }}
        >
          {projects.map((p) => (
            <option key={p.project_id} value={p.project_id}>
              {p.name}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={exportCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>

      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', borderTop: '2px solid #444' }}>
        <canvas
          ref={importCanvasRef}
          width={1400}
          height={400}
          style={{ display: 'block', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

BACKEND (Flask/FastAPI)

python
# Endpoints nodig:
GET  /api/scheduler/status              # System overview
GET  /api/scheduler/active-tasks        # Active runtime tasks
GET  /api/scheduler/due-tasks           # Due tasks
GET  /api/scheduler/execution-requests  # Execution queue
GET  /api/scheduler/retries             # Retry state
GET  /api/scheduler/missed              # Missed tasks
GET  /api/scheduler/escalations         # Escalated tasks
GET  /api/scheduler/dispatch-candidates # Dispatch queue
GET  /api/scheduler/control             # Control config (dry-run, api_enabled, etc)
GET  /api/scheduler/logs                # Last 100 lines of scheduler.log
GET  /api/agents/{agent}/journal        # Journal events
Backend responsibility:

Lees ONLY runtime JSON files (niet TASKS.md direct)
Parse scheduler.state.json → last_run_at, mode, etc
Parse alle queue files → count & status
Lees control_config.json → toon API/OpenClaw status
Tail scheduler.log → last 100 entries
Lees JOURNAL/open/*.md → event timeline
FRONTEND (React)
Nieuw component: /frontend-mcc/src/components/views/SchedulerView.jsx

7 Pagina's (tab-based):

Overview - Status cards (Last Run, Mode, API Calls, Tasks, Escalations)
Runtime Pipeline - Flow diagram (Due → Active → Execution → Retry → Escalation → Dispatch)
Active Tasks - Tabel met filters (owner, priority, status)
Execution Requests - Tabel met detail drawer
Escalation Center ⭐ - Missed + Escalated + Retrying tasks (rood gemarkeerd)
Dispatch Control - Read-only status (SAFE MODE / LIVE DISPATCH banner)
Journal Timeline - Agent events chronologisch
🎨 KLEUR SCHEMA
Green  (#4CAF50)  = Healthy / On-time
Yellow (#FFC107)  = Pending / Retrying
Red    (#F44336)  = Missed / Escalated
Gray   (#757575)  = Dry-run / Disabled
🔐 KRITISCHE UX-REGELS
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ 🔒 SAFE MODE ACTIVE                     │
│ API: DISABLED | OpenClaw: DISABLED      │
│ Dispatch: DISABLED | Mode: DRY_RUN      │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
Dit MOET altijd bovenaan zichtbaar zijn.

📌 MIJN BEVINDINGEN
Dit is governance software - niet voor simulatie, voor compliance
Read-only eerst - geen write actions in MVP
Source tracking belangrijk - elke taak moet tonen: waar in TASKS.md, welke runtime status
Cost control centraal - API calls ALTIJD zichtbaar en 0 in dry-run
Agent accountability - timeline per agent van activation → execution → escalation

STAP 1: BACKEND - Scheduler API endpoints

bash
cat > ~/arc_ai_angels/mission_control/mcc-backend/app/routes/scheduler.py << 'EOF'
from flask import Blueprint, jsonify
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

scheduler_bp = Blueprint('scheduler', __name__, url_prefix='/api/scheduler')

RUNTIME_PATH = '/home/prime/arc_ai_angels/runtime/scheduler'
AGENTS_PATH = '/home/prime/arc_ai_angels/agents'

def read_json_safe(filepath):
    """Read JSON file safely"""
    try:
        if os.path.exists(filepath):
            with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
                return json.load(f)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error reading {filepath}: {e}")
    return {}

def read_file_tail(filepath, lines=100):
    """Read last N lines of file"""
    try:
        if os.path.exists(filepath):
            with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
                all_lines = f.readlines()
                return ''.join(all_lines[-lines:])
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error reading {filepath}: {e}")
    return ""

@scheduler_bp.route('/status', methods=['GET'])
def get_status():
    """System status overview"""
    state = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/scheduler.state.json')
    control = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/control/control_config.json')
    due = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/due_tasks.json')
    active = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/active_tasks.json')
    exec_req = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/execution_requests.json')
    missed = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/missed_tasks.json')
    retry = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/retry_state.json')
    escalations = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/escalations.json')

    return jsonify({
        'last_run_at': state.get('last_run_at', 'Never'),
        'task_files_scanned': state.get('task_files_scanned', 0),
        'scheduled_tasks_found': state.get('scheduled_tasks_found', 0),
        'due_tasks_found': len(due) if isinstance(due, list) else 0,
        'active_runtime_tasks': len(active) if isinstance(active, list) else 0,
        'execution_requests': len(exec_req) if isinstance(exec_req, list) else 0,
        'missed_tasks_found': len(missed) if isinstance(missed, list) else 0,
        'retry_items': len(retry) if isinstance(retry, list) else 0,
        'escalations': len(escalations) if isinstance(escalations, list) else 0,
        'api_calls': state.get('api_calls', 0),
        'journal_events_enabled': control.get('journal_events_enabled', True),
        'execution_requests_enabled': control.get('execution_requests_enabled', True),
        'retry_escalation_enabled': control.get('retry_escalation_enabled', True),
        'control_layer_enabled': control.get('control_layer_enabled', True),
        'dispatch_enabled': control.get('dispatch_enabled', False),
        'api_enabled': control.get('api_enabled', False),
        'openclaw_enabled': control.get('openclaw_enabled', False),
        'mode': control.get('mode', 'dry_run')
    })

@scheduler_bp.route('/active-tasks', methods=['GET'])
def get_active_tasks():
    """Active runtime tasks"""
    active = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/active_tasks.json')
    return jsonify(active if isinstance(active, list) else [])

@scheduler_bp.route('/due-tasks', methods=['GET'])
def get_due_tasks():
    """Due tasks"""
    due = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/due_tasks.json')
    return jsonify(due if isinstance(due, list) else [])

@scheduler_bp.route('/execution-requests', methods=['GET'])
def get_execution_requests():
    """Execution requests"""
    req = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/execution_requests.json')
    return jsonify(req if isinstance(req, list) else [])

@scheduler_bp.route('/retries', methods=['GET'])
def get_retries():
    """Retry state"""
    retry = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/retry_state.json')
    return jsonify(retry if isinstance(retry, list) else [])

@scheduler_bp.route('/missed', methods=['GET'])
def get_missed():
    """Missed tasks"""
    missed = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/missed_tasks.json')
    return jsonify(missed if isinstance(missed, list) else [])

@scheduler_bp.route('/escalations', methods=['GET'])
def get_escalations():
    """Escalated tasks"""
    esc = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/escalations.json')
    return jsonify(esc if isinstance(esc, list) else [])

@scheduler_bp.route('/dispatch-candidates', methods=['GET'])
def get_dispatch_candidates():
    """Dispatch candidates"""
    disp = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/dispatch_candidates.json')
    return jsonify(disp if isinstance(disp, list) else [])

@scheduler_bp.route('/control', methods=['GET'])
def get_control():
    """Control configuration"""
    control = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/control/control_config.json')
    return jsonify(control)

@scheduler_bp.route('/logs', methods=['GET'])
def get_logs():
    """Scheduler logs (last 100 lines)"""
    logs = read_file_tail(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/scheduler.log', 100)
    return jsonify({'logs': logs})

@scheduler_bp.route('/agents/<agent>/journal', methods=['GET'])
def get_agent_journal(agent):
    """Agent journal events"""
    journal_path = f'{AGENTS_PATH}/{agent}/JOURNAL/open'
    events = []
    
    if os.path.exists(journal_path):
        for filename in sorted(os.listdir(journal_path)):
            if filename.endswith('.md'):
                filepath = os.path.join(journal_path, filename)
                try:
                    with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
                        content = f.read()
                        events.append({
                            'file': filename,
                            'type': filename.replace('.md', ''),
                            'timestamp': os.path.getmtime(filepath),
                            'content': content[:200]  # First 200 chars
                        })
                except:
                    pass
    
    return jsonify(events)

@scheduler_bp.route('/runtime-pipeline', methods=['GET'])
def get_runtime_pipeline():
    """Pipeline visualization counts"""
    due = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/due_tasks.json')
    active = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/active_tasks.json')
    exec_req = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/execution_requests.json')
    retry = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/retry_state.json')
    esc = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/escalations.json')
    disp = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/dispatch_candidates.json')
    
    return jsonify({
        'due': len(due) if isinstance(due, list) else 0,
        'active': len(active) if isinstance(active, list) else 0,
        'execution_requests': len(exec_req) if isinstance(exec_req, list) else 0,
        'retries': len(retry) if isinstance(retry, list) else 0,
        'escalations': len(esc) if isinstance(esc, list) else 0,
        'dispatch_candidates': len(disp) if isinstance(disp, list) else 0,
    })
EOF

cat > ~/arc_ai_angels/mission_control/frontend-mcc/src/components/views/SchedulerView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SchedulerView({ theme }) {
  const [status, setStatus] = useState(null)
  const [pipeline, setPipeline] = useState(null)
  const [activeTasks, setActiveTasks] = useState([])
  const [escalations, setEscalations] = useState([])
  const [logs, setLogs] = useState('')
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview')
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)

  const fetchAll = async () => {
    try {
      const [statusRes, pipelineRes, tasksRes, escalRes, logsRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/status`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/runtime-pipeline`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/active-tasks`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/escalations`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/logs`)
      ])
      
      setStatus(statusRes.data)
      setPipeline(pipelineRes.data)
      setActiveTasks(tasksRes.data)
      setEscalations(escalRes.data)
      setLogs(logsRes.data.logs)
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching scheduler data:', error)
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchAll()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchAll, 5000) // Refresh every 5s
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const getStatusColor = (value) => {
    if (status?.mode === 'dry_run') return '#757575'
    if (value > 0) return '#F44336'
    return '#4CAF50'
  }

  if (loading) return <div style={{ padding: '20px', color: theme.colors.text }}>Loading...</div>

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a' }}>
      {/* HEADER - COST CONTROL BANNER */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '12px 16px',
        backgroundColor: status?.api_enabled ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50',
        borderBottom: '2px solid #FF5722',
        color: '#fff',
        fontWeight: 'bold',
        fontSize: '12px'
      }}>
        {status?.api_enabled ? '⚠️ LIVE DISPATCH ENABLED' : '🔒 SAFE MODE ACTIVE'} 
        {' • '}
        API: {status?.api_enabled ? 'ENABLED' : 'DISABLED'}
        {' • '}
        OpenClaw: {status?.openclaw_enabled ? 'ENABLED' : 'DISABLED'}
        {' • '}
        Dispatch: {status?.dispatch_enabled ? 'ENABLED' : 'DISABLED'}
        {' • '}
        Mode: {status?.mode?.toUpperCase()}
      </div>

      {/* TABS */}
      <div style={{
        display: 'flex',
        borderBottom: '1px solid #333',
        backgroundColor: '#0d0d0d'
      }}>
        {['overview', 'pipeline', 'active-tasks', 'escalations', 'logs'].map(tab => (
          <button
            key={tab}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)}
            style={{
              padding: '12px 16px',
              backgroundColor: activeTab === tab ? '#FF5722' : 'transparent',
              border: 'none',
              color: '#fff',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontSize: '12px',
              fontWeight: activeTab === tab ? 'bold' : 'normal',
              borderBottom: activeTab === tab ? '3px solid #FF5722' : 'none'
            }}
          >
            {tab.toUpperCase()}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CONTENT */}
      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', padding: '16px' }}>
        {/* OVERVIEW TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'overview' && status && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#FF5722', marginBottom: '16px' }}>🎛️ ARC CONTINUITY CONTROL CENTER</h2>
            
            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '24px' }}>
              <Card title="Last Run" value={new Date(status.last_run_at).toLocaleTimeString()} color="#4CAF50" />
              <Card title="Mode" value={status.mode.toUpperCase()} color={status.mode === 'dry_run' ? '#757575' : '#F44336'} />
              <Card title="API Calls" value={status.api_calls} color={status.api_calls > 0 ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50'} />
              <Card title="Dispatch" value={status.dispatch_enabled ? 'ENABLED' : 'DISABLED'} color={status.dispatch_enabled ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50'} />
            </div>

            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, 1fr)', gap: '12px' }}>
              <Card title="Active Tasks" value={status.active_runtime_tasks} color={getStatusColor(status.active_runtime_tasks)} />
              <Card title="Execution Requests" value={status.execution_requests} color={getStatusColor(status.execution_requests)} />
              <Card title="Missed Tasks" value={status.missed_tasks_found} color={status.missed_tasks_found > 0 ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50'} />
              <Card title="Retries" value={status.retry_items} color={status.retry_items > 0 ? '#FFC107' : '#4CAF50'} />
              <Card title="Escalations" value={status.escalations} color={status.escalations > 0 ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50'} />
              <Card title="Due Tasks" value={status.due_tasks_found} color={status.due_tasks_found > 0 ? '#FFC107' : '#4CAF50'} />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* PIPELINE TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'pipeline' && pipeline && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#FF5722', marginBottom: '24px' }}>📊 RUNTIME PIPELINE</h2>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-around', alignItems: 'center', height: '200px' }}>
              <PipelineNode label="Due" count={pipeline.due} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Active" count={pipeline.active} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Execution" count={pipeline.execution_requests} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Retry" count={pipeline.retries} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Escalation" count={pipeline.escalations} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Dispatch" count={pipeline.dispatch_candidates} />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ACTIVE TASKS TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'active-tasks' && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#FF5722', marginBottom: '16px' }}>⚙️ ACTIVE TASKS</h2>
            <TasksTable tasks={activeTasks} />
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ESCALATIONS TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'escalations' && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#F44336', marginBottom: '16px' }}>🚨 ESCALATION CENTER</h2>
            <TasksTable tasks={escalations} highlight={true} />
          </div>
        )}

        {/* LOGS TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'logs' && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#FF5722', marginBottom: '16px' }}>📋 SCHEDULER LOGS</h2>
            <pre style={{
              backgroundColor: '#0d0d0d',
              color: '#4CAF50',
              padding: '12px',
              borderRadius: '4px',
              overflow: 'auto',
              fontSize: '11px',
              fontFamily: 'monospace',
              maxHeight: '600px'
            }}>
              {logs}
            </pre>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

function Card({ title, value, color }) {
  return (
    <div style={{
      backgroundColor: '#0d0d0d',
      border: `2px solid ${color}`,
      borderRadius: '6px',
      padding: '12px',
      textAlign: 'center'
    }}>
      <div style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: '#888', marginBottom: '6px' }}>{title}</div>
      <div style={{ fontSize: '18px', fontWeight: 'bold', color }}>
        {typeof value === 'number' ? value : value}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

function PipelineNode({ label, count }) {
  return (
    <div style={{
      backgroundColor: count > 0 ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50',
      color: '#fff',
      padding: '12px 16px',
      borderRadius: '6px',
      textAlign: 'center',
      minWidth: '80px'
    }}>
      <div style={{ fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{label}</div>
      <div style={{ fontSize: '18px', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{count}</div>
    </div>
  )
}

function Arrow() {
  return <div style={{ fontSize: '24px', color: '#555', margin: '0 8px' }}>→</div>
}

function TasksTable({ tasks, highlight }) {
  return (
    <table style={{
      width: '100%',
      borderCollapse: 'collapse',
      fontSize: '12px'
    }}>
      <thead>
        <tr style={{ borderBottom: '2px solid #FF5722' }}>
          <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Task ID</th>
          <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Owner</th>
          <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Title</th>
          <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Status</th>
          <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Priority</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        {tasks.map((task, i) => (
          <tr key={i} style={{
            backgroundColor: i % 2 === 0 ? '#0d0d0d' : 'transparent',
            borderBottom: '1px solid #222',
            color: highlight ? '#F44336' : '#ccc'
          }}>
            <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>{task.task_id}</td>
            <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>{task.owner}</td>
            <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>{task.title}</td>
            <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>
              <span style={{
                backgroundColor: task.runtime_status === 'missed' ? '#F44336' : task.runtime_status === 'pending' ? '#FFC107' : '#4CAF50',
                color: '#fff',
                padding: '4px 8px',
                borderRadius: '3px',
                fontSize: '10px'
              }}>
                {task.runtime_status}
              </span>
            </td>
            <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>{task.priority}</td>
          </tr>
        ))}
      </tbody>
    </table>
  )
}
EOF

16:22
Claude responded: Aha!
Aha! Je bent FastAPI aan het gebruiken, niet Flask. register_blueprint werkt niet in FastAPI. We moeten een proper FastAPI router maken:

bash
cat > ~/arc_ai_angels/mission_control/mcc-backend/app/api/scheduler_routes.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/scheduler", tags=["scheduler"])

RUNTIME_PATH = '/home/prime/arc_ai_angels/runtime/scheduler'
AGENTS_PATH = '/home/prime/arc_ai_angels/agents'

def read_json_safe(filepath):
    """Read JSON file safely"""
    try:
        if os.path.exists(filepath):
            with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
                return json.load(f)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error reading {filepath}: {e}")
    return {}

def read_file_tail(filepath, lines=100):
    """Read last N lines of file"""
    try:
        if os.path.exists(filepath):
            with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
                all_lines = f.readlines()
                return ''.join(all_lines[-lines:])
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error reading {filepath}: {e}")
    return ""

@router.get("/status")
async def get_status():
    """System status overview"""
    state = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/scheduler.state.json')
    control = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/control/control_config.json')
    due = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/due_tasks.json')
    active = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/active_tasks.json')
    exec_req = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/execution_requests.json')
    missed = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/missed_tasks.json')
    retry = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/retry_state.json')
    escalations = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/escalations.json')

    return {
        'last_run_at': state.get('last_run_at', 'Never'),
        'task_files_scanned': state.get('task_files_scanned', 0),
        'scheduled_tasks_found': state.get('scheduled_tasks_found', 0),
        'due_tasks_found': len(due) if isinstance(due, list) else 0,
        'active_runtime_tasks': len(active) if isinstance(active, list) else 0,
        'execution_requests': len(exec_req) if isinstance(exec_req, list) else 0,
        'missed_tasks_found': len(missed) if isinstance(missed, list) else 0,
        'retry_items': len(retry) if isinstance(retry, list) else 0,
        'escalations': len(escalations) if isinstance(escalations, list) else 0,
        'api_calls': state.get('api_calls', 0),
        'journal_events_enabled': control.get('journal_events_enabled', True),
        'execution_requests_enabled': control.get('execution_requests_enabled', True),
        'retry_escalation_enabled': control.get('retry_escalation_enabled', True),
        'control_layer_enabled': control.get('control_layer_enabled', True),
        'dispatch_enabled': control.get('dispatch_enabled', False),
        'api_enabled': control.get('api_enabled', False),
        'openclaw_enabled': control.get('openclaw_enabled', False),
        'mode': control.get('mode', 'dry_run')
    }

@router.get("/active-tasks")
async def get_active_tasks():
    """Active runtime tasks"""
    active = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/active_tasks.json')
    return active if isinstance(active, list) else []

@router.get("/due-tasks")
async def get_due_tasks():
    """Due tasks"""
    due = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/due_tasks.json')
    return due if isinstance(due, list) else []

@router.get("/execution-requests")
async def get_execution_requests():
    """Execution requests"""
    req = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/execution_requests.json')
    return req if isinstance(req, list) else []

@router.get("/retries")
async def get_retries():
    """Retry state"""
    retry = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/retry_state.json')
    return retry if isinstance(retry, list) else []

@router.get("/missed")
async def get_missed():
    """Missed tasks"""
    missed = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/missed_tasks.json')
    return missed if isinstance(missed, list) else []

@router.get("/escalations")
async def get_escalations():
    """Escalated tasks"""
    esc = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/escalations.json')
    return esc if isinstance(esc, list) else []

@router.get("/dispatch-candidates")
async def get_dispatch_candidates():
    """Dispatch candidates"""
    disp = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/dispatch_candidates.json')
    return disp if isinstance(disp, list) else []

@router.get("/control")
async def get_control():
    """Control configuration"""
    control = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/control/control_config.json')
    return control

@router.get("/logs")
async def get_logs():
    """Scheduler logs (last 100 lines)"""
    logs = read_file_tail(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/scheduler.log', 100)
    return {'logs': logs}

@router.get("/agents/{agent}/journal")
async def get_agent_journal(agent: str):
    """Agent journal events"""
    journal_path = f'{AGENTS_PATH}/{agent}/JOURNAL/open'
    events = []
    
    if os.path.exists(journal_path):
        for filename in sorted(os.listdir(journal_path)):
            if filename.endswith('.md'):
                filepath = os.path.join(journal_path, filename)
                try:
                    with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
                        content = f.read()
                        events.append({
                            'file': filename,
                            'type': filename.replace('.md', ''),
                            'timestamp': os.path.getmtime(filepath),
                            'content': content[:200]
                        })
                except:
                    pass
    
    return events

@router.get("/runtime-pipeline")
async def get_runtime_pipeline():
    """Pipeline visualization counts"""
    due = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/due_tasks.json')
    active = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/active_tasks.json')
    exec_req = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/execution_requests.json')
    retry = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/retry_state.json')
    esc = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/escalations.json')
    disp = read_json_safe(f'{RUNTIME_PATH}/queue/dispatch_candidates.json')
    
    return {
        'due': len(due) if isinstance(due, list) else 0,
        'active': len(active) if isinstance(active, list) else 0,
        'execution_requests': len(exec_req) if isinstance(exec_req, list) else 0,
        'retries': len(retry) if isinstance(retry, list) else 0,
        'escalations': len(esc) if isinstance(esc, list) else 0,
        'dispatch_candidates': len(disp) if isinstance(disp, list) else 0,
    }
EOF
Nu registreer in main.py:

bash
cat > ~/arc_ai_angels/mission_control/mcc-backend/app/main.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from app.config import settings
from app.db.database import engine, init_db, Base
from app.api.routes import router as routes_router
from app.api.analytics_routes import router as analytics_router
from app.api.journal_routes import router as journal_router
from app.api.cost_routes import router as cost_router
from app.api.projects_routes import router as projects_router
from app.api.scheduler_routes import router as scheduler_router

# Initialize database
Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)
init_db()

@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    print("🚀 MCC Backend Starting...")
    yield
    print("🛑 MCC Backend Shutting down...")

app = FastAPI(
    title="Mission Control Center v3.0",
    description="ARC AI ANGELS - Orchestration & Analytics",
    version="3.0.0",
    lifespan=lifespan
)

# CORS
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

# Routes
app.include_router(routes_router)
app.include_router(analytics_router)
app.include_router(journal_router)
app.include_router(cost_router)
app.include_router(projects_router)
app.include_router(scheduler_router)

@app.get("/")
async def root():
    return {"message": "MCC v3.0 Online", "status": "operational"}

@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "healthy", "version": "3.0.0"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)
EOF

cat > ~/arc_ai_angels/mission_control/frontend-mcc/src/components/views/SchedulerView.jsx << 'EOF'
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'

export default function SchedulerView({ theme }) {
  const [status, setStatus] = useState(null)
  const [pipeline, setPipeline] = useState(null)
  const [activeTasks, setActiveTasks] = useState([])
  const [escalations, setEscalations] = useState([])
  const [missed, setMissed] = useState([])
  const [logs, setLogs] = useState('')
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview')
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [lastUpdate, setLastUpdate] = useState(new Date())

  const fetchAll = async () => {
    try {
      const [statusRes, pipelineRes, tasksRes, escalRes, missedRes, logsRes] = await Promise.all([
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/status`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/runtime-pipeline`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/active-tasks`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/escalations`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/missed`),
        axios.get(`${API_BASE}/api/scheduler/logs`)
      ])
      
      setStatus(statusRes.data)
      setPipeline(pipelineRes.data)
      setActiveTasks(tasksRes.data)
      setEscalations(escalRes.data)
      setMissed(missedRes.data)
      setLogs(logsRes.data.logs)
      setLastUpdate(new Date())
      setLoading(false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching scheduler data:', error)
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchAll()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchAll, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const getStatusColor = (value) => {
    if (status?.mode === 'dry_run') return '#757575'
    if (value > 0) return '#F44336'
    return '#4CAF50'
  }

  if (loading) {
    return <div style={{ padding: '40px', color: theme?.colors?.text || '#fff' }}>⏳ Loading scheduler...</div>
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a', color: '#fff' }}>
      {/* HEADER - COST CONTROL BANNER */}
      <div style={{
        padding: '12px 16px',
        backgroundColor: status?.api_enabled ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50',
        borderBottom: '2px solid #FF5722',
        color: '#fff',
        fontWeight: 'bold',
        fontSize: '12px',
        display: 'flex',
        justifyContent: 'space-between',
        alignItems: 'center'
      }}>
        <div>
          {status?.api_enabled ? '⚠️ LIVE DISPATCH ENABLED' : '🔒 SAFE MODE ACTIVE'} 
          {' • '}
          API: {status?.api_enabled ? 'ENABLED' : 'DISABLED'}
          {' • '}
          OpenClaw: {status?.openclaw_enabled ? 'ENABLED' : 'DISABLED'}
          {' • '}
          Dispatch: {status?.dispatch_enabled ? 'ENABLED' : 'DISABLED'}
          {' • '}
          Mode: {status?.mode?.toUpperCase()}
        </div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: '11px', opacity: 0.8 }}>
          Last update: {lastUpdate.toLocaleTimeString()}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* TABS */}
      <div style={{
        display: 'flex',
        borderBottom: '1px solid #333',
        backgroundColor: '#0d0d0d',
        overflowX: 'auto'
      }}>
        {['overview', 'pipeline', 'active-tasks', 'missed', 'escalations', 'logs'].map(tab => (
          <button
            key={tab}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)}
            style={{
              padding: '12px 16px',
              backgroundColor: activeTab === tab ? '#FF5722' : 'transparent',
              border: 'none',
              color: '#fff',
              cursor: 'pointer',
              fontSize: '12px',
              fontWeight: activeTab === tab ? 'bold' : 'normal',
              whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
              borderBottom: activeTab === tab ? '3px solid #FF5722' : 'none'
            }}
          >
            {tab === 'overview' && '📊 OVERVIEW'}
            {tab === 'pipeline' && '🔄 PIPELINE'}
            {tab === 'active-tasks' && '⚙️ ACTIVE'}
            {tab === 'missed' && '❌ MISSED'}
            {tab === 'escalations' && '🚨 ESCALATIONS'}
            {tab === 'logs' && '📋 LOGS'}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CONTENT */}
      <div style={{ flex: 1, overflow: 'auto', padding: '16px' }}>
        {/* OVERVIEW TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'overview' && status && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#FF5722', marginBottom: '16px', margin: 0 }}>🎛️ ARC CONTINUITY CONTROL CENTER</h2>
            <p style={{ color: '#888', fontSize: '12px', marginBottom: '24px' }}>Agent task continuity, execution accountability and escalation monitoring</p>
            
            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)', gap: '12px', marginBottom: '24px' }}>
              <Card title="Last Run" value={new Date(status.last_run_at).toLocaleTimeString()} color="#4CAF50" />
              <Card title="Mode" value={status.mode.toUpperCase()} color={status.mode === 'dry_run' ? '#757575' : '#F44336'} />
              <Card title="API Calls" value={status.api_calls} color={status.api_calls > 0 ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50'} />
              <Card title="Files Scanned" value={status.task_files_scanned} color="#2196F3" />
            </div>

            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, 1fr)', gap: '12px' }}>
              <Card title="Active Tasks" value={status.active_runtime_tasks} color={getStatusColor(status.active_runtime_tasks)} />
              <Card title="Execution Requests" value={status.execution_requests} color={getStatusColor(status.execution_requests)} />
              <Card title="Missed Tasks" value={status.missed_tasks_found} color={status.missed_tasks_found > 0 ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50'} />
              <Card title="Retries" value={status.retry_items} color={status.retry_items > 0 ? '#FFC107' : '#4CAF50'} />
              <Card title="Escalations" value={status.escalations} color={status.escalations > 0 ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50'} />
              <Card title="Due Tasks" value={status.due_tasks_found} color={status.due_tasks_found > 0 ? '#FFC107' : '#4CAF50'} />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* PIPELINE TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'pipeline' && pipeline && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#FF5722', marginBottom: '24px' }}>📊 RUNTIME PIPELINE</h2>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-around', alignItems: 'center', height: '200px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>
              <PipelineNode label="Due" count={pipeline.due} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Active" count={pipeline.active} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Exec Req" count={pipeline.execution_requests} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Retry" count={pipeline.retries} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Escalate" count={pipeline.escalations} />
              <Arrow />
              <PipelineNode label="Dispatch" count={pipeline.dispatch_candidates} />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ACTIVE TASKS TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'active-tasks' && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#FF5722', marginBottom: '16px' }}>⚙️ ACTIVE TASKS</h2>
            {activeTasks.length === 0 ? (
              <p style={{ color: '#888' }}>No active tasks</p>
            ) : (
              <TasksTable tasks={activeTasks} />
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* MISSED TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'missed' && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#F44336', marginBottom: '16px' }}>❌ MISSED TASKS</h2>
            {missed.length === 0 ? (
              <p style={{ color: '#888' }}>No missed tasks</p>
            ) : (
              <TasksTable tasks={missed} highlight={true} />
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ESCALATIONS TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'escalations' && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#F44336', marginBottom: '16px' }}>🚨 ESCALATION CENTER</h2>
            {escalations.length === 0 ? (
              <p style={{ color: '#888' }}>No escalated tasks</p>
            ) : (
              <TasksTable tasks={escalations} highlight={true} />
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* LOGS TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'logs' && (
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ color: '#FF5722', marginBottom: '16px' }}>📋 SCHEDULER LOGS</h2>
            <pre style={{
              backgroundColor: '#0d0d0d',
              color: '#4CAF50',
              padding: '12px',
              borderRadius: '4px',
              overflow: 'auto',
              fontSize: '11px',
              fontFamily: 'monospace',
              maxHeight: '600px',
              border: '1px solid #333'
            }}>
              {logs || 'No logs available'}
            </pre>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

function Card({ title, value, color }) {
  return (
    <div style={{
      backgroundColor: '#0d0d0d',
      border: `2px solid ${color}`,
      borderRadius: '6px',
      padding: '12px',
      textAlign: 'center'
    }}>
      <div style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: '#888', marginBottom: '6px' }}>{title}</div>
      <div style={{ fontSize: '18px', fontWeight: 'bold', color }}>
        {typeof value === 'number' ? value : value}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

function PipelineNode({ label, count }) {
  return (
    <div style={{
      backgroundColor: count > 0 ? '#F44336' : '#4CAF50',
      color: '#fff',
      padding: '12px 16px',
      borderRadius: '6px',
      textAlign: 'center',
      minWidth: '80px'
    }}>
      <div style={{ fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{label}</div>
      <div style={{ fontSize: '18px', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{count}</div>
    </div>
  )
}

function Arrow() {
  return <div style={{ fontSize: '24px', color: '#555', margin: '0 8px' }}>→</div>
}

function TasksTable({ tasks, highlight }) {
  return (
    <div style={{ overflowX: 'auto' }}>
      <table style={{
        width: '100%',
        borderCollapse: 'collapse',
        fontSize: '12px'
      }}>
        <thead>
          <tr style={{ borderBottom: '2px solid #FF5722' }}>
            <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Task ID</th>
            <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Owner</th>
            <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Title</th>
            <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Status</th>
            <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Priority</th>
            <th style={{ textAlign: 'left', padding: '8px', color: '#FF5722' }}>Execute At</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {tasks.map((task, i) => (
            <tr key={i} style={{
              backgroundColor: i % 2 === 0 ? '#0d0d0d' : 'transparent',
              borderBottom: '1px solid #222',
              color: highlight ? '#F44336' : '#ccc'
            }}>
              <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>{task.task_id || 'N/A'}</td>
              <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>{task.owner || 'N/A'}</td>
              <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>{task.title || 'N/A'}</td>
              <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>
                <span style={{
                  backgroundColor: task.runtime_status === 'missed' ? '#F44336' : task.runtime_status === 'pending' ? '#FFC107' : '#4CAF50',
                  color: '#fff',
                  padding: '4px 8px',
                  borderRadius: '3px',
                  fontSize: '10px'
                }}>
                  {task.runtime_status || 'unknown'}
                </span>
              </td>
              <td style={{ padding: '8px' }}>{task.priority || 'N/A'}</td>
              <td style={{ padding: '8px', fontSize: '11px' }}>{task.execute_at ? new Date(task.execute_at).toLocaleTimeString() : 'N/A'}</td>
            </tr>
          ))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > ~/arc_ai_angels/mission_control/frontend-mcc/src/components/Viewport.jsx << 'EOF'
import React from 'react'
import Dashboard from './views/Dashboard'
import TasksView from './views/TasksView'
import AgentsView from './views/AgentsView'
import OmniLeadsView from './views/OmniLeadsView'
import ProjectsView from './views/ProjectsView'
import SimulationView from './views/SimulationView'
import AnalyticsView from './views/AnalyticsView'
import SchedulerView from './views/SchedulerView'

export default function Viewport({ view, health, agents, setSelectedAgent, theme }) {
  const renderView = () => {
    switch (view) {
      case 'dashboard':
        return <Dashboard health={health} agents={agents} theme={theme} />
      case 'agents':
        return <AgentsView agents={agents} setSelectedAgent={setSelectedAgent} theme={theme} />
      case 'omni-leads':
        return <OmniLeadsView theme={theme} />
      case 'projects':
        return <ProjectsView theme={theme} />
      case 'simulation':
        return <SimulationView theme={theme} />
      case 'scheduler':
        return <SchedulerView theme={theme} />
      case 'analytics':
        return <AnalyticsView health={health} theme={theme} />
      default:
        return <Dashboard health={health} agents={agents} theme={theme} />
    }
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }}>
      {renderView()}
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

bash
cat > ~/arc_ai_angels/mission_control/frontend-mcc/src/components/Sidebar.jsx << 'EOF'
import React from 'react'
import { THEMES } from '../themes'

export default function Sidebar({ view, setView, health, wsConnected, theme, setTheme, currentTheme }) {
  const menuItems = [
    { id: 'dashboard', label: '📊 Dashboard' },
    { id: 'agents', label: '🤖 Agents' },
    { id: 'omni-leads', label: '👥 Omni' },
    { id: 'projects', label: '💼 Projects' },
    { id: 'simulation', label: '🎬 Sim' },
    { id: 'scheduler', label: '🎛️ Scheduler' },
    { id: 'analytics', label: '📈 Analytics' },
  ]

  const themeList = Object.keys(THEMES)

  return (
    <div style={{
      width: '160px',
      backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bgSecondary,
      borderRight: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
      overflowY: 'auto',
      padding: '16px',
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100vh',
      boxSizing: 'border-box',
    }}>
      {/* HEADER */}
      <div style={{
        marginBottom: '24px',
        paddingBottom: '16px',
        borderBottom: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
      }}>
        <h1 style={{
          fontSize: '14px',
          color: currentTheme.colors.secondary,
          margin: 0,
          fontWeight: 'bold'
        }}>
          🤖 MCC
        </h1>
        <p style={{
          fontSize: '10px',
          color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted,
          margin: '4px 0 0 0'
        }}>
          v3.0
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* MENU ITEMS */}
      <nav style={{ flex: 1, marginBottom: '24px' }}>
        {menuItems.map(item => (
          <button
            key={item.id}
            onClick={() => setView(item.id)}
            style={{
              width: '100%',
              padding: '10px 12px',
              marginBottom: '8px',
              backgroundColor: view === item.id ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : 'transparent',
              border: `1px solid ${view === item.id ? currentTheme.colors.secondary : 'transparent'}`,
              color: view === item.id ? currentTheme.colors.bgPrimary : currentTheme.colors.text,
              cursor: 'pointer',
              borderRadius: '4px',
              fontSize: '12px',
              fontWeight: view === item.id ? 'bold' : 'normal',
              transition: 'all 0.2s'
            }}
          >
            {item.label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </nav>

      {/* STATUS */}
      <div style={{
        paddingTop: '16px',
        borderTop: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
        fontSize: '10px'
      }}>
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          marginBottom: '8px',
          color: wsConnected ? '#4CAF50' : '#F44336'
        }}>
          <span style={{
            width: '6px',
            height: '6px',
            borderRadius: '50%',
            backgroundColor: wsConnected ? '#4CAF50' : '#F44336',
            marginRight: '6px'
          }} />
          {wsConnected ? 'Connected' : 'Offline'}
        </div>
        <div style={{
          color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted,
          fontSize: '9px'
        }}>
          Health: {health?.status || 'unknown'}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* THEME SELECTOR */}
      <div style={{
        marginTop: '16px',
        paddingTop: '16px',
        borderTop: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`
      }}>
        <p style={{
          fontSize: '10px',
          color: currentTheme.colors.textMuted,
          margin: '0 0 8px 0'
        }}>
          Theme:
        </p>
        <select
          value={theme}
          onChange={(e) => setTheme(e.target.value)}
          style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '6px',
            backgroundColor: currentTheme.colors.bgPrimary,
            border: `1px solid ${currentTheme.colors.border}`,
            color: currentTheme.colors.text,
            borderRadius: '4px',
            fontSize: '10px',
            cursor: 'pointer'
          }}
        >
          {themeList.map(t => (
            <option key={t} value={t}>{t}</option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
